authors_text: Shiyu Feng,Ahmad Abuaish,Patricio A. Vela
title: Safer Gap: A Gap-based Local Planner for Safe Navigation with Nonholonomic Mobile Robots
title_zh: 更安全的间隙：基于间隙的局部规划器，用于非完整移动机器人的安全导航
abstract: This paper extends the gap-based navigation technique in Potential Gap by guaranteeing safety for nonholonomic robots for all tiers of the local planner hierarchy, so called Safer Gap. The first tier generates a Bezier-based collision-free path through gaps. A subset of navigable free-space from the robot through a gap, called the keyhole, is defined to be the union of the largest collision-free disc centered on the robot and a trapezoidal region directed through the gap. It is encoded by a shallow neural network zeroing barrier function (ZBF). Nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC), with Keyhole ZBF constraints and output tracking of the Bezier path, synthesizes a safe kinematically-feasible trajectory. Low-level use of the Keyhole ZBF within a point-wise optimization-based safe control synthesis module serves as a final safety layer. Simulation and experimental validation of Safer Gap confirm its collision-free navigation properties.
summary: This paper extends the gap-based navigation technique in Potential Gap by guaranteeing safety for nonholonomic robots for all tiers of the local planner hierarchy, so called Safer Gap. The first tier generates a Bezier-based collision-free path through gaps. A subset of navigable free-space from the robot through a gap, called the keyhole, is defined to be the union of the largest collision-free disc centered on the robot and a trapezoidal region directed through the gap. It is encoded by a shallow neural network zeroing barrier function (ZBF). Nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC), with Keyhole ZBF constraints and output tracking of the Bezier path, synthesizes a safe kinematically-feasible trajectory. Low-level use of the Keyhole ZBF within a point-wise optimization-based safe control synthesis module serves as a final safety layer. Simulation and experimental validation of Safer Gap confirm its collision-free navigation properties.
abstract_zh: 本文通过保证本地规划器层次结构所有层的非完整机器人的安全性，扩展了 Potential Gap 中基于间隙的导航技术，即所谓的 Safer Gap。第一层通过间隙生成基于贝塞尔曲线的无碰撞路径。从机器人穿过间隙的可导航自由空间的子集（称为钥匙孔）被定义为以机器人为中心的最大无碰撞圆盘与穿过间隙的梯形区域的并集。它由浅层神经网络归零屏障函数 (ZBF) 编码。非线性模型预测控制 (NMPC) 具有 Keyhole ZBF 约束和 Bezier 路径的输出跟踪，可合成安全的运动学可行轨迹。基于逐点优化的安全控制综合模块中 Keyhole ZBF 的低级使用充当最终安全层。 Safer Gap 的仿真和实验验证证实了其无碰撞导航特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于间隙的局部规划方法Safer Gap，确保非完整移动机器人在所有规划层级实现安全导航。
AI.motivation: 现有间隙导航技术难以保证非完整机器人运动学可行性与全层级安全性，需设计兼顾路径生成与动态避障的规划框架。
AI.method: 通过定义关键孔区域（包含最大安全圆与梯形通道）并用ZBF神经网络编码，结合NMPC轨迹优化与低层级安全控制模块实现安全导航。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明Safer Gap可有效保证非完整机器人碰撞自由的导航性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多层级安全约束设计，为非完整机器人提供了可靠的安全导航解决方案。

authors_text: Shyam Venkatasubramanian,Sandeep Gogineni,Bosung Kang,Ali Pezeshki,Muralidhar Rangaswamy,Vahid Tarokh
title: Subspace Perturbation Analysis for Data-Driven Radar Target Localization
title_zh: 数据驱动雷达目标定位的子空间扰动分析
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to 2023 IEEE Radar Conference (RadarConf). Extension of arXiv:2209.02890
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to 2023 IEEE Radar Conference (RadarConf). Extension of arXiv:2209.02890
abstract: Recent works exploring data-driven approaches to classical problems in adaptive radar have demonstrated promising results pertaining to the task of radar target localization. Via the use of space-time adaptive processing (STAP) techniques and convolutional neural networks, these data-driven approaches to target localization have helped benchmark the performance of neural networks for matched scenarios. However, the thorough bridging of these topics across mismatched scenarios still remains an open problem. As such, in this work, we augment our data-driven approach to radar target localization by performing a subspace perturbation analysis, which allows us to benchmark the localization accuracy of our proposed deep learning framework across mismatched scenarios. To evaluate this framework, we generate comprehensive datasets by randomly placing targets of variable strengths in mismatched constrained areas via RFView, a high-fidelity, site-specific modeling and simulation tool. For the radar returns from these constrained areas, we generate heatmap tensors in range, azimuth, and elevation using the normalized adaptive matched filter (NAMF) test statistic. We estimate target locations from these heatmap tensors using a convolutional neural network, and demonstrate that the predictive performance of our framework in the presence of mismatches can be predetermined.
summary: Recent works exploring data-driven approaches to classical problems in adaptive radar have demonstrated promising results pertaining to the task of radar target localization. Via the use of space-time adaptive processing (STAP) techniques and convolutional neural networks, these data-driven approaches to target localization have helped benchmark the performance of neural networks for matched scenarios. However, the thorough bridging of these topics across mismatched scenarios still remains an open problem. As such, in this work, we augment our data-driven approach to radar target localization by performing a subspace perturbation analysis, which allows us to benchmark the localization accuracy of our proposed deep learning framework across mismatched scenarios. To evaluate this framework, we generate comprehensive datasets by randomly placing targets of variable strengths in mismatched constrained areas via RFView, a high-fidelity, site-specific modeling and simulation tool. For the radar returns from these constrained areas, we generate heatmap tensors in range, azimuth, and elevation using the normalized adaptive matched filter (NAMF) test statistic. We estimate target locations from these heatmap tensors using a convolutional neural network, and demonstrate that the predictive performance of our framework in the presence of mismatches can be predetermined.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作探索了自适应雷达中经典问题的数据驱动方法，已经证明了与雷达目标定位任务相关的有希望的结果。通过使用时空自适应处理（STAP）技术和卷积神经网络，这些数据驱动的目标定位方法有助于对匹配场景的神经网络性能进行基准测试。然而，在不匹配的场景中彻底桥接这些主题仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。因此，在这项工作中，我们通过执行子空间扰动分析来增强数据驱动的雷达目标定位方法，这使我们能够在不匹配的场景中对我们提出的深度学习框架的定位精度进行基准测试。为了评估这个框架，我们通过 RFView（一种高保真、特定地点的建模和模拟工具）将不同强度的目标随机放置在不匹配的约束区域中，生成综合数据集。对于来自这些受限区域的雷达回波，我们使用归一化自适应匹配滤波器 (NAMF) 测试统计量生成距离、方位角和仰角的热图张量。我们使用卷积神经网络从这些热图张量估计目标位置，并证明我们的框架在存在不匹配的情况下的预测性能是可以预先确定的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于子空间扰动分析的数据驱动雷达目标定位方法，通过深度学习框架评估跨不匹配场景的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法在匹配场景下表现良好，但跨不匹配场景的性能评估仍存在挑战，需建立更普适的基准测试方法。
AI.method: 结合时频自适应处理（STAP）与卷积神经网络（CNN），利用RFView生成高保真数据集，通过归一化自适应匹配滤波（NAMF）生成三维热力图张量并训练CNN模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提框架可通过子空间扰动分析预判不匹配场景下的定位性能，验证了方法在复杂环境中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为雷达目标定位提供了跨场景性能评估的新范式，有效衔接了数据驱动方法与传统子空间理论分析。

authors_text: Pingping Cai,Zhenyao Wu,Xinyi Wu,Song Wang
title: Parametric Surface Constrained Upsampler Network for Point Cloud
title_zh: 点云参数化曲面约束上采样网络
abstract: Designing a point cloud upsampler, which aims to generate a clean and dense point cloud given a sparse point representation, is a fundamental and challenging problem in computer vision. A line of attempts achieves this goal by establishing a point-to-point mapping function via deep neural networks. However, these approaches are prone to produce outlier points due to the lack of explicit surface-level constraints. To solve this problem, we introduce a novel surface regularizer into the upsampler network by forcing the neural network to learn the underlying parametric surface represented by bicubic functions and rotation functions, where the new generated points are then constrained on the underlying surface. These designs are integrated into two different networks for two tasks that take advantages of upsampling layers - point cloud upsampling and point cloud completion for evaluation. The state-of-the-art experimental results on both tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/corecai163/PSCU.
summary: Designing a point cloud upsampler, which aims to generate a clean and dense point cloud given a sparse point representation, is a fundamental and challenging problem in computer vision. A line of attempts achieves this goal by establishing a point-to-point mapping function via deep neural networks. However, these approaches are prone to produce outlier points due to the lack of explicit surface-level constraints. To solve this problem, we introduce a novel surface regularizer into the upsampler network by forcing the neural network to learn the underlying parametric surface represented by bicubic functions and rotation functions, where the new generated points are then constrained on the underlying surface. These designs are integrated into two different networks for two tasks that take advantages of upsampling layers - point cloud upsampling and point cloud completion for evaluation. The state-of-the-art experimental results on both tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/corecai163/PSCU.
abstract_zh: 设计点云上采样器的目的是在给定稀疏点表示的情况下生成干净且密集的点云，是计算机视觉中的一个基本且具有挑战性的问题。通过深度神经网络建立点对点映射函数，一系列尝试实现了这一目标。然而，由于缺乏明确的表面水平约束，这些方法很容易产生异常点。为了解决这个问题，我们在上采样器网络中引入了一种新颖的表面正则化器，强制神经网络学习由双三次函数和旋转函数表示的底层参数化表面，然后将新生成的点约束在底层表面上。这些设计被集成到两个不同的网络中，用于利用上采样层的两项任务——点云上采样和点云完成评估。这两项任务的最新实验结果证明了所提出方法的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/corecai163/PSCU 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数化表面约束的点云上采样网络，旨在从稀疏点云生成密集且干净的点云。
AI.motivation: 现有点云上采样方法因缺乏显式表面约束，易生成离群点，导致结果不准确。
AI.method: 引入表面正则化项，强制网络学习双三次函数和旋转函数表示的参数化表面，约束生成点位于该表面，并应用于点云上采样与补全任务。
AI.result: 在点云上采样和补全任务中均取得最先进的实验结果，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数化表面约束，有效提升了点云上采样与补全的质量，验证了方法的优越性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种参数化表面约束的点云上采样网络，旨在从稀疏点云生成密集且干净的点云。
ai_content.motivation: 现有点云上采样方法因缺乏显式表面约束，易生成离群点，导致结果不准确。

ai_content.result: 在点云上采样和补全任务中均取得最先进的实验结果，代码已开源。

search_text: Parametric Surface Constrained Upsampler Network for Point Cloud 点云参数化曲面约束上采样网络 Designing a point cloud upsampler, which aims to generate a clean and dense point cloud given a sparse point representation, is a fundamental and challenging problem in computer vision. A line of attempts achieves this goal by establishing a point-to-point mapping function via deep neural networks. However, these approaches are prone to produce outlier points due to the lack of explicit surface-level constraints. To solve this problem, we introduce a novel surface regularizer into the upsampler network by forcing the neural network to learn the underlying parametric surface represented by bicubic functions and rotation functions, where the new generated points are then constrained on the underlying surface. These designs are integrated into two different networks for two tasks that take advantages of upsampling layers - point cloud upsampling and point cloud completion for evaluation. The state-of-the-art experimental results on both tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/corecai163/PSCU. 设计点云上采样器的目的是在给定稀疏点表示的情况下生成干净且密集的点云，是计算机视觉中的一个基本且具有挑战性的问题。通过深度神经网络建立点对点映射函数，一系列尝试实现了这一目标。然而，由于缺乏明确的表面水平约束，这些方法很容易产生异常点。为了解决这个问题，我们在上采样器网络中引入了一种新颖的表面正则化器，强制神经网络学习由双三次函数和旋转函数表示的底层参数化表面，然后将新生成的点约束在底层表面上。这些设计被集成到两个不同的网络中，用于利用上采样层的两项任务——点云上采样和点云完成评估。这两项任务的最新实验结果证明了所提出方法的有效性。该代码可在 https://github.com/corecai163/PSCU 获取。 本文提出一种参数化表面约束的点云上采样网络，旨在从稀疏点云生成密集且干净的点云。 Pingping Cai,Zhenyao Wu,Xinyi Wu,Song Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Tomas Kulvicius,Sigrun Lang,Claudius AA Widmann,Nina Hansmann,Daniel Holzinger,Luise Poustka,Dajie Zhang,Peter B Marschik
title: Facilitating deep acoustic phenotyping: A basic coding scheme of infant vocalisations preluding computational analysis, machine learning and clinical reasoning
title_zh: 促进深层声学表型：婴儿发声的基本编码方案，包括计算分析、机器学习和临床推理
abstract: Theoretical background: early verbal development is not yet fully understood, especially in its formative phase. Research question: can a reliable, easy-to-use coding scheme for the classification of early infant vocalizations be defined that is applicable as a basis for further analysis of language development? Methods: in a longitudinal study of 45 neurotypical infants, we analyzed vocalizations of the first 4 months of life. Audio segments were assigned to 5 classes: (1) Voiced and (2) Voiceless vocalizations; (3) Defined signal; (4) Non-target; (5) Nonassignable. Results: Two female coders with different experience achieved high agreement without intensive training. Discussion and Conclusion: The reliable scheme can be used in research and clinical settings for efficient coding of infant vocalizations, as a basis for detailed manual and machine analyses.
summary: Theoretical background: early verbal development is not yet fully understood, especially in its formative phase. Research question: can a reliable, easy-to-use coding scheme for the classification of early infant vocalizations be defined that is applicable as a basis for further analysis of language development? Methods: in a longitudinal study of 45 neurotypical infants, we analyzed vocalizations of the first 4 months of life. Results: Two female coders with different experience achieved high agreement without intensive training. Discussion and Conclusion: The reliable scheme can be used in research and clinical settings for efficient coding of infant vocalizations, as a basis for detailed manual and machine analyses.
abstract_zh: 理论背景：早期语言发展尚未完全被理解，特别是在其形成阶段。研究问题：能否定义一个可靠、易于使用的早期婴儿发声分类编码方案，作为进一步分析语言发展的基础？方法：在对 45 名神经正常婴儿的纵向研究中，我们分析了生命前 4 个月的发声情况。音频片段被分配到 5 个类别：(1) 有声发声和 (2) 无声发声； (3) 定义信号； （4）非目标； (5) 不可转让。结果：两名具有不同经验的女性编码员在没有经过强化培训的情况下达到了很高的一致性。讨论和结论：可靠的方案可用于研究和临床环境中，以对婴儿发声进行有效编码，作为详细的手动和机器分析的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可靠的婴儿发声分类编码方案，为后续计算分析、机器学习和临床推理提供基础。
AI.motivation: 早期语言发育机制尚未完全明确，缺乏适用于婴儿发声分类的可靠且易用的编码系统，阻碍了进一步分析。
AI.method: 对45名神经发育正常婴儿的前4个月发声进行纵向研究，将音频片段分为5类，并由两名经验不同的编码者进行标注。
AI.result: 两名编码者在未接受密集培训的情况下达成高一致性，验证了该分类方案的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该编码方案可有效应用于研究和临床场景，为手动分析与机器学习模型提供标准化数据基础。

authors_text: Dvij Kalaria,Qin Lin,John M. Dolan
title: Adaptive Planning and Control with Time-Varying Tire Models for Autonomous Racing Using Extreme Learning Machine
title_zh: 使用极限学习机进行自动赛车时变轮胎模型的自适应规划和控制
abstract: Autonomous racing is a challenging problem, as the vehicle needs to operate at the friction or handling limits in order to achieve minimum lap times. Autonomous race cars require highly accurate perception, state estimation, planning and precise application of controls. What makes it even more challenging is the accurate identification of vehicle model parameters that dictate the effects of the lateral tire slip, which may change over time, for example, due to wear and tear of the tires. Current works either propose model identification offline or need good parameters to start with (within 15-20\% of actual value), which is not enough to account for major changes in tire model that occur during actual races when driving at the control limits. We propose a unified framework which learns the tire model online from the collected data, as well as adjusts the model based on environmental changes even if the model parameters change by a higher margin. We demonstrate our approach in numeric and high-fidelity simulators for a 1:43 scale race car and a full-size car.
summary: Autonomous racing is a challenging problem, as the vehicle needs to operate at the friction or handling limits in order to achieve minimum lap times. Autonomous race cars require highly accurate perception, state estimation, planning and precise application of controls. What makes it even more challenging is the accurate identification of vehicle model parameters that dictate the effects of the lateral tire slip, which may change over time, for example, due to wear and tear of the tires. Current works either propose model identification offline or need good parameters to start with (within 15-20\% of actual value), which is not enough to account for major changes in tire model that occur during actual races when driving at the control limits. We propose a unified framework which learns the tire model online from the collected data, as well as adjusts the model based on environmental changes even if the model parameters change by a higher margin. We demonstrate our approach in numeric and high-fidelity simulators for a 1:43 scale race car and a full-size car.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶赛车是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为车辆需要在摩擦或操控极限下运行才能实现最短的单圈时间。自动赛车需要高度准确的感知、状态估计、规划和精确的控制应用。更具挑战性的是准确识别车辆模型参数，这些参数决定了轮胎横向滑移的影响，这些参数可能会随着时间的推移而变化，例如，由于轮胎的磨损。目前的工作要么提出离线模型识别，要么需要良好的参数来开始（实际值的 15-20% 以内），这不足以解释在实际比赛中在控制极限下行驶时轮胎模型发生的重大变化。我们提出了一个统一的框架，可以从收集的数据中在线学习轮胎模型，并根据环境变化调整模型，即使模型参数变化幅度较大。我们在 1:43 比例赛车和全尺寸汽车的数字和高保真模拟器中展示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于极端学习机的在线轮胎模型学习框架，用于自动驾驶赛车中的自适应规划和控制，以应对轮胎参数随时间变化的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶赛车方法依赖离线模型或初始参数误差较小的模型，无法适应实际比赛中轮胎磨损导致的显著参数变化，影响控制精度和性能。
AI.method: 提出统一框架，结合极端学习机实时学习轮胎模型参数，并根据环境变化动态调整模型，即使参数变化范围较大时仍能保持适应性。
AI.result: 在数值模拟和高保真赛车仿真环境中验证了方法的有效性，适用于1:43比例车模和全尺寸赛车。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效应对轮胎模型参数的动态变化，提升自动驾驶赛车在极限工况下的规划与控制性能。

authors_text: Rindranirina Ramamonjison,Timothy T. Yu,Raymond Li,Haley Li,Giuseppe Carenini,Bissan Ghaddar,Shiqi He,Mahdi Mostajabdaveh,Amin Banitalebi-Dehkordi,Zirui Zhou,Yong Zhang
title: NL4Opt Competition: Formulating Optimization Problems Based on Their Natural Language Descriptions
title_zh: NL4Opt 竞赛：根据自然语言描述制定优化问题
abstract: The Natural Language for Optimization (NL4Opt) Competition was created to investigate methods of extracting the meaning and formulation of an optimization problem based on its text description. Specifically, the goal of the competition is to increase the accessibility and usability of optimization solvers by allowing non-experts to interface with them using natural language. We separate this challenging goal into two sub-tasks: (1) recognize and label the semantic entities that correspond to the components of the optimization problem; (2) generate a meaning representation (i.e., a logical form) of the problem from its detected problem entities. The first task aims to reduce ambiguity by detecting and tagging the entities of the optimization problems. The second task creates an intermediate representation of the linear programming (LP) problem that is converted into a format that can be used by commercial solvers. In this report, we present the LP word problem dataset and shared tasks for the NeurIPS 2022 competition. Furthermore, we investigate and compare the performance of the ChatGPT large language model against the winning solutions. Through this competition, we hope to bring interest towards the development of novel machine learning applications and datasets for optimization modeling.

Specifically, the goal of the competition is to increase the accessibility and usability of optimization solvers by allowing non-experts to interface with them using natural language. We separate this challenging goal into two sub-tasks: (1) recognize and label the semantic entities that correspond to the components of the optimization problem; (2) generate a meaning representation (i.e., a logical form) of the problem from its detected problem entities. The first task aims to reduce ambiguity by detecting and tagging the entities of the optimization problems. The second task creates an intermediate representation of the linear programming (LP) problem that is converted into a format that can be used by commercial solvers. In this report, we present the LP word problem dataset and shared tasks for the NeurIPS 2022 competition. Furthermore, we investigate and compare the performance of the ChatGPT large language model against the winning solutions. Through this competition, we hope to bring interest towards the development of novel machine learning applications and datasets for optimization modeling.
abstract_zh: 优化自然语言 (NL4Opt) 竞赛旨在研究根据文本描述提取优化问题的含义和表述的方法。具体来说，竞赛的目标是通过允许非专家使用自然语言与优化求解器交互来提高优化求解器的可访问性和可用性。我们将这个具有挑战性的目标分为两个子任务：（1）识别并标记与优化问题的组成部分相对应的语义实体； （2）从检测到的问题实体生成问题的含义表示（即逻辑形式）。第一项任务旨在通过检测和标记优化问题的实体来减少歧义。第二个任务创建线性规划 (LP) 问题的中间表示，并将其转换为商业求解器可以使用的格式。在本报告中，我们介绍了 NeurIPS 2022 竞赛的 LP 应用题数据集和共享任务。此外，我们还研究并比较了 ChatGPT 大语言模型与获胜解决方案的性能。通过这次比赛，我们希望引起人们对开发新颖的机器学习应用程序和优化建模数据集的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 通过自然语言描述构建优化问题的竞赛，旨在提升非专家对优化求解器的使用能力。
AI.motivation: 提升非专家用户使用优化求解器的便捷性，通过自然语言接口降低使用门槛。
AI.method: 将任务拆分为实体识别与逻辑形式生成，构建LP数据集，并比较不同模型性能。
AI.result: 展示了ChatGPT与竞赛优胜方案的性能对比，推动相关数据集和模型的发展。
AI.conclusion: 通过竞赛推动优化建模的机器学习应用与数据集开发，促进自然语言处理与优化领域的结合。

authors_text: Stephen McCrory,Sylvain Bertrand,Achintya Mohan,Duncan Calvert,Jerry Pratt,Robert Griffin
title: Generating Humanoid Multi-Contact through Feasibility Visualization
title_zh: 通过可行性可视化生成人形多重接触
abstract: We present a feasibility-driven teleoperation framework designed to generate humanoid multi-contact maneuvers for use in unstructured environments. Our framework is designed for motions with arbitrary contact modes and postures. The operator configures a pre-execution preview robot through contact points and kinematic tasks. A fast estimation of the preview robot's quasi-static feasibility is performed by checking contact stability and collisions along an interpolated trajectory. A visualization of Center of Mass (CoM) stability margin, based on friction and actuation constraints, is displayed and can be previewed if the operator chooses to add or remove contacts. Contact points can be placed anywhere on a mesh approximation of the robot surface, enabling motions with knee or forearm contacts. We demonstrate our approach in simulation and hardware on a NASA Valkyrie humanoid, focusing on multi-contact trajectories which are challenging to generate autonomously or through alternative teleoperation approaches.
summary: We present a feasibility-driven teleoperation framework designed to generate humanoid multi-contact maneuvers for use in unstructured environments. Our framework is designed for motions with arbitrary contact modes and postures. The operator configures a pre-execution preview robot through contact points and kinematic tasks. A fast estimation of the preview robot's quasi-static feasibility is performed by checking contact stability and collisions along an interpolated trajectory. A visualization of Center of Mass (CoM) stability margin, based on friction and actuation constraints, is displayed and can be previewed if the operator chooses to add or remove contacts. Contact points can be placed anywhere on a mesh approximation of the robot surface, enabling motions with knee or forearm contacts. We demonstrate our approach in simulation and hardware on a NASA Valkyrie humanoid, focusing on multi-contact trajectories which are challenging to generate autonomously or through alternative teleoperation approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可行性驱动的远程操作框架，旨在生成用于非结构化环境的人形多接触机动。我们的框架专为任意接触模式和姿势的运动而设计。操作员通过接触点和运动学任务配置预执行预览机器人。通过检查沿插值轨迹的接触稳定性和碰撞，可以快速估计预览机器人的准静态可行性。显示基于摩擦和驱动约束的质心 (CoM) 稳定性裕度的可视化效果，如果操作员选择添加或删除接触，则可以预览该效果。接触点可以放置在机器人表面网格近似上的任何位置，从而可以通过膝盖或前臂接触进行运动。我们在 NASA Valkyrie 人形机器人上展示了我们的模拟和硬件方法，重点关注难以自主生成或通过替代远程操作方法生成的多接触轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可行性可视化的遥操作框架，用于在非结构化环境中生成人形机器人的多接触动作。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以自主生成或通过传统遥操作生成复杂多接触轨迹，需更直观的交互方式确保运动可行性。
AI.method: 通过预执行配置接触点和运动学任务，结合准静态可行性快速评估与可视化质心稳定性边距，支持动态调整接触点并利用网格表面近似实现复杂接触。
AI.result: 在模拟与NASA Valkyrie机器人上验证了框架有效性，成功生成传统方法难以处理的多接触轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过可视化辅助操作者生成可行的多接触动作，解决了复杂环境中人形机器人运动规划的难题。

authors_text: Hao Yu,Zheng Qin,Ji Hou,Mahdi Saleh,Dongsheng Li,Benjamin Busam,Slobodan Ilic
title: Rotation-Invariant Transformer for Point Cloud Matching
title_zh: 用于点云匹配的旋转不变变压器
abstract: The intrinsic rotation invariance lies at the core of matching point clouds with handcrafted descriptors. However, it is widely despised by recent deep matchers that obtain the rotation invariance extrinsically via data augmentation. As the finite number of augmented rotations can never span the continuous SO(3) space, these methods usually show instability when facing rotations that are rarely seen. To this end, we introduce RoITr, a Rotation-Invariant Transformer to cope with the pose variations in the point cloud matching task. We contribute both on the local and global levels. Starting from the local level, we introduce an attention mechanism embedded with Point Pair Feature (PPF)-based coordinates to describe the pose-invariant geometry, upon which a novel attention-based encoder-decoder architecture is constructed. We further propose a global transformer with rotation-invariant cross-frame spatial awareness learned by the self-attention mechanism, which significantly improves the feature distinctiveness and makes the model robust with respect to the low overlap. Experiments are conducted on both the rigid and non-rigid public benchmarks, where RoITr outperforms all the state-of-the-art models by a considerable margin in the low-overlapping scenarios. Especially when the rotations are enlarged on the challenging 3DLoMatch benchmark, RoITr surpasses the existing methods by at least 13 and 5 percentage points in terms of Inlier Ratio and Registration Recall, respectively.
summary: The intrinsic rotation invariance lies at the core of matching point clouds with handcrafted descriptors. However, it is widely despised by recent deep matchers that obtain the rotation invariance extrinsically via data augmentation. As the finite number of augmented rotations can never span the continuous SO(3) space, these methods usually show instability when facing rotations that are rarely seen. To this end, we introduce RoITr, a Rotation-Invariant Transformer to cope with the pose variations in the point cloud matching task. We contribute both on the local and global levels. Starting from the local level, we introduce an attention mechanism embedded with Point Pair Feature (PPF)-based coordinates to describe the pose-invariant geometry, upon which a novel attention-based encoder-decoder architecture is constructed. We further propose a global transformer with rotation-invariant cross-frame spatial awareness learned by the self-attention mechanism, which significantly improves the feature distinctiveness and makes the model robust with respect to the low overlap. Experiments are conducted on both the rigid and non-rigid public benchmarks, where RoITr outperforms all the state-of-the-art models by a considerable margin in the low-overlapping scenarios. Especially when the rotations are enlarged on the challenging 3DLoMatch benchmark, RoITr surpasses the existing methods by at least 13 and 5 percentage points in terms of Inlier Ratio and Registration Recall, respectively.
abstract_zh: 内在的旋转不变性是点云与手工描述符匹配的核心。然而，它被最近的深度匹配器广泛鄙视，这些匹配器通过数据增强从外部获得旋转不变性。由于有限数量的增广旋转永远无法跨越连续的 SO(3) 空间，因此这些方法在面对罕见的旋转时通常表现出不稳定。为此，我们引入了 RoITr，一种旋转不变变换器来应对点云匹配任务中的姿态变化。我们在本地和全球层面做出贡献。从局部层面开始，我们引入了一种嵌入基于点对特征（PPF）的坐标的注意力机制来描述姿势不变几何，并在此基础上构建了一种新颖的基于注意力的编码器-解码器架构。我们进一步提出了一种通过自注意力机制学习的具有旋转不变跨帧空间意识的全局变换器，这显着提高了特征的独特性并使模型在低重叠方面具有鲁棒性。在严格和非严格的公共基准上进行了实验，其中 RoITr 在低重叠场景中明显优于所有最先进的模型。特别是当在具有挑战性的 3DLoMatch 基准上扩大旋转时，RoITr 在 Inlier Ratio 和 Registration Recall 方面分别超过现有方法至少 13 个和 5 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种旋转不变的Transformer模型（RoITr），用于解决点云匹配中因旋转变化导致的匹配不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度匹配方法通过有限的数据增强实现旋转不变性，无法覆盖连续的SO(3)空间，导致面对罕见旋转时性能不稳定。
AI.method: 在局部层面引入基于点对特征（PPF）坐标的注意力机制构建编码器-解码器结构；在全局层面设计自注意力驱动的旋转不变跨帧空间感知Transformer，提升特征区分度和低重叠场景鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在刚性和非刚性基准测试中，RoITr在低重叠场景下显著优于现有方法，尤其在3DLoMatch基准上Inlier Ratio和Registration Recall分别提升13%和5%以上。
AI.conclusion: RoITr通过局部几何描述与全局旋转不变机制的结合，有效解决了点云匹配中的姿态变化问题，验证了其在低重叠和大旋转场景下的优越性。

tldr: 本文提出一种旋转不变的Transformer模型（RoITr），用于解决点云匹配中因旋转变化导致的匹配不稳定问题。
motivation: 现有深度匹配方法通过有限的数据增强实现旋转不变性，无法覆盖连续的SO(3)空间，导致面对罕见旋转时性能不稳定。
method: 在局部层面引入基于点对特征（PPF）坐标的注意力机制构建编码器-解码器结构；在全局层面设计自注意力驱动的旋转不变跨帧空间感知Transformer，提升特征区分度和低重叠场景鲁棒性。

conclusion: RoITr通过局部几何描述与全局旋转不变机制的结合，有效解决了点云匹配中的姿态变化问题，验证了其在低重叠和大旋转场景下的优越性。
search_text: Rotation-Invariant Transformer for Point Cloud Matching 用于点云匹配的旋转不变变压器 The intrinsic rotation invariance lies at the core of matching point clouds with handcrafted descriptors. However, it is widely despised by recent deep matchers that obtain the rotation invariance extrinsically via data augmentation. As the finite number of augmented rotations can never span the continuous SO(3) space, these methods usually show instability when facing rotations that are rarely seen. To this end, we introduce RoITr, a Rotation-Invariant Transformer to cope with the pose variations in the point cloud matching task. We contribute both on the local and global levels. Starting from the local level, we introduce an attention mechanism embedded with Point Pair Feature (PPF)-based coordinates to describe the pose-invariant geometry, upon which a novel attention-based encoder-decoder architecture is constructed. We further propose a global transformer with rotation-invariant cross-frame spatial awareness learned by the self-attention mechanism, which significantly improves the feature distinctiveness and makes the model robust with respect to the low overlap. Experiments are conducted on both the rigid and non-rigid public benchmarks, where RoITr outperforms all the state-of-the-art models by a considerable margin in the low-overlapping scenarios. Especially when the rotations are enlarged on the challenging 3DLoMatch benchmark, RoITr surpasses the existing methods by at least 13 and 5 percentage points in terms of Inlier Ratio and Registration Recall, respectively. 内在的旋转不变性是点云与手工描述符匹配的核心。然而，它被最近的深度匹配器广泛鄙视，这些匹配器通过数据增强从外部获得旋转不变性。由于有限数量的增广旋转永远无法跨越连续的 SO(3) 空间，因此这些方法在面对罕见的旋转时通常表现出不稳定。为此，我们引入了 RoITr，一种旋转不变变换器来应对点云匹配任务中的姿态变化。我们在本地和全球层面做出贡献。从局部层面开始，我们引入了一种嵌入基于点对特征（PPF）的坐标的注意力机制来描述姿势不变几何，并在此基础上构建了一种新颖的基于注意力的编码器-解码器架构。我们进一步提出了一种通过自注意力机制学习的具有旋转不变跨帧空间意识的全局变换器，这显着提高了特征的独特性并使模型在低重叠方面具有鲁棒性。在严格和非严格的公共基准上进行了实验，其中 RoITr 在低重叠场景中明显优于所有最先进的模型。特别是当在具有挑战性的 3DLoMatch 基准上扩大旋转时，RoITr 在 Inlier Ratio 和 Registration Recall 方面分别超过现有方法至少 13 个和 5 个百分点。 本文提出一种旋转不变的Transformer模型（RoITr），用于解决点云匹配中因旋转变化导致的匹配不稳定问题。 Hao Yu,Zheng Qin,Ji Hou,Mahdi Saleh,Dongsheng Li,Benjamin Busam,Slobodan Ilic cs.CV

authors_text: Mahdi Taheri,Mohammad Riazati,Mohammad Hasan Ahmadilivani,Maksim Jenihhin,Masoud Daneshtalab,Jaan Raik,Mikael Sjodin,Bjorn Lisper
title: DeepAxe: A Framework for Exploration of Approximation and Reliability Trade-offs in DNN Accelerators
title_zh: DeepAxe：DNN 加速器中近似值和可靠性权衡探索的框架
comment: This paper is accepted at the 24th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED) 2023, 8 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
comments: This paper is accepted at the 24th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED) 2023, 8 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
abstract: While the role of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in a wide range of safety-critical applications is expanding, emerging DNNs experience massive growth in terms of computation power. It raises the necessity of improving the reliability of DNN accelerators yet reducing the computational burden on the hardware platforms, i.e. reducing the energy consumption and execution time as well as increasing the efficiency of DNN accelerators. Therefore, the trade-off between hardware performance, i.e. area, power and delay, and the reliability of the DNN accelerator implementation becomes critical and requires tools for analysis. In this paper, we propose a framework DeepAxe for design space exploration for FPGA-based implementation of DNNs by considering the trilateral impact of applying functional approximation on accuracy, reliability and hardware performance. The framework enables selective approximation of reliability-critical DNNs, providing a set of Pareto-optimal DNN implementation design space points for the target resource utilization requirements. The design flow starts with a pre-trained network in Keras, uses an innovative high-level synthesis environment DeepHLS and results in a set of Pareto-optimal design space points as a guide for the designer. The framework is demonstrated in a case study of custom and state-of-the-art DNNs and datasets.
summary: While the role of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) in a wide range of safety-critical applications is expanding, emerging DNNs experience massive growth in terms of computation power. It raises the necessity of improving the reliability of DNN accelerators yet reducing the computational burden on the hardware platforms, i.e. reducing the energy consumption and execution time as well as increasing the efficiency of DNN accelerators. Therefore, the trade-off between hardware performance, i.e. area, power and delay, and the reliability of the DNN accelerator implementation becomes critical and requires tools for analysis. In this paper, we propose a framework DeepAxe for design space exploration for FPGA-based implementation of DNNs by considering the trilateral impact of applying functional approximation on accuracy, reliability and hardware performance. The framework enables selective approximation of reliability-critical DNNs, providing a set of Pareto-optimal DNN implementation design space points for the target resource utilization requirements. The design flow starts with a pre-trained network in Keras, uses an innovative high-level synthesis environment DeepHLS and results in a set of Pareto-optimal design space points as a guide for the designer. The framework is demonstrated in a case study of custom and state-of-the-art DNNs and datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 在各种安全关键应用中的作用正在扩大，但新兴的 DNN 在计算能力方面经历了巨大的增长。这就提出了提高DNN加速器可靠性的必要性，同时减少硬件平台的计算负担，即减少能耗和执行时间，并提高DNN加速器的效率。因此，硬件性能（即面积、功耗和延迟）与 DNN 加速器实现的可靠性之间的权衡变得至关重要，并且需要分析工具。在本文中，我们考虑到应用函数逼近对准确性、可靠性和硬件性能的三方面影响，提出了一个框架 DeepAxe，用于基于 FPGA 实现 DNN 的设计空间探索。该框架能够选择性逼近可靠性关键的 DNN，为目标资源利用要求提供一组帕累托最优 DNN 实现设计空间点。设计流程从 Keras 中的预训练网络开始，使用创新的高级综合环境 DeepHLS，并产生一组帕累托最优设计空间点作为设计人员的指南。该框架在定制和最先进的 DNN 和数据集的案例研究中得到了演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepAxe框架，用于探索DNN加速器中近似与可靠性的权衡，优化硬件性能。
AI.motivation: 随着DNN在安全关键场景的广泛应用，其计算需求激增，需在提升可靠性的同时降低硬件资源消耗，现有工具难以有效分析这种权衡关系。
AI.method: 基于FPGA实现，结合DeepHLS高阶综合环境，通过三元影响分析（准确率、可靠性、硬件性能）生成帕累托最优设计空间点。
AI.result: 框架在定制及主流DNN模型与数据集上验证有效，可为设计者提供满足资源约束的优化方案。
AI.conclusion: DeepAxe为DNN加速器设计提供了系统化权衡分析工具，在资源限制下实现可靠性与效率的平衡。

It raises the necessity of improving the reliability of DNN accelerators yet reducing the computational burden on the hardware platforms, i.e. reducing the energy consumption and execution time as well as increasing the efficiency of DNN accelerators. Therefore, the trade-off between hardware performance, i.e. area, power and delay, and the reliability of the DNN accelerator implementation becomes critical and requires tools for analysis. In this paper, we propose a framework DeepAxe for design space exploration for FPGA-based implementation of DNNs by considering the trilateral impact of applying functional approximation on accuracy, reliability and hardware performance. authors_text: Hao Tang,Zhenyu Zhang,Humphrey Shi,Bo Li,Ling Shao,Nicu Sebe,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Graph Transformer GANs for Graph-Constrained House Generation
title_zh: 用于图约束房屋生成的图 Transformer GAN
abstract: We present a novel graph Transformer generative adversarial network (GTGAN) to learn effective graph node relations in an end-to-end fashion for the challenging graph-constrained house generation task. The proposed graph-Transformer-based generator includes a novel graph Transformer encoder that combines graph convolutions and self-attentions in a Transformer to model both local and global interactions across connected and non-connected graph nodes. Specifically, the proposed connected node attention (CNA) and non-connected node attention (NNA) aim to capture the global relations across connected nodes and non-connected nodes in the input graph, respectively. The proposed graph modeling block (GMB) aims to exploit local vertex interactions based on a house layout topology. Moreover, we propose a new node classification-based discriminator to preserve the high-level semantic and discriminative node features for different house components. Finally, we propose a novel graph-based cycle-consistency loss that aims at maintaining the relative spatial relationships between ground truth and predicted graphs. Experiments on two challenging graph-constrained house generation tasks (i.e., house layout and roof generation) with two public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of GTGAN in terms of objective quantitative scores and subjective visual realism. New state-of-the-art results are established by large margins on both tasks.
summary: We present a novel graph Transformer generative adversarial network (GTGAN) to learn effective graph node relations in an end-to-end fashion for the challenging graph-constrained house generation task. The proposed graph-Transformer-based generator includes a novel graph Transformer encoder that combines graph convolutions and self-attentions in a Transformer to model both local and global interactions across connected and non-connected graph nodes. Specifically, the proposed connected node attention (CNA) and non-connected node attention (NNA) aim to capture the global relations across connected nodes and non-connected nodes in the input graph, respectively. The proposed graph modeling block (GMB) aims to exploit local vertex interactions based on a house layout topology. Moreover, we propose a new node classification-based discriminator to preserve the high-level semantic and discriminative node features for different house components. Finally, we propose a novel graph-based cycle-consistency loss that aims at maintaining the relative spatial relationships between ground truth and predicted graphs. Experiments on two challenging graph-constrained house generation tasks (i.e., house layout and roof generation) with two public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of GTGAN in terms of objective quantitative scores and subjective visual realism. New state-of-the-art results are established by large margins on both tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的图 Transformer 生成对抗网络（GTGAN），以端到端的方式学习有效的图节点关系，以应对具有挑战性的图约束房屋生成任务。所提出的基于图 Transformer 的生成器包括一种新颖的图 Transformer 编码器，它将图卷积和自注意力结合在 Transformer 中，以对连接和非连接图节点之间的局部和全局交互进行建模。具体来说，所提出的连接节点注意（CNA）和非连接节点注意（NNA）旨在分别捕获输入图中连接节点和非连接节点之间的全局关系。所提出的图建模块（GMB）旨在利用基于房屋布局拓扑的局部顶点交互。此外，我们提出了一种新的基于节点分类的鉴别器，以保留不同房屋组件的高级语义和判别节点特征。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于图的循环一致性损失，旨在维持真实图和预测图之间的相对空间关系。使用两个公共数据集对两个具有挑战性的图形约束房屋生成任务（即房屋布局和屋顶生成）进行的实验证明了 GTGAN 在客观定量得分和主观视觉真实感方面的有效性。在这两项任务上都取得了巨大的新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图Transformer的生成对抗网络（GTGAN），用于在图约束条件下生成房屋布局和屋顶结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时建模图中连接节点与非连接节点的全局关系，且缺乏对房屋拓扑结构的局部交互建模，导致生成效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含图卷积与自注意力机制的图Transformer编码器，提出连接节点注意力（CNA）与非连接节点注意力（NNA）模块，结合局部顶点交互的图建模块（GMB），并采用基于节点分类的判别器与图循环一致性损失函数。
AI.result: 在两个房屋生成数据集上取得客观指标与视觉真实感的显著提升，两项任务均达到新状态-of-the-art水平。
AI.conclusion: GTGAN通过融合全局与局部图结构建模机制，有效解决了图约束房屋生成任务中的关键挑战，验证了方法的有效性与先进性。

method: 设计包含图卷积与自注意力机制的图Transformer编码器，提出连接节点注意力（CNA）与非连接节点注意力（NNA）模块，结合局部顶点交互的图建模块（GMB），并采用基于节点分类的判别器与图循环一致性损失函数。
result: 在两个房屋生成数据集上取得客观指标与视觉真实感的显著提升，两项任务均达到新状态-of-the-art水平。
conclusion: GTGAN通过融合全局与局部图结构建模机制，有效解决了图约束房屋生成任务中的关键挑战，验证了方法的有效性与先进性。
search_text: Graph Transformer GANs for Graph-Constrained House Generation 用于图约束房屋生成的图 Transformer GAN We present a novel graph Transformer generative adversarial network (GTGAN) to learn effective graph node relations in an end-to-end fashion for the challenging graph-constrained house generation task. The proposed graph-Transformer-based generator includes a novel graph Transformer encoder that combines graph convolutions and self-attentions in a Transformer to model both local and global interactions across connected and non-connected graph nodes. Specifically, the proposed connected node attention (CNA) and non-connected node attention (NNA) aim to capture the global relations across connected nodes and non-connected nodes in the input graph, respectively. The proposed graph modeling block (GMB) aims to exploit local vertex interactions based on a house layout topology. Moreover, we propose a new node classification-based discriminator to preserve the high-level semantic and discriminative node features for different house components. Finally, we propose a novel graph-based cycle-consistency loss that aims at maintaining the relative spatial relationships between ground truth and predicted graphs. Experiments on two challenging graph-constrained house generation tasks (i.e., house layout and roof generation) with two public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of GTGAN in terms of objective quantitative scores and subjective visual realism. New state-of-the-art results are established by large margins on both tasks. 我们提出了一种新颖的图 Transformer 生成对抗网络（GTGAN），以端到端的方式学习有效的图节点关系，以应对具有挑战性的图约束房屋生成任务。所提出的基于图 Transformer 的生成器包括一种新颖的图 Transformer 编码器，它将图卷积和自注意力结合在 Transformer 中，以对连接和非连接图节点之间的局部和全局交互进行建模。具体来说，所提出的连接节点注意（CNA）和非连接节点注意（NNA）旨在分别捕获输入图中连接节点和非连接节点之间的全局关系。所提出的图建模块（GMB）旨在利用基于房屋布局拓扑的局部顶点交互。此外，我们提出了一种新的基于节点分类的鉴别器，以保留不同房屋组件的高级语义和判别节点特征。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于图的循环一致性损失，旨在维持真实图和预测图之间的相对空间关系。使用两个公共数据集对两个具有挑战性的图形约束房屋生成任务（即房屋布局和屋顶生成）进行的实验证明了 GTGAN 在客观定量得分和主观视觉真实感方面的有效性。在这两项任务上都取得了巨大的新的最先进的结果。 本文提出一种基于图Transformer的生成对抗网络（GTGAN），用于在图约束条件下生成房屋布局和屋顶结构。 Hao Tang,Zhenyu Zhang,Humphrey Shi,Bo Li,Ling Shao,Nicu Sebe,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Nikhil J. Dhinagar,Vignesh Santhalingam,Katherine E. Lawrence,Emily Laltoo,Paul M. Thompson
title: Few-Shot Classification of Autism Spectrum Disorder using Site-Agnostic Meta-Learning and Brain MRI
title_zh: 使用站点不可知元学习和脑 MRI 对自闭症谱系障碍进行少样本分类
abstract: For machine learning applications in medical imaging, the availability of training data is often limited, which hampers the design of radiological classifiers for subtle conditions such as autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Transfer learning is one method to counter this problem of low training data regimes. Here we explore the use of meta-learning for very low data regimes in the context of having prior data from multiple sites - an approach we term site-agnostic meta-learning. Inspired by the effectiveness of meta-learning for optimizing a model across multiple tasks, here we propose a framework to adapt it to learn across multiple sites. We tested our meta-learning model for classifying ASD versus typically developing controls in 2,201 T1-weighted (T1-w) MRI scans collected from 38 imaging sites as part of Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange (ABIDE) [age: 5.2-64.0 years]. The method was trained to find a good initialization state for our model that can quickly adapt to data from new unseen sites by fine-tuning on the limited data that is available. The proposed method achieved an ROC-AUC=0.857 on 370 scans from 7 unseen sites in ABIDE using a few-shot setting of 2-way 20-shot i.e., 20 training samples per site. Our results outperformed a transfer learning baseline by generalizing across a wider range of sites as well as other related prior work. We also tested our model in a zero-shot setting on an independent test site without any additional fine-tuning. Our experiments show the promise of the proposed site-agnostic meta-learning framework for challenging neuroimaging tasks involving multi-site heterogeneity with limited availability of training data.
summary: For machine learning applications in medical imaging, the availability of training data is often limited, which hampers the design of radiological classifiers for subtle conditions such as autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Transfer learning is one method to counter this problem of low training data regimes. Here we explore the use of meta-learning for very low data regimes in the context of having prior data from multiple sites - an approach we term site-agnostic meta-learning. Inspired by the effectiveness of meta-learning for optimizing a model across multiple tasks, here we propose a framework to adapt it to learn across multiple sites. We tested our meta-learning model for classifying ASD versus typically developing controls in 2,201 T1-weighted (T1-w) MRI scans collected from 38 imaging sites as part of Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange (ABIDE) [age: 5.2-64.0 years]. The method was trained to find a good initialization state for our model that can quickly adapt to data from new unseen sites by fine-tuning on the limited data that is available. The proposed method achieved an ROC-AUC=0.857 on 370 scans from 7 unseen sites in ABIDE using a few-shot setting of 2-way 20-shot i.e., 20 training samples per site. Our results outperformed a transfer learning baseline by generalizing across a wider range of sites as well as other related prior work. We also tested our model in a zero-shot setting on an independent test site without any additional fine-tuning. Our experiments show the promise of the proposed site-agnostic meta-learning framework for challenging neuroimaging tasks involving multi-site heterogeneity with limited availability of training data.
abstract_zh: 对于医学成像中的机器学习应用，训练数据的可用性通常是有限的，这阻碍了针对自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）等微妙情况的放射学分类器的设计。迁移学习是解决训练数据量低问题的一种方法。在这里，我们探索在具有来自多个站点的先前数据的背景下对非常低的数据状态使用元学习 - 我们将这种方法称为与站点无关的元学习。受到元学习跨多个任务优化模型的有效性的启发，我们在这里提出了一个框架，使其能够跨多个站点学习。作为自闭症脑成像数据交换 (ABIDE) 的一部分，我们在 38 个成像站点收集了 2,201 个 T1 加权 (T1-w) MRI 扫描，测试了用于对 ASD 进行分类与通常开发对照的元学习模型 [年龄：5.2-64.0 岁]。该方法经过训练，为我们的模型找到一个良好的初始化状态，该状态可以通过对可用的有限数据进行微调来快速适应来自新的未见站点的数据。所提出的方法使用 2 路 20 个镜头的少数镜头设置（即每个站点 20 个训练样本）在 ABIDE 中 7 个未见过的站点的 370 次扫描中实现了 ROC-AUC=0.857。通过在更广泛的站点以及其他相关的先前工作中进行推广，我们的结果优于迁移学习基线。我们还在独立测试站点上以零样本设置测试了我们的模型，无需任何额外的微调。我们的实验表明，所提出的与站点无关的元学习框架有望用于挑战涉及多站点异质性且训练数据可用性有限的神经影像任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于元学习的框架，用于在少量训练数据下跨多站点脑MRI数据分类自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像中训练数据有限，限制了针对细微疾病（如ASD）的分类器设计。传统迁移学习难以应对多站点数据异质性，需探索更有效的跨站点适应方法。
AI.method: 提出站点无关元学习（site-agnostic meta-learning）框架，通过元学习优化模型初始化，使其能快速适应新站点的少量数据，基于ABIDE数据集的2201例T1-w MRI进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 在370例7个新站点数据上，2-way 20-shot设置下ROC-AUC达0.857，优于迁移学习基线及其他方法；零样本设置下模型仍保持性能。
AI.conclusion: 站点无关元学习框架有效应对多站点异质性与数据稀缺问题，在神经影像任务中展现潜力。

authors_text: Mark Quinlan
title: Disconnected from Reality: Do the core concepts of the metaverse exclude disabled individuals?
title_zh: 脱离现实：虚拟宇宙的核心概念是否排除残疾人？
comment: TIAM23 Workshop at ACM CHI 23, Hamburg, Germany
comments: TIAM23 Workshop at ACM CHI 23, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: Commercially-driven metaverse development has been driven by philosophical and science fiction concepts. Through translating these concepts into products, the developers may have inadvertently excluded individuals with disabilities from this new expanded reality. This ideologically-driven development is presented in this paper through a brief background of what we see as the most influential of these concepts, and explain how these might affect disabled individuals wishing to engage with said products. It is our hope that these ideas prompt conversation on future inclusivity access from the concept stage of future metaverse development.
summary: Commercially-driven metaverse development has been driven by philosophical and science fiction concepts. Through translating these concepts into products, the developers may have inadvertently excluded individuals with disabilities from this new expanded reality. This ideologically-driven development is presented in this paper through a brief background of what we see as the most influential of these concepts, and explain how these might affect disabled individuals wishing to engage with said products. It is our hope that these ideas prompt conversation on future inclusivity access from the concept stage of future metaverse development.
abstract_zh: 商业驱动的虚拟宇宙发展是由哲学和科幻小说概念驱动的。通过将这些概念转化为产品，开发人员可能无意中将残疾人排除在这个新的扩展现实之外。本文通过对我们认为最有影响力的这些概念的简要背景介绍了这种意识形态驱动的发展，并解释了这些概念如何影响希望使用上述产品的残疾人。我们希望这些想法能够从未来元宇宙发展的概念阶段引发关于未来包容性访问的对话。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨元宇宙核心概念是否可能排除残障人士，并分析其潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 商业驱动的元宇宙开发基于哲学和科幻概念，可能无意中导致残障人士被排除，需从概念阶段推动包容性设计。
AI.method: 通过回顾元宇宙发展的核心哲学与科幻概念，分析其对残障人士参与产品使用的潜在障碍。
AI.result: 指出当前元宇宙概念可能因设计假设而排除残障群体，并强调需在早期阶段纳入包容性考量。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁在元宇宙开发的概念阶段即重视残障人士需求，以构建更公平的数字环境。

authors_text: Kaan Gokcesu,Hakan Gokcesu
title: A 2-opt Algorithm for Locally Optimal Set Partition Optimization
title_zh: 局部最优集划分优化的2-opt算法
abstract: Our research deals with the optimization version of the set partition problem, where the objective is to minimize the absolute difference between the sums of the two disjoint partitions. Although this problem is known to be NP-hard and requires exponential time to solve, we propose a less demanding version of this problem where the goal is to find a locally optimal solution. In our approach, we consider the local optimality in respect to any movement of at most two elements. To accomplish this, we developed an algorithm that can generate a locally optimal solution in at most $O(N^2)$ time and $O(N)$ space. Our algorithm can handle arbitrary input precisions and does not require positive or integer inputs. Hence, it can be applied in various problem scenarios with ease.
summary: Our research deals with the optimization version of the set partition problem, where the objective is to minimize the absolute difference between the sums of the two disjoint partitions. Although this problem is known to be NP-hard and requires exponential time to solve, we propose a less demanding version of this problem where the goal is to find a locally optimal solution. In our approach, we consider the local optimality in respect to any movement of at most two elements. To accomplish this, we developed an algorithm that can generate a locally optimal solution in at most $O(N^2)$ time and $O(N)$ space. Our algorithm can handle arbitrary input precisions and does not require positive or integer inputs. Hence, it can be applied in various problem scenarios with ease.
abstract_zh: 我们的研究涉及集合划分问题的优化版本，其目标是最小化两个不相交划分的总和之间的绝对差。尽管这个问题被认为是 NP 难题并且需要指数时间来解决，但我们提出了这个问题的一个要求较低的版本，其目标是找到局部最优解。在我们的方法中，我们考虑最多两个元素的任何运动的局部最优性。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了一种算法，可以在最多 $O(N^2)$ 时间和 $O(N)$ 空间内生成局部最优解。我们的算法可以处理任意输入精度，并且不需要正数或整数输入。因此，它可以轻松应用于各种问题场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于2-opt算法的局部最优集合划分方法，旨在最小化两个子集和的绝对差异。
AI.motivation: 集合划分问题属于NP难问题，传统方法计算复杂度高，需寻找更高效的局部最优解以适应实际应用场景。
AI.method: 设计一种时间复杂度为O(N²)、空间复杂度为O(N)的2-opt算法，通过最多交换两个元素实现局部最优。
AI.result: 成功开发出支持任意精度输入的算法，无需正数或整数限制，适用于多种问题场景。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为NP难问题提供了高效的局部最优解方案，在实际应用中具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Nikhil J. Dhinagar,Sophia I. Thomopoulos,Emily Laltoo,Paul M. Thompson
title: Efficiently Training Vision Transformers on Structural MRI Scans for Alzheimer's Disease Detection
title_zh: 有效训练视觉变压器进行结构 MRI 扫描以检测阿尔茨海默病
abstract: Neuroimaging of large populations is valuable to identify factors that promote or resist brain disease, and to assist diagnosis, subtyping, and prognosis. Data-driven models such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have increasingly been applied to brain images to perform diagnostic and prognostic tasks by learning robust features. Vision transformers (ViT) - a new class of deep learning architectures - have emerged in recent years as an alternative to CNNs for several computer vision applications. Here we tested variants of the ViT architecture for a range of desired neuroimaging downstream tasks based on difficulty, in this case for sex and Alzheimer's disease (AD) classification based on 3D brain MRI. In our experiments, two vision transformer architecture variants achieved an AUC of 0.987 for sex and 0.892 for AD classification, respectively. We independently evaluated our models on data from two benchmark AD datasets. We achieved a performance boost of 5% and 9-10% upon fine-tuning vision transformer models pre-trained on synthetic (generated by a latent diffusion model) and real MRI scans, respectively. Our main contributions include testing the effects of different ViT training strategies including pre-training, data augmentation and learning rate warm-ups followed by annealing, as pertaining to the neuroimaging domain. These techniques are essential for training ViT-like models for neuroimaging applications where training data is usually limited. We also analyzed the effect of the amount of training data utilized on the test-time performance of the ViT via data-model scaling curves.
summary: Neuroimaging of large populations is valuable to identify factors that promote or resist brain disease, and to assist diagnosis, subtyping, and prognosis. Data-driven models such as convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have increasingly been applied to brain images to perform diagnostic and prognostic tasks by learning robust features. Vision transformers (ViT) - a new class of deep learning architectures - have emerged in recent years as an alternative to CNNs for several computer vision applications. Here we tested variants of the ViT architecture for a range of desired neuroimaging downstream tasks based on difficulty, in this case for sex and Alzheimer's disease (AD) classification based on 3D brain MRI. In our experiments, two vision transformer architecture variants achieved an AUC of 0.987 for sex and 0.892 for AD classification, respectively. We independently evaluated our models on data from two benchmark AD datasets. We achieved a performance boost of 5% and 9-10% upon fine-tuning vision transformer models pre-trained on synthetic (generated by a latent diffusion model) and real MRI scans, respectively. Our main contributions include testing the effects of different ViT training strategies including pre-training, data augmentation and learning rate warm-ups followed by annealing, as pertaining to the neuroimaging domain. These techniques are essential for training ViT-like models for neuroimaging applications where training data is usually limited. We also analyzed the effect of the amount of training data utilized on the test-time performance of the ViT via data-model scaling curves.
abstract_zh: 大量人群的神经影像学对于识别促进或抵抗脑部疾病的因素以及协助诊断、分型和预后很有价值。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 等数据驱动模型已越来越多地应用于大脑图像，通过学习稳健的特征来执行诊断和预后任务。视觉变换器 (ViT) 是一种新型深度学习架构，近年来出现，作为多种计算机视觉应用中 CNN 的替代品。在这里，我们根据难度测试了 ViT 架构的变体，用于一系列所需的神经影像下游任务，在本例中是基于 3D 脑部 MRI 的性别和阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 分类。在我们的实验中，两种视觉 Transformer 架构变体的性别 AUC 分别为 0.987，AD 分类的 AUC 分别为 0.892。我们根据两个基准 AD 数据集的数据独立评估了我们的模型。通过对合成（由潜在扩散模型生成）和真实 MRI 扫描进行预训练的视觉变换器模型进行微调，我们分别实现了 5% 和 9-10% 的性能提升。我们的主要贡献包括测试神经影像领域不同 ViT 训练策略的效果，包括预训练、数据增强和学习率预热，然后进行退火。这些技术对于训练用于训练数据通常有限的神经影像应用的 ViT 类模型至关重要。我们还通过数据模型缩放曲线分析了训练数据量对 ViT 测试时性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了如何高效训练视觉Transformer（ViT）模型以用于基于结构MRI扫描的阿尔茨海默病检测。
AI.motivation: 神经影像数据对脑疾病诊断和分型至关重要，而传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在处理此类任务时存在局限性。视觉Transformer（ViT）作为新兴的深度学习架构，可能为神经影像分析提供更优解决方案。
AI.method: 测试了多种ViT架构变体，通过预训练、数据增强、学习率预热与退火等策略，在3D脑部MRI数据上进行性别和阿尔茨海默病分类任务的训练与评估。
AI.result: 在性别分类任务中AUC达0.987，在阿尔茨海默病分类中AUC为0.892；通过微调预训练模型，性能分别提升5%（合成数据）和9-10%（真实数据）。
AI.conclusion: ViT在神经影像领域具有潜力，但需结合预训练、数据增强等策略以应对小样本挑战，且训练数据量对模型性能有显著影响。

authors_text: Faseeh Ahmad,Matthias Mayr,Volker Krueger
title: Learning to Adapt the Parameters of Behavior Trees and Motion Generators (BTMGs) to Task Variations
title_zh: 学习使行为树和运动生成器 (BTMG) 的参数适应任务变化
abstract: The ability to learn new tasks and quickly adapt to different variations or dimensions is an important attribute in agile robotics. In our previous work, we have explored Behavior Trees and Motion Generators (BTMGs) as a robot arm policy representation to facilitate the learning and execution of assembly tasks. The current implementation of the BTMGs for a specific task may not be robust to the changes in the environment and may not generalize well to different variations of tasks. We propose to extend the BTMG policy representation with a module that predicts BTMG parameters for a new task variation. To achieve this, we propose a model that combines a Gaussian process and a weighted support vector machine classifier. This model predicts the performance measure and the feasibility of the predicted policy with BTMG parameters and task variations as inputs. Using the outputs of the model, we then construct a surrogate reward function that is utilized within an optimizer to maximize the performance of a task over BTMG parameters for a fixed task variation. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach, we conducted experimental evaluations on push and obstacle avoidance tasks in simulation and with a real KUKA iiwa robot. Furthermore, we compared the performance of our approach with four baseline methods.
summary: The ability to learn new tasks and quickly adapt to different variations or dimensions is an important attribute in agile robotics. In our previous work, we have explored Behavior Trees and Motion Generators (BTMGs) as a robot arm policy representation to facilitate the learning and execution of assembly tasks. The current implementation of the BTMGs for a specific task may not be robust to the changes in the environment and may not generalize well to different variations of tasks. We propose to extend the BTMG policy representation with a module that predicts BTMG parameters for a new task variation. To achieve this, we propose a model that combines a Gaussian process and a weighted support vector machine classifier. This model predicts the performance measure and the feasibility of the predicted policy with BTMG parameters and task variations as inputs. Using the outputs of the model, we then construct a surrogate reward function that is utilized within an optimizer to maximize the performance of a task over BTMG parameters for a fixed task variation. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach, we conducted experimental evaluations on push and obstacle avoidance tasks in simulation and with a real KUKA iiwa robot. Furthermore, we compared the performance of our approach with four baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 学习新任务并快速适应不同变化或维度的能力是敏捷机器人的一个重要属性。在我们之前的工作中，我们探索了行为树和运动生成器（BTMG）作为机器人手臂策略表示，以促进装配任务的学习和执行。当前针对特定任务的 BTMG 实现可能对环境的变化不具有鲁棒性，并且可能无法很好地推广到不同的任务变体。我们建议使用一个模块来扩展 BTMG 策略表示，该模块可以预测新任务变体的 BTMG 参数。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种结合高斯过程和加权支持向量机分类器的模型。该模型以 BTMG 参数和任务变化作为输入来预测性能指标和预测策略的可行性。然后，我们使用模型的输出构建一个替代奖励函数，该函数在优化器中使用，以在固定任务变化的 BTMG 参数上最大化任务的性能。为了证明我们提出的方法的有效性，我们使用真实的 KUKA iiwa 机器人对模拟中的推动和避障任务进行了实验评估。此外，我们将我们的方法与四种基线方法的性能进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过预测BTMG参数来适应任务变化的方法，以提高机器人执行任务的灵活性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有BTMG策略在环境变化或任务变体下表现不够鲁棒，难以泛化到不同任务场景，需提升参数自适应能力。
AI.method: 结合高斯过程与加权支持向量机分类器，构建预测模型输出性能指标与策略可行性，并基于此设计代理奖励函数进行参数优化。
AI.result: 在推物与避障任务的仿真及真实KUKA iiwa机器人实验中，该方法相较四个基线方法表现出更优的适应性与任务性能。

search_text: Learning to Adapt the Parameters of Behavior Trees and Motion Generators (BTMGs) to Task Variations 学习使行为树和运动生成器 (BTMG) 的参数适应任务变化 The ability to learn new tasks and quickly adapt to different variations or dimensions is an important attribute in agile robotics. In our previous work, we have explored Behavior Trees and Motion Generators (BTMGs) as a robot arm policy representation to facilitate the learning and execution of assembly tasks. The current implementation of the BTMGs for a specific task may not be robust to the changes in the environment and may not generalize well to different variations of tasks. We propose to extend the BTMG policy representation with a module that predicts BTMG parameters for a new task variation. To achieve this, we propose a model that combines a Gaussian process and a weighted support vector machine classifier. This model predicts the performance measure and the feasibility of the predicted policy with BTMG parameters and task variations as inputs. Using the outputs of the model, we then construct a surrogate reward function that is utilized within an optimizer to maximize the performance of a task over BTMG parameters for a fixed task variation. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach, we conducted experimental evaluations on push and obstacle avoidance tasks in simulation and with a real KUKA iiwa robot. Furthermore, we compared the performance of our approach with four baseline methods. 学习新任务并快速适应不同变化或维度的能力是敏捷机器人的一个重要属性。在我们之前的工作中，我们探索了行为树和运动生成器（BTMG）作为机器人手臂策略表示，以促进装配任务的学习和执行。当前针对特定任务的 BTMG 实现可能对环境的变化不具有鲁棒性，并且可能无法很好地推广到不同的任务变体。我们建议使用一个模块来扩展 BTMG 策略表示，该模块可以预测新任务变体的 BTMG 参数。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种结合高斯过程和加权支持向量机分类器的模型。该模型以 BTMG 参数和任务变化作为输入来预测性能指标和预测策略的可行性。然后，我们使用模型的输出构建一个替代奖励函数，该函数在优化器中使用，以在固定任务变化的 BTMG 参数上最大化任务的性能。为了证明我们提出的方法的有效性，我们使用真实的 KUKA iiwa 机器人对模拟中的推动和避障任务进行了实验评估。此外，我们将我们的方法与四种基线方法的性能进行了比较。 本文提出一种通过预测BTMG参数来适应任务变化的方法，以提高机器人执行任务的灵活性和鲁棒性。 Faseeh Ahmad,Matthias Mayr,Volker Krueger cs.RO

authors_text: Jiefeng Chen,Timothy Nguyen,Dilan Gorur,Arslan Chaudhry
title: Is forgetting less a good inductive bias for forward transfer?
title_zh: 遗忘较少是前向转移的良好归纳偏差吗？
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: One of the main motivations of studying continual learning is that the problem setting allows a model to accrue knowledge from past tasks to learn new tasks more efficiently. However, recent studies suggest that the key metric that continual learning algorithms optimize, reduction in catastrophic forgetting, does not correlate well with the forward transfer of knowledge. We believe that the conclusion previous works reached is due to the way they measure forward transfer. We argue that the measure of forward transfer to a task should not be affected by the restrictions placed on the continual learner in order to preserve knowledge of previous tasks. Instead, forward transfer should be measured by how easy it is to learn a new task given a set of representations produced by continual learning on previous tasks. Under this notion of forward transfer, we evaluate different continual learning algorithms on a variety of image classification benchmarks. Our results indicate that less forgetful representations lead to a better forward transfer suggesting a strong correlation between retaining past information and learning efficiency on new tasks. Further, we found less forgetful representations to be more diverse and discriminative compared to their forgetful counterparts.
summary: One of the main motivations of studying continual learning is that the problem setting allows a model to accrue knowledge from past tasks to learn new tasks more efficiently. However, recent studies suggest that the key metric that continual learning algorithms optimize, reduction in catastrophic forgetting, does not correlate well with the forward transfer of knowledge. We believe that the conclusion previous works reached is due to the way they measure forward transfer. We argue that the measure of forward transfer to a task should not be affected by the restrictions placed on the continual learner in order to preserve knowledge of previous tasks. Instead, forward transfer should be measured by how easy it is to learn a new task given a set of representations produced by continual learning on previous tasks. Under this notion of forward transfer, we evaluate different continual learning algorithms on a variety of image classification benchmarks. Our results indicate that less forgetful representations lead to a better forward transfer suggesting a strong correlation between retaining past information and learning efficiency on new tasks. Further, we found less forgetful representations to be more diverse and discriminative compared to their forgetful counterparts.
abstract_zh: 研究持续学习的主要动机之一是问题设置允许模型从过去的任务中积累知识，从而更有效地学习新任务。然而，最近的研究表明，持续学习算法优化的关键指标——灾难性遗忘的减少——与知识的前向迁移并没有很好的相关性。我们认为，之前的工作得出的结论是由于他们衡量远期转移的方式。我们认为，为了保留先前任务的知识，对任务的前向迁移的度量不应受到对持续学习者施加的限制的影响。相反，前向迁移应该通过给定通过对先前任务的持续学习产生的一组表示来学习新任务的难易程度来衡量。在前向迁移的概念下，我们在各种图像分类基准上评估不同的持续学习算法。我们的结果表明，较少的健忘表征会导致更好的前向迁移，这表明保留过去的信息和新任务的学习效率之间存在很强的相关性。此外，我们发现，与健忘的对应物相比，较少健忘的表征更加多样化和更具歧视性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在连续学习中，减少遗忘是否有助于正向知识迁移，并重新定义了正向迁移的衡量标准。
AI.motivation: 连续学习的目标是通过保留过去任务的知识来提高新任务的学习效率，但之前的研究发现减少灾难性遗忘与正向迁移之间的相关性较低，因此本文希望重新审视正向迁移的衡量方式。
AI.method: 本文重新定义了正向迁移的衡量标准，不再受连续学习模型保留旧知识的限制，而是通过评估模型在新任务上的学习效率来衡量正向迁移。
AI.result: 研究发现，遗忘较少的模型在新任务上的学习效率更高，并且这些模型的表示更具多样性和辨别力。
AI.conclusion: 减少遗忘有助于提高正向迁移，表明保留旧信息与新任务的学习效率之间存在强相关性。

authors_text: Miguel Á. González-Santamarta,Francisco J. Rodríguez-Lera,Vicente Matellán Olivera,Virginia Riego Del Castillo,Lidia Sánchez-González
title: SAILOR: Perceptual Anchoring For Robotic Cognitive Architectures
title_zh: SAILOR：机器人认知架构的感知锚定
comment: 16 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables, 3 algorithms, Submitted to Scientific Reports
comments: 16 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables, 3 algorithms, Submitted to Scientific Reports
abstract: Symbolic anchoring is a crucial problem in the field of robotics, as it enables robots to obtain symbolic knowledge from the perceptual information acquired through their sensors. In cognitive-based robots, this process of processing sub-symbolic data from real-world sensors to obtain symbolic knowledge is still an open problem. To address this issue, this paper presents SAILOR, a framework for providing symbolic anchoring in the ROS 2 ecosystem. SAILOR aims to maintain the link between symbolic data and perceptual data in real robots over time, increasing the intelligent behavior of robots. It provides a semantic world modeling approach using two deep learning-based sub-symbolic robotic skills: object recognition and matching function. The object recognition skill allows the robot to recognize and identify objects in its environment, while the matching function enables the robot to decide if new perceptual data corresponds to existing symbolic data. This paper provides a description of the proposed method and the development of the framework, as well as its integration in MERLIN2 (a hybrid cognitive architecture fully functional in robots running ROS 2).
summary: Symbolic anchoring is a crucial problem in the field of robotics, as it enables robots to obtain symbolic knowledge from the perceptual information acquired through their sensors. In cognitive-based robots, this process of processing sub-symbolic data from real-world sensors to obtain symbolic knowledge is still an open problem. To address this issue, this paper presents SAILOR, a framework for providing symbolic anchoring in the ROS 2 ecosystem. SAILOR aims to maintain the link between symbolic data and perceptual data in real robots over time, increasing the intelligent behavior of robots. It provides a semantic world modeling approach using two deep learning-based sub-symbolic robotic skills: object recognition and matching function. The object recognition skill allows the robot to recognize and identify objects in its environment, while the matching function enables the robot to decide if new perceptual data corresponds to existing symbolic data. This paper provides a description of the proposed method and the development of the framework, as well as its integration in MERLIN2 (a hybrid cognitive architecture fully functional in robots running ROS 2).
abstract_zh: 符号锚定是机器人领域的一个关键问题，因为它使机器人能够从传感器获取的感知信息中获取符号知识。在基于认知的机器人中，处理来自现实世界传感器的子符号数据以获得符号知识的过程仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 SAILOR，一个在 ROS 2 生态系统中提供符号锚定的框架。 SAILOR旨在随着时间的推移保持真实机器人中符号数据和感知数据之间的联系，从而提高机器人的智能行为。它提供了一种语义世界建模方法，使用两种基于深度学习的子符号机器人技能：对象识别和匹配功能。物体识别技能使机器人能够识别和识别其环境中的物体，而匹配功能使机器人能够确定新的感知数据是否与现有的符号数据相对应。本文描述了所提出的方法和框架的开发，以及它在 MERLIN2（一种在运行 ROS 2 的机器人中功能齐全的混合认知架构）中的集成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAILOR框架，在ROS 2生态系统中实现机器人感知信息与符号知识的关联，提升机器人智能行为。
AI.motivation: 基于认知的机器人仍面临将传感器获取的次符号数据转化为符号知识的难题，需有效维持感知与符号数据的长期关联。
AI.method: 采用深度学习实现物体识别与匹配功能，结合语义世界建模方法，集成至MERLIN2混合认知架构中。
AI.result: 成功开发SAILOR框架并实现与MERLIN2的整合，验证了框架在机器人认知任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SAILOR为机器人符号锚定提供有效解决方案，增强了环境感知与符号知识的动态关联能力。

It provides a semantic world modeling approach using two deep learning-based sub-symbolic robotic skills: object recognition and matching function. The object recognition skill allows the robot to recognize and identify objects in its environment, while the matching function enables the robot to decide if new perceptual data corresponds to existing symbolic data. This paper provides a description of the proposed method and the development of the framework, as well as its integration in MERLIN2 (a hybrid cognitive architecture fully functional in robots running ROS 2). 符号锚定是机器人领域的一个关键问题，因为它使机器人能够从传感器获取的感知信息中获取符号知识。在基于认知的机器人中，处理来自现实世界传感器的子符号数据以获得符号知识的过程仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了 SAILOR，一个在 ROS 2 生态系统中提供符号锚定的框架。 SAILOR旨在随着时间的推移保持真实机器人中符号数据和感知数据之间的联系，从而提高机器人的智能行为。它提供了一种语义世界建模方法，使用两种基于深度学习的子符号机器人技能：对象识别和匹配功能。物体识别技能使机器人能够识别和识别其环境中的物体，而匹配功能使机器人能够确定新的感知数据是否与现有的符号数据相对应。本文描述了所提出的方法和框架的开发，以及它在 MERLIN2（一种在运行 ROS 2 的机器人中功能齐全的混合认知架构）中的集成。 本文提出SAILOR框架，在ROS 2生态系统中实现机器人感知信息与符号知识的关联，提升机器人智能行为。 Miguel Á. González-Santamarta,Francisco J. Rodríguez-Lera,Vicente Matellán Olivera,Virginia Riego Del Castillo,Lidia Sánchez-González cs.RO

authors_text: Alicia Durrer,Julia Wolleb,Florentin Bieder,Tim Sinnecker,Matthias Weigel,Robin Sandkühler,Cristina Granziera,Özgür Yaldizli,Philippe C. Cattin
title: Diffusion Models for Contrast Harmonization of Magnetic Resonance Images
title_zh: 磁共振图像对比度协调的扩散模型
abstract: Magnetic resonance (MR) images from multiple sources often show differences in image contrast related to acquisition settings or the used scanner type. For long-term studies, longitudinal comparability is essential but can be impaired by these contrast differences, leading to biased results when using automated evaluation tools. This study presents a diffusion model-based approach for contrast harmonization. We use a data set consisting of scans of 18 Multiple Sclerosis patients and 22 healthy controls. Each subject was scanned in two MR scanners of different magnetic field strengths (1.5 T and 3 T), resulting in a paired data set that shows scanner-inherent differences. We map images from the source contrast to the target contrast for both directions, from 3 T to 1.5 T and from 1.5 T to 3 T. As we only want to change the contrast, not the anatomical information, our method uses the original image to guide the image-to-image translation process by adding structural information. The aim is that the mapped scans display increased comparability with scans of the target contrast for downstream tasks. We evaluate this method for the task of segmentation of cerebrospinal fluid, grey matter and white matter. Our method achieves good and consistent results for both directions of the mapping.

Each subject was scanned in two MR scanners of different magnetic field strengths (1.5 T and 3 T), resulting in a paired data set that shows scanner-inherent differences. We map images from the source contrast to the target contrast for both directions, from 3 T to 1.5 T and from 1.5 T to 3 T. As we only want to change the contrast, not the anatomical information, our method uses the original image to guide the image-to-image translation process by adding structural information. The aim is that the mapped scans display increased comparability with scans of the target contrast for downstream tasks. We evaluate this method for the task of segmentation of cerebrospinal fluid, grey matter and white matter. Our method achieves good and consistent results for both directions of the mapping.
abstract_zh: 来自多个来源的磁共振 (MR) 图像通常会显示与采集设置或所使用的扫描仪类型相关的图像对比度差异。对于长期研究来说，纵向可比性至关重要，但这些对比差异可能会削弱纵向可比性，从而在使用自动评估工具时导致结果出现偏差。本研究提出了一种基于扩散模型的对比度协调方法。我们使用的数据集由 18 名多发性硬化症患者和 22 名健康对照者的扫描组成。每个受试者都在两台不同磁场强度（1.5 T 和 3 T）的 MR 扫描仪中进行扫描，从而产生显示扫描仪固有差异的配对数据集。我们将图像从源对比度映射到目标对比度的两个方向，从 3 T 到 1.5 T 以及从 1.5 T 到 3 T。由于我们只想更改对比度，而不是解剖信息，因此我们的方法使用原始图像通过添加结构信息来指导图像到图像的转换过程。目的是映射扫描与下游任务的目标对比度扫描显示出更高的可比性。我们评估该方法在脑脊液、灰质和白质分割任务中的效果。我们的方法在映射的两个方向上都取得了良好且一致的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的磁共振图像对比度调和方法，旨在解决多源MR图像因采集设置或扫描仪类型不同导致的对比度差异问题。
AI.motivation: 不同扫描仪或采集参数导致的MR图像对比度差异会破坏纵向研究的可比性，进而影响自动化评估工具的准确性，需开发统一的对比度调和方法。
AI.method: 使用包含18名多发性硬化患者和22名健康受试者的配对数据集（1.5T和3T扫描仪），通过扩散模型实现双向对比度映射（3T→1.5T和1.5T→3T），利用原始图像的结构信息引导生成过程以保留解剖特征。
AI.result: 在脑脊液、灰质和白质分割任务中，该方法在两种对比度映射方向均表现出良好且一致的性能，显著提升了跨扫描仪数据的可比性。
AI.conclusion: 扩散模型有效实现了MR图像对比度调和，为纵向研究和自动化分析提供了更可靠的数据基础。

authors_text: Akash Fogla,Kanish Kumar,Sunnay Saurav,Bishnu ramanujan
title: Vehicle lateral control using Machine Learning for automated vehicle guidance
title_zh: 使用机器学习进行车辆横向控制以实现自动车辆引导
abstract: Uncertainty in decision-making is crucial in the machine learning model used for a safety-critical system that operates in the real world. Therefore, it is important to handle uncertainty in a graceful manner for the safe operation of the CPS. In this work, we design a vehicle's lateral controller using a machine-learning model. To this end, we train a random forest model that is an ensemble model and a deep neural network model. Due to the ensemble in the random forest model, we can predict the confidence/uncertainty in the prediction. We train our controller on data generated from running the car on one track in the simulator and tested it on other tracks. Due to prediction in confidence, we could decide when the controller is less confident in prediction and takes control if needed. We have two results to share: first, even on a very small number of labeled data, a very good generalization capability of the random forest-based regressor in comparison with a deep neural network and accordingly random forest controller can drive on another similar track, where the deep neural network-based model fails to drive, and second confidence in predictions in random forest controller makes it possible to let us know when the controller is not confident in prediction and likely to fail. By creating a threshold, it was possible to take control when the controller is not safe and that is missing in a deep neural network-based controller.
summary: Uncertainty in decision-making is crucial in the machine learning model used for a safety-critical system that operates in the real world. Therefore, it is important to handle uncertainty in a graceful manner for the safe operation of the CPS. In this work, we design a vehicle's lateral controller using a machine-learning model. To this end, we train a random forest model that is an ensemble model and a deep neural network model. Due to the ensemble in the random forest model, we can predict the confidence/uncertainty in the prediction. We train our controller on data generated from running the car on one track in the simulator and tested it on other tracks. Due to prediction in confidence, we could decide when the controller is less confident in prediction and takes control if needed. We have two results to share: first, even on a very small number of labeled data, a very good generalization capability of the random forest-based regressor in comparison with a deep neural network and accordingly random forest controller can drive on another similar track, where the deep neural network-based model fails to drive, and second confidence in predictions in random forest controller makes it possible to let us know when the controller is not confident in prediction and likely to fail. By creating a threshold, it was possible to take control when the controller is not safe and that is missing in a deep neural network-based controller.
abstract_zh: 在用于现实世界中运行的安全关键系统的机器学习模型中，决策的不确定性至关重要。因此，为了 CPS 的安全运行，以优雅的方式处理不确定性非常重要。在这项工作中，我们使用机器学习模型设计车辆的横向控制器。为此，我们训练了一个随机森林模型，它是一个集成模型和一个深度神经网络模型。由于随机森林模型中的集成，我们可以预测预测的置信度/不确定性。我们根据汽车在模拟器中的一条轨道上运行时生成的数据来训练控制器，并在其他轨道上进行测试。由于预测有信心，我们可以决定控制器何时对预测不太有信心并在需要时进行控制。我们有两个结果要分享：第一，即使在极少量的标记数据上，与深度神经网络相比，基于随机森林的回归器也具有非常好的泛化能力，因此随机森林控制器可以在另一个类似的轨道上行驶，而基于深度神经网络的模型无法驱动；第二，随机森林控制器的预测置信度使我们可以知道控制器何时对预测没有信心并且可能会失败。通过创建阈值，当控制器不安全且基于深度神经网络的控制器中缺少该阈值时，可以进行控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于机器学习的车辆横向控制方法，通过比较随机森林与深度神经网络模型，解决自动驾驶中的不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 安全关键系统需在现实环境中优雅处理不确定性，传统模型缺乏预测置信度的能力，可能导致控制失效。
AI.method: 训练随机森林（集成模型）和深度神经网络，利用模拟器生成单赛道数据进行训练，通过预测置信度阈值实现控制权切换。
AI.result: 随机森林在少量标注数据下表现更优，可成功驾驶相似赛道；其置信度机制能识别不安全状态并触发控制接管，而深度网络无法实现。
AI.conclusion: 随机森林控制器因具备预测置信度能力，在不确定性场景下比深度网络更安全可靠，适合自动驾驶等安全关键系统。

By creating a threshold, it was possible to take control when the controller is not safe and that is missing in a deep neural network-based controller. 在用于现实世界中运行的安全关键系统的机器学习模型中，决策的不确定性至关重要。因此，为了 CPS 的安全运行，以优雅的方式处理不确定性非常重要。在这项工作中，我们使用机器学习模型设计车辆的横向控制器。为此，我们训练了一个随机森林模型，它是一个集成模型和一个深度神经网络模型。由于随机森林模型中的集成，我们可以预测预测的置信度/不确定性。我们根据汽车在模拟器中的一条轨道上运行时生成的数据来训练控制器，并在其他轨道上进行测试。由于预测有信心，我们可以决定控制器何时对预测不太有信心并在需要时进行控制。我们有两个结果要分享：第一，即使在极少量的标记数据上，与深度神经网络相比，基于随机森林的回归器也具有非常好的泛化能力，因此随机森林控制器可以在另一个类似的轨道上行驶，而基于深度神经网络的模型无法驱动；第二，随机森林控制器的预测置信度使我们可以知道控制器何时对预测没有信心并且可能会失败。通过创建阈值，当控制器不安全且基于深度神经网络的控制器中缺少该阈值时，可以进行控制。 本文提出一种基于机器学习的车辆横向控制方法，通过比较随机森林与深度神经网络模型，解决自动驾驶中的不确定性问题。 Akash Fogla,Kanish Kumar,Sunnay Saurav,Bishnu ramanujan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Bereket A. Yilma,Luis A. Leiva
title: The Elements of Visual Art Recommendation: Learning Latent Semantic Representations of Paintings
title_zh: 视觉艺术要素推荐：学习绘画的潜在语义表征
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 23)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI 23)
abstract: Artwork recommendation is challenging because it requires understanding how users interact with highly subjective content, the complexity of the concepts embedded within the artwork, and the emotional and cognitive reflections they may trigger in users. In this paper, we focus on efficiently capturing the elements (i.e., latent semantic relationships) of visual art for personalized recommendation. We propose and study recommender systems based on textual and visual feature learning techniques, as well as their combinations. We then perform a small-scale and a large-scale user-centric evaluation of the quality of the recommendations. Our results indicate that textual features compare favourably with visual ones, whereas a fusion of both captures the most suitable hidden semantic relationships for artwork recommendation. Ultimately, this paper contributes to our understanding of how to deliver content that suitably matches the user's interests and how they are perceived.
summary: Artwork recommendation is challenging because it requires understanding how users interact with highly subjective content, the complexity of the concepts embedded within the artwork, and the emotional and cognitive reflections they may trigger in users. In this paper, we focus on efficiently capturing the elements (i.e., latent semantic relationships) of visual art for personalized recommendation. We propose and study recommender systems based on textual and visual feature learning techniques, as well as their combinations. We then perform a small-scale and a large-scale user-centric evaluation of the quality of the recommendations. Our results indicate that textual features compare favourably with visual ones, whereas a fusion of both captures the most suitable hidden semantic relationships for artwork recommendation. Ultimately, this paper contributes to our understanding of how to deliver content that suitably matches the user's interests and how they are perceived.
abstract_zh: 艺术品推荐具有挑战性，因为它需要了解用户如何与高度主观的内容交互、艺术品中嵌入的概念的复杂性以及它们可能引发用户的情感和认知反映。在本文中，我们专注于有效捕获视觉艺术的元素（即潜在语义关系）以进行个性化推荐。我们提出并研究基于文本和视觉特征学习技术及其组合的推荐系统。然后，我们对建议的质量进行小规模和大规模以用户为中心的评估。我们的结果表明，文本特征与视觉特征相比具有优势，而两者的融合捕获了最适合艺术品推荐的隐藏语义关系。最终，本文有助于我们理解如何提供适合用户兴趣及其感知方式的内容。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过学习绘画的潜在语义表示，构建高效的视觉艺术推荐系统。
AI.motivation: 艺术品推荐面临用户主观偏好、艺术概念复杂性及情感认知差异等挑战，需探索更精准的推荐方法。
AI.method: 结合文本与视觉特征学习技术，构建推荐系统并融合多模态特征以捕捉隐藏语义关系。
AI.result: 文本特征优于视觉特征，而文本与视觉特征的融合能最佳捕捉艺术作品的潜在语义关系。
AI.conclusion: 融合文本与视觉特征的方法可更精准匹配用户兴趣，提升艺术品推荐质量。
