authors_text: Francesco Crocetti,Jeffrey Mao,Alessandro Saviolo,Gabriele Costante,Giuseppe Loianno
title: GaPT: Gaussian Process Toolkit for Online Regression with Application to Learning Quadrotor Dynamics
title_zh: GaPT：用于在线回归的高斯过程工具包，应用于学习四旋翼动力学
abstract: Gaussian Processes (GPs) are expressive models for capturing signal statistics and expressing prediction uncertainty. As a result, the robotics community has gathered interest in leveraging these methods for inference, planning, and control. Unfortunately, despite providing a closed-form inference solution, GPs are non-parametric models that typically scale cubically with the dataset size, hence making them difficult to be used especially on onboard Size, Weight, and Power (SWaP) constrained aerial robots. In addition, the integration of popular libraries with GPs for different kernels is not trivial. In this paper, we propose GaPT, a novel toolkit that converts GPs to their state space form and performs regression in linear time. GaPT is designed to be highly compatible with several optimizers popular in robotics. We thoroughly validate the proposed approach for learning quadrotor dynamics on both single and multiple input GP settings. GaPT accurately captures the system behavior in multiple flight regimes and operating conditions, including those producing highly nonlinear effects such as aerodynamic forces and rotor interactions. Moreover, the results demonstrate the superior computational performance of GaPT compared to a classical GP inference approach on both single and multi-input settings especially when considering large number of data points, enabling real-time regression speed on embedded platforms used on SWaP-constrained aerial robots.
summary: Gaussian Processes (GPs) are expressive models for capturing signal statistics and expressing prediction uncertainty. As a result, the robotics community has gathered interest in leveraging these methods for inference, planning, and control. Unfortunately, despite providing a closed-form inference solution, GPs are non-parametric models that typically scale cubically with the dataset size, hence making them difficult to be used especially on onboard Size, Weight, and Power (SWaP) constrained aerial robots. In addition, the integration of popular libraries with GPs for different kernels is not trivial. In this paper, we propose GaPT, a novel toolkit that converts GPs to their state space form and performs regression in linear time. GaPT is designed to be highly compatible with several optimizers popular in robotics. We thoroughly validate the proposed approach for learning quadrotor dynamics on both single and multiple input GP settings. GaPT accurately captures the system behavior in multiple flight regimes and operating conditions, including those producing highly nonlinear effects such as aerodynamic forces and rotor interactions. Moreover, the results demonstrate the superior computational performance of GaPT compared to a classical GP inference approach on both single and multi-input settings especially when considering large number of data points, enabling real-time regression speed on embedded platforms used on SWaP-constrained aerial robots.
abstract_zh: 高斯过程 (GP) 是用于捕获信号统计数据和表达预测不确定性的表达模型。因此，机器人社区对利用这些方法进行推理、规划和控制产生了兴趣。不幸的是，尽管提供了封闭形式的推理解决方案，GP 是非参数模型，通常随数据集大小成立方比例缩放，因此使其难以使用，尤其是在机载尺寸、重量和功率 (SWaP) 受限的空中机器人上。此外，将流行的库与不同内核的 GP 集成起来也并非易事。在本文中，我们提出了 GaPT，这是一种新颖的工具包，可将 GP 转换为其状态空间形式并在线性时间内执行回归。 GaPT 的设计与机器人领域流行的几种优化器高度兼容。我们彻底验证了所提出的在单输入和多输入 GP 设置上学习四旋翼飞行器动力学的方法。 GaPT 准确捕获多种飞行状态和操作条件下的系统行为，包括那些产生高度非线性效应的行为，例如气动力和旋翼相互作用。此外，结果表明，与经典的 GP 推理方法相比，GaPT 在单输入和多输入设置上都具有卓越的计算性能，特别是在考虑大量数据点时，可在 SWaP 约束的空中机器人上使用的嵌入式平台上实现实时回归速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GaPT工具包，将高斯过程（GP）转换为状态空间形式，实现线性时间回归，用于四旋翼无人机动力学学习。
AI.motivation: 传统GP模型计算复杂度高（立方级），难以在计算资源受限的无人机上实时应用，且现有库难以灵活集成不同核函数。
AI.method: 通过将GP转换为状态空间表示，结合线性时间回归算法，并兼容机器人领域主流优化器，实现高效在线回归。
AI.result: GaPT在单输入和多输入场景下均能准确捕捉四旋翼无人机在多种飞行状态下的非线性动力学特性，计算效率较传统GP提升显著，支持嵌入式平台实时回归。
AI.conclusion: GaPT有效解决了GP模型在计算效率和工程集成上的瓶颈，为资源受限无人机的在线动力学学习提供了可行方案。

method: 通过将GP转换为状态空间表示，结合线性时间回归算法，并兼容机器人领域主流优化器，实现高效在线回归。
result: GaPT在单输入和多输入场景下均能准确捕捉四旋翼无人机在多种飞行状态下的非线性动力学特性，计算效率较传统GP提升显著，支持嵌入式平台实时回归。
conclusion: GaPT有效解决了GP模型在计算效率和工程集成上的瓶颈，为资源受限无人机的在线动力学学习提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Keno K. Bressem,Jens-Michalis Papaioannou,Paul Grundmann,Florian Borchert,Lisa C. Adams,Leonhard Liu,Felix Busch,Lina Xu,Jan P. Loyen,Stefan M. Niehues,Moritz Augustin,Lennart Grosser,Marcus R. Makowski,Hugo JWL. Aerts,Alexander Löser
title: MEDBERT.de: A Comprehensive German BERT Model for the Medical Domain
title_zh: MEDBERT.de：医疗领域的德国综合 BERT 模型
comment: Keno K. Bressem and Jens-Michalis Papaioannou and Paul Grundmann contributed equally
comments: Keno K. Bressem and Jens-Michalis Papaioannou and Paul Grundmann contributed equally
abstract: This paper presents medBERTde, a pre-trained German BERT model specifically designed for the German medical domain. The model has been trained on a large corpus of 4.7 Million German medical documents and has been shown to achieve new state-of-the-art performance on eight different medical benchmarks covering a wide range of disciplines and medical document types. In addition to evaluating the overall performance of the model, this paper also conducts a more in-depth analysis of its capabilities. We investigate the impact of data deduplication on the model's performance, as well as the potential benefits of using more efficient tokenization methods. Our results indicate that domain-specific models such as medBERTde are particularly useful for longer texts, and that deduplication of training data does not necessarily lead to improved performance. Furthermore, we found that efficient tokenization plays only a minor role in improving model performance, and attribute most of the improved performance to the large amount of training data. To encourage further research, the pre-trained model weights and new benchmarks based on radiological data are made publicly available for use by the scientific community.
summary: This paper presents medBERTde, a pre-trained German BERT model specifically designed for the German medical domain. The model has been trained on a large corpus of 4.7 Million German medical documents and has been shown to achieve new state-of-the-art performance on eight different medical benchmarks covering a wide range of disciplines and medical document types. In addition to evaluating the overall performance of the model, this paper also conducts a more in-depth analysis of its capabilities. We investigate the impact of data deduplication on the model's performance, as well as the potential benefits of using more efficient tokenization methods. Our results indicate that domain-specific models such as medBERTde are particularly useful for longer texts, and that deduplication of training data does not necessarily lead to improved performance. Furthermore, we found that efficient tokenization plays only a minor role in improving model performance, and attribute most of the improved performance to the large amount of training data. To encourage further research, the pre-trained model weights and new benchmarks based on radiological data are made publicly available for use by the scientific community.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 medBERTde，这是一种专为德国医疗领域设计的预训练德国 BERT 模型。该模型已经在包含 470 万份德国医疗文档的大型语料库上进行了训练，并在涵盖广泛学科和医疗文档类型的八种不同医疗基准上显示出新的最先进性能。除了评估模型的整体性能外，本文还对其能力进行了更深入的分析。我们研究了重复数据删除对模型性能的影响，以及使用更有效的标记化方法的潜在好处。我们的结果表明，特定领域的模型（例如 medBERTde）对于较长的文本特别有用，并且训练数据的重复数据删除并不一定会带来性能的提高。此外，我们发现有效的标记化在提高模型性能方面仅发挥很小的作用，并将大部分性能提高归因于大量的训练数据。为了鼓励进一步研究，基于放射数据的预训练模型权重和新基准公开供科学界使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为medBERTde的预训练德语BERT模型，专门针对德国医学领域进行优化，并在多个医学基准测试中取得了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的通用语言模型在处理医学领域文本时表现不足，尤其在处理长文本和特定医学文档时存在局限性，因此需要开发针对德语医学领域的专用模型。
AI.method: 基于470万份德语医学文档训练模型，通过分析数据去重和高效分词方法对模型性能的影响，评估其在八个多学科医学基准测试中的表现。
AI.result: medBERTde在八项医学基准测试中达到最先进水平，发现数据去重对性能提升无显著影响，高效分词作用有限，模型性能主要受益于大规模训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 领域专用模型如medBERTde在处理长文本任务中表现优异，研究结果和模型权重已公开，为后续医学NLP研究提供支持。

search_text: MEDBERT.de: A Comprehensive German BERT Model for the Medical Domain MEDBERT.de：医疗领域的德国综合 BERT 模型 This paper presents medBERTde, a pre-trained German BERT model specifically designed for the German medical domain. The model has been trained on a large corpus of 4.7 Million German medical documents and has been shown to achieve new state-of-the-art performance on eight different medical benchmarks covering a wide range of disciplines and medical document types. In addition to evaluating the overall performance of the model, this paper also conducts a more in-depth analysis of its capabilities. We investigate the impact of data deduplication on the model's performance, as well as the potential benefits of using more efficient tokenization methods. Our results indicate that domain-specific models such as medBERTde are particularly useful for longer texts, and that deduplication of training data does not necessarily lead to improved performance. Furthermore, we found that efficient tokenization plays only a minor role in improving model performance, and attribute most of the improved performance to the large amount of training data. To encourage further research, the pre-trained model weights and new benchmarks based on radiological data are made publicly available for use by the scientific community. 本文介绍了 medBERTde，这是一种专为德国医疗领域设计的预训练德国 BERT 模型。该模型已经在包含 470 万份德国医疗文档的大型语料库上进行了训练，并在涵盖广泛学科和医疗文档类型的八种不同医疗基准上显示出新的最先进性能。除了评估模型的整体性能外，本文还对其能力进行了更深入的分析。我们研究了重复数据删除对模型性能的影响，以及使用更有效的标记化方法的潜在好处。我们的结果表明，特定领域的模型（例如 medBERTde）对于较长的文本特别有用，并且训练数据的重复数据删除并不一定会带来性能的提高。此外，我们发现有效的标记化在提高模型性能方面仅发挥很小的作用，并将大部分性能提高归因于大量的训练数据。为了鼓励进一步研究，基于放射数据的预训练模型权重和新基准公开供科学界使用。 本文提出了一种名为medBERTde的预训练德语BERT模型，专门针对德国医学领域进行优化，并在多个医学基准测试中取得了最先进性能。 Keno K. authors_text: Jamila Smith-Loud,Andrew Smart,Darlene Neal,Amber Ebinama,Eric Corbett,Paul Nicholas,Qazi Rashid,Anne Peckham,Sarah Murphy-Gray,Nicole Morris,Elisha Smith Arrillaga,Nicole-Marie Cotton,Emnet Almedom,Olivia Araiza,Eliza McCullough,Abbie Langston,Christopher Nellum
title: The Equitable AI Research Roundtable (EARR): Towards Community-Based Decision Making in Responsible AI Development
title_zh: 公平人工智能研究圆桌会议 (EARR)：在负责任的人工智能开发中迈向基于社区的决策
abstract: This paper reports on our initial evaluation of The Equitable AI Research Roundtable -- a coalition of experts in law, education, community engagement, social justice, and technology. EARR was created in collaboration among a large tech firm, nonprofits, NGO research institutions, and universities to provide critical research based perspectives and feedback on technology's emergent ethical and social harms. Through semi-structured workshops and discussions within the large tech firm, EARR has provided critical perspectives and feedback on how to conceptualize equity and vulnerability as they relate to AI technology. We outline three principles in practice of how EARR has operated thus far that are especially relevant to the concerns of the FAccT community: how EARR expands the scope of expertise in AI development, how it fosters opportunities for epistemic curiosity and responsibility, and that it creates a space for mutual learning. This paper serves as both an analysis and translation of lessons learned through this engagement approach, and the possibilities for future research.
summary: This paper reports on our initial evaluation of The Equitable AI Research Roundtable -- a coalition of experts in law, education, community engagement, social justice, and technology. EARR was created in collaboration among a large tech firm, nonprofits, NGO research institutions, and universities to provide critical research based perspectives and feedback on technology's emergent ethical and social harms. Through semi-structured workshops and discussions within the large tech firm, EARR has provided critical perspectives and feedback on how to conceptualize equity and vulnerability as they relate to AI technology. We outline three principles in practice of how EARR has operated thus far that are especially relevant to the concerns of the FAccT community: how EARR expands the scope of expertise in AI development, how it fosters opportunities for epistemic curiosity and responsibility, and that it creates a space for mutual learning. This paper serves as both an analysis and translation of lessons learned through this engagement approach, and the possibilities for future research.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了我们对公平人工智能研究圆桌会议（由法律、教育、社区参与、社会正义和技术专家组成的联盟）的初步评估。 EARR 是一家大型科技公司、非营利组织、非政府组织研究机构和大学合作创建的，旨在针对技术新兴的道德和社会危害提供基于批判性研究的观点和反馈。通过大型科技公司内部的半结构化研讨会和讨论，EARR 就如何概念化与人工智能技术相关的公平性和脆弱性提供了重要的观点和反馈。我们概述了 EARR 迄今为止运作方式的三个实践原则，这些原则与 FAccT 社区关注的问题特别相关：EARR 如何扩大人工智能开发的专业知识范围，如何培养认知好奇心和责任感的机会，以及如何创造相互学习的空间。本文既是对通过这种参与方法吸取的经验教训的分析和翻译，也是未来研究的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个跨领域专家联盟EARR的初步评估，旨在通过社区参与推动负责任的AI开发。
AI.motivation: 当前AI技术发展伴随伦理和社会危害，需多方协作确保公平性与社会责任。
AI.method: 通过半结构化研讨会和讨论，联合科技企业、非营利组织等多方主体进行跨领域协作。
AI.result: 提炼出EARR运作的三大原则，包括扩展专业知识、培养责任感与好奇心、促进相互学习。
AI.conclusion: EARR模式为负责任AI开发提供了可行框架，未来需进一步验证其影响并推广实践。

authors_text: Tingting Fang,Fei Zhu,Jie Chen
title: Nonlinear Hyperspectral Unmixing based on Multilinear Mixing Model using Convolutional Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用卷积自动编码器的基于多线性混合模型的非线性高光谱分解
abstract: Unsupervised spectral unmixing consists of representing each observed pixel as a combination of several pure materials called endmembers with their corresponding abundance fractions. Beyond the linear assumption, various nonlinear unmixing models have been proposed, with the associated optimization problems solved either by traditional optimization algorithms or deep learning techniques. Current deep learning-based nonlinear unmixing focuses on the models in additive, bilinear-based formulations. By interpreting the reflection process using the discrete Markov chain, the multilinear mixing model (MLM) successfully accounts for the up to infinite-order interactions between endmembers. However, to simulate the physics process of MLM by neural networks explicitly is a challenging problem that has not been approached by far. In this article, we propose a novel autoencoder-based network for unsupervised unmixing based on MLM. Benefitting from an elaborate network design, the relationships among all the model parameters {\em i.e.}, endmembers, abundances, and transition probability parameters are explicitly modeled. There are two modes: MLM-1DAE considers only pixel-wise spectral information, and MLM-3DAE exploits the spectral-spatial correlations within input patches. Experiments on both the synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method as it achieves competitive performance to the classic solutions of MLM.
summary: Unsupervised spectral unmixing consists of representing each observed pixel as a combination of several pure materials called endmembers with their corresponding abundance fractions. Beyond the linear assumption, various nonlinear unmixing models have been proposed, with the associated optimization problems solved either by traditional optimization algorithms or deep learning techniques. Current deep learning-based nonlinear unmixing focuses on the models in additive, bilinear-based formulations. By interpreting the reflection process using the discrete Markov chain, the multilinear mixing model (MLM) successfully accounts for the up to infinite-order interactions between endmembers. However, to simulate the physics process of MLM by neural networks explicitly is a challenging problem that has not been approached by far. In this article, we propose a novel autoencoder-based network for unsupervised unmixing based on MLM. Benefitting from an elaborate network design, the relationships among all the model parameters {\em i.e.}, endmembers, abundances, and transition probability parameters are explicitly modeled. There are two modes: MLM-1DAE considers only pixel-wise spectral information, and MLM-3DAE exploits the spectral-spatial correlations within input patches. Experiments on both the synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method as it achieves competitive performance to the classic solutions of MLM.
abstract_zh: 无监督光谱分解包括将每个观察到的像素表示为称为端元的几种纯材料及其相应丰度分数的组合。除了线性假设之外，还提出了各种非线性分解模型，并通过传统优化算法或深度学习技术解决了相关的优化问题。当前基于深度学习的非线性解混合侧重于基于加性、双线性的公式中的模型。通过使用离散马尔可夫链解释反射过程，多线性混合模型 (MLM) 成功地解释了端元之间高达无限阶的相互作用。然而，通过神经网络明确地模拟 MLM 的物理过程是一个具有挑战性的问题，迄今为止尚未解决。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于自动编码器的网络，用于基于 MLM 的无监督分解。受益于精心设计的网络设计，所有模型参数、端元、丰度和转移概率参数之间的关系都被明确建模。有两种模式：MLM-1DAE 仅考虑像素级光谱信息，MLM-3DAE 利用输入补丁内的光谱空间相关性。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性，因为它实现了与 MLM 经典解决方案竞争的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多线性混合模型（MLM）的卷积自编码器方法，用于实现高光谱数据的非线性无监督解混。
AI.motivation: 传统的高光谱解混方法通常基于线性假设，而实际中存在非线性混合现象。多线性混合模型能够考虑端元之间的高阶相互作用，但尚未有研究通过神经网络显式模拟这一过程。
AI.method: 本文设计了一种基于自编码器的网络，通过显式建模端元、丰度和转移概率参数之间的关系来实现MLM的非线性解混。提出两种模式：MLM-1DAE和MLM-3DAE，分别考虑像素级光谱信息和光谱-空间相关性。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在解混性能上与经典MLM方法相当，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为显式建模MLM提供了新的思路，为高光谱数据的非线性解混提供了有效的深度学习解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多线性混合模型（MLM）的卷积自编码器方法，用于实现高光谱数据的非线性无监督解混。
ai_content.motivation: 传统的高光谱解混方法通常基于线性假设，而实际中存在非线性混合现象。多线性混合模型能够考虑端元之间的高阶相互作用，但尚未有研究通过神经网络显式模拟这一过程。

search_text: Nonlinear Hyperspectral Unmixing based on Multilinear Mixing Model using Convolutional Autoencoders 使用卷积自动编码器的基于多线性混合模型的非线性高光谱分解 Unsupervised spectral unmixing consists of representing each observed pixel as a combination of several pure materials called endmembers with their corresponding abundance fractions. Beyond the linear assumption, various nonlinear unmixing models have been proposed, with the associated optimization problems solved either by traditional optimization algorithms or deep learning techniques. Current deep learning-based nonlinear unmixing focuses on the models in additive, bilinear-based formulations. By interpreting the reflection process using the discrete Markov chain, the multilinear mixing model (MLM) successfully accounts for the up to infinite-order interactions between endmembers. However, to simulate the physics process of MLM by neural networks explicitly is a challenging problem that has not been approached by far. In this article, we propose a novel autoencoder-based network for unsupervised unmixing based on MLM. Benefitting from an elaborate network design, the relationships among all the model parameters {\em i.e.}, endmembers, abundances, and transition probability parameters are explicitly modeled. There are two modes: MLM-1DAE considers only pixel-wise spectral information, and MLM-3DAE exploits the spectral-spatial correlations within input patches. Experiments on both the synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method as it achieves competitive performance to the classic solutions of MLM. 无监督光谱分解包括将每个观察到的像素表示为称为端元的几种纯材料及其相应丰度分数的组合。除了线性假设之外，还提出了各种非线性分解模型，并通过传统优化算法或深度学习技术解决了相关的优化问题。当前基于深度学习的非线性解混合侧重于基于加性、双线性的公式中的模型。通过使用离散马尔可夫链解释反射过程，多线性混合模型 (MLM) 成功地解释了端元之间高达无限阶的相互作用。然而，通过神经网络明确地模拟 MLM 的物理过程是一个具有挑战性的问题，迄今为止尚未解决。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于自动编码器的网络，用于基于 MLM 的无监督分解。受益于精心设计的网络设计，所有模型参数、端元、丰度和转移概率参数之间的关系都被明确建模。有两种模式：MLM-1DAE 仅考虑像素级光谱信息，MLM-3DAE 利用输入补丁内的光谱空间相关性。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性，因为它实现了与 MLM 经典解决方案竞争的性能。 本文提出了一种基于多线性混合模型（MLM）的卷积自编码器方法，用于实现高光谱数据的非线性无监督解混。 Tingting Fang,Fei Zhu,Jie Chen cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Lucas Kreiss,Shaowei Jiang,Xiang Li,Shiqi Xu,Kevin C. Zhou,Alexander Mühlberg,Kyung Chul Lee,Kanghyun Kim,Amey Chaware,Michael Ando,Laura Barisoni,Seung Ah Lee,Guoan Zheng,Kyle Lafata,Oliver Friedrich,Roarke Horstmeyer
title: Digital staining in optical microscopy using deep learning -- a review
title_zh: 使用深度学习的光学显微镜数字染色——综述
comment: Review article, 4 main Figures, 3 Tables, 2 supplementary figures
comments: Review article, 4 main Figures, 3 Tables, 2 supplementary figures
abstract: Until recently, conventional biochemical staining had the undisputed status as well-established benchmark for most biomedical problems related to clinical diagnostics, fundamental research and biotechnology. Despite this role as gold-standard, staining protocols face several challenges, such as a need for extensive, manual processing of samples, substantial time delays, altered tissue homeostasis, limited choice of contrast agents for a given sample, 2D imaging instead of 3D tomography and many more. Label-free optical technologies, on the other hand, do not rely on exogenous and artificial markers, by exploiting intrinsic optical contrast mechanisms, where the specificity is typically less obvious to the human observer. Over the past few years, digital staining has emerged as a promising concept to use modern deep learning for the translation from optical contrast to established biochemical contrast of actual stainings. In this review article, we provide an in-depth analysis of the current state-of-the-art in this field, suggest methods of good practice, identify pitfalls and challenges and postulate promising advances towards potential future implementations and applications.
summary: Until recently, conventional biochemical staining had the undisputed status as well-established benchmark for most biomedical problems related to clinical diagnostics, fundamental research and biotechnology. Despite this role as gold-standard, staining protocols face several challenges, such as a need for extensive, manual processing of samples, substantial time delays, altered tissue homeostasis, limited choice of contrast agents for a given sample, 2D imaging instead of 3D tomography and many more. Label-free optical technologies, on the other hand, do not rely on exogenous and artificial markers, by exploiting intrinsic optical contrast mechanisms, where the specificity is typically less obvious to the human observer. Over the past few years, digital staining has emerged as a promising concept to use modern deep learning for the translation from optical contrast to established biochemical contrast of actual stainings. In this review article, we provide an in-depth analysis of the current state-of-the-art in this field, suggest methods of good practice, identify pitfalls and challenges and postulate promising advances towards potential future implementations and applications.
abstract_zh: 直到最近，传统生化染色作为与临床诊断、基础研究和生物技术相关的大多数生物医学问题的公认基准，仍具有无可争议的地位。尽管作为黄金标准，染色方案仍面临一些挑战，例如需要对样品进行大量的手动处理、大量的时间延迟、组织稳态改变、给定样品的造影剂选择有限、2D 成像而不是 3D 断层扫描等等。另一方面，无标记光学技术通过利用内在的光学对比机制，不依赖于外源和人工标记，其中特异性对于人类观察者来说通常不太明显。在过去的几年中，数字染色已成为一个有前景的概念，可利用现代深度学习将实际染色的光学对比度转换为已建立的生化对比度。在这篇评论文章中，我们对该领域当前的最新技术进行了深入分析，提出了良好实践的方法，识别了陷阱和挑战，并假设了未来潜在实施和应用的有希望的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用深度学习实现光学显微镜数字染色的最新进展，分析了技术现状、挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统生物化学染色存在流程繁琐、耗时、组织损伤等问题，而无标记光学技术缺乏特异性，需通过深度学习实现光学对比到生物化学对比的转换以提升诊断效率。
AI.method: 通过文献分析法系统梳理数字染色领域技术路线，比较不同深度学习模型性能，总结最佳实践并归纳技术瓶颈。
AI.result: 明确了当前主流的深度学习框架与数据处理流程，指出数据质量、模型泛化能力及跨平台兼容性为关键挑战，预测多模态数据融合与自动化分析为未来突破方向。
AI.conclusion: 数字染色结合深度学习可显著提升显微成像效率与准确性，但需解决数据标准化、算法可解释性等核心问题以推动临床应用落地。

authors_text: Qidong Huang,Xiaoyi Dong,Dongdong Chen,Weiming Zhang,Feifei Wang,Gang Hua,Nenghai Yu
title: Diversity-Aware Meta Visual Prompting
title_zh: 多样性感知元视觉提示
comment: CVPR2023, code is available at https://github.com/shikiw/DAM-VP
comments: CVPR2023, code is available at https://github.com/shikiw/DAM-VP
abstract: We present Diversity-Aware Meta Visual Prompting~(DAM-VP), an efficient and effective prompting method for transferring pre-trained models to downstream tasks with frozen backbone. A challenging issue in visual prompting is that image datasets sometimes have a large data diversity whereas a per-dataset generic prompt can hardly handle the complex distribution shift toward the original pretraining data distribution properly. To address this issue, we propose a dataset Diversity-Aware prompting strategy whose initialization is realized by a Meta-prompt. Specifically, we cluster the downstream dataset into small homogeneity subsets in a diversity-adaptive way, with each subset has its own prompt optimized separately. Such a divide-and-conquer design reduces the optimization difficulty greatly and significantly boosts the prompting performance. Furthermore, all the prompts are initialized with a meta-prompt, which is learned across several datasets. It is a bootstrapped paradigm, with the key observation that the prompting knowledge learned from previous datasets could help the prompt to converge faster and perform better on a new dataset. During inference, we dynamically select a proper prompt for each input, based on the feature distance between the input and each subset. Through extensive experiments, our DAM-VP demonstrates superior efficiency and effectiveness, clearly surpassing previous prompting methods in a series of downstream datasets for different pretraining models. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/shikiw/DAM-VP}.
summary: We present Diversity-Aware Meta Visual Prompting~(DAM-VP), an efficient and effective prompting method for transferring pre-trained models to downstream tasks with frozen backbone. A challenging issue in visual prompting is that image datasets sometimes have a large data diversity whereas a per-dataset generic prompt can hardly handle the complex distribution shift toward the original pretraining data distribution properly. To address this issue, we propose a dataset Diversity-Aware prompting strategy whose initialization is realized by a Meta-prompt. Specifically, we cluster the downstream dataset into small homogeneity subsets in a diversity-adaptive way, with each subset has its own prompt optimized separately. Such a divide-and-conquer design reduces the optimization difficulty greatly and significantly boosts the prompting performance. Furthermore, all the prompts are initialized with a meta-prompt, which is learned across several datasets. It is a bootstrapped paradigm, with the key observation that the prompting knowledge learned from previous datasets could help the prompt to converge faster and perform better on a new dataset. During inference, we dynamically select a proper prompt for each input, based on the feature distance between the input and each subset. Through extensive experiments, our DAM-VP demonstrates superior efficiency and effectiveness, clearly surpassing previous prompting methods in a series of downstream datasets for different pretraining models. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/shikiw/DAM-VP}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了多样性感知元视觉提示~（DAM-VP），这是一种高效且有效的提示方法，用于将预训练模型转移到具有冻结主干的下游任务。视觉提示中的一个具有挑战性的问题是图像数据集有时具有很大的数据多样性，而每个数据集的通用提示很难正确处理向原始预训练数据分布的复杂分布转变。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种数据集多样性感知提示策略，其初始化是通过元提示来实现的。具体来说，我们以多样性自适应的方式将下游数据集聚类成小的同质子集，每个子​​集都有自己单独优化的提示。这种分而治之的设计大大降低了优化难度，并显着提升了提示性能。此外，所有提示均使用元提示进行初始化，该元提示是通过多个数据集学习的。这是一个引导范式，其关键观察是从以前的数据集中学到的提示知识可以帮助提示更快地收敛并在新数据集上表现得更好。在推理过程中，我们根据输入与每个子集之间的特征距离，动态地为每个输入选择合适的提示。通过大量的实验，我们的 DAM-VP 表现出了卓越的效率和有效性，在不同预训练模型的一系列下游数据集中明显超越了之前的提示方法。我们的代码位于：\url{https://github.com/shikiw/DAM-VP}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAM-VP方法，通过元提示初始化和数据集多样性感知的提示策略，解决视觉提示中因数据分布偏移导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示方法在处理多样化下游任务时，单一通用提示难以适应复杂的数据分布偏移，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 采用元提示初始化多个子集专用提示，通过自适应聚类将下游数据集划分为同质子集，分别优化各子集提示，并基于输入特征动态选择最优提示。
AI.result: 在多个预训练模型的下游任务中，DAM-VP显著优于现有提示方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DAM-VP通过分治策略和元提示机制有效提升提示效率，为跨数据集的视觉模型迁移提供了新思路。

result: 在多个预训练模型的下游任务中，DAM-VP显著优于现有提示方法，且代码已开源。
conclusion: DAM-VP通过分治策略和元提示机制有效提升提示效率，为跨数据集的视觉模型迁移提供了新思路。
search_text: Diversity-Aware Meta Visual Prompting 多样性感知元视觉提示 We present Diversity-Aware Meta Visual Prompting~(DAM-VP), an efficient and effective prompting method for transferring pre-trained models to downstream tasks with frozen backbone. A challenging issue in visual prompting is that image datasets sometimes have a large data diversity whereas a per-dataset generic prompt can hardly handle the complex distribution shift toward the original pretraining data distribution properly. To address this issue, we propose a dataset Diversity-Aware prompting strategy whose initialization is realized by a Meta-prompt. Specifically, we cluster the downstream dataset into small homogeneity subsets in a diversity-adaptive way, with each subset has its own prompt optimized separately. Such a divide-and-conquer design reduces the optimization difficulty greatly and significantly boosts the prompting performance. Furthermore, all the prompts are initialized with a meta-prompt, which is learned across several datasets. It is a bootstrapped paradigm, with the key observation that the prompting knowledge learned from previous datasets could help the prompt to converge faster and perform better on a new dataset. During inference, we dynamically select a proper prompt for each input, based on the feature distance between the input and each subset. Through extensive experiments, our DAM-VP demonstrates superior efficiency and effectiveness, clearly surpassing previous prompting methods in a series of downstream datasets for different pretraining models. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/shikiw/DAM-VP}. 我们提出了多样性感知元视觉提示~（DAM-VP），这是一种高效且有效的提示方法，用于将预训练模型转移到具有冻结主干的下游任务。视觉提示中的一个具有挑战性的问题是图像数据集有时具有很大的数据多样性，而每个数据集的通用提示很难正确处理向原始预训练数据分布的复杂分布转变。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种数据集多样性感知提示策略，其初始化是通过元提示来实现的。具体来说，我们以多样性自适应的方式将下游数据集聚类成小的同质子集，每个子​​集都有自己单独优化的提示。这种分而治之的设计大大降低了优化难度，并显着提升了提示性能。此外，所有提示均使用元提示进行初始化，该元提示是通过多个数据集学习的。这是一个引导范式，其关键观察是从以前的数据集中学到的提示知识可以帮助提示更快地收敛并在新数据集上表现得更好。在推理过程中，我们根据输入与每个子集之间的特征距离，动态地为每个输入选择合适的提示。通过大量的实验，我们的 DAM-VP 表现出了卓越的效率和有效性，在不同预训练模型的一系列下游数据集中明显超越了之前的提示方法。我们的代码位于：\url{https://github.com/shikiw/DAM-VP}。 本文提出DAM-VP方法，通过元提示初始化和数据集多样性感知的提示策略，解决视觉提示中因数据分布偏移导致的性能下降问题。 Qidong Huang,Xiaoyi Dong,Dongdong Chen,Weiming Zhang,Feifei Wang,Gang Hua,Nenghai Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Naoto Inoue,Kotaro Kikuchi,Edgar Simo-Serra,Mayu Otani,Kota Yamaguchi
title: LayoutDM: Discrete Diffusion Model for Controllable Layout Generation
title_zh: LayoutDM：用于可控布局生成的离散扩散模型
comment: To be published in CVPR2023, project page: https://cyberagentailab.github.io/layout-dm/
comments: To be published in CVPR2023, project page: https://cyberagentailab.github.io/layout-dm/
abstract: Controllable layout generation aims at synthesizing plausible arrangement of element bounding boxes with optional constraints, such as type or position of a specific element. In this work, we try to solve a broad range of layout generation tasks in a single model that is based on discrete state-space diffusion models. Our model, named LayoutDM, naturally handles the structured layout data in the discrete representation and learns to progressively infer a noiseless layout from the initial input, where we model the layout corruption process by modality-wise discrete diffusion. For conditional generation, we propose to inject layout constraints in the form of masking or logit adjustment during inference. We show in the experiments that our LayoutDM successfully generates high-quality layouts and outperforms both task-specific and task-agnostic baselines on several layout tasks.
summary: Controllable layout generation aims at synthesizing plausible arrangement of element bounding boxes with optional constraints, such as type or position of a specific element. In this work, we try to solve a broad range of layout generation tasks in a single model that is based on discrete state-space diffusion models. Our model, named LayoutDM, naturally handles the structured layout data in the discrete representation and learns to progressively infer a noiseless layout from the initial input, where we model the layout corruption process by modality-wise discrete diffusion. For conditional generation, we propose to inject layout constraints in the form of masking or logit adjustment during inference. We show in the experiments that our LayoutDM successfully generates high-quality layouts and outperforms both task-specific and task-agnostic baselines on several layout tasks.
abstract_zh: 可控布局生成旨在综合具有可选约束（例如特定元素的类型或位置）的元素边界框的合理排列。在这项工作中，我们尝试在基于离散状态空间扩散模型的单个模型中解决广泛的布局生成任务。我们的模型名为 LayoutDM，自然地处理离散表示中的结构化布局数据，并学习从初始输入逐步推断无噪声布局，其中我们通过模态离散扩散对布局损坏过程进行建模。对于条件生成，我们建议在推理过程中以屏蔽或 logit 调整的形式注入布局约束。我们在实验中表明，我们的 LayoutDM 成功生成了高质量的布局，并且在多个布局任务上优于特定于任务和任务无关的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散状态空间扩散模型的可控布局生成方法LayoutDM，能够处理结构化布局数据并满足多种约束条件。
AI.motivation: 现有布局生成方法难以统一处理多任务且约束控制能力有限，需开发通用模型以满足复杂布局约束需求。
AI.method: 设计离散扩散模型LayoutDM，通过模态级离散扩散模拟布局退化过程，并采用掩码或logit调整实现条件生成。
AI.result: 实验表明LayoutDM在多个布局任务中生成质量优于任务特定和通用基线模型，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 离散扩散模型为可控布局生成提供了新思路，未来可拓展至更多结构化数据生成场景。

authors_text: Jianren Wang,Sudeep Dasari,Mohan Kumar Srirama,Shubham Tulsiani,Abhinav Gupta
title: Manipulate by Seeing: Creating Manipulation Controllers from Pre-Trained Representations
title_zh: 通过观察进行操作：根据预先训练的表示创建操作控制器
comment: Oral Presentation at the International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2023
comments: Oral Presentation at the International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2023
abstract: The field of visual representation learning has seen explosive growth in the past years, but its benefits in robotics have been surprisingly limited so far. Prior work uses generic visual representations as a basis to learn (task-specific) robot action policies (e.g., via behavior cloning). While the visual representations do accelerate learning, they are primarily used to encode visual observations. Thus, action information has to be derived purely from robot data, which is expensive to collect! In this work, we present a scalable alternative where the visual representations can help directly infer robot actions. We observe that vision encoders express relationships between image observations as distances (e.g., via embedding dot product) that could be used to efficiently plan robot behavior. We operationalize this insight and develop a simple algorithm for acquiring a distance function and dynamics predictor, by fine-tuning a pre-trained representation on human collected video sequences. The final method is able to substantially outperform traditional robot learning baselines (e.g., 70% success v.s. 50% for behavior cloning on pick-place) on a suite of diverse real-world manipulation tasks. It can also generalize to novel objects, without using any robot demonstrations during train time. For visualizations of the learned policies please check: https://agi-labs.github.io/manipulate-by-seeing/.
summary: The field of visual representation learning has seen explosive growth in the past years, but its benefits in robotics have been surprisingly limited so far. Prior work uses generic visual representations as a basis to learn (task-specific) robot action policies (e.g., via behavior cloning). While the visual representations do accelerate learning, they are primarily used to encode visual observations. Thus, action information has to be derived purely from robot data, which is expensive to collect! In this work, we present a scalable alternative where the visual representations can help directly infer robot actions. We observe that vision encoders express relationships between image observations as distances (e.g., via embedding dot product) that could be used to efficiently plan robot behavior. We operationalize this insight and develop a simple algorithm for acquiring a distance function and dynamics predictor, by fine-tuning a pre-trained representation on human collected video sequences. The final method is able to substantially outperform traditional robot learning baselines (e.g., 70% success v.s. 50% for behavior cloning on pick-place) on a suite of diverse real-world manipulation tasks. It can also generalize to novel objects, without using any robot demonstrations during train time. For visualizations of the learned policies please check: https://agi-labs.github.io/manipulate-by-seeing/.
abstract_zh: 视觉表征学习领域在过去几年中出现了爆炸性增长，但迄今为止其在机器人技术中的好处却出人意料地有限。先前的工作使用通用视觉表示作为学习（特定于任务的）机器人动作策略（例如，通过行为克隆）的基础。虽然视觉表示确实加速了学习，但它们主要用于编码视觉观察。因此，动作信息必须纯粹从机器人数据中获取，而收集这些数据的成本很高！在这项工作中，我们提出了一种可扩展的替代方案，其中视觉表示可以帮助直接推断机器人动作。我们观察到视觉编码器将图像观察之间的关系表达为距离（例如，通过嵌入点积），可用于有效地规划机器人行为。我们将这一见解付诸实践，并开发了一种简单的算法，通过对人类收集的视频序列的预训练表示进行微调，来获取距离函数和动态预测器。最终方法在一系列不同的现实世界操作任务上能够大大优于传统的机器人学习基线（例如，在拾取位置进行行为克隆的成功率为 70%，而行为克隆的成功率为 50%）。它还可以推广到新颖的物体，而无需在训练期间使用任何机器人演示。有关学习策略的可视化，请检查：https://agi-labs.github.io/manipulate-by-seeing/。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用预训练视觉表示直接推断机器人动作的方法，以提高操作任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖机器人数据提取动作信息成本高，而视觉表示中的图像距离关系可更高效规划行为。
AI.method: 微调预训练模型获取距离函数和动力学预测器，通过人类视频序列学习操作控制器。
AI.result: 在多个真实操作任务中成功率提升（如抓放任务70% vs 50%），且可泛化至新物体无需训练演示。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效利用预训练视觉表示提升机器人学习效率与泛化能力，为视觉-操作联合学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Renrui Zhang,Liuhui Wang,Ziyu Guo,Yali Wang,Peng Gao,Hongsheng Li,Jianbo Shi
title: Parameter is Not All You Need: Starting from Non-Parametric Networks for 3D Point Cloud Analysis
title_zh: 参数并不是您所需要的全部：从非参数网络开始进行 3D 点云分析
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/ZrrSkywalker/Point-NN
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/ZrrSkywalker/Point-NN
abstract: We present a Non-parametric Network for 3D point cloud analysis, Point-NN, which consists of purely non-learnable components: farthest point sampling (FPS), k-nearest neighbors (k-NN), and pooling operations, with trigonometric functions. Surprisingly, it performs well on various 3D tasks, requiring no parameters or training, and even surpasses existing fully trained models. Starting from this basic non-parametric model, we propose two extensions. First, Point-NN can serve as a base architectural framework to construct Parametric Networks by simply inserting linear layers on top. Given the superior non-parametric foundation, the derived Point-PN exhibits a high performance-efficiency trade-off with only a few learnable parameters. Second, Point-NN can be regarded as a plug-and-play module for the already trained 3D models during inference. Point-NN captures the complementary geometric knowledge and enhances existing methods for different 3D benchmarks without re-training. We hope our work may cast a light on the community for understanding 3D point clouds with non-parametric methods. Code is available at https://github.com/ZrrSkywalker/Point-NN.
summary: We present a Non-parametric Network for 3D point cloud analysis, Point-NN, which consists of purely non-learnable components: farthest point sampling (FPS), k-nearest neighbors (k-NN), and pooling operations, with trigonometric functions. Surprisingly, it performs well on various 3D tasks, requiring no parameters or training, and even surpasses existing fully trained models. Starting from this basic non-parametric model, we propose two extensions. First, Point-NN can serve as a base architectural framework to construct Parametric Networks by simply inserting linear layers on top. Given the superior non-parametric foundation, the derived Point-PN exhibits a high performance-efficiency trade-off with only a few learnable parameters. Second, Point-NN can be regarded as a plug-and-play module for the already trained 3D models during inference. Point-NN captures the complementary geometric knowledge and enhances existing methods for different 3D benchmarks without re-training. We hope our work may cast a light on the community for understanding 3D point clouds with non-parametric methods. Code is available at https://github.com/ZrrSkywalker/Point-NN.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于 3D 点云分析的非参数网络 Point-NN，它由纯不可学习的组件组成：最远点采样 (FPS)、k 最近邻 (k-NN) 和带有三角函数的池操作。令人惊讶的是，它在各种 3D 任务上表现良好，不需要参数或训练，甚至超越了现有的完全训练的模型。从这个基本的非参数模型开始，我们提出了两个扩展。首先，Point-NN 可以作为构建参数网络的基础架构框架，只需在顶部插入线性层即可。鉴于卓越的非参数基础，派生的 Point-PN 表现出高性能与效率的权衡，仅需要几个可学习的参数。其次，Point-NN 可以被视为推理过程中已训练的 3D 模型的即插即用模块。 Point-NN 捕获互补的几何知识，并增强针对不同 3D 基准的现有方法，而无需重新训练。我们希望我们的工作能够为社区带来启发，帮助他们用非参数方法理解 3D 点云。代码可在 https://github.com/ZrrSkywalker/Point-NN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需参数和训练的非参数网络Point-NN，用于3D点云分析，并通过两种扩展方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统依赖参数的3D点云分析方法，探索无需训练的非参数模型在几何理解中的潜力。
AI.method: 基于FPS、k-NN和三角函数构建纯非参数网络Point-NN，并扩展为带少量参数的Point-PN或作为模块增强现有模型。
AI.result: Point-NN在多个3D任务中超越现有训练模型，Point-PN实现高性能-效率平衡，且无需再训练即可提升已有方法。
AI.conclusion: 非参数方法为3D点云分析提供了高效且有效的替代方案，启发社区探索更轻量化的模型设计。

search_text: Parameter is Not All You Need: Starting from Non-Parametric Networks for 3D Point Cloud Analysis 参数并不是您所需要的全部：从非参数网络开始进行 3D 点云分析 We present a Non-parametric Network for 3D point cloud analysis, Point-NN, which consists of purely non-learnable components: farthest point sampling (FPS), k-nearest neighbors (k-NN), and pooling operations, with trigonometric functions. Surprisingly, it performs well on various 3D tasks, requiring no parameters or training, and even surpasses existing fully trained models. Starting from this basic non-parametric model, we propose two extensions. First, Point-NN can serve as a base architectural framework to construct Parametric Networks by simply inserting linear layers on top. Given the superior non-parametric foundation, the derived Point-PN exhibits a high performance-efficiency trade-off with only a few learnable parameters. Second, Point-NN can be regarded as a plug-and-play module for the already trained 3D models during inference. Point-NN captures the complementary geometric knowledge and enhances existing methods for different 3D benchmarks without re-training. We hope our work may cast a light on the community for understanding 3D point clouds with non-parametric methods. Code is available at https://github.com/ZrrSkywalker/Point-NN. 我们提出了一种用于 3D 点云分析的非参数网络 Point-NN，它由纯不可学习的组件组成：最远点采样 (FPS)、k 最近邻 (k-NN) 和带有三角函数的池操作。令人惊讶的是，它在各种 3D 任务上表现良好，不需要参数或训练，甚至超越了现有的完全训练的模型。从这个基本的非参数模型开始，我们提出了两个扩展。首先，Point-NN 可以作为构建参数网络的基础架构框架，只需在顶部插入线性层即可。鉴于卓越的非参数基础，派生的 Point-PN 表现出高性能与效率的权衡，仅需要几个可学习的参数。其次，Point-NN 可以被视为推理过程中已训练的 3D 模型的即插即用模块。 Point-NN 捕获互补的几何知识，并增强针对不同 3D 基准的现有方法，而无需重新训练。我们希望我们的工作能够为社区带来启发，帮助他们用非参数方法理解 3D 点云。代码可在 https://github.com/ZrrSkywalker/Point-NN 获取。 本文提出了一种无需参数和训练的非参数网络Point-NN，用于3D点云分析，并通过两种扩展方法提升性能。 Renrui Zhang,Liuhui Wang,Ziyu Guo,Yali Wang,Peng Gao,Hongsheng Li,Jianbo Shi cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhen Liu,Yao Feng,Michael J. Black,Derek Nowrouzezahrai,Liam Paull,Weiyang Liu
title: MeshDiffusion: Score-based Generative 3D Mesh Modeling
title_zh: MeshDiffusion：基于分数的生成 3D 网格建模
abstract: We consider the task of generating realistic 3D shapes, which is useful for a variety of applications such as automatic scene generation and physical simulation. Compared to other 3D representations like voxels and point clouds, meshes are more desirable in practice, because (1) they enable easy and arbitrary manipulation of shapes for relighting and simulation, and (2) they can fully leverage the power of modern graphics pipelines which are mostly optimized for meshes. Previous scalable methods for generating meshes typically rely on sub-optimal post-processing, and they tend to produce overly-smooth or noisy surfaces without fine-grained geometric details. To overcome these shortcomings, we take advantage of the graph structure of meshes and use a simple yet very effective generative modeling method to generate 3D meshes. Specifically, we represent meshes with deformable tetrahedral grids, and then train a diffusion model on this direct parametrization. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on multiple generative tasks.
summary: We consider the task of generating realistic 3D shapes, which is useful for a variety of applications such as automatic scene generation and physical simulation. Compared to other 3D representations like voxels and point clouds, meshes are more desirable in practice, because (1) they enable easy and arbitrary manipulation of shapes for relighting and simulation, and (2) they can fully leverage the power of modern graphics pipelines which are mostly optimized for meshes. Previous scalable methods for generating meshes typically rely on sub-optimal post-processing, and they tend to produce overly-smooth or noisy surfaces without fine-grained geometric details. To overcome these shortcomings, we take advantage of the graph structure of meshes and use a simple yet very effective generative modeling method to generate 3D meshes. Specifically, we represent meshes with deformable tetrahedral grids, and then train a diffusion model on this direct parametrization. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our model on multiple generative tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑生成真实 3D 形状的任务，这对于自动场景生成和物理模拟等各种应用很有用。与体素和点云等其他 3D 表示形式相比，网格在实践中更受欢迎，因为 (1) 它们可以轻松、任意地操作形状以进行重新照明和模拟，(2) 它们可以充分利用现代图形管道的功能，而现代图形管道大多针对网格进行了优化。以前用于生成网格的可扩展方法通常依赖于次优的后处理，并且它们往往会产生过于平滑或嘈杂的表面，而没有细粒度的几何细节。为了克服这些缺点，我们利用网格的图形结构，并使用简单但非常有效的生成建模方法来生成 3D 网格。具体来说，我们用可变形四面体网格表示网格，然后在这种直接参数化的基础上训练扩散模型。我们证明了我们的模型在多个生成任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散模型的生成方法，用于创建具有精细几何细节的高质量3D网格模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D网格生成方法依赖次优后处理，导致表面过度平滑或存在噪声，无法保留细粒度几何细节，需改进生成质量。
AI.method: 利用网格的图结构，通过可变形四面体网格表示三维形状，并在此参数化基础上训练扩散模型进行生成。
AI.result: 在多种生成任务中验证了该方法的有效性，生成结果优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过直接利用网格结构的扩散模型，有效解决了现有方法的不足，实现了更高质量的3D网格生成。

authors_text: Qihao Liu,Junfeng Wu,Yi Jiang,Xiang Bai,Alan Yuille,Song Bai
title: InstMove: Instance Motion for Object-centric Video Segmentation
title_zh: InstMove：用于以对象为中心的视频分割的实例运动
abstract: Despite significant efforts, cutting-edge video segmentation methods still remain sensitive to occlusion and rapid movement, due to their reliance on the appearance of objects in the form of object embeddings, which are vulnerable to these disturbances. A common solution is to use optical flow to provide motion information, but essentially it only considers pixel-level motion, which still relies on appearance similarity and hence is often inaccurate under occlusion and fast movement. In this work, we study the instance-level motion and present InstMove, which stands for Instance Motion for Object-centric Video Segmentation. In comparison to pixel-wise motion, InstMove mainly relies on instance-level motion information that is free from image feature embeddings, and features physical interpretations, making it more accurate and robust toward occlusion and fast-moving objects. To better fit in with the video segmentation tasks, InstMove uses instance masks to model the physical presence of an object and learns the dynamic model through a memory network to predict its position and shape in the next frame. With only a few lines of code, InstMove can be integrated into current SOTA methods for three different video segmentation tasks and boost their performance. Specifically, we improve the previous arts by 1.5 AP on OVIS dataset, which features heavy occlusions, and 4.9 AP on YouTubeVIS-Long dataset, which mainly contains fast-moving objects. These results suggest that instance-level motion is robust and accurate, and hence serving as a powerful solution in complex scenarios for object-centric video segmentation.
summary: Despite significant efforts, cutting-edge video segmentation methods still remain sensitive to occlusion and rapid movement, due to their reliance on the appearance of objects in the form of object embeddings, which are vulnerable to these disturbances. A common solution is to use optical flow to provide motion information, but essentially it only considers pixel-level motion, which still relies on appearance similarity and hence is often inaccurate under occlusion and fast movement. In this work, we study the instance-level motion and present InstMove, which stands for Instance Motion for Object-centric Video Segmentation. In comparison to pixel-wise motion, InstMove mainly relies on instance-level motion information that is free from image feature embeddings, and features physical interpretations, making it more accurate and robust toward occlusion and fast-moving objects. To better fit in with the video segmentation tasks, InstMove uses instance masks to model the physical presence of an object and learns the dynamic model through a memory network to predict its position and shape in the next frame. With only a few lines of code, InstMove can be integrated into current SOTA methods for three different video segmentation tasks and boost their performance. Specifically, we improve the previous arts by 1.5 AP on OVIS dataset, which features heavy occlusions, and 4.9 AP on YouTubeVIS-Long dataset, which mainly contains fast-moving objects. These results suggest that instance-level motion is robust and accurate, and hence serving as a powerful solution in complex scenarios for object-centric video segmentation.
abstract_zh: 尽管付出了巨大的努力，尖端的视频分割方法仍然对遮挡和快速移动敏感，因为它们依赖于对象嵌入形式的对象外观，而对象嵌入很容易受到这些干扰。常见的解决方案是使用光流来提供运动信息，但本质上它只考虑像素级运动，仍然依赖于外观相似性，因此在遮挡和快速运动下往往不准确。在这项工作中，我们研究了实例级运动并提出了 InstMove，它代表以对象为中心的视频分割的实例运动。与像素级运动相比，InstMove 主要依赖于实例级运动信息，不受图像特征嵌入的影响，并具有物理解释，使其对于遮挡和快速移动的物体更加准确和鲁棒。为了更好地适应视频分割任务，InstMove 使用实例掩码对对象的物理存在进行建模，并通过内存网络学习动态模型以预测其在下一帧中的位置和形状。只需几行代码，InstMove 就可以集成到当前的 SOTA 方法中，用于三种不同的视频分割任务并提高其性能。具体来说，我们在 OVIS 数据集（具有严重遮挡）上将之前的技术提高了 1.5 AP，在 YouTubeVIS-Long 数据集上将之前的技术提高了 4.9 AP（主要包含快速移动的物体）。这些结果表明实例级运动是稳健且准确的，因此可以作为以对象为中心的视频分割的复杂场景中的强大解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InstMove方法，通过实例级运动信息提升遮挡和快速运动场景下的视频分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割方法依赖像素级光流和外观嵌入，在遮挡和快速运动场景下易失效，需寻找更鲁棒的运动建模方式。
AI.method: 基于实例掩码建模物体物理存在状态，通过记忆网络学习动态模型预测下一帧物体位置和形状，无需依赖图像特征嵌入。
AI.result: 在OVIS数据集上提升1.5 AP，在YouTubeVIS-Long数据集上提升4.9 AP，验证了方法对复杂场景的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 实例级运动建模能有效提升遮挡和快速运动场景下的视频分割精度，为对象中心视频分割提供新思路。

method: 基于实例掩码建模物体物理存在状态，通过记忆网络学习动态模型预测下一帧物体位置和形状，无需依赖图像特征嵌入。
result: 在OVIS数据集上提升1.5 AP，在YouTubeVIS-Long数据集上提升4.9 AP，验证了方法对复杂场景的有效性。
conclusion: 实例级运动建模能有效提升遮挡和快速运动场景下的视频分割精度，为对象中心视频分割提供新思路。
search_text: InstMove: Instance Motion for Object-centric Video Segmentation InstMove：用于以对象为中心的视频分割的实例运动 Despite significant efforts, cutting-edge video segmentation methods still remain sensitive to occlusion and rapid movement, due to their reliance on the appearance of objects in the form of object embeddings, which are vulnerable to these disturbances. A common solution is to use optical flow to provide motion information, but essentially it only considers pixel-level motion, which still relies on appearance similarity and hence is often inaccurate under occlusion and fast movement. In this work, we study the instance-level motion and present InstMove, which stands for Instance Motion for Object-centric Video Segmentation. In comparison to pixel-wise motion, InstMove mainly relies on instance-level motion information that is free from image feature embeddings, and features physical interpretations, making it more accurate and robust toward occlusion and fast-moving objects. To better fit in with the video segmentation tasks, InstMove uses instance masks to model the physical presence of an object and learns the dynamic model through a memory network to predict its position and shape in the next frame. With only a few lines of code, InstMove can be integrated into current SOTA methods for three different video segmentation tasks and boost their performance. Specifically, we improve the previous arts by 1.5 AP on OVIS dataset, which features heavy occlusions, and 4.9 AP on YouTubeVIS-Long dataset, which mainly contains fast-moving objects. These results suggest that instance-level motion is robust and accurate, and hence serving as a powerful solution in complex scenarios for object-centric video segmentation. 尽管付出了巨大的努力，尖端的视频分割方法仍然对遮挡和快速移动敏感，因为它们依赖于对象嵌入形式的对象外观，而对象嵌入很容易受到这些干扰。常见的解决方案是使用光流来提供运动信息，但本质上它只考虑像素级运动，仍然依赖于外观相似性，因此在遮挡和快速运动下往往不准确。在这项工作中，我们研究了实例级运动并提出了 InstMove，它代表以对象为中心的视频分割的实例运动。与像素级运动相比，InstMove 主要依赖于实例级运动信息，不受图像特征嵌入的影响，并具有物理解释，使其对于遮挡和快速移动的物体更加准确和鲁棒。为了更好地适应视频分割任务，InstMove 使用实例掩码对对象的物理存在进行建模，并通过内存网络学习动态模型以预测其在下一帧中的位置和形状。只需几行代码，InstMove 就可以集成到当前的 SOTA 方法中，用于三种不同的视频分割任务并提高其性能。具体来说，我们在 OVIS 数据集（具有严重遮挡）上将之前的技术提高了 1.5 AP，在 YouTubeVIS-Long 数据集上将之前的技术提高了 4.9 AP（主要包含快速移动的物体）。这些结果表明实例级运动是稳健且准确的，因此可以作为以对象为中心的视频分割的复杂场景中的强大解决方案。 本文提出InstMove方法，通过实例级运动信息提升遮挡和快速运动场景下的视频分割性能。 Qihao Liu,Junfeng Wu,Yi Jiang,Xiang Bai,Alan Yuille,Song Bai cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Zhang,Feng Li,Xueyan Zou,Shilong Liu,Chunyuan Li,Jianfeng Gao,Jianwei Yang,Lei Zhang
title: A Simple Framework for Open-Vocabulary Segmentation and Detection
title_zh: 开放词汇分割和检测的简单框架
comment: A Simple Framework for Open-Vocabulary Segmentation and Detection
comments: A Simple Framework for Open-Vocabulary Segmentation and Detection
abstract: We present OpenSeeD, a simple Open-vocabulary Segmentation and Detection framework that jointly learns from different segmentation and detection datasets. To bridge the gap of vocabulary and annotation granularity, we first introduce a pre-trained text encoder to encode all the visual concepts in two tasks and learn a common semantic space for them. This gives us reasonably good results compared with the counterparts trained on segmentation task only. To further reconcile them, we locate two discrepancies: $i$) task discrepancy -- segmentation requires extracting masks for both foreground objects and background stuff, while detection merely cares about the former; $ii$) data discrepancy -- box and mask annotations are with different spatial granularity, and thus not directly interchangeable. To address these issues, we propose a decoupled decoding to reduce the interference between foreground/background and a conditioned mask decoding to assist in generating masks for given boxes. To this end, we develop a simple encoder-decoder model encompassing all three techniques and train it jointly on COCO and Objects365. After pre-training, our model exhibits competitive or stronger zero-shot transferability for both segmentation and detection. Specifically, OpenSeeD beats the state-of-the-art method for open-vocabulary instance and panoptic segmentation across 5 datasets, and outperforms previous work for open-vocabulary detection on LVIS and ODinW under similar settings. When transferred to specific tasks, our model achieves new SoTA for panoptic segmentation on COCO and ADE20K, and instance segmentation on ADE20K and Cityscapes. Finally, we note that OpenSeeD is the first to explore the potential of joint training on segmentation and detection, and hope it can be received as a strong baseline for developing a single model for both tasks in open world.
summary: We present OpenSeeD, a simple Open-vocabulary Segmentation and Detection framework that jointly learns from different segmentation and detection datasets. To bridge the gap of vocabulary and annotation granularity, we first introduce a pre-trained text encoder to encode all the visual concepts in two tasks and learn a common semantic space for them. This gives us reasonably good results compared with the counterparts trained on segmentation task only. To further reconcile them, we locate two discrepancies: $i$) task discrepancy -- segmentation requires extracting masks for both foreground objects and background stuff, while detection merely cares about the former; $ii$) data discrepancy -- box and mask annotations are with different spatial granularity, and thus not directly interchangeable. To address these issues, we propose a decoupled decoding to reduce the interference between foreground/background and a conditioned mask decoding to assist in generating masks for given boxes. To this end, we develop a simple encoder-decoder model encompassing all three techniques and train it jointly on COCO and Objects365. After pre-training, our model exhibits competitive or stronger zero-shot transferability for both segmentation and detection. Specifically, OpenSeeD beats the state-of-the-art method for open-vocabulary instance and panoptic segmentation across 5 datasets, and outperforms previous work for open-vocabulary detection on LVIS and ODinW under similar settings. When transferred to specific tasks, our model achieves new SoTA for panoptic segmentation on COCO and ADE20K, and instance segmentation on ADE20K and Cityscapes. Finally, we note that OpenSeeD is the first to explore the potential of joint training on segmentation and detection, and hope it can be received as a strong baseline for developing a single model for both tasks in open world.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 OpenSeeD，一个简单的开放词汇分割和检测框架，可以从不同的分割和检测数据集中共同学习。为了弥合词汇和注释粒度的差距，我们首先引入一个预训练的文本编码器来编码两个任务中的所有视觉概念，并为它们学习一个共同的语义空间。与仅在分割任务上训练的同行相比，这为我们提供了相当好的结果。为了进一步协调它们，我们找到两个差异：$i$）任务差异——分割需要提取前景对象和背景对象的掩模，而检测只关心前者； $ii$) 数据差异——框和掩模注释具有不同的空间粒度，因此不能直接互换。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种解耦解码，以减少前景/背景之间的干扰，并提出了条件掩码解码，以帮助为给定框生成掩码。为此，我们开发了一个包含所有三种技术的简单编码器-解码器模型，并在 COCO 和 Objects365 上联合训练。经过预训练后，我们的模型在分割和检测方面表现出有竞争力的或更强的零样本可迁移性。具体来说，OpenSeeD 击败了跨 5 个数据集的开放词汇实例和全景分割的最先进方法，并且优于之前在类似设置下对 LVIS 和 ODinW 进行开放词汇检测的工作。当转移到特定任务时，我们的模型在 COCO 和 ADE20K 上实现了全景分割的新 SoTA，在 ADE20K 和 Cityscapes 上实现了实例分割。最后，我们注意到 OpenSeeD 是第一个探索分割和检测联合训练潜力的公司，并希望它能够作为在开放世界中为这两项任务开发单一模型的强大基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenSeeD框架，通过联合学习分割与检测任务，实现开放词汇的分割与检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在分割与检测任务间存在词汇量和标注粒度的差距，需统一语义空间并解决任务与数据差异问题。
AI.method: 引入预训练文本编码器构建共享语义空间，采用解耦解码减少前景/背景干扰，并通过条件掩码解码生成框对应掩码，联合训练分割与检测数据集。
AI.result: OpenSeeD在5个数据集的开放词汇分割任务及LVIS、ODinW检测任务中均优于现有方法，在COCO、ADE20K等数据集上达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: OpenSeeD是首个联合训练分割与检测的框架，为开放世界下统一模型提供了强基线。

authors_text: Anthony Chen,Kevin Zhang,Renrui Zhang,Zihan Wang,Yuheng Lu,Yandong Guo,Shanghang Zhang
title: PiMAE: Point Cloud and Image Interactive Masked Autoencoders for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: PiMAE：用于 3D 对象检测的点云和图像交互式掩模自动编码器
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023. Code is available at https://github.com/BLVLab/PiMAE
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023. Code is available at https://github.com/BLVLab/PiMAE
abstract: Masked Autoencoders learn strong visual representations and achieve state-of-the-art results in several independent modalities, yet very few works have addressed their capabilities in multi-modality settings. In this work, we focus on point cloud and RGB image data, two modalities that are often presented together in the real world, and explore their meaningful interactions. To improve upon the cross-modal synergy in existing works, we propose PiMAE, a self-supervised pre-training framework that promotes 3D and 2D interaction through three aspects. Specifically, we first notice the importance of masking strategies between the two sources and utilize a projection module to complementarily align the mask and visible tokens of the two modalities. Then, we utilize a well-crafted two-branch MAE pipeline with a novel shared decoder to promote cross-modality interaction in the mask tokens. Finally, we design a unique cross-modal reconstruction module to enhance representation learning for both modalities. Through extensive experiments performed on large-scale RGB-D scene understanding benchmarks (SUN RGB-D and ScannetV2), we discover it is nontrivial to interactively learn point-image features, where we greatly improve multiple 3D detectors, 2D detectors, and few-shot classifiers by 2.9%, 6.7%, and 2.4%, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/BLVLab/PiMAE.
summary: Masked Autoencoders learn strong visual representations and achieve state-of-the-art results in several independent modalities, yet very few works have addressed their capabilities in multi-modality settings. In this work, we focus on point cloud and RGB image data, two modalities that are often presented together in the real world, and explore their meaningful interactions. To improve upon the cross-modal synergy in existing works, we propose PiMAE, a self-supervised pre-training framework that promotes 3D and 2D interaction through three aspects. Specifically, we first notice the importance of masking strategies between the two sources and utilize a projection module to complementarily align the mask and visible tokens of the two modalities. Then, we utilize a well-crafted two-branch MAE pipeline with a novel shared decoder to promote cross-modality interaction in the mask tokens. Finally, we design a unique cross-modal reconstruction module to enhance representation learning for both modalities. Through extensive experiments performed on large-scale RGB-D scene understanding benchmarks (SUN RGB-D and ScannetV2), we discover it is nontrivial to interactively learn point-image features, where we greatly improve multiple 3D detectors, 2D detectors, and few-shot classifiers by 2.9%, 6.7%, and 2.4%, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/BLVLab/PiMAE.
abstract_zh: 蒙面自动编码器学习强大的视觉表示，并在几种独立的模态中实现最先进的结果，但很少有作品在多模态设置中解决它们的能力。在这项工作中，我们重点关注点云和 RGB 图像数据（这两种在现实世界中经常一起呈现的模式），并探索它们有意义的交互。为了改善现有工作中的跨模态协同作用，我们提出了 PiMAE，一种自监督预训练框架，通过三个方面促进 3D 和 2D 交互。具体来说，我们首先注意到两个源之间的掩码策略的重要性，并利用投影模块来互补地对齐两种模式的掩码和可见标记。然后，我们利用精心设计的两分支 MAE 管道和新颖的共享解码器来促进掩码令牌中的跨模态交互。最后，我们设计了一个独特的跨模态重建模块来增强两种模态的表示学习。通过在大规模 RGB-D 场景理解基准（SUN RGB-D 和 ScannetV2）上进行的大量实验，我们发现交互式学习点图像特征并非易事，我们将多个 3D 检测器、2D 检测器和少样本分类器分别大幅改进了 2.9%、6.7% 和 2.4%。代码可在 https://github.com/BLVLab/PiMAE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PiMAE，一种结合点云和图像的跨模态自监督预训练框架，用于提升3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态研究较少关注点云与图像的协同作用，而二者在真实场景中常共存，需探索有效交互机制以提升多模态表征能力。
AI.method: 通过三方面改进：1）设计投影模块对齐点云与图像的掩码与可见区域；2）构建双分支MAE结构并引入共享解码器促进跨模态交互；3）开发跨模态重建模块增强表征学习。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D和ScannetV2数据集上，PiMAE使3D检测器性能提升2.9%，2D检测器提升6.7%，少样本分类器提升2.4%。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态特征交互具有挑战性，PiMAE通过结构创新有效提升了多模态表征能力，代码已开源供研究使用。

motivation: 现有跨模态研究较少关注点云与图像的协同作用，而二者在真实场景中常共存，需探索有效交互机制以提升多模态表征能力。
method: 通过三方面改进：1）设计投影模块对齐点云与图像的掩码与可见区域；2）构建双分支MAE结构并引入共享解码器促进跨模态交互；3）开发跨模态重建模块增强表征学习。
result: 在SUN RGB-D和ScannetV2数据集上，PiMAE使3D检测器性能提升2.9%，2D检测器提升6.7%，少样本分类器提升2.4%。
conclusion: 跨模态特征交互具有挑战性，PiMAE通过结构创新有效提升了多模态表征能力，代码已开源供研究使用。
search_text: PiMAE: Point Cloud and Image Interactive Masked Autoencoders for 3D Object Detection PiMAE：用于 3D 对象检测的点云和图像交互式掩模自动编码器 Masked Autoencoders learn strong visual representations and achieve state-of-the-art results in several independent modalities, yet very few works have addressed their capabilities in multi-modality settings. In this work, we focus on point cloud and RGB image data, two modalities that are often presented together in the real world, and explore their meaningful interactions. To improve upon the cross-modal synergy in existing works, we propose PiMAE, a self-supervised pre-training framework that promotes 3D and 2D interaction through three aspects. Specifically, we first notice the importance of masking strategies between the two sources and utilize a projection module to complementarily align the mask and visible tokens of the two modalities. Then, we utilize a well-crafted two-branch MAE pipeline with a novel shared decoder to promote cross-modality interaction in the mask tokens. Finally, we design a unique cross-modal reconstruction module to enhance representation learning for both modalities. Through extensive experiments performed on large-scale RGB-D scene understanding benchmarks (SUN RGB-D and ScannetV2), we discover it is nontrivial to interactively learn point-image features, where we greatly improve multiple 3D detectors, 2D detectors, and few-shot classifiers by 2.9%, 6.7%, and 2.4%, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/BLVLab/PiMAE. 蒙面自动编码器学习强大的视觉表示，并在几种独立的模态中实现最先进的结果，但很少有作品在多模态设置中解决它们的能力。在这项工作中，我们重点关注点云和 RGB 图像数据（这两种在现实世界中经常一起呈现的模式），并探索它们有意义的交互。为了改善现有工作中的跨模态协同作用，我们提出了 PiMAE，一种自监督预训练框架，通过三个方面促进 3D 和 2D 交互。具体来说，我们首先注意到两个源之间的掩码策略的重要性，并利用投影模块来互补地对齐两种模式的掩码和可见标记。然后，我们利用精心设计的两分支 MAE 管道和新颖的共享解码器来促进掩码令牌中的跨模态交互。最后，我们设计了一个独特的跨模态重建模块来增强两种模态的表示学习。通过在大规模 RGB-D 场景理解基准（SUN RGB-D 和 ScannetV2）上进行的大量实验，我们发现交互式学习点图像特征并非易事，我们将多个 3D 检测器、2D 检测器和少样本分类器分别大幅改进了 2.9%、6.7% 和 2.4%。代码可在 https://github.com/BLVLab/PiMAE 获取。 本文提出PiMAE，一种结合点云和图像的跨模态自监督预训练框架，用于提升3D目标检测性能。 Anthony Chen,Kevin Zhang,Renrui Zhang,Zihan Wang,Yuheng Lu,Yandong Guo,Shanghang Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Dídac Surís,Sachit Menon,Carl Vondrick
title: ViperGPT: Visual Inference via Python Execution for Reasoning
title_zh: ViperGPT：通过 Python 执行进行视觉推理以进行推理
abstract: Answering visual queries is a complex task that requires both visual processing and reasoning. End-to-end models, the dominant approach for this task, do not explicitly differentiate between the two, limiting interpretability and generalization. Learning modular programs presents a promising alternative, but has proven challenging due to the difficulty of learning both the programs and modules simultaneously. We introduce ViperGPT, a framework that leverages code-generation models to compose vision-and-language models into subroutines to produce a result for any query. ViperGPT utilizes a provided API to access the available modules, and composes them by generating Python code that is later executed. This simple approach requires no further training, and achieves state-of-the-art results across various complex visual tasks.
summary: Answering visual queries is a complex task that requires both visual processing and reasoning. End-to-end models, the dominant approach for this task, do not explicitly differentiate between the two, limiting interpretability and generalization. Learning modular programs presents a promising alternative, but has proven challenging due to the difficulty of learning both the programs and modules simultaneously. We introduce ViperGPT, a framework that leverages code-generation models to compose vision-and-language models into subroutines to produce a result for any query. ViperGPT utilizes a provided API to access the available modules, and composes them by generating Python code that is later executed. This simple approach requires no further training, and achieves state-of-the-art results across various complex visual tasks.
abstract_zh: 回答视觉查询是一项复杂的任务，需要视觉处理和推理。端到端模型是此任务的主要方法，没有明确区分两者，限制了可解释性和泛化性。学习模块化程序是一种很有前途的选择，但由于同时学习程序和模块的困难，事实证明具有挑战性。我们引入了 ViperGPT，这是一个框架，它利用代码生成模型将视觉和语言模型组合成子例程，以生成任何查询的结果。 ViperGPT 利用提供的 API 来访问可用模块，并通过生成稍后执行的 Python 代码来组合它们。这种简单的方法不需要进一步的培训，并且可以在各种复杂的视觉任务中实现最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViperGPT框架，通过生成Python代码组合视觉语言模型模块，解决复杂视觉推理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端模型无法区分视觉处理与推理模块，导致可解释性差且泛化能力弱；模块化方法因需同时学习程序和模块而面临挑战。
AI.method: 利用代码生成模型将视觉语言模型编排为子程序，通过API调用可用模块并生成可执行Python代码，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在多个复杂视觉任务中达到最先进水平，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: ViperGPT通过代码生成实现模块化视觉推理，无需额外训练即可提升模型性能与可解释性。

authors_text: Jacob Sharf,Mustafa Omer Gul,Yoav Artzi
title: CB2: Collaborative Natural Language Interaction Research Platform
title_zh: CB2：协作自然语言交互研究平台
abstract: CB2 is a multi-agent platform to study collaborative natural language interaction in a grounded task-oriented scenario. It includes a 3D game environment, a backend server designed to serve trained models to human agents, and various tools and processes to enable scalable studies. We deploy CB2 at https://cb2.ai as a system demonstration with a learned instruction following model.
summary: CB2 is a multi-agent platform to study collaborative natural language interaction in a grounded task-oriented scenario. It includes a 3D game environment, a backend server designed to serve trained models to human agents, and various tools and processes to enable scalable studies. We deploy CB2 at https://cb2.ai as a system demonstration with a learned instruction following model.
abstract_zh: CB2 是一个多智能体平台，用于研究扎根的面向任务的场景中的协作自然语言交互。它包括一个 3D 游戏环境、一个旨在为人类代理提供经过训练的模型的后端服务器，以及用于实现可扩展研究的各种工具和流程。我们在 https://cb2.ai 上部署 CB2 作为系统演示，并使用学习的指令遵循模型。

AI.tldr: 开发了一个多智能体平台CB2，用于研究任务导向场景中的协作自然语言交互。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏可扩展的工具和环境来研究协作自然语言交互，需要一个平台支持可扩展的实验和研究。
AI.method: 构建了一个包含3D游戏环境、后端服务器及工具流程的平台，支持模型与人类代理的交互和可扩展研究。
AI.result: 成功部署了CB2平台，并展示了基于学习的指令遵循模型的系统演示。
AI.conclusion: CB2为协作自然语言交互研究提供了可扩展的实验平台，推动了相关领域的发展。

authors_text: Chenyang Lei,Xuanchi Ren,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Qifeng Chen
title: Blind Video Deflickering by Neural Filtering with a Flawed Atlas
title_zh: 通过神经过滤和有缺陷的图集进行盲目视频去闪烁
comment: To appear in CVPR2023. Code: github.com/ChenyangLEI/All-In-One-Deflicker Website: chenyanglei.github.io/deflicker
comments: To appear in CVPR2023. Code: github.com/ChenyangLEI/All-In-One-Deflicker Website: chenyanglei.github.io/deflicker
abstract: Many videos contain flickering artifacts. Common causes of flicker include video processing algorithms, video generation algorithms, and capturing videos under specific situations. Prior work usually requires specific guidance such as the flickering frequency, manual annotations, or extra consistent videos to remove the flicker. In this work, we propose a general flicker removal framework that only receives a single flickering video as input without additional guidance. Since it is blind to a specific flickering type or guidance, we name this "blind deflickering." The core of our approach is utilizing the neural atlas in cooperation with a neural filtering strategy. The neural atlas is a unified representation for all frames in a video that provides temporal consistency guidance but is flawed in many cases. To this end, a neural network is trained to mimic a filter to learn the consistent features (e.g., color, brightness) and avoid introducing the artifacts in the atlas. To validate our method, we construct a dataset that contains diverse real-world flickering videos. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves satisfying deflickering performance and even outperforms baselines that use extra guidance on a public benchmark.
summary: Many videos contain flickering artifacts. Common causes of flicker include video processing algorithms, video generation algorithms, and capturing videos under specific situations. Prior work usually requires specific guidance such as the flickering frequency, manual annotations, or extra consistent videos to remove the flicker. In this work, we propose a general flicker removal framework that only receives a single flickering video as input without additional guidance. Since it is blind to a specific flickering type or guidance, we name this "blind deflickering." The core of our approach is utilizing the neural atlas in cooperation with a neural filtering strategy. The neural atlas is a unified representation for all frames in a video that provides temporal consistency guidance but is flawed in many cases. To this end, a neural network is trained to mimic a filter to learn the consistent features (e.g., color, brightness) and avoid introducing the artifacts in the atlas. To validate our method, we construct a dataset that contains diverse real-world flickering videos. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves satisfying deflickering performance and even outperforms baselines that use extra guidance on a public benchmark.
abstract_zh: 许多视频包含闪烁伪像。造成闪烁的常见原因包括视频处理算法、视频生成算法以及特定情况下的视频捕获。之前的工作通常需要特定的指导，例如闪烁频率、手动注释或额外一致的视频来消除闪烁。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用的闪烁消除框架，该框架仅接收单个闪烁视频作为输入，而无需额外的指导。由于它对特定的闪烁类型或指导视而不见，因此我们将其命名为“盲目去闪烁”。我们方法的核心是利用神经图谱与神经过滤策略相结合。神经图谱是视频中所有帧的统一表示，它提供时间一致性指导，但在许多情况下存在缺陷。为此，训练神经网络来模仿过滤器以学习一致的特征（例如颜色、亮度）并避免在图集中引入伪影。为了验证我们的方法，我们构建了一个包含各种现实世界闪烁视频的数据集。大量的实验表明，我们的方法实现了令人满意的去闪烁性能，甚至优于在公共基准上使用额外指导的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外指导的盲视频去闪烁方法，通过神经图谱与神经滤波策略实现。
AI.motivation: 视频中常存在闪烁伪影，传统方法通常需要特定的指导信息，如闪烁频率或手动标注，限制了其适用性。本文旨在提出一种无需额外指导的通用去闪烁框架。
AI.method: 本文的核心方法是结合神经图谱和神经滤波策略。神经图谱提供时间一致性指导，但本身存在缺陷，因此通过训练神经网络来学习一致的特征（如颜色、亮度），避免引入图谱中的伪影。
AI.result: 实验表明，本文方法在多样化的真实世界闪烁视频数据集上表现良好，甚至优于使用额外指导的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的盲视频去闪烁方法在无需额外指导的情况下，能够有效去除视频中的闪烁伪影，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: Blind Video Deflickering by Neural Filtering with a Flawed Atlas 通过神经过滤和有缺陷的图集进行盲目视频去闪烁 Many videos contain flickering artifacts. Common causes of flicker include video processing algorithms, video generation algorithms, and capturing videos under specific situations. Prior work usually requires specific guidance such as the flickering frequency, manual annotations, or extra consistent videos to remove the flicker. In this work, we propose a general flicker removal framework that only receives a single flickering video as input without additional guidance. Since it is blind to a specific flickering type or guidance, we name this "blind deflickering." The core of our approach is utilizing the neural atlas in cooperation with a neural filtering strategy. The neural atlas is a unified representation for all frames in a video that provides temporal consistency guidance but is flawed in many cases. To this end, a neural network is trained to mimic a filter to learn the consistent features (e.g., color, brightness) and avoid introducing the artifacts in the atlas. To validate our method, we construct a dataset that contains diverse real-world flickering videos. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves satisfying deflickering performance and even outperforms baselines that use extra guidance on a public benchmark. 许多视频包含闪烁伪像。造成闪烁的常见原因包括视频处理算法、视频生成算法以及特定情况下的视频捕获。之前的工作通常需要特定的指导，例如闪烁频率、手动注释或额外一致的视频来消除闪烁。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用的闪烁消除框架，该框架仅接收单个闪烁视频作为输入，而无需额外的指导。由于它对特定的闪烁类型或指导视而不见，因此我们将其命名为“盲目去闪烁”。我们方法的核心是利用神经图谱与神经过滤策略相结合。神经图谱是视频中所有帧的统一表示，它提供时间一致性指导，但在许多情况下存在缺陷。为此，训练神经网络来模仿过滤器以学习一致的特征（例如颜色、亮度）并避免在图集中引入伪影。为了验证我们的方法，我们构建了一个包含各种现实世界闪烁视频的数据集。大量的实验表明，我们的方法实现了令人满意的去闪烁性能，甚至优于在公共基准上使用额外指导的基线。 本文提出了一种无需额外指导的盲视频去闪烁方法，通过神经图谱与神经滤波策略实现。 Chenyang Lei,Xuanchi Ren,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Qifeng Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Jiuhai Chen,Lichang Chen,Chen Zhu,Tianyi Zhou
title: How Many Demonstrations Do You Need for In-context Learning?
title_zh: 情境学习需要多少演示？
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are capable to perform complex reasoning by in-context learning (ICL) when provided with a few input-output demonstrations (demos) and more powerful when intermediate reasoning steps ("chain of thoughts (CoT)") of the demos are given. Is it necessary to use multi-demo in ICL? In this paper, we study ICL using fewer demos for each test query on the tasks in~\cite{wei2022chain}. Surprisingly, we do not observe significant degradation when using only one randomly chosen demo. To study this phenomenon, for each test query, we categorize demos into "correct demos" leading to the correct answer, and "wrong demos" resulting in wrong answers. Our analysis reveals an inherent bias in those widely studied datasets: most demos are correct for a majority of test queries, which explains the good performance of using one random demo. Moreover, ICL (with and w/o CoT) using only one correct demo significantly outperforms all-demo ICL adopted by most previous works, indicating the weakness of LLMs in finding correct demo(s) for input queries, which is difficult to evaluate on the biased datasets. Furthermore, we observe a counterintuitive behavior of ICL using multi-demo, i.e., its accuracy degrades(improves) when given more correct(wrong) demos. This implies that ICL can be easily misguided by interference among demos and their spurious correlations. Our analyses highlight several fundamental challenges that need to be addressed in LLMs training, ICL, and benchmark design.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are capable to perform complex reasoning by in-context learning (ICL) when provided with a few input-output demonstrations (demos) and more powerful when intermediate reasoning steps ("chain of thoughts (CoT)") of the demos are given. Is it necessary to use multi-demo in ICL? In this paper, we study ICL using fewer demos for each test query on the tasks in~\cite{wei2022chain}. Surprisingly, we do not observe significant degradation when using only one randomly chosen demo. To study this phenomenon, for each test query, we categorize demos into "correct demos" leading to the correct answer, and "wrong demos" resulting in wrong answers. Our analysis reveals an inherent bias in those widely studied datasets: most demos are correct for a majority of test queries, which explains the good performance of using one random demo. Moreover, ICL (with and w/o CoT) using only one correct demo significantly outperforms all-demo ICL adopted by most previous works, indicating the weakness of LLMs in finding correct demo(s) for input queries, which is difficult to evaluate on the biased datasets. Furthermore, we observe a counterintuitive behavior of ICL using multi-demo, i.e., its accuracy degrades(improves) when given more correct(wrong) demos. This implies that ICL can be easily misguided by interference among demos and their spurious correlations. Our analyses highlight several fundamental challenges that need to be addressed in LLMs training, ICL, and benchmark design.
abstract_zh: 当提供一些输入输出演示（演示）时，大型语言模型（LLM）能够通过上下文学习（ICL）执行复杂的推理，并且当给出演示的中间推理步骤（“思想链（CoT）”）时，它会变得更强大。 ICL 是否需要使用多重演示？在本文中，我们针对 ~\cite{wei2022chain} 中的任务的每个测试查询使用更少的演示来研究 ICL。令人惊讶的是，当仅使用一个随机选择的演示时，我们没有观察到明显的性能下降。为了研究这种现象，对于每个测试查询，我们将演示分为导致正确答案的“正确演示”和导致错误答案的“错误演示”。我们的分析揭示了那些广泛研究的数据集的固有偏差：大多数演示对于大多数测试查询都是正确的，这解释了使用一个随机演示的良好性能。此外，仅使用一个正确演示的 ICL（有和没有 CoT）明显优于大多数先前作品采用的全演示 ICL，这表明法学硕士在为输入查询找到正确演示方面的弱点，这很难在有偏差的数据集上进行评估。此外，我们观察到使用多个演示的 ICL 的违反直觉的行为，即，当给出更多正确（错误）演示时，其准确性会降低（提高）。这意味着 ICL 很容易被演示之间的干扰及其虚假相关性所误导。我们的分析强调了法学硕士培训、ICL 和基准设计中需要解决的几个基本挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在上下文学习（ICL）中使用少量演示示例的效果，发现使用单个随机演示示例即可获得良好性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍采用多个演示示例进行ICL，但作者质疑是否有必要使用多示例，并探索数据集偏差对模型性能的影响。
AI.method: 将演示示例分为‘正确示例’和‘错误示例’，分析单示例与多示例ICL的性能差异，并研究演示示例数量与正确性对结果的影响。
AI.result: 单个随机演示示例性能显著，因数据集存在偏差；使用单个正确示例优于多示例ICL，且多示例性能随正确/错误示例数量变化呈现非单调趋势。
AI.conclusion: LLMs在选择正确演示示例上存在缺陷，多示例ICL易受干扰和虚假相关性影响，需改进训练、ICL方法及基准设计。

authors_text: Leslie Ann Goldberg,Marc Roth,Tassilo Constantin Schwarz
title: Parameterised Approximation of the Fixation Probability of the Dominant Mutation in the Multi-Type Moran Process
title_zh: 多型莫兰过程中显性突变固定概率的参数化近似
abstract: The multi-type Moran process is an evolutionary process on a connected graph $G$ in which each vertex has one of $k$ types and, in each step, a vertex $v$ is chosen to reproduce its type to one of its neighbours. The probability of a vertex $v$ being chosen for reproduction is proportional to the fitness of the type of $v$. So far, the literature was almost solely concerned with the $2$-type Moran process in which each vertex is either healthy (type $0$) or a mutant (type $1$), and the main problem of interest has been the (approximate) computation of the so-called fixation probability, i.e., the probability that eventually all vertices are mutants. In this work we initiate the study of approximating fixation probabilities in the multi-type Moran process on general graphs. Our main result is an FPTRAS (fixed-parameter tractable randomised approximation scheme) for computing the fixation probability of the dominant mutation; the parameter is the number of types and their fitnesses. In the course of our studies we also provide novel upper bounds on the expected absorption time, i.e., the time that it takes the multi-type Moran process to reach a state in which each vertex has the same type.
summary: The multi-type Moran process is an evolutionary process on a connected graph $G$ in which each vertex has one of $k$ types and, in each step, a vertex $v$ is chosen to reproduce its type to one of its neighbours. The probability of a vertex $v$ being chosen for reproduction is proportional to the fitness of the type of $v$. So far, the literature was almost solely concerned with the $2$-type Moran process in which each vertex is either healthy (type $0$) or a mutant (type $1$), and the main problem of interest has been the (approximate) computation of the so-called fixation probability, i.e., the probability that eventually all vertices are mutants. In this work we initiate the study of approximating fixation probabilities in the multi-type Moran process on general graphs. Our main result is an FPTRAS (fixed-parameter tractable randomised approximation scheme) for computing the fixation probability of the dominant mutation; the parameter is the number of types and their fitnesses. In the course of our studies we also provide novel upper bounds on the expected absorption time, i.e., the time that it takes the multi-type Moran process to reach a state in which each vertex has the same type.
abstract_zh: 多类型莫兰过程是连通图 $G$ 上的进化过程，其中每个顶点都有 $k$ 类型之一，并且在每一步中，都会选择一个顶点 $v$ 将其类型复制到其邻居之一。选择顶点 $v$ 进行复制的概率与 $v$ 类型的适应度成正比。到目前为止，文献几乎只关注$2$型莫兰过程，其中每个顶点要么是健康的（类型$0$）要么是突变体（类型$1$），并且主要感兴趣的问题是所谓的固定概率的（近似）计算，即最终所有顶点都是突变体的概率。在这项工作中，我们开始研究一般图上多类型莫兰过程中的近似注视概率。我们的主要成果是用于计算显性突变固定概率的 FPTRAS（固定参数易处理随机近似方案）；参数是类型的数量及其适合度。在我们的研究过程中，我们还提供了预期吸收时间的新上限，即多类型莫兰过程达到每个顶点具有相同类型的状态所需的时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多类型Moran过程中优势突变的固定概率的参数化近似方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文献主要关注二类型Moran过程，而多类型过程在复杂网络中更具现实意义但计算难度更高，需开发高效近似方法。
AI.method: 提出基于参数的固定参数可处理随机化近似方案（FPTRAS），参数为类型数量及适应度值，并结合吸收时间上界分析。
AI.result: 实现了优势突变固定概率的FPTRAS算法，并提供了多类型Moran过程吸收时间的新上界证明。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为多类型进化过程的计算分析提供了理论工具，推动了复杂网络中突变固定概率研究的进展。
