search_text: Parameterised Approximation of the Fixation Probability of the Dominant Mutation in the Multi-Type Moran Process 多型莫兰过程中显性突变固定概率的参数化近似 The multi-type Moran process is an evolutionary process on a connected graph $G$ in which each vertex has one of $k$ types and, in each step, a vertex $v$ is chosen to reproduce its type to one of its neighbours. The probability of a vertex $v$ being chosen for reproduction is proportional to the fitness of the type of $v$. So far, the literature was almost solely concerned with the $2$-type Moran process in which each vertex is either healthy (type $0$) or a mutant (type $1$), and the main problem of interest has been the (approximate) computation of the so-called fixation probability, i.e., the probability that eventually all vertices are mutants. In this work we initiate the study of approximating fixation probabilities in the multi-type Moran process on general graphs. Our main result is an FPTRAS (fixed-parameter tractable randomised approximation scheme) for computing the fixation probability of the dominant mutation; the parameter is the number of types and their fitnesses. In the course of our studies we also provide novel upper bounds on the expected absorption time, i.e., the time that it takes the multi-type Moran process to reach a state in which each vertex has the same type. 多类型莫兰过程是连通图 $G$ 上的进化过程，其中每个顶点都有 $k$ 类型之一，并且在每一步中，都会选择一个顶点 $v$ 将其类型复制到其邻居之一。选择顶点 $v$ 进行复制的概率与 $v$ 类型的适应度成正比。到目前为止，文献几乎只关注$2$型莫兰过程，其中每个顶点要么是健康的（类型$0$）要么是突变体（类型$1$），并且主要感兴趣的问题是所谓的固定概率的（近似）计算，即最终所有顶点都是突变体的概率。在这项工作中，我们开始研究一般图上多类型莫兰过程中的近似注视概率。我们的主要成果是用于计算显性突变固定概率的 FPTRAS（固定参数易处理随机近似方案）；参数是类型的数量及其适合度。在我们的研究过程中，我们还提供了预期吸收时间的新上限，即多类型莫兰过程达到每个顶点具有相同类型的状态所需的时间。 本文研究了多类型Moran过程中优势突变的固定概率的参数化近似方法。 Leslie Ann Goldberg,Marc Roth,Tassilo Constantin Schwarz cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Ali Beikmohammadi,Sindri Magnússon
title: Human-Inspired Framework to Accelerate Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 加速强化学习的受人启发的框架
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is crucial for data science decision-making but suffers from sample inefficiency, particularly in real-world scenarios with costly physical interactions. This paper introduces a novel human-inspired framework to enhance RL algorithm sample efficiency. It achieves this by initially exposing the learning agent to simpler tasks that progressively increase in complexity, ultimately leading to the main task. This method requires no pre-training and involves learning simpler tasks for just one iteration. The resulting knowledge can facilitate various transfer learning approaches, such as value and policy transfer, without increasing computational complexity. It can be applied across different goals, environments, and RL algorithms, including value-based, policy-based, tabular, and deep RL methods. Experimental evaluations demonstrate the framework's effectiveness in enhancing sample efficiency, especially in challenging main tasks, demonstrated through both a simple Random Walk and more complex optimal control problems with constraints.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is crucial for data science decision-making but suffers from sample inefficiency, particularly in real-world scenarios with costly physical interactions. This paper introduces a novel human-inspired framework to enhance RL algorithm sample efficiency. It achieves this by initially exposing the learning agent to simpler tasks that progressively increase in complexity, ultimately leading to the main task. This method requires no pre-training and involves learning simpler tasks for just one iteration. The resulting knowledge can facilitate various transfer learning approaches, such as value and policy transfer, without increasing computational complexity. It can be applied across different goals, environments, and RL algorithms, including value-based, policy-based, tabular, and deep RL methods. Experimental evaluations demonstrate the framework's effectiveness in enhancing sample efficiency, especially in challenging main tasks, demonstrated through both a simple Random Walk and more complex optimal control problems with constraints.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 对于数据科学决策至关重要，但存在样本效率低下的问题，特别是在物理交互成本高昂的现实场景中。本文介绍了一种新颖的受人类启发的框架来提高 RL 算法的样本效率。它通过最初让学习代理承担更简单的任务来实现这一点，这些任务的复杂性逐渐增加，最终导致主要任务。这种方法不需要预训练，只需一次迭代即可学习更简单的任务。由此产生的知识可以促进各种迁移学习方法，例如价值和策略迁移，而不会增加计算复杂性。它可以应用于不同的目标、环境和 RL 算法，包括基于值、基于策略、表格和深度 RL 方法。实验评估证明了该框架在提高样本效率方面的有效性，特别是在具有挑战性的主要任务中，通过简单的随机游走和更复杂的带约束的最优控制问题来证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受人类启发的框架，通过逐步增加任务复杂度来加速强化学习过程，提高样本效率。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在现实场景中面临样本效率低、物理交互成本高的问题，需要更高效的训练方法。
AI.method: 设计分阶段任务训练框架，先让智能体学习简单任务（仅需一次迭代），再逐步过渡到复杂主任务，实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架显著提升样本效率，尤其在随机游走和约束最优控制等复杂任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需预训练且兼容多种RL算法，为解决现实场景中的样本效率问题提供了通用有效的方法。

authors_text: Jing Zou,Noémie Debroux,Lihao Liu,Jing Qin,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Angelica I Aviles-Rivero
title: Learning Homeomorphic Image Registration via Conformal-Invariant Hyperelastic Regularisation
title_zh: 通过共形不变超弹性正则化学习同态图像配准
abstract: Deformable image registration is a fundamental task in medical image analysis and plays a crucial role in a wide range of clinical applications. Recently, deep learning-based approaches have been widely studied for deformable medical image registration and achieved promising results. However, existing deep learning image registration techniques do not theoretically guarantee topology-preserving transformations. This is a key property to preserve anatomical structures and achieve plausible transformations that can be used in real clinical settings. We propose a novel framework for deformable image registration. Firstly, we introduce a novel regulariser based on conformal-invariant properties in a nonlinear elasticity setting. Our regulariser enforces the deformation field to be smooth, invertible and orientation-preserving. More importantly, we strictly guarantee topology preservation yielding to a clinical meaningful registration. Secondly, we boost the performance of our regulariser through coordinate MLPs, where one can view the to-be-registered images as continuously differentiable entities. We demonstrate, through numerical and visual experiments, that our framework is able to outperform current techniques for image registration.
summary: Deformable image registration is a fundamental task in medical image analysis and plays a crucial role in a wide range of clinical applications. Recently, deep learning-based approaches have been widely studied for deformable medical image registration and achieved promising results. However, existing deep learning image registration techniques do not theoretically guarantee topology-preserving transformations. This is a key property to preserve anatomical structures and achieve plausible transformations that can be used in real clinical settings. We propose a novel framework for deformable image registration. Firstly, we introduce a novel regulariser based on conformal-invariant properties in a nonlinear elasticity setting. Our regulariser enforces the deformation field to be smooth, invertible and orientation-preserving. More importantly, we strictly guarantee topology preservation yielding to a clinical meaningful registration. Secondly, we boost the performance of our regulariser through coordinate MLPs, where one can view the to-be-registered images as continuously differentiable entities. We demonstrate, through numerical and visual experiments, that our framework is able to outperform current techniques for image registration.
abstract_zh: 变形图像配准是医学图像分析的一项基本任务，在广泛的临床应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。最近，基于深度学习的方法在可变形医学图像配准方面得到了广泛研究，并取得了可喜的成果。然而，现有的深度学习图像配准技术在理论上并不能保证拓扑保持变换。这是保留解剖结构并实现可用于真实临床环境的合理转换的关键属性。我们提出了一种用于可变形图像配准的新颖框架。首先，我们介绍了一种基于非线性弹性设置中的共形不变特性的新型正则化器。我们的正则化器强制变形场平滑、可逆且方向保持。更重要的是，我们严格保证拓扑保存能够产生临床意义的注册。其次，我们通过坐标 MLP 提高了正则化器的性能，其中人们可以将待配准的图像视为连续可微的实体。我们通过数值和视觉实验证明，我们的框架能够超越当前的图像配准技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于共形不变超弹性正则化的可变形图像配准框架，解决医学图像分析中拓扑保持变换的理论保证问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习图像配准方法缺乏拓扑保持变换的理论保证，而临床应用需要确保解剖结构不变形的可靠配准。
AI.method: 设计共形不变超弹性正则化约束变形场平滑性、可逆性和方向保持性，并通过坐标MLP将图像视为连续可微分实体增强正则化效果。
AI.result: 数值实验和视觉实验表明，该框架在配准精度和拓扑保持性方面优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论保证拓扑保持性，为临床医学图像配准提供了更可靠且符合解剖学意义的解决方案。

authors_text: Lu Yihe,Rana Alkhoury Maroun,Barbara Webb
title: Vision-based route following by an embodied insect-inspired sparse neural network
title_zh: 基于视觉的路线，由受昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络进行跟踪
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures; work-in-progress submission, accepted as a poster at ICLR 2023 Workshop on Sparsity in Neural Networks; non-archival
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures; work-in-progress submission, accepted as a poster at ICLR 2023 Workshop on Sparsity in Neural Networks; non-archival
abstract: We compared the efficiency of the FlyHash model, an insect-inspired sparse neural network (Dasgupta et al., 2017), to similar but non-sparse models in an embodied navigation task. This requires a model to control steering by comparing current visual inputs to memories stored along a training route. We concluded the FlyHash model is more efficient than others, especially in terms of data encoding.
summary: We compared the efficiency of the FlyHash model, an insect-inspired sparse neural network (Dasgupta et al., 2017), to similar but non-sparse models in an embodied navigation task. This requires a model to control steering by comparing current visual inputs to memories stored along a training route. We concluded the FlyHash model is more efficient than others, especially in terms of data encoding.
abstract_zh: 我们将 FlyHash 模型（一种受昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络（Dasgupta 等人，2017））与具体导航任务中的类似但非稀疏模型的效率进行了比较。这需要一个模型通过将当前视觉输入与沿训练路线存储的记忆进行比较来控制转向。我们得出的结论是 FlyHash 模型比其他模型更高效，特别是在数据编码方面。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了FlyHash模型与其他非稀疏模型在具身导航任务中的效率，特别是在数据编码方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在验证昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络在视觉导航任务中的效率，尤其是在数据编码方面的优势。
AI.method: 通过将FlyHash模型与类似的非稀疏模型进行比较，测试它们在具身导航任务中控制转向的能力，基于当前视觉输入与训练路线中存储的记忆进行比较。
AI.result: FlyHash模型在数据编码方面比其他模型更高效。
AI.conclusion: FlyHash模型作为一种昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络，在具身导航任务中表现出更高的效率，尤其是在数据编码方面。

ai_content.tldr: 本文比较了FlyHash模型与其他非稀疏模型在具身导航任务中的效率，特别是在数据编码方面的表现。
ai_content.motivation: 研究旨在验证昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络在视觉导航任务中的效率，尤其是在数据编码方面的优势。
ai_content.method: 通过将FlyHash模型与类似的非稀疏模型进行比较，测试它们在具身导航任务中控制转向的能力，基于当前视觉输入与训练路线中存储的记忆进行比较。
ai_content.result: FlyHash模型在数据编码方面比其他模型更高效。
ai_content.conclusion: FlyHash模型作为一种昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络，在具身导航任务中表现出更高的效率，尤其是在数据编码方面。

search_text: Vision-based route following by an embodied insect-inspired sparse neural network 基于视觉的路线，由受昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络进行跟踪 We compared the efficiency of the FlyHash model, an insect-inspired sparse neural network (Dasgupta et al., 2017), to similar but non-sparse models in an embodied navigation task. This requires a model to control steering by comparing current visual inputs to memories stored along a training route. We concluded the FlyHash model is more efficient than others, especially in terms of data encoding. 我们将 FlyHash 模型（一种受昆虫启发的稀疏神经网络（Dasgupta 等人，2017））与具体导航任务中的类似但非稀疏模型的效率进行了比较。这需要一个模型通过将当前视觉输入与沿训练路线存储的记忆进行比较来控制转向。我们得出的结论是 FlyHash 模型比其他模型更高效，特别是在数据编码方面。 本文比较了FlyHash模型与其他非稀疏模型在具身导航任务中的效率，特别是在数据编码方面的表现。 Lu Yihe,Rana Alkhoury Maroun,Barbara Webb cs.NE,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Mohamed Akrout,Amal Feriani,Faouzi Bellili,Amine Mezghani,Ekram Hossain
title: Domain Generalization in Machine Learning Models for Wireless Communications: Concepts, State-of-the-Art, and Open Issues
title_zh: 无线通信机器学习模型的领域泛化：概念、最新技术和悬而未决的问题
abstract: Data-driven machine learning (ML) is promoted as one potential technology to be used in next-generations wireless systems. This led to a large body of research work that applies ML techniques to solve problems in different layers of the wireless transmission link. However, most of these applications rely on supervised learning which assumes that the source (training) and target (test) data are independent and identically distributed (i.i.d). This assumption is often violated in the real world due to domain or distribution shifts between the source and the target data. Thus, it is important to ensure that these algorithms generalize to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. In this context, domain generalization (DG) tackles the OOD-related issues by learning models on different and distinct source domains/datasets with generalization capabilities to unseen new domains without additional finetuning. Motivated by the importance of DG requirements for wireless applications, we present a comprehensive overview of the recent developments in DG and the different sources of domain shift. We also summarize the existing DG methods and review their applications in selected wireless communication problems, and conclude with insights and open questions.
summary: Data-driven machine learning (ML) is promoted as one potential technology to be used in next-generations wireless systems. This led to a large body of research work that applies ML techniques to solve problems in different layers of the wireless transmission link. However, most of these applications rely on supervised learning which assumes that the source (training) and target (test) data are independent and identically distributed (i.i.d). This assumption is often violated in the real world due to domain or distribution shifts between the source and the target data. Thus, it is important to ensure that these algorithms generalize to out-of-distribution (OOD) data. In this context, domain generalization (DG) tackles the OOD-related issues by learning models on different and distinct source domains/datasets with generalization capabilities to unseen new domains without additional finetuning. Motivated by the importance of DG requirements for wireless applications, we present a comprehensive overview of the recent developments in DG and the different sources of domain shift. We also summarize the existing DG methods and review their applications in selected wireless communication problems, and conclude with insights and open questions.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的机器学习 (ML) 被推广为下一代无线系统中使用的一项潜在技术。这导致了大量的研究工作应用机器学习技术来解决无线传输链路不同层的问题。然而，这些应用程序大多数依赖于监督学习，它假设源（训练）和目标（测试）数据是独立且同分布（i.i.d）的。由于源数据和目标数据之间的域或分布变化，这一假设在现实世界中经常被违反。因此，确保这些算法能够推广到分布外 (OOD) 数据非常重要。在这种情况下，域泛化（DG）通过学习不同且不同的源域/数据集上的模型来解决与 OOD 相关的问题，并具有泛化能力到未见过的新域，而无需额外的微调。鉴于 DG 要求对无线应用的重要性，我们全面概述了 DG 的最新发展以及域转移的不同来源。我们还总结了现有的 DG 方法并回顾了它们在选定的无线通信问题中的应用，并以见解和开放性问题作为总结。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了无线通信中机器学习模型的领域泛化（DG）技术，涵盖概念、最新进展及开放问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习假设训练数据与测试数据独立同分布，但实际无线通信场景中存在领域偏移问题，导致模型泛化能力不足，需研究DG技术以应对分布外数据。
AI.method: 通过文献综述总结现有DG方法，分析领域偏移来源，并将其应用于无线通信中的典型问题（如信道预测、调制识别等）。
AI.result: 系统梳理了DG技术框架、领域偏移分类及在无线通信中的应用案例，指出现有方法的局限性及未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 领域泛化对无线通信系统的鲁棒性至关重要，需进一步探索跨领域数据生成、自监督学习等技术以提升模型适应性。

authors_text: Asef Islam,Anthony Wu,Jay Mandavilli,Wojtek Zbijewski,Jeff Siewerdsen
title: Image Guidance for Robot-Assisted Ankle Fracture Repair
title_zh: 机器人辅助踝关节骨折修复的图像引导
abstract: This project concerns developing and validating an image guidance framework for application to a robotic-assisted fibular reduction in ankle fracture surgery. The aim is to produce and demonstrate proper functioning of software for automatic determination of directions for fibular repositioning with the ultimate goal of application to a robotic reduction procedure that can reduce the time and complexity of the procedure as well as provide the benefits of reduced error in ideal final fibular position, improved syndesmosis restoration and reduced incidence of post-traumatic osteoarthritis. The focus of this product will be developing and testing the image guidance software, from the input of preoperative images through the steps of automated segmentation and registration until the output of a final transformation that can be used as instructions to a robot on how to reposition the fibula, but will not involve developing or implementing the hardware of the robot itself.
summary: This project concerns developing and validating an image guidance framework for application to a robotic-assisted fibular reduction in ankle fracture surgery. The aim is to produce and demonstrate proper functioning of software for automatic determination of directions for fibular repositioning with the ultimate goal of application to a robotic reduction procedure that can reduce the time and complexity of the procedure as well as provide the benefits of reduced error in ideal final fibular position, improved syndesmosis restoration and reduced incidence of post-traumatic osteoarthritis. The focus of this product will be developing and testing the image guidance software, from the input of preoperative images through the steps of automated segmentation and registration until the output of a final transformation that can be used as instructions to a robot on how to reposition the fibula, but will not involve developing or implementing the hardware of the robot itself.
abstract_zh: 该项目涉及开发和验证图像引导框架，用于踝关节骨折手术中机器人辅助腓骨复位。目的是生产并演示自动确定腓骨重新定位方向的软件的正确功能，最终目标是应用于机器人复​​位手术，该手术可以减少手术时间和复杂性，并提供减少理想最终腓骨位置误差、改善韧带联合恢复和减少创伤后骨关节炎发生率的好处。该产品的重点将是开发和测试图像引导软件，从术前图像的输入到自动分割和配准的步骤，直到最终转换的输出，该转换可用作机器人如何重新定位腓骨的指令，但不涉及开发或实现机器人本身的硬件。

AI.tldr: 开发和验证用于机器人辅助踝关节骨折修复的图像引导软件框架，实现腓骨复位方向的自动确定。
AI.motivation: 现有手术方法存在操作复杂、定位误差大等问题，该软件旨在提升复位精度，减少手术时间并降低术后并发症风险。
AI.method: 基于术前影像数据，通过自动分割与配准算法生成腓骨复位的变换指令，输出机器人可执行的定位参数。
AI.result: 成功构建了图像引导软件并验证其功能，实现了从影像输入到机器人指令输出的全流程自动化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为机器人辅助踝关节手术提供了可行的软件解决方案，需进一步临床试验验证其实际效果。

authors_text: Axel Levy,Mark Matthews,Matan Sela,Gordon Wetzstein,Dmitry Lagun
title: MELON: NeRF with Unposed Images in SO(3)
title_zh: MELON：SO(3) 中带有未摆出图像的 NeRF
abstract: Neural radiance fields enable novel-view synthesis and scene reconstruction with photorealistic quality from a few images, but require known and accurate camera poses. Conventional pose estimation algorithms fail on smooth or self-similar scenes, while methods performing inverse rendering from unposed views require a rough initialization of the camera orientations. The main difficulty of pose estimation lies in real-life objects being almost invariant under certain transformations, making the photometric distance between rendered views non-convex with respect to the camera parameters. Using an equivalence relation that matches the distribution of local minima in camera space, we reduce this space to its quotient set, in which pose estimation becomes a more convex problem. Using a neural-network to regularize pose estimation, we demonstrate that our method - MELON - can reconstruct a neural radiance field from unposed images with state-of-the-art accuracy while requiring ten times fewer views than adversarial approaches.
summary: Neural radiance fields enable novel-view synthesis and scene reconstruction with photorealistic quality from a few images, but require known and accurate camera poses. Conventional pose estimation algorithms fail on smooth or self-similar scenes, while methods performing inverse rendering from unposed views require a rough initialization of the camera orientations. The main difficulty of pose estimation lies in real-life objects being almost invariant under certain transformations, making the photometric distance between rendered views non-convex with respect to the camera parameters. Using an equivalence relation that matches the distribution of local minima in camera space, we reduce this space to its quotient set, in which pose estimation becomes a more convex problem. Using a neural-network to regularize pose estimation, we demonstrate that our method - MELON - can reconstruct a neural radiance field from unposed images with state-of-the-art accuracy while requiring ten times fewer views than adversarial approaches.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场可以从一些图像中实现新颖的视图合成和场景重建，并具有逼真的质量，但需要已知且准确的相机姿势。传统的姿态估计算法在平滑或自相似的场景上失败，而从未姿态视图执行逆渲染的方法需要对相机方向进行粗略初始化。位姿估计的主要困难在于现实生活中的物体在某些变换下几乎不变，使得渲染视图之间的光度距离相对于相机参数是非凸的。使用与相机空间中局部最小值的分布相匹配的等价关系，我们将该空间减少到其商集，其中姿态估计成为一个更凸的问题。使用神经网络来规范姿势估计，我们证明了我们的方法 - MELON - 可以以最先进的精度从未摆姿势的图像重建神经辐射场，同时所需的视图比对抗方法少十倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MELON方法，通过未标注姿态的图像重建神经辐射场（NeRF），解决传统方法在平滑或自相似场景中姿态估计失败的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统姿态估计算法在平滑或自相似场景中表现不佳，且逆向渲染方法需要初始姿态估计，而现实物体在某些变换下具有不变性，导致相机参数的光度距离非凸。
AI.method: 通过等价关系将相机空间简化为商集，使姿态估计更凸，并利用神经网络正则化姿态估计过程。
AI.result: MELON在未标注姿态图像下实现神经辐射场重建，准确率达到最先进水平，所需视图数量仅为对抗方法的十分之一。
AI.conclusion: MELON通过商集空间转换和神经正则化有效解决未标注姿态的NeRF重建问题，显著提升效率与精度。

search_text: MELON: NeRF with Unposed Images in SO(3) MELON：SO(3) 中带有未摆出图像的 NeRF Neural radiance fields enable novel-view synthesis and scene reconstruction with photorealistic quality from a few images, but require known and accurate camera poses. Conventional pose estimation algorithms fail on smooth or self-similar scenes, while methods performing inverse rendering from unposed views require a rough initialization of the camera orientations. The main difficulty of pose estimation lies in real-life objects being almost invariant under certain transformations, making the photometric distance between rendered views non-convex with respect to the camera parameters. Using an equivalence relation that matches the distribution of local minima in camera space, we reduce this space to its quotient set, in which pose estimation becomes a more convex problem. Using a neural-network to regularize pose estimation, we demonstrate that our method - MELON - can reconstruct a neural radiance field from unposed images with state-of-the-art accuracy while requiring ten times fewer views than adversarial approaches. 神经辐射场可以从一些图像中实现新颖的视图合成和场景重建，并具有逼真的质量，但需要已知且准确的相机姿势。传统的姿态估计算法在平滑或自相似的场景上失败，而从未姿态视图执行逆渲染的方法需要对相机方向进行粗略初始化。位姿估计的主要困难在于现实生活中的物体在某些变换下几乎不变，使得渲染视图之间的光度距离相对于相机参数是非凸的。使用与相机空间中局部最小值的分布相匹配的等价关系，我们将该空间减少到其商集，其中姿态估计成为一个更凸的问题。使用神经网络来规范姿势估计，我们证明了我们的方法 - MELON - 可以以最先进的精度从未摆姿势的图像重建神经辐射场，同时所需的视图比对抗方法少十倍。 本文提出MELON方法，通过未标注姿态的图像重建神经辐射场（NeRF），解决传统方法在平滑或自相似场景中姿态估计失败的问题。 Axel Levy,Mark Matthews,Matan Sela,Gordon Wetzstein,Dmitry Lagun cs.CV

authors_text: Hagay Michaeli,Tomer Michaeli,Daniel Soudry
title: Alias-Free Convnets: Fractional Shift Invariance via Polynomial Activations
title_zh: 无别名卷积网络：通过多项式激活实现分数平移不变性
comment: The paper was accepted to CVPR 2023. Our code is available at https://github.com/hmichaeli/alias_free_convnets/
comments: The paper was accepted to CVPR 2023. Our code is available at https://github.com/hmichaeli/alias_free_convnets/
abstract: Although CNNs are believed to be invariant to translations, recent works have shown this is not the case, due to aliasing effects that stem from downsampling layers. The existing architectural solutions to prevent aliasing are partial since they do not solve these effects, that originate in non-linearities. We propose an extended anti-aliasing method that tackles both downsampling and non-linear layers, thus creating truly alias-free, shift-invariant CNNs. We show that the presented model is invariant to integer as well as fractional (i.e., sub-pixel) translations, thus outperforming other shift-invariant methods in terms of robustness to adversarial translations.
summary: Although CNNs are believed to be invariant to translations, recent works have shown this is not the case, due to aliasing effects that stem from downsampling layers. The existing architectural solutions to prevent aliasing are partial since they do not solve these effects, that originate in non-linearities. We propose an extended anti-aliasing method that tackles both downsampling and non-linear layers, thus creating truly alias-free, shift-invariant CNNs. We show that the presented model is invariant to integer as well as fractional (i.e., sub-pixel) translations, thus outperforming other shift-invariant methods in terms of robustness to adversarial translations.
abstract_zh: 尽管 CNN 被认为对于平移是不变的，但最近的研究表明，由于下采样层产生的混叠效应，情况并非如此。现有的防止混叠的架构解决方案是片面的，因为它们不能解决这些源自非线性的影响。我们提出了一种扩展的抗锯齿方法，可以处理下采样和非线性层，从而创建真正的无锯齿、平移不变的 CNN。我们表明，所提出的模型对于整数和平移（即子像素）平移是不变的，因此在对抗性平移的鲁棒性方面优于其他平移不变方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过多项式激活实现分数位移不变性的卷积神经网络架构，解决传统CNN因下采样和非线性层导致的混叠效应问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN被认为具有平移不变性，但下采样层引起的混叠效应导致其无法真正实现整数或分数像素级别的位移不变性，现有方法仅部分解决该问题。
AI.method: 设计基于多项式激活函数的扩展抗混叠方法，同时处理下采样层与非线性层的混叠效应，构建真正无混叠的位移不变CNN。
AI.result: 所提模型在整数和分数（子像素）位移下均保持不变性，在对抗性位移攻击下的鲁棒性优于现有位移不变方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化下采样与非线性层的混叠效应，该方法实现了CNN的真正位移不变性，为鲁棒视觉模型设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hadas Orgad,Bahjat Kawar,Yonatan Belinkov
title: Editing Implicit Assumptions in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
title_zh: 编辑文本到图像扩散模型中的隐式假设
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models often make implicit assumptions about the world when generating images. While some assumptions are useful (e.g., the sky is blue), they can also be outdated, incorrect, or reflective of social biases present in the training data. Thus, there is a need to control these assumptions without requiring explicit user input or costly re-training. In this work, we aim to edit a given implicit assumption in a pre-trained diffusion model. Our Text-to-Image Model Editing method, TIME for short, receives a pair of inputs: a "source" under-specified prompt for which the model makes an implicit assumption (e.g., "a pack of roses"), and a "destination" prompt that describes the same setting, but with a specified desired attribute (e.g., "a pack of blue roses"). TIME then updates the model's cross-attention layers, as these layers assign visual meaning to textual tokens. We edit the projection matrices in these layers such that the source prompt is projected close to the destination prompt. Our method is highly efficient, as it modifies a mere 2.2% of the model's parameters in under one second. To evaluate model editing approaches, we introduce TIMED (TIME Dataset), containing 147 source and destination prompt pairs from various domains. Our experiments (using Stable Diffusion) show that TIME is successful in model editing, generalizes well for related prompts unseen during editing, and imposes minimal effect on unrelated generations.
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models often make implicit assumptions about the world when generating images. While some assumptions are useful (e.g., the sky is blue), they can also be outdated, incorrect, or reflective of social biases present in the training data. Thus, there is a need to control these assumptions without requiring explicit user input or costly re-training. In this work, we aim to edit a given implicit assumption in a pre-trained diffusion model. Our Text-to-Image Model Editing method, TIME for short, receives a pair of inputs: a "source" under-specified prompt for which the model makes an implicit assumption (e.g., "a pack of roses"), and a "destination" prompt that describes the same setting, but with a specified desired attribute (e.g., "a pack of blue roses"). TIME then updates the model's cross-attention layers, as these layers assign visual meaning to textual tokens. We edit the projection matrices in these layers such that the source prompt is projected close to the destination prompt. Our method is highly efficient, as it modifies a mere 2.2% of the model's parameters in under one second. To evaluate model editing approaches, we introduce TIMED (TIME Dataset), containing 147 source and destination prompt pairs from various domains. Our experiments (using Stable Diffusion) show that TIME is successful in model editing, generalizes well for related prompts unseen during editing, and imposes minimal effect on unrelated generations.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像的扩散模型在生成图像时通常会对世界做出隐式假设。虽然某些假设是有用的（例如，天空是蓝色的），但它们也可能过时、不正确或反映了训练数据中存在的社会偏见。因此，需要控制这些假设，而不需要明确的用户输入或昂贵的重新训练。在这项工作中，我们的目标是编辑预训练扩散模型中给定的隐式假设。我们的文本到图像模型编辑方法（简称 TIME）接收一对输入：模型做出隐式假设的“源”未指定提示（例如“一包玫瑰”），以及描述相同设置但具有指定所需属性的“目标”提示（例如“一包蓝玫瑰”）。然后，TIME 更新模型的交叉注意力层，因为这些层将视觉含义分配给文本标记。我们编辑这些层中的投影矩阵，以便将源提示投影到靠近目标提示的位置。我们的方法非常高效，因为它在一秒内只修改了 2.2% 的模型参数。为了评估模型编辑方法，我们引入了 TIMED（TIME 数据集），其中包含来自各个领域的 147 个源和目标提示对。我们的实验（使用稳定扩散）表明 TIME 在模型编辑方面是成功的，对于编辑过程中未见的相关提示具有很好的泛化性，并且对不相关的代产生的影响最小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TIME的方法，用于在无需重新训练的情况下编辑预训练文本到图像扩散模型中的隐式假设。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在生成图像时会隐含世界假设，这些假设可能过时、错误或包含社会偏见，需在不依赖显式用户输入或高昂再训练成本的前提下进行控制。
AI.method: 通过接收源提示（如'一束玫瑰'）和目标提示（如'一束蓝玫瑰'），修改模型的交叉注意力层投影矩阵，使源提示与目标提示在向量空间中接近，仅调整2.2%参数且耗时不足一秒。
AI.result: 在Stable Diffusion上验证显示，TIME能有效编辑模型假设，对未见过的相关提示具有泛化能力，且对无关生成影响极小。并构建包含147对提示的TIMED数据集评估方法。
AI.conclusion: TIME提供了一种高效、可扩展的模型编辑方案，可精准修正扩散模型的隐式假设，为控制生成内容的社会偏见和错误认知提供了新思路。

search_text: Editing Implicit Assumptions in Text-to-Image Diffusion Models 编辑文本到图像扩散模型中的隐式假设 Text-to-image diffusion models often make implicit assumptions about the world when generating images. While some assumptions are useful (e.g., the sky is blue), they can also be outdated, incorrect, or reflective of social biases present in the training data. Thus, there is a need to control these assumptions without requiring explicit user input or costly re-training. In this work, we aim to edit a given implicit assumption in a pre-trained diffusion model. Our Text-to-Image Model Editing method, TIME for short, receives a pair of inputs: a "source" under-specified prompt for which the model makes an implicit assumption (e.g., "a pack of roses"), and a "destination" prompt that describes the same setting, but with a specified desired attribute (e.g., "a pack of blue roses"). TIME then updates the model's cross-attention layers, as these layers assign visual meaning to textual tokens. We edit the projection matrices in these layers such that the source prompt is projected close to the destination prompt. Our method is highly efficient, as it modifies a mere 2.2% of the model's parameters in under one second. To evaluate model editing approaches, we introduce TIMED (TIME Dataset), containing 147 source and destination prompt pairs from various domains. Our experiments (using Stable Diffusion) show that TIME is successful in model editing, generalizes well for related prompts unseen during editing, and imposes minimal effect on unrelated generations. 文本到图像的扩散模型在生成图像时通常会对世界做出隐式假设。虽然某些假设是有用的（例如，天空是蓝色的），但它们也可能过时、不正确或反映了训练数据中存在的社会偏见。因此，需要控制这些假设，而不需要明确的用户输入或昂贵的重新训练。在这项工作中，我们的目标是编辑预训练扩散模型中给定的隐式假设。我们的文本到图像模型编辑方法（简称 TIME）接收一对输入：模型做出隐式假设的“源”未指定提示（例如“一包玫瑰”），以及描述相同设置但具有指定所需属性的“目标”提示（例如“一包蓝玫瑰”）。然后，TIME 更新模型的交叉注意力层，因为这些层将视觉含义分配给文本标记。我们编辑这些层中的投影矩阵，以便将源提示投影到靠近目标提示的位置。我们的方法非常高效，因为它在一秒内只修改了 2.2% 的模型参数。为了评估模型编辑方法，我们引入了 TIMED（TIME 数据集），其中包含来自各个领域的 147 个源和目标提示对。我们的实验（使用稳定扩散）表明 TIME 在模型编辑方面是成功的，对于编辑过程中未见的相关提示具有很好的泛化性，并且对不相关的代产生的影响最小。 本文提出一种名为TIME的方法，用于在无需重新训练的情况下编辑预训练文本到图像扩散模型中的隐式假设。 Hadas Orgad,Bahjat Kawar,Yonatan Belinkov cs.CV

authors_text: Seyed Muhammad Hossein Mousavi
title: Victoria Amazonica Optimization (VAO): An Algorithm Inspired by the Giant Water Lily Plant
title_zh: Victoria Amazonica Optimization (VAO)：一种受巨型睡莲植物启发的算法
abstract: The Victoria Amazonica plant, often known as the Giant Water Lily, has the largest floating spherical leaf in the world, with a maximum leaf diameter of 3 meters. It spreads its leaves by the force of its spines and creates a large shadow underneath, killing any plants that require sunlight. These water tyrants use their formidable spines to compel each other to the surface and increase their strength to grab more space from the surface. As they spread throughout the pond or basin, with the earliest-growing leaves having more room to grow, each leaf gains a unique size. Its flowers are transsexual and when they bloom, Cyclocephala beetles are responsible for the pollination process, being attracted to the scent of the female flower. After entering the flower, the beetle becomes covered with pollen and transfers it to another flower for fertilization. After the beetle leaves, the flower turns into a male and changes color from white to pink. The male flower dies and sinks into the water, releasing its seed to help create a new generation. In this paper, the mathematical life cycle of this magnificent plant is introduced, and each leaf and blossom are treated as a single entity. The proposed bio-inspired algorithm is tested with 24 benchmark optimization test functions, such as Ackley, and compared to ten other famous algorithms, including the Genetic Algorithm. The proposed algorithm is tested on 10 optimization problems: Minimum Spanning Tree, Hub Location Allocation, Quadratic Assignment, Clustering, Feature Selection, Regression, Economic Dispatching, Parallel Machine Scheduling, Color Quantization, and Image Segmentation and compared to traditional and bio-inspired algorithms. Overall, the performance of the algorithm in all tasks is satisfactory.

After the beetle leaves, the flower turns into a male and changes color from white to pink. The male flower dies and sinks into the water, releasing its seed to help create a new generation. In this paper, the mathematical life cycle of this magnificent plant is introduced, and each leaf and blossom are treated as a single entity. The proposed bio-inspired algorithm is tested with 24 benchmark optimization test functions, such as Ackley, and compared to ten other famous algorithms, including the Genetic Algorithm. The proposed algorithm is tested on 10 optimization problems: Minimum Spanning Tree, Hub Location Allocation, Quadratic Assignment, Clustering, Feature Selection, Regression, Economic Dispatching, Parallel Machine Scheduling, Color Quantization, and Image Segmentation and compared to traditional and bio-inspired algorithms. Overall, the performance of the algorithm in all tasks is satisfactory.
abstract_zh: 维多利亚亚马逊植物，通常被称为巨型睡莲，拥有世界上最大的漂浮球形叶子，最大叶子直径达 3 米。它通过刺的力量展开叶子，并在下面形成一个巨大的阴影，杀死任何需要阳光的植物。这些水霸利用它们强大的刺将彼此逼到水面，并增强自己的力量，以从水面夺取更多空间。当它们遍布整个池塘或盆地时，最早生长的叶子有更多的生长空间，每片叶子都有独特的大小。它的花是变性的，当它们开花时，环头甲虫负责授粉过程，被雌花的气味所吸引。进入花朵后，甲虫被花粉覆盖并将其转移到另一朵花上进行受精。甲虫离开后，花变成雄花，颜色从白色变为粉红色。雄花死亡并沉入水中，释放种子以帮助产生新一代。在本文中，介绍了这种宏伟植物的数学生命周期，并将每片叶子和花朵视为一个实体。所提出的仿生算法使用 24 个基准优化测试函数（例如 Ackley）进行了测试，并与包括遗传算法在内的其他十种著名算法进行了比较。该算法在 10 个优化问题上进行了测试：最小生成树、集线器位置分配、二次分配、聚类、特征选择、回归、经济调度、并行机器调度、颜色量化和图像分割，并与传统算法和仿生算法进行了比较。总体而言，算法在所有任务中的表现令人满意。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受巨型睡莲植物启发的优化算法（VAO），并测试其在多个优化问题中的性能。
AI.motivation: 巨型睡莲通过叶片竞争和花朵性别转换等生物特性实现高效资源分配，启发了新型优化算法的设计。
AI.method: 将睡莲叶片和花朵的生命周期数学化，构建竞争扩散机制与信息传递模型，设计对应优化算法并测试24个基准函数及10类实际问题。
AI.result: VAO算法在最小生成树、聚类、图像分割等10类优化问题中表现优于传统算法和其它生物启发算法。
AI.conclusion: 基于睡莲生长机制的VAO算法有效解决了多类优化问题，验证了生物启发式方法在复杂优化中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Suguru Yasutomi,Toshihisa Tanaka
title: Style Feature Extraction Using Contrastive Conditioned Variational Autoencoders with Mutual Information Constraints
title_zh: 使用具有互信息约束的对比条件变分自编码器进行风格特征提取
abstract: Extracting fine-grained features such as styles from unlabeled data is crucial for data analysis. Unsupervised methods such as variational autoencoders (VAEs) can extract styles that are usually mixed with other features. Conditional VAEs (CVAEs) can isolate styles using class labels; however, there are no established methods to extract only styles using unlabeled data. In this paper, we propose a CVAE-based method that extracts style features using only unlabeled data. The proposed model consists of a contrastive learning (CL) part that extracts style-independent features and a CVAE part that extracts style features. The CL model learns representations independent of data augmentation, which can be viewed as a perturbation in styles, in a self-supervised manner. Considering the style-independent features from the pretrained CL model as a condition, the CVAE learns to extract only styles. Additionally, we introduce a constraint based on mutual information between the CL and VAE features to prevent the CVAE from ignoring the condition. Experiments conducted using two simple datasets, MNIST and an original dataset based on Google Fonts, demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently extract style features. Further experiments using real-world natural image datasets were also conducted to illustrate the method's extendability.
summary: Extracting fine-grained features such as styles from unlabeled data is crucial for data analysis. Unsupervised methods such as variational autoencoders (VAEs) can extract styles that are usually mixed with other features. Conditional VAEs (CVAEs) can isolate styles using class labels; however, there are no established methods to extract only styles using unlabeled data. In this paper, we propose a CVAE-based method that extracts style features using only unlabeled data. The proposed model consists of a contrastive learning (CL) part that extracts style-independent features and a CVAE part that extracts style features. The CL model learns representations independent of data augmentation, which can be viewed as a perturbation in styles, in a self-supervised manner. Considering the style-independent features from the pretrained CL model as a condition, the CVAE learns to extract only styles. Additionally, we introduce a constraint based on mutual information between the CL and VAE features to prevent the CVAE from ignoring the condition. Experiments conducted using two simple datasets, MNIST and an original dataset based on Google Fonts, demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently extract style features. Further experiments using real-world natural image datasets were also conducted to illustrate the method's extendability.
abstract_zh: 从未标记的数据中提取样式等细粒度特征对于数据分析至关重要。无监督方法（例如变分自动编码器（VAE））可以提取通常与其他特征混合的样式。条件 VAE（CVAE）可以使用类标签来隔离样式；然而，还没有既定的方法来使用未标记的数据仅提取样式。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CVAE 的方法，仅使用未标记的数据提取风格特征。所提出的模型由提取风格无关特征的对比学习（CL）部分和提取风格特征的 CVAE 部分组成。 CL 模型以自我监督的方式学习独立于数据增强的表示，这可以被视为风格的扰动。考虑到预训练 CL 模型中与风格无关的特征作为条件，CVAE 学会仅提取风格。此外，我们引入了基于 CL 和 VAE 特征之间的互信息的约束，以防止 CVAE 忽略该条件。使用两个简单数据集（MNIST 和基于 Google Fonts 的原始数据集）进行的实验表明，所提出的方法可以有效地提取风格特征。还使用真实世界的自然图像数据集进行了进一步的实验，以说明该方法的可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的无监督方法，仅利用无标签数据提取风格特征。
AI.motivation: 现有条件变分自编码器（CVAE）依赖类别标签提取风格特征，但缺乏针对无标签数据的纯风格提取方法，需探索无需监督信息的风格解耦方案。
AI.method: 结合对比学习（CL）与CVAE：CL模块通过自监督学习提取与风格无关的特征，CVAE以CL特征为条件提取风格特征，并引入CL与VAE特征间的互信息约束防止条件被忽略。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Google Fonts数据集上验证了方法有效性，并扩展至真实自然图像数据集，证明其可高效提取风格特征。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督风格提取框架在合成与真实数据集上均表现良好，为无标签数据的细粒度特征分析提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有条件变分自编码器（CVAE）依赖类别标签提取风格特征，但缺乏针对无标签数据的纯风格提取方法，需探索无需监督信息的风格解耦方案。
method: 结合对比学习（CL）与CVAE：CL模块通过自监督学习提取与风格无关的特征，CVAE以CL特征为条件提取风格特征，并引入CL与VAE特征间的互信息约束防止条件被忽略。
result: 在MNIST和Google Fonts数据集上验证了方法有效性，并扩展至真实自然图像数据集，证明其可高效提取风格特征。
conclusion: 提出的无监督风格提取框架在合成与真实数据集上均表现良好，为无标签数据的细粒度特征分析提供了新思路。
search_text: Style Feature Extraction Using Contrastive Conditioned Variational Autoencoders with Mutual Information Constraints 使用具有互信息约束的对比条件变分自编码器进行风格特征提取 Extracting fine-grained features such as styles from unlabeled data is crucial for data analysis. Unsupervised methods such as variational autoencoders (VAEs) can extract styles that are usually mixed with other features. Conditional VAEs (CVAEs) can isolate styles using class labels; however, there are no established methods to extract only styles using unlabeled data. In this paper, we propose a CVAE-based method that extracts style features using only unlabeled data. The proposed model consists of a contrastive learning (CL) part that extracts style-independent features and a CVAE part that extracts style features. The CL model learns representations independent of data augmentation, which can be viewed as a perturbation in styles, in a self-supervised manner. Considering the style-independent features from the pretrained CL model as a condition, the CVAE learns to extract only styles. Additionally, we introduce a constraint based on mutual information between the CL and VAE features to prevent the CVAE from ignoring the condition. Experiments conducted using two simple datasets, MNIST and an original dataset based on Google Fonts, demonstrate that the proposed method can efficiently extract style features. Further experiments using real-world natural image datasets were also conducted to illustrate the method's extendability. 从未标记的数据中提取样式等细粒度特征对于数据分析至关重要。无监督方法（例如变分自动编码器（VAE））可以提取通常与其他特征混合的样式。条件 VAE（CVAE）可以使用类标签来隔离样式；然而，还没有既定的方法来使用未标记的数据仅提取样式。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 CVAE 的方法，仅使用未标记的数据提取风格特征。所提出的模型由提取风格无关特征的对比学习（CL）部分和提取风格特征的 CVAE 部分组成。 CL 模型以自我监督的方式学习独立于数据增强的表示，这可以被视为风格的扰动。考虑到预训练 CL 模型中与风格无关的特征作为条件，CVAE 学会仅提取风格。此外，我们引入了基于 CL 和 VAE 特征之间的互信息的约束，以防止 CVAE 忽略该条件。使用两个简单数据集（MNIST 和基于 Google Fonts 的原始数据集）进行的实验表明，所提出的方法可以有效地提取风格特征。还使用真实世界的自然图像数据集进行了进一步的实验，以说明该方法的可扩展性。 本文提出一种基于对比条件变分自编码器（CVAE）的无监督方法，仅利用无标签数据提取风格特征。 Suguru Yasutomi,Toshihisa Tanaka cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Jiawei Huang,Akito Iizuka,Hajime Tanaka,Taku Komura,Yoshifumi Kitamura
title: Online Neural Path Guiding with Normalized Anisotropic Spherical Gaussians
title_zh: 使用归一化各向异性球面高斯的在线神经路径引导
abstract: The variance reduction speed of physically-based rendering is heavily affected by the adopted importance sampling technique. In this paper we propose a novel online framework to learn the spatial-varying density model with a single small neural network using stochastic ray samples. To achieve this task, we propose a novel closed-form density model called the normalized anisotropic spherical gaussian mixture, that can express complex irradiance fields with a small number of parameters. Our framework learns the distribution in a progressive manner and does not need any warm-up phases. Due to the compact and expressive representation of our density model, our framework can be implemented entirely on the GPU, allowing it produce high quality images with limited computational resources.
summary: The variance reduction speed of physically-based rendering is heavily affected by the adopted importance sampling technique. In this paper we propose a novel online framework to learn the spatial-varying density model with a single small neural network using stochastic ray samples. To achieve this task, we propose a novel closed-form density model called the normalized anisotropic spherical gaussian mixture, that can express complex irradiance fields with a small number of parameters. Our framework learns the distribution in a progressive manner and does not need any warm-up phases. Due to the compact and expressive representation of our density model, our framework can be implemented entirely on the GPU, allowing it produce high quality images with limited computational resources.
abstract_zh: 基于物理的渲染的方差降低速度很大程度上受到所采用的重要性采样技术的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的在线框架，通过使用随机射线样本的单个小型神经网络来学习空间变化密度模型。为了实现这一任务，我们提出了一种新颖的封闭形式密度模型，称为归一化各向异性球面高斯混合，它可以用少量参数表达复杂的辐照度场。我们的框架以渐进的方式学习分布，不需要任何预热阶段。由于我们的密度模型的紧凑和富有表现力的表示，我们的框架可以完全在 GPU 上实现，从而允许它用有限的计算资源生成高质量的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于归一化各向异性球面高斯混合模型的在线神经路径引导框架，通过小规模神经网络学习空间变化密度模型以提升基于物理的渲染效率。
AI.motivation: 基于物理的渲染中，传统重要性采样技术存在方差减少速度慢、依赖预处理等问题，亟需更高效且无需复杂预热的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计归一化各向异性球面高斯混合模型作为紧凑密度表示，结合在线学习机制与GPU加速，利用随机射线样本渐进式训练密度分布。
AI.result: 实现无需预热阶段的实时高质量渲染，在有限计算资源下显著提升图像生成效率与质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过参数高效的密度模型与在线学习策略，为物理渲染提供了可在GPU上高效实现的新型路径引导方案。

authors_text: Weiyang Jin,Yongpei Zhu,Yuxi Peng
title: Interpretable ODE-style Generative Diffusion Model via Force Field Construction
title_zh: 通过力场构建可解释的 ODE 式生成扩散模型
comment: find some mistake for the results
comments: find some mistake for the results
abstract: For a considerable time, researchers have focused on developing a method that establishes a deep connection between the generative diffusion model and mathematical physics. Despite previous efforts, progress has been limited to the pursuit of a single specialized method. In order to advance the interpretability of diffusion models and explore new research directions, it is essential to establish a unified ODE-style generative diffusion model. Such a model should draw inspiration from physical models and possess a clear geometric meaning. This paper aims to identify various physical models that are suitable for constructing ODE-style generative diffusion models accurately from a mathematical perspective. We then summarize these models into a unified method. Additionally, we perform a case study where we use the theoretical model identified by our method to develop a range of new diffusion model methods, and conduct experiments. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We have constructed a computational framework that attains highly proficient results with regards to image generation speed, alongside an additional model that demonstrates exceptional performance in both Inception score and FID score. These results underscore the significance of our method in advancing the field of diffusion models.
summary: For a considerable time, researchers have focused on developing a method that establishes a deep connection between the generative diffusion model and mathematical physics. Despite previous efforts, progress has been limited to the pursuit of a single specialized method. In order to advance the interpretability of diffusion models and explore new research directions, it is essential to establish a unified ODE-style generative diffusion model. Such a model should draw inspiration from physical models and possess a clear geometric meaning. This paper aims to identify various physical models that are suitable for constructing ODE-style generative diffusion models accurately from a mathematical perspective. We then summarize these models into a unified method. Additionally, we perform a case study where we use the theoretical model identified by our method to develop a range of new diffusion model methods, and conduct experiments. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We have constructed a computational framework that attains highly proficient results with regards to image generation speed, alongside an additional model that demonstrates exceptional performance in both Inception score and FID score. These results underscore the significance of our method in advancing the field of diffusion models.
abstract_zh: 相当长一段时间以来，研究人员一直致力于开发一种在生成扩散模型和数学物理之间建立深层联系的方法。尽管之前做出了努力，但进展仅限于追求单一的专门方法。为了提高扩散模型的可解释性并探索新的研究方向，有必要建立统一的ODE式生成扩散模型。这样的模型应该从物理模型中汲取灵感，并具有明确的几何意义。本文旨在从数学角度识别适合准确构建 ODE 式生成扩散模型的各种物理模型。然后我们将这些模型总结成一个统一的方法。此外，我们还进行了一个案例研究，使用我们的方法确定的理论模型来开发一系列新的扩散模型方法，并进行实验。我们在 CIFAR-10 上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。我们构建了一个计算框架，该框架在图像生成速度方面获得了高度熟练的结果，同时还构建了一个在 Inception 分数和 FID 分数方面均表现出卓越性能的附加模型。这些结果强调了我们的方法在推进扩散模型领域的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建力场模型，建立具有可解释性的ODE风格生成扩散模型，以提升扩散模型的可解释性并探索新研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在扩散模型与数学物理的深度连接上进展有限，且方法单一，需通过统一的ODE风格模型提升可解释性并推动新方向。
AI.method: 从数学角度筛选适合构建ODE风格扩散模型的物理模型，将其归纳为统一方法，并通过理论模型开发新扩散方法进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上实验表明，该方法在图像生成速度、Inception分数和FID分数上均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过物理模型的数学统一框架，显著推动了扩散模型的可解释性与性能优化，为领域发展提供新思路。

authors_text: Paul Friedrich,Julia Wolleb,Florentin Bieder,Florian M. Thieringer,Philippe C. Cattin
title: Point Cloud Diffusion Models for Automatic Implant Generation
title_zh: 用于自动植入物生成的点云扩散模型
comment: Accepted to MICCAI 2023. Project page: https://pfriedri.github.io/pcdiff-implant-io/ . Code: https://github.com/pfriedri/pcdiff-implant/
comments: Accepted to MICCAI 2023. Project page: https://pfriedri.github.io/pcdiff-implant-io/ . Code: https://github.com/pfriedri/pcdiff-implant/
abstract: Advances in 3D printing of biocompatible materials make patient-specific implants increasingly popular. The design of these implants is, however, still a tedious and largely manual process. Existing approaches to automate implant generation are mainly based on 3D U-Net architectures on downsampled or patch-wise data, which can result in a loss of detail or contextual information. Following the recent success of Diffusion Probabilistic Models, we propose a novel approach for implant generation based on a combination of 3D point cloud diffusion models and voxelization networks. Due to the stochastic sampling process in our diffusion model, we can propose an ensemble of different implants per defect, from which the physicians can choose the most suitable one. We evaluate our method on the SkullBreak and SkullFix datasets, generating high-quality implants and achieving competitive evaluation scores.
summary: Advances in 3D printing of biocompatible materials make patient-specific implants increasingly popular. The design of these implants is, however, still a tedious and largely manual process. Existing approaches to automate implant generation are mainly based on 3D U-Net architectures on downsampled or patch-wise data, which can result in a loss of detail or contextual information. Following the recent success of Diffusion Probabilistic Models, we propose a novel approach for implant generation based on a combination of 3D point cloud diffusion models and voxelization networks. Due to the stochastic sampling process in our diffusion model, we can propose an ensemble of different implants per defect, from which the physicians can choose the most suitable one. We evaluate our method on the SkullBreak and SkullFix datasets, generating high-quality implants and achieving competitive evaluation scores.
abstract_zh: 生物相容性材料 3D 打印技术的进步使得患者专用植入物越来越受欢迎。然而，这些植入物的设计仍然是一个乏味且主要是手动的过程。现有的自动生成植入物的方法主要基于基于下采样或分片数据的 3D U-Net 架构，这可能会导致细节或上下文信息的丢失。继最近扩散概率模型的成功之后，我们提出了一种基于 3D 点云扩散模型和体素化网络相结合的植入物生成的新方法。由于我们的扩散模型中的随机采样过程，我们可以针对每个缺陷提出不同植入物的集合，医生可以从中选择最合适的一个。我们在 SkullBreak 和 SkullFix 数据集上评估我们的方法，生成高质量的植入物并获得有竞争力的评估分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于3D点云扩散模型与体素化网络的自动植入物生成方法，解决现有3D U-Net架构在细节保留和上下文理解上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有植入物设计依赖人工且自动化方法存在细节丢失问题，需更高效保留几何特征与医学语义的生成方案。
AI.method: 融合3D点云扩散模型的随机采样能力与体素化网络的结构表达，通过多阶段扩散过程生成多样化植入物候选方案。
AI.result: 在SkullBreak和SkullFix数据集上生成高质量植入物，取得与现有方法相当的评估指标并实现医生可选择的多样性输出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过概率生成框架有效平衡了植入物的几何精度与医学可行性，为个性化医疗提供自动化设计新范式。

search_text: Point Cloud Diffusion Models for Automatic Implant Generation 用于自动植入物生成的点云扩散模型 Advances in 3D printing of biocompatible materials make patient-specific implants increasingly popular. The design of these implants is, however, still a tedious and largely manual process. Existing approaches to automate implant generation are mainly based on 3D U-Net architectures on downsampled or patch-wise data, which can result in a loss of detail or contextual information. Following the recent success of Diffusion Probabilistic Models, we propose a novel approach for implant generation based on a combination of 3D point cloud diffusion models and voxelization networks. Due to the stochastic sampling process in our diffusion model, we can propose an ensemble of different implants per defect, from which the physicians can choose the most suitable one. We evaluate our method on the SkullBreak and SkullFix datasets, generating high-quality implants and achieving competitive evaluation scores. 生物相容性材料 3D 打印技术的进步使得患者专用植入物越来越受欢迎。然而，这些植入物的设计仍然是一个乏味且主要是手动的过程。现有的自动生成植入物的方法主要基于基于下采样或分片数据的 3D U-Net 架构，这可能会导致细节或上下文信息的丢失。继最近扩散概率模型的成功之后，我们提出了一种基于 3D 点云扩散模型和体素化网络相结合的植入物生成的新方法。由于我们的扩散模型中的随机采样过程，我们可以针对每个缺陷提出不同植入物的集合，医生可以从中选择最合适的一个。我们在 SkullBreak 和 SkullFix 数据集上评估我们的方法，生成高质量的植入物并获得有竞争力的评估分数。 本文提出基于3D点云扩散模型与体素化网络的自动植入物生成方法，解决现有3D U-Net架构在细节保留和上下文理解上的不足。 Paul Friedrich,Julia Wolleb,Florentin Bieder,Florian M. Thieringer,Philippe C. Cattin eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Marco Kemmerling,Daniel Lütticke,Robert H. Schmitt
title: Beyond Games: A Systematic Review of Neural Monte Carlo Tree Search Applications
title_zh: 超越游戏：神经蒙特卡罗树搜索应用的系统回顾
comment: 38 pages, 14 figures, submitted to Springer Applied Intelligence
comments: 38 pages, 14 figures, submitted to Springer Applied Intelligence
abstract: The advent of AlphaGo and its successors marked the beginning of a new paradigm in playing games using artificial intelligence. This was achieved by combining Monte Carlo tree search, a planning procedure, and deep learning. While the impact on the domain of games has been undeniable, it is less clear how useful similar approaches are in applications beyond games and how they need to be adapted from the original methodology. We review 129 peer-reviewed articles detailing the application of neural Monte Carlo tree search methods in domains other than games. Our goal is to systematically assess how such methods are structured in practice and if their success can be extended to other domains. We find applications in a variety of domains, many distinct ways of guiding the tree search using learned policy and value functions, and various training methods. Our review maps the current landscape of algorithms in the family of neural monte carlo tree search as they are applied to practical problems, which is a first step towards a more principled way of designing such algorithms for specific problems and their requirements.
summary: The advent of AlphaGo and its successors marked the beginning of a new paradigm in playing games using artificial intelligence. This was achieved by combining Monte Carlo tree search, a planning procedure, and deep learning. While the impact on the domain of games has been undeniable, it is less clear how useful similar approaches are in applications beyond games and how they need to be adapted from the original methodology. We review 129 peer-reviewed articles detailing the application of neural Monte Carlo tree search methods in domains other than games. Our goal is to systematically assess how such methods are structured in practice and if their success can be extended to other domains. We find applications in a variety of domains, many distinct ways of guiding the tree search using learned policy and value functions, and various training methods. Our review maps the current landscape of algorithms in the family of neural monte carlo tree search as they are applied to practical problems, which is a first step towards a more principled way of designing such algorithms for specific problems and their requirements.
abstract_zh: AlphaGo 及其后继者的出现标志着使用人工智能玩游戏的新范式的开始。这是通过结合蒙特卡罗树搜索、规划过程和深度学习来实现的。虽然对游戏领域的影响是不可否认的，但尚不清楚类似的方法在游戏以外的应用程序中有多有用，以及它们需要如何根据原始方法进行调整。我们回顾了 129 篇同行评审的文章，详细介绍了神经蒙特卡罗树搜索方法在游戏以外领域的应用。我们的目标是系统地评估这些方法在实践中是如何构建的，以及它们的成功是否可以扩展到其他领域。我们在各个领域找到了应用程序，使用学习的策略和价值函数以及各种训练方法来指导树搜索的许多不同方式。我们的回顾描绘了神经蒙特卡罗树搜索家族中算法应用于实际问题时的当前情况，这是针对特定问题及其要求设计此类算法的更原则性方法的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了神经蒙特卡洛树搜索在游戏以外领域的应用，分析其结构和适应性。
AI.motivation: 尽管AlphaGo等成功应用了蒙特卡洛树搜索与深度学习，但其在非游戏领域的效用及适应方法尚不明确，需系统评估。
AI.method: 通过回顾129篇同行评审论文，分析神经蒙特卡洛树搜索在非游戏领域的应用方式、策略指导及训练方法。
AI.result: 发现该方法在多领域有应用，存在多种利用策略函数和价值函数引导搜索的方式，以及不同的训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究为设计针对特定问题的神经蒙特卡洛树搜索算法提供了基础，需更系统化的方法应对不同需求。

authors_text: Annika Briegleb,Thomas Haubner,Vasileios Belagiannis,Walter Kellermann
title: Localizing Spatial Information in Neural Spatiospectral Filters
title_zh: 神经空间谱滤波器中的空间信息本地化
comment: Accepted to the 31st European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2023), Helsinki, Finland. 5 pages, 3 figures
comments: Accepted to the 31st European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2023), Helsinki, Finland. 5 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Beamforming for multichannel speech enhancement relies on the estimation of spatial characteristics of the acoustic scene. In its simplest form, the delay-and-sum beamformer (DSB) introduces a time delay to all channels to align the desired signal components for constructive superposition. Recent investigations of neural spatiospectral filtering revealed that these filters can be characterized by a beampattern similar to one of traditional beamformers, which shows that artificial neural networks can learn and explicitly represent spatial structure. Using the Complex-valued Spatial Autoencoder (COSPA) as an exemplary neural spatiospectral filter for multichannel speech enhancement, we investigate where and how such networks represent spatial information. We show via clustering that for COSPA the spatial information is represented by the features generated by a gated recurrent unit (GRU) layer that has access to all channels simultaneously and that these features are not source -- but only direction of arrival-dependent.
summary: Beamforming for multichannel speech enhancement relies on the estimation of spatial characteristics of the acoustic scene. In its simplest form, the delay-and-sum beamformer (DSB) introduces a time delay to all channels to align the desired signal components for constructive superposition. Recent investigations of neural spatiospectral filtering revealed that these filters can be characterized by a beampattern similar to one of traditional beamformers, which shows that artificial neural networks can learn and explicitly represent spatial structure. Using the Complex-valued Spatial Autoencoder (COSPA) as an exemplary neural spatiospectral filter for multichannel speech enhancement, we investigate where and how such networks represent spatial information. We show via clustering that for COSPA the spatial information is represented by the features generated by a gated recurrent unit (GRU) layer that has access to all channels simultaneously and that these features are not source -- but only direction of arrival-dependent.
abstract_zh: 用于多通道语音增强的波束形成依赖于对声学场景的空间特征的估计。最简单的形式是，延迟求和波束形成器 (DSB) 向所有通道引入时间延迟，以对齐所需的信号分量以实现相长叠加。最近对神经空间频谱滤波的研究表明，这些滤波器的波束图案与传统波束形成器类似，这表明人工神经网络可以学习并明确表示空间结构。使用复值空间自动编码器（COSPA）作为多通道语音增强的示例性神经空间频谱滤波器，我们研究了此类网络在何处以及如何表示空间信息。我们通过聚类表明，对于 COSPA，空间信息由门控循环单元 (GRU) 层生成的特征表示，该层可以同时访问所有通道，并且这些特征不是源，而是仅依赖于到达方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了神经网络在多通道语音增强中的空间信息表示，特别是通过COSPA模型分析其空间信息的编码机制。
AI.motivation: 传统的波束成形技术依赖于对声学场景的空间特征估计，而近期研究表明神经网络可以学习并显式表示空间结构，因此有必要研究神经网络如何表征空间信息。
AI.method: 本文以COSPA模型为例，通过聚类分析方法，研究其空间信息在GRU层中的表示方式，并分析这些特征是否依赖于声源或仅依赖于到达方向。
AI.result: 结果表明，COSPA模型中空间信息由具有所有通道访问权限的GRU层生成的特征表示，并且这些特征仅依赖于到达方向，而非声源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了神经网络在空间信息表征中的机制，为设计更高效的多通道语音增强模型提供了理论依据。

method: 本文以COSPA模型为例，通过聚类分析方法，研究其空间信息在GRU层中的表示方式，并分析这些特征是否依赖于声源或仅依赖于到达方向。
result: 结果表明，COSPA模型中空间信息由具有所有通道访问权限的GRU层生成的特征表示，并且这些特征仅依赖于到达方向，而非声源。
conclusion: 该研究揭示了神经网络在空间信息表征中的机制，为设计更高效的多通道语音增强模型提供了理论依据。
search_text: Localizing Spatial Information in Neural Spatiospectral Filters 神经空间谱滤波器中的空间信息本地化 Beamforming for multichannel speech enhancement relies on the estimation of spatial characteristics of the acoustic scene. In its simplest form, the delay-and-sum beamformer (DSB) introduces a time delay to all channels to align the desired signal components for constructive superposition. Recent investigations of neural spatiospectral filtering revealed that these filters can be characterized by a beampattern similar to one of traditional beamformers, which shows that artificial neural networks can learn and explicitly represent spatial structure. Using the Complex-valued Spatial Autoencoder (COSPA) as an exemplary neural spatiospectral filter for multichannel speech enhancement, we investigate where and how such networks represent spatial information. We show via clustering that for COSPA the spatial information is represented by the features generated by a gated recurrent unit (GRU) layer that has access to all channels simultaneously and that these features are not source -- but only direction of arrival-dependent. 用于多通道语音增强的波束形成依赖于对声学场景的空间特征的估计。最简单的形式是，延迟求和波束形成器 (DSB) 向所有通道引入时间延迟，以对齐所需的信号分量以实现相长叠加。最近对神经空间频谱滤波的研究表明，这些滤波器的波束图案与传统波束形成器类似，这表明人工神经网络可以学习并明确表示空间结构。使用复值空间自动编码器（COSPA）作为多通道语音增强的示例性神经空间频谱滤波器，我们研究了此类网络在何处以及如何表示空间信息。我们通过聚类表明，对于 COSPA，空间信息由门控循环单元 (GRU) 层生成的特征表示，该层可以同时访问所有通道，并且这些特征不是源，而是仅依赖于到达方向。 本文研究了神经网络在多通道语音增强中的空间信息表示，特别是通过COSPA模型分析其空间信息的编码机制。 Annika Briegleb,Thomas Haubner,Vasileios Belagiannis,Walter Kellermann eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Zicheng Zhang,Wei Sun,Yingjie Zhou,Jun Jia,Zhichao Zhang,Jing Liu,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai
title: Subjective and Objective Quality Assessment for in-the-Wild Computer Graphics Images
title_zh: 野外计算机图形图像的主观和客观质量评估
abstract: Computer graphics images (CGIs) are artificially generated by means of computer programs and are widely perceived under various scenarios, such as games, streaming media, etc. In practice, the quality of CGIs consistently suffers from poor rendering during production, inevitable compression artifacts during the transmission of multimedia applications, and low aesthetic quality resulting from poor composition and design. However, few works have been dedicated to dealing with the challenge of computer graphics image quality assessment (CGIQA). Most image quality assessment (IQA) metrics are developed for natural scene images (NSIs) and validated on databases consisting of NSIs with synthetic distortions, which are not suitable for in-the-wild CGIs. To bridge the gap between evaluating the quality of NSIs and CGIs, we construct a large-scale in-the-wild CGIQA database consisting of 6,000 CGIs (CGIQA-6k) and carry out the subjective experiment in a well-controlled laboratory environment to obtain the accurate perceptual ratings of the CGIs. Then, we propose an effective deep learning-based no-reference (NR) IQA model by utilizing both distortion and aesthetic quality representation. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms all other state-of-the-art NR IQA methods on the constructed CGIQA-6k database and other CGIQA-related databases. The database is released at https://github.com/zzc-1998/CGIQA6K.
summary: Computer graphics images (CGIs) are artificially generated by means of computer programs and are widely perceived under various scenarios, such as games, streaming media, etc. In practice, the quality of CGIs consistently suffers from poor rendering during production, inevitable compression artifacts during the transmission of multimedia applications, and low aesthetic quality resulting from poor composition and design. However, few works have been dedicated to dealing with the challenge of computer graphics image quality assessment (CGIQA). Most image quality assessment (IQA) metrics are developed for natural scene images (NSIs) and validated on databases consisting of NSIs with synthetic distortions, which are not suitable for in-the-wild CGIs. To bridge the gap between evaluating the quality of NSIs and CGIs, we construct a large-scale in-the-wild CGIQA database consisting of 6,000 CGIs (CGIQA-6k) and carry out the subjective experiment in a well-controlled laboratory environment to obtain the accurate perceptual ratings of the CGIs. Then, we propose an effective deep learning-based no-reference (NR) IQA model by utilizing both distortion and aesthetic quality representation. Experimental results show that the proposed method outperforms all other state-of-the-art NR IQA methods on the constructed CGIQA-6k database and other CGIQA-related databases. The database is released at https://github.com/zzc-1998/CGIQA6K.
abstract_zh: 计算机图形图像（CGI）是通过计算机程序人工生成的，在游戏、流媒体等各种场景下被广泛感知。在实践中，CGI 的质量始终存在制作过程中渲染效果不佳、多媒体应用程序传输过程中不可避免的压缩伪像以及由于构图和设计不佳而导致的审美质量低下等问题。然而，很少有研究致力于应对计算机图形图像质量评估（CGIQA）的挑战。大多数图像质量评估 (IQA) 指标都是针对自然场景图像 (NSI) 开发的，并在由具有合成失真的 NSI 组成的数据库上进行验证，这些模型不适合野外 CGI。为了弥合评估 NSI 和 CGI​​ 质量之间的差距，我们构建了一个由 6,000 个 CGI 组成的大规模野外 CGIQA 数据库（CGIQA-6k），并在良好控制的实验室环境中进行主观实验，以获得 CGI 的准确感知评级。然后，我们通过利用失真和美学质量表示，提出了一种有效的基于深度学习的无参考（NR）IQA 模型。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在构建的 CGIQA-6k 数据库和其他 CGIQA 相关数据库上优于所有其他最先进的 NR IQA 方法。该数据库发布于https://github.com/zzc-1998/CGIQA6K。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决真实场景下计算机图形图像（CGIs）质量评估的挑战，通过构建大规模数据库并提出结合失真与美学质量的深度学习无参考评估模型。
AI.motivation: 现有图像质量评估方法多针对自然场景图像，难以适应CGIs在渲染缺陷、压缩伪影及美学设计等方面的特殊质量问题。
AI.method: 构建包含6,000张CGIs的大型数据库（CGIQA-6k），通过实验室主观实验获取感知评分，并设计融合失真与美学特征的深度学习无参考（NR）IQA模型。
AI.result: 所提方法在CGIQA-6k及其他相关数据库上均优于现有最先进的NR IQA方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了CGI质量评估领域的空白，为后续研究提供了基准数据库与有效评估框架。

authors_text: Baran Hashemi,Nikolai Hartmann,Sahand Sharifzadeh,James Kahn,Thomas Kuhr
title: Ultra-High-Resolution Detector Simulation with Intra-Event Aware GAN and Self-Supervised Relational Reasoning
title_zh: 使用事件内感知 GAN 和自监督关系推理进行超高分辨率探测器模拟
abstract: Simulating high-resolution detector responses is a computationally intensive process that has long been challenging in Particle Physics. Despite the ability of generative models to streamline it, full ultra-high-granularity detector simulation still proves to be difficult as it contains correlated and fine-grained information. To overcome these limitations, we propose Intra-Event Aware Generative Adversarial Network (IEA-GAN). IEA-GAN presents a Relational Reasoning Module that approximates an event in detector simulation, generating contextualized high-resolution full detector responses with a proper relational inductive bias. IEA-GAN also introduces a Self-Supervised intra-event aware loss and Uniformity loss, significantly enhancing sample fidelity and diversity. We demonstrate IEA-GAN's application in generating sensor-dependent images for the ultra-high-granularity Pixel Vertex Detector (PXD), with more than 7.5 M information channels at the Belle II Experiment. Applications of this work span from Foundation Models for high-granularity detector simulation, such as at the HL-LHC (High Luminosity LHC), to simulation-based inference and fine-grained density estimation. To our knowledge, IEA-GAN is the first algorithm for faithful ultra-high-granularity full detector simulation with event-based reasoning.
summary: Simulating high-resolution detector responses is a computationally intensive process that has long been challenging in Particle Physics. Despite the ability of generative models to streamline it, full ultra-high-granularity detector simulation still proves to be difficult as it contains correlated and fine-grained information. To overcome these limitations, we propose Intra-Event Aware Generative Adversarial Network (IEA-GAN). IEA-GAN presents a Relational Reasoning Module that approximates an event in detector simulation, generating contextualized high-resolution full detector responses with a proper relational inductive bias. IEA-GAN also introduces a Self-Supervised intra-event aware loss and Uniformity loss, significantly enhancing sample fidelity and diversity. We demonstrate IEA-GAN's application in generating sensor-dependent images for the ultra-high-granularity Pixel Vertex Detector (PXD), with more than 7.5 M information channels at the Belle II Experiment. Applications of this work span from Foundation Models for high-granularity detector simulation, such as at the HL-LHC (High Luminosity LHC), to simulation-based inference and fine-grained density estimation. To our knowledge, IEA-GAN is the first algorithm for faithful ultra-high-granularity full detector simulation with event-based reasoning.
abstract_zh: 模拟高分辨率探测器响应是一个计算密集型过程，长期以来在粒子物理学中一直具有挑战性。尽管生成模型能够简化它，但完整的超高粒度探测器模拟仍然很困难，因为它包含相关的细粒度信息。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了事件内感知生成对抗网络（IEA-GAN）。 IEA-GAN 提出了一个关系推理模块，可近似检测器模拟中的事件，生成具有适当关系归纳偏差的情境化高分辨率完整检测器响应。 IEA-GAN 还引入了自监督事件内感知损失和均匀性损失，显着增强了样本保真度和多样性。我们在 Belle II 实验中演示了 IEA-GAN 在为超高粒度像素顶点检测器 (PXD) 生成依赖于传感器的图像方面的应用，该图像具有超过 750 万个信息通道。这项工作的应用范围从用于高粒度探测器模拟的基础模型（例如 HL-LHC（高亮度 LHC））到基于模拟的推理和细粒度密度估计。据我们所知，IEA-GAN 是第一个通过基于事件推理进行忠实超高粒度全探测器模拟的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件内感知GAN和自监督关系推理的超高分辨率探测器模拟方法，用于解决粒子物理中高计算成本的模拟问题。
AI.motivation: 传统高分辨率探测器模拟计算成本高，现有生成模型难以处理相关性和细粒度信息，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出IEA-GAN模型，包含关系推理模块和自监督损失函数，通过事件内感知机制生成高分辨率探测器响应。
AI.result: 成功生成PXD探测器图像，提升样本质量与多样性，适用于HL-LHC等场景。
AI.conclusion: IEA-GAN是首个实现基于事件推理的高粒度探测器模拟的算法，为高亮度实验提供新方法。

To our knowledge, IEA-GAN is the first algorithm for faithful ultra-high-granularity full detector simulation with event-based reasoning. 模拟高分辨率探测器响应是一个计算密集型过程，长期以来在粒子物理学中一直具有挑战性。尽管生成模型能够简化它，但完整的超高粒度探测器模拟仍然很困难，因为它包含相关的细粒度信息。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了事件内感知生成对抗网络（IEA-GAN）。 IEA-GAN 提出了一个关系推理模块，可近似检测器模拟中的事件，生成具有适当关系归纳偏差的情境化高分辨率完整检测器响应。 IEA-GAN 还引入了自监督事件内感知损失和均匀性损失，显着增强了样本保真度和多样性。我们在 Belle II 实验中演示了 IEA-GAN 在为超高粒度像素顶点检测器 (PXD) 生成依赖于传感器的图像方面的应用，该图像具有超过 750 万个信息通道。这项工作的应用范围从用于高粒度探测器模拟的基础模型（例如 HL-LHC（高亮度 LHC））到基于模拟的推理和细粒度密度估计。据我们所知，IEA-GAN 是第一个通过基于事件推理进行忠实超高粒度全探测器模拟的算法。 本文提出了一种基于事件内感知GAN和自监督关系推理的超高分辨率探测器模拟方法，用于解决粒子物理中高计算成本的模拟问题。 Baran Hashemi,Nikolai Hartmann,Sahand Sharifzadeh,James Kahn,Thomas Kuhr physics.ins-det,cs.AI,cs.CV,hep-ph,physics.data-an

authors_text: He Zhu,Xihua Li,Xuemin Zhao,Yunbo Cao,Shan Yu
title: TQ-Net: Mixed Contrastive Representation Learning For Heterogeneous Test Questions
title_zh: TQ-Net：异构测试问题的混合对比表示学习
comment: This paper has been accepted for the AAAI2023 AI4Edu Workshop
comments: This paper has been accepted for the AAAI2023 AI4Edu Workshop
abstract: Recently, more and more people study online for the convenience of access to massive learning materials (e.g. test questions/notes), thus accurately understanding learning materials became a crucial issue, which is essential for many educational applications. Previous studies focus on using language models to represent the question data. However, test questions (TQ) are usually heterogeneous and multi-modal, e.g., some of them may only contain text, while others half contain images with information beyond their literal description. In this context, both supervised and unsupervised methods are difficult to learn a fused representation of questions. Meanwhile, this problem cannot be solved by conventional methods such as image caption, as the images may contain information complementary rather than duplicate to the text. In this paper, we first improve previous text-only representation with a two-stage unsupervised instance level contrastive based pre-training method (MCL: Mixture Unsupervised Contrastive Learning). Then, TQ-Net was proposed to fuse the content of images to the representation of heterogeneous data. Finally, supervised contrastive learning was conducted on relevance prediction-related downstream tasks, which helped the model to learn the representation of questions effectively. We conducted extensive experiments on question-based tasks on large-scale, real-world datasets, which demonstrated the effectiveness of TQ-Net and improve the precision of downstream applications (e.g. similar questions +2.02% and knowledge point prediction +7.20%). Our code will be available, and we will open-source a subset of our data to promote the development of relative studies.

Previous studies focus on using language models to represent the question data. However, test questions (TQ) are usually heterogeneous and multi-modal, e.g., some of them may only contain text, while others half contain images with information beyond their literal description. In this context, both supervised and unsupervised methods are difficult to learn a fused representation of questions. Meanwhile, this problem cannot be solved by conventional methods such as image caption, as the images may contain information complementary rather than duplicate to the text. In this paper, we first improve previous text-only representation with a two-stage unsupervised instance level contrastive based pre-training method (MCL: Mixture Unsupervised Contrastive Learning). Then, TQ-Net was proposed to fuse the content of images to the representation of heterogeneous data. Finally, supervised contrastive learning was conducted on relevance prediction-related downstream tasks, which helped the model to learn the representation of questions effectively. We conducted extensive experiments on question-based tasks on large-scale, real-world datasets, which demonstrated the effectiveness of TQ-Net and improve the precision of downstream applications (e.g. similar questions +2.02% and knowledge point prediction +7.20%). Our code will be available, and we will open-source a subset of our data to promote the development of relative studies.
abstract_zh: 近年来，越来越多的人在线学习，以方便获取海量学习材料（例如试题/笔记），因此准确理解学习材料成为一个至关重要的问题，这对于许多教育应用至关重要。之前的研究主要集中在使用语言模型来表示问题数据。然而，测试问题（TQ）通常是异构的和多模态的，例如，其中一些可能只包含文本，而另一些则包含图像，其信息超出了其文字描述。在这种情况下，有监督和无监督方法都很难学习问题的融合表示。同时，这个问题无法通过图像标题等传统方法来解决，因为图像可能包含与文本互补而不是重复的信息。在本文中，我们首先使用基于两阶段无监督实例级对比的预训练方法（MCL：混合无监督对比学习）改进了之前的纯文本表示。然后，提出了 TQ-Net 将图像内容融合到异构数据的表示中。最后，对相关性预测相关的下游任务进行有监督对比学习，这有助于模型有效地学习问题的表示。我们在大规模真实数据集上对基于问题的任务进行了广泛的实验，证明了 TQ-Net 的有效性并提高了下游应用的精度（例如相似问题 +2.02% 和知识点预测 +7.20%）。我们的代码将可用，并且我们将开源一部分数据以促进相关研究的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TQ-Net模型，通过混合对比学习解决异构测试题（含文本和图像）的表示学习问题，提升教育应用中的相关任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效融合异构测试题（文本与图像）的多模态信息，传统方法如图像字幕无法处理图像与文本的互补性信息，亟需新的表示学习框架。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1）基于混合无监督对比学习（MCL）预训练文本表示；2）通过TQ-Net融合图像信息；3）在相关性预测任务上进行监督对比学习优化表示。
AI.result: 在大规模真实数据集上，TQ-Net使相似问题检索精度提升2.02%，知识点预测精度提升7.20%，并开源代码和部分数据集。
AI.conclusion: TQ-Net通过混合对比学习有效解决了异构测试题的表示问题，验证了多模态融合对教育应用的重要性，开源资源将促进相关研究发展。

authors_text: Yanjun Gao,Dmitriy Dligach,Timothy Miller,Matthew M Churpek,Ozlem Uzuner,Majid Afshar
title: Progress Note Understanding -- Assessment and Plan Reasoning: Overview of the 2022 N2C2 Track 3 Shared Task
title_zh: 进度说明理解 - 评估和计划推理：2022 年 N2C2 Track 3 共享任务概述
comment: To appear in Journal of Biomedical Informatics
comments: To appear in Journal of Biomedical Informatics
abstract: Daily progress notes are common types in the electronic health record (EHR) where healthcare providers document the patient's daily progress and treatment plans. The EHR is designed to document all the care provided to patients, but it also enables note bloat with extraneous information that distracts from the diagnoses and treatment plans. Applications of natural language processing (NLP) in the EHR is a growing field with the majority of methods in information extraction. Few tasks use NLP methods for downstream diagnostic decision support. We introduced the 2022 National NLP Clinical Challenge (N2C2) Track 3: Progress Note Understanding - Assessment and Plan Reasoning as one step towards a new suite of tasks. The Assessment and Plan Reasoning task focuses on the most critical components of progress notes, Assessment and Plan subsections where health problems and diagnoses are contained. The goal of the task was to develop and evaluate NLP systems that automatically predict causal relations between the overall status of the patient contained in the Assessment section and its relation to each component of the Plan section which contains the diagnoses and treatment plans. The goal of the task was to identify and prioritize diagnoses as the first steps in diagnostic decision support to find the most relevant information in long documents like daily progress notes. We present the results of 2022 n2c2 Track 3 and provide a description of the data, evaluation, participation and system performance.

abstract_zh: 每日进展记录是电子健康记录 (EHR) 中的常见类型，医疗保健提供者记录患者的每日进展和治疗计划。 EHR 旨在记录向患者提供的所有护理，但它也会导致笔记中包含无关信息，从而分散诊断和治疗计划的注意力。自然语言处理 (NLP) 在 EHR 中的应用是一个不断发展的领域，大多数方法都用于信息提取。很少有任务使用 NLP 方法来支持下游诊断决策。我们推出了 2022 年国家 NLP 临床挑战赛 (N2C2) 第 3 轨道：进展笔记理解 - 评估和计划推理，作为迈向一套新任务的一步。评估和计划推理任务侧重于进度记录、评估和计划小节中最关键的组成部分，其中包含健康问题和诊断。该任务的目标是开发和评估 NLP 系统，该系统自动预测评估部分中包含的患者总体状态与其与包含诊断和治疗计划的计划部分中每个组成部分的关系之间的因果关系。该任务的目标是确定诊断并确定其优先级，作为诊断决策支持的第一步，以便在每日进度记录等长文档中找到最相关的信息。我们展示 2022 年 n2c2 Track 3 的结果，并提供数据、评估、参与和系统性能的描述。

AI.tldr: 开发NLP系统自动预测病历评估部分与计划部分的因果关系，以支持诊断决策
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录存在冗余信息干扰诊断，现有NLP方法多聚焦信息提取，缺乏面向诊断决策支持的因果推理任务
AI.method: 组织2022年N2C2挑战赛Track3，要求系统识别评估部分患者状态与计划部分诊断/治疗方案的因果关联
AI.result: 展示2022年任务的数据集、评估指标、参赛系统表现及诊断优先级识别效果
AI.conclusion: 该任务为医疗NLP开辟新方向，推动因果推理在临床决策支持系统中的应用研究

We present the results of 2022 n2c2 Track 3 and provide a description of the data, evaluation, participation and system performance. 每日进展记录是电子健康记录 (EHR) 中的常见类型，医疗保健提供者记录患者的每日进展和治疗计划。 EHR 旨在记录向患者提供的所有护理，但它也会导致笔记中包含无关信息，从而分散诊断和治疗计划的注意力。自然语言处理 (NLP) 在 EHR 中的应用是一个不断发展的领域，大多数方法都用于信息提取。很少有任务使用 NLP 方法来支持下游诊断决策。我们推出了 2022 年国家 NLP 临床挑战赛 (N2C2) 第 3 轨道：进展笔记理解 - 评估和计划推理，作为迈向一套新任务的一步。评估和计划推理任务侧重于进度记录、评估和计划小节中最关键的组成部分，其中包含健康问题和诊断。该任务的目标是开发和评估 NLP 系统，该系统自动预测评估部分中包含的患者总体状态与其与包含诊断和治疗计划的计划部分中每个组成部分的关系之间的因果关系。该任务的目标是确定诊断并确定其优先级，作为诊断决策支持的第一步，以便在每日进度记录等长文档中找到最相关的信息。我们展示 2022 年 n2c2 Track 3 的结果，并提供数据、评估、参与和系统性能的描述。 开发NLP系统自动预测病历评估部分与计划部分的因果关系，以支持诊断决策 Yanjun Gao,Dmitriy Dligach,Timothy Miller,Matthew M Churpek,Ozlem Uzuner,Majid Afshar cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Alessio Colucci,Andreas Steininger,Muhammad Shafique
title: ISimDL: Importance Sampling-Driven Acceleration of Fault Injection Simulations for Evaluating the Robustness of Deep Learning
title_zh: ISimDL：用于评估深度学习鲁棒性的故障注入仿真的重要采样驱动加速
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) systems have proliferated in many applications, requiring specialized hardware accelerators and chips. In the nano-era, devices have become increasingly more susceptible to permanent and transient faults. Therefore, we need an efficient methodology for analyzing the resilience of advanced DL systems against such faults, and understand how the faults in neural accelerator chips manifest as errors at the DL application level, where faults can lead to undetectable and unrecoverable errors. Using fault injection, we can perform resilience investigations of the DL system by modifying neuron weights and outputs at the software-level, as if the hardware had been affected by a transient fault. Existing fault models reduce the search space, allowing faster analysis, but requiring a-priori knowledge on the model, and not allowing further analysis of the filtered-out search space. Therefore, we propose ISimDL, a novel methodology that employs neuron sensitivity to generate importance sampling-based fault-scenarios. Without any a-priori knowledge of the model-under-test, ISimDL provides an equivalent reduction of the search space as existing works, while allowing long simulations to cover all the possible faults, improving on existing model requirements. Our experiments show that the importance sampling provides up to 15x higher precision in selecting critical faults than the random uniform sampling, reaching such precision in less than 100 faults. Additionally, we showcase another practical use-case for importance sampling for reliable DNN design, namely Fault Aware Training (FAT). By using ISimDL to select the faults leading to errors, we can insert the faults during the DNN training process to harden the DNN against such faults. Using importance sampling in FAT reduces the overhead required for finding faults that lead to a predetermined drop in accuracy by more than 12x.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) systems have proliferated in many applications, requiring specialized hardware accelerators and chips. In the nano-era, devices have become increasingly more susceptible to permanent and transient faults. Therefore, we need an efficient methodology for analyzing the resilience of advanced DL systems against such faults, and understand how the faults in neural accelerator chips manifest as errors at the DL application level, where faults can lead to undetectable and unrecoverable errors. Using fault injection, we can perform resilience investigations of the DL system by modifying neuron weights and outputs at the software-level, as if the hardware had been affected by a transient fault. Existing fault models reduce the search space, allowing faster analysis, but requiring a-priori knowledge on the model, and not allowing further analysis of the filtered-out search space. Therefore, we propose ISimDL, a novel methodology that employs neuron sensitivity to generate importance sampling-based fault-scenarios. Without any a-priori knowledge of the model-under-test, ISimDL provides an equivalent reduction of the search space as existing works, while allowing long simulations to cover all the possible faults, improving on existing model requirements. Our experiments show that the importance sampling provides up to 15x higher precision in selecting critical faults than the random uniform sampling, reaching such precision in less than 100 faults. Additionally, we showcase another practical use-case for importance sampling for reliable DNN design, namely Fault Aware Training (FAT). By using ISimDL to select the faults leading to errors, we can insert the faults during the DNN training process to harden the DNN against such faults. Using importance sampling in FAT reduces the overhead required for finding faults that lead to a predetermined drop in accuracy by more than 12x.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 系统在许多应用中激增，需要专门的硬件加速器和芯片。在纳米时代，设备变得越来越容易出现永久性和暂时性故障。因此，我们需要一种有效的方法来分析先进的深度学习系统针对此类故障的恢复能力，并了解神经加速器芯片中的故障如何在深度学习应用程序级别表现为错误，其中错误可能导致不可检测和不可恢复的错误。使用故障注入，我们可以通过在软件级别修改神经元权重和输出来执行深度学习系统的弹性研究，就好像硬件受到瞬态故障的影响一样。现有的故障模型减少了搜索空间，允许更快的分析，但需要模型的先验知识，并且不允许对过滤掉的搜索空间进行进一步分析。因此，我们提出了 ISimDL，这是一种利用神经元敏感性来生成基于重要性采样的故障场景的新颖方法。在无需对被测模型有任何先验知识的情况下，ISimDL 可以像现有工作一样减少搜索空间，同时允许长时间仿真以覆盖所有可能的故障，从而改进现有模型要求。我们的实验表明，重要性采样在选择关键故障方面的精度比随机均匀采样高出 15 倍，在少于 100 个故障时即可达到这样的精度。此外，我们还展示了可靠 DNN 设计的重要性采样的另一个实际用例，即故障感知训练 (FAT)。通过使用 ISimDL 来选择导致错误的故障，我们可以在 DNN 训练过程中插入故障，以强化 DNN 针对此类故障的能力。在 FAT 中使用重要性采样可减少查找导致精度预定下降 12 倍以上的故障所需的开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ISimDL方法，利用重要性采样加速深度学习系统的故障注入仿真，以评估其鲁棒性并改进可靠设计。
AI.motivation: 现有故障模型需依赖先验知识且无法分析过滤后的搜索空间，难以全面评估深度学习系统在硬件故障下的表现。
AI.method: 基于神经元敏感度生成重要性采样驱动的故障场景，无需先验知识即可高效缩减搜索空间，并结合故障感知训练（FAT）提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 重要性采样较随机采样精度提升15倍，100次以内定位关键故障；FAT模式下故障检测开销降低12倍以上。
AI.conclusion: ISimDL通过动态采样优化故障分析效率，为深度学习硬件可靠性验证和抗故障训练提供了有效方法论支撑。
