authors_text: Jaromir Savelka,Arav Agarwal,Christopher Bogart,Majd Sakr
title: Large Language Models (GPT) Struggle to Answer Multiple-Choice Questions about Code
title_zh: 大型语言模型 (GPT) 难以回答有关代码的多项选择题
abstract: We analyzed effectiveness of three generative pre-trained transformer (GPT) models in answering multiple-choice question (MCQ) assessments, often involving short snippets of code, from introductory and intermediate programming courses at the postsecondary level. This emerging technology stirs countless discussions of its potential uses (e.g., exercise generation, code explanation) as well as misuses in programming education (e.g., cheating). However, the capabilities of GPT models and their limitations to reason about and/or analyze code in educational settings have been under-explored. We evaluated several OpenAI's GPT models on formative and summative MCQ assessments from three Python courses (530 questions). We found that MCQs containing code snippets are not answered as successfully as those that only contain natural language. While questions requiring to fill-in a blank in the code or completing a natural language statement about the snippet are handled rather successfully, MCQs that require analysis and/or reasoning about the code (e.g., what is true/false about the snippet, or what is its output) appear to be the most challenging. These findings can be leveraged by educators to adapt their instructional practices and assessments in programming courses, so that GPT becomes a valuable assistant for a learner as opposed to a source of confusion and/or potential hindrance in the learning process.
summary: We analyzed effectiveness of three generative pre-trained transformer (GPT) models in answering multiple-choice question (MCQ) assessments, often involving short snippets of code, from introductory and intermediate programming courses at the postsecondary level. This emerging technology stirs countless discussions of its potential uses (e.g., exercise generation, code explanation) as well as misuses in programming education (e.g., cheating). However, the capabilities of GPT models and their limitations to reason about and/or analyze code in educational settings have been under-explored. We evaluated several OpenAI's GPT models on formative and summative MCQ assessments from three Python courses (530 questions). We found that MCQs containing code snippets are not answered as successfully as those that only contain natural language. While questions requiring to fill-in a blank in the code or completing a natural language statement about the snippet are handled rather successfully, MCQs that require analysis and/or reasoning about the code (e.g., what is true/false about the snippet, or what is its output) appear to be the most challenging. These findings can be leveraged by educators to adapt their instructional practices and assessments in programming courses, so that GPT becomes a valuable assistant for a learner as opposed to a source of confusion and/or potential hindrance in the learning process.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了三种生成式预训练 Transformer (GPT) 模型在回答多项选择题 (MCQ) 评估时的有效性，这些评估通常涉及来自高等教育入门和中级编程课程的简短代码片段。这项新兴技术引发了无数关于其潜在用途（例如练习生成、代码解释）以及编程教育中的误用（例如作弊）的讨论。然而，GPT 模型的功能及其在教育环境中推理和/或分析代码的局限性尚未得到充分探索。我们根据三门 Python 课程（530 个问题）的形成性和总结性 MC​​Q 评估评估了多个 OpenAI 的 GPT 模型。我们发现包含代码片段的 MCQ 的回答不如仅包含自然语言的 MCQ 成功。虽然需要在代码中填空或完成有关片段的自然语言陈述的问题处理得相当成功，但需要对代码进行分析和/或推理的 MCQ（例如，片段的真/假是什么，或者其输出是什么）似乎最具挑战性。教育工作者可以利用这些发现来调整他们在编程课程中的教学实践和评估，从而使 GPT 成为学习者的宝贵助手，而不是学习过程中的混乱和/或潜在障碍的根源。

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了三种GPT模型在回答编程课程中包含代码片段的多选题（MCQ）方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管GPT等大型语言模型在编程教育中的潜在用途和滥用问题引发广泛讨论，但其在代码分析和推理方面的具体能力与局限性尚未充分研究。
AI.method: 研究者在三个Python课程的530道形成性与总结性MCQ中测试了OpenAI的GPT模型，对比分析代码相关问题与纯自然语言问题的解答表现。
AI.result: 包含代码片段的MCQ解答成功率低于纯自然语言问题，尤其涉及代码分析或推理的问题（如判断代码输出）最具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 教育者应调整教学与评估方式，使GPT成为学习辅助工具而非学习障碍。

However, the capabilities of GPT models and their limitations to reason about and/or analyze code in educational settings have been under-explored. We found that MCQs containing code snippets are not answered as successfully as those that only contain natural language. While questions requiring to fill-in a blank in the code or completing a natural language statement about the snippet are handled rather successfully, MCQs that require analysis and/or reasoning about the code (e.g., what is true/false about the snippet, or what is its output) appear to be the most challenging. These findings can be leveraged by educators to adapt their instructional practices and assessments in programming courses, so that GPT becomes a valuable assistant for a learner as opposed to a source of confusion and/or potential hindrance in the learning process. 我们分析了三种生成式预训练 Transformer (GPT) 模型在回答多项选择题 (MCQ) 评估时的有效性，这些评估通常涉及来自高等教育入门和中级编程课程的简短代码片段。这项新兴技术引发了无数关于其潜在用途（例如练习生成、代码解释）以及编程教育中的误用（例如作弊）的讨论。然而，GPT 模型的功能及其在教育环境中推理和/或分析代码的局限性尚未得到充分探索。我们根据三门 Python 课程（530 个问题）的形成性和总结性 MC​​Q 评估评估了多个 OpenAI 的 GPT 模型。我们发现包含代码片段的 MCQ 的回答不如仅包含自然语言的 MCQ 成功。虽然需要在代码中填空或完成有关片段的自然语言陈述的问题处理得相当成功，但需要对代码进行分析和/或推理的 MCQ（例如，片段的真/假是什么，或者其输出是什么）似乎最具挑战性。教育工作者可以利用这些发现来调整他们在编程课程中的教学实践和评估，从而使 GPT 成为学习者的宝贵助手，而不是学习过程中的混乱和/或潜在障碍的根源。 该论文评估了三种GPT模型在回答编程课程中包含代码片段的多选题（MCQ）方面的有效性。 Jaromir Savelka,Arav Agarwal,Christopher Bogart,Majd Sakr cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jianjian Yin,Zhichao Zheng,Yanhui Gu,Junsheng Zhou,Yi Chen
title: Class-level Multiple Distributions Representation are Necessary for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 类级多重分布表示对于语义分割是必要的
abstract: Existing approaches focus on using class-level features to improve semantic segmentation performance. How to characterize the relationships of intra-class pixels and inter-class pixels is the key to extract the discriminative representative class-level features. In this paper, we introduce for the first time to describe intra-class variations by multiple distributions. Then, multiple distributions representation learning(\textbf{MDRL}) is proposed to augment the pixel representations for semantic segmentation. Meanwhile, we design a class multiple distributions consistency strategy to construct discriminative multiple distribution representations of embedded pixels. Moreover, we put forward a multiple distribution semantic aggregation module to aggregate multiple distributions of the corresponding class to enhance pixel semantic information. Our approach can be seamlessly integrated into popular segmentation frameworks FCN/PSPNet/CCNet and achieve 5.61\%/1.75\%/0.75\% mIoU improvements on ADE20K. Extensive experiments on the Cityscapes, ADE20K datasets have proved that our method can bring significant performance improvement.
summary: Existing approaches focus on using class-level features to improve semantic segmentation performance. How to characterize the relationships of intra-class pixels and inter-class pixels is the key to extract the discriminative representative class-level features. In this paper, we introduce for the first time to describe intra-class variations by multiple distributions. Then, multiple distributions representation learning(\textbf{MDRL}) is proposed to augment the pixel representations for semantic segmentation. Meanwhile, we design a class multiple distributions consistency strategy to construct discriminative multiple distribution representations of embedded pixels. Moreover, we put forward a multiple distribution semantic aggregation module to aggregate multiple distributions of the corresponding class to enhance pixel semantic information. Our approach can be seamlessly integrated into popular segmentation frameworks FCN/PSPNet/CCNet and achieve 5.61\%/1.75\%/0.75\% mIoU improvements on ADE20K. Extensive experiments on the Cityscapes, ADE20K datasets have proved that our method can bring significant performance improvement.
abstract_zh: 现有方法侧重于使用类级特征来提高语义分割性能。如何表征类内像素和类间像素的关系是提取具有判别性的代表性类级特征的关键。在本文中，我们首次引入通过多个分布来描述类内变化。然后，提出了多分布表示学习（\textbf{MDRL}）来增强语义分割的像素表示。同时，我们设计了一类多重分布一致性策略来构造嵌入像素的判别性多重分布表示。此外，我们提出了多分布语义聚合模块来聚合相应类别的多个分布以增强像素语义信息。我们的方法可以无缝集成到流行的分割框架 FCN/PSPNet/CCNet 中，并在 ADE20K 上实现 5.61\%/1.75\%/0.75\% mIoU 改进。在 Cityscapes、ADE20K 数据集上的大量实验证明我们的方法可以带来显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 提出多重分布表示方法以提升语义分割中的类级特征表征能力
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效表征类内像素变化及类间关系，需改进特征提取以提高分割性能
AI.method: 提出多重分布表示学习（MDRL），结合一致性策略与语义聚合模块，增强像素表征与语义信息
AI.result: 在ADE20K等数据集上实现显著mIoU提升，验证方法有效性
AI.conclusion: 多重分布表示有效提升语义分割性能，且方法具有良好的框架兼容性

authors_text: Jinchao Li,Xixin Wu,Kaitao Song,Dongsheng Li,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: A Hierarchical Regression Chain Framework for Affective Vocal Burst Recognition
title_zh: 用于情感语音突发识别的分层回归链框架
abstract: As a common way of emotion signaling via non-linguistic vocalizations, vocal burst (VB) plays an important role in daily social interaction. Understanding and modeling human vocal bursts are indispensable for developing robust and general artificial intelligence. Exploring computational approaches for understanding vocal bursts is attracting increasing research attention. In this work, we propose a hierarchical framework, based on chain regression models, for affective recognition from VBs, that explicitly considers multiple relationships: (i) between emotional states and diverse cultures; (ii) between low-dimensional (arousal & valence) and high-dimensional (10 emotion classes) emotion spaces; and (iii) between various emotion classes within the high-dimensional space. To address the challenge of data sparsity, we also use self-supervised learning (SSL) representations with layer-wise and temporal aggregation modules. The proposed systems participated in the ACII Affective Vocal Burst (A-VB) Challenge 2022 and ranked first in the "TWO'' and "CULTURE'' tasks. Experimental results based on the ACII Challenge 2022 dataset demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed system and the effectiveness of considering multiple relationships using hierarchical regression chain models.
summary: As a common way of emotion signaling via non-linguistic vocalizations, vocal burst (VB) plays an important role in daily social interaction. Understanding and modeling human vocal bursts are indispensable for developing robust and general artificial intelligence. Exploring computational approaches for understanding vocal bursts is attracting increasing research attention. In this work, we propose a hierarchical framework, based on chain regression models, for affective recognition from VBs, that explicitly considers multiple relationships: (i) between emotional states and diverse cultures; (ii) between low-dimensional (arousal & valence) and high-dimensional (10 emotion classes) emotion spaces; and (iii) between various emotion classes within the high-dimensional space. To address the challenge of data sparsity, we also use self-supervised learning (SSL) representations with layer-wise and temporal aggregation modules. The proposed systems participated in the ACII Affective Vocal Burst (A-VB) Challenge 2022 and ranked first in the "TWO'' and "CULTURE'' tasks. Experimental results based on the ACII Challenge 2022 dataset demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed system and the effectiveness of considering multiple relationships using hierarchical regression chain models.
abstract_zh: 作为通过非语言发声传递情感信号的常见方式，发声（VB）在日常社交互动中发挥着重要作用。理解和建模人类发声对于开发强大的通用人工智能是必不可少的。探索理解声音爆发的计算方法正在吸引越来越多的研究关注。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于链回归模型的分层框架，用于 VB 的情感识别，该框架明确考虑了多种关系：（i）情绪状态与不同文化之间的关系； (ii) 低维（唤醒度和效价）和高维（10 个情感类别）情感空间之间； (iii) 高维空间内的各种情感类别之间。为了解决数据稀疏性的挑战，我们还使用带有分层和时间聚合模块的自监督学习（SSL）表示。所提出的系统参加了 2022 年 ACII 情感声音突发 (A-VB) 挑战赛，并在“TWO”和“CULTURE”任务中排名第一。基于 ACII Challenge 2022 数据集的实验结果证明了所提出系统的优越性能以及使用分层回归链模型考虑多重关系的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于链式回归模型的分层框架，用于从语音爆发（VB）中进行情感识别，考虑了多种情感状态与文化、低维与高维情感空间以及高维情感类别间的关系。
AI.motivation: 语音爆发作为非语言情感信号在日常社交中至关重要，但现有方法难以处理情感状态与文化、多维情感空间间的复杂关系及数据稀疏性问题。
AI.method: 构建分层回归链框架，整合情感状态与文化、低维（唤醒度/效价）与高维（10类情感）空间的关系，并引入自监督学习（SSL）与分层时序聚合模块以缓解数据稀疏性。
AI.result: 系统在ACII 2022 A-VB挑战赛中两项任务中排名第一，实验表明该框架在情感识别任务中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层回归链模型通过建模多维情感关系并结合SSL技术，有效提升了语音爆发情感识别的性能，为跨文化情感计算提供了新思路。

authors_text: Amirhossein Hajavi,Ali Etemad
title: A Study on Bias and Fairness In Deep Speaker Recognition
title_zh: 深度说话人识别中的偏差和公平性研究
abstract: With the ubiquity of smart devices that use speaker recognition (SR) systems as a means of authenticating individuals and personalizing their services, fairness of SR systems has becomes an important point of focus. In this paper we study the notion of fairness in recent SR systems based on 3 popular and relevant definitions, namely Statistical Parity, Equalized Odds, and Equal Opportunity. We examine 5 popular neural architectures and 5 commonly used loss functions in training SR systems, while evaluating their fairness against gender and nationality groups. Our detailed experiments shed light on this concept and demonstrate that more sophisticated encoder architectures better align with the definitions of fairness. Additionally, we find that the choice of loss functions can significantly impact the bias of SR models.
summary: With the ubiquity of smart devices that use speaker recognition (SR) systems as a means of authenticating individuals and personalizing their services, fairness of SR systems has becomes an important point of focus. In this paper we study the notion of fairness in recent SR systems based on 3 popular and relevant definitions, namely Statistical Parity, Equalized Odds, and Equal Opportunity. We examine 5 popular neural architectures and 5 commonly used loss functions in training SR systems, while evaluating their fairness against gender and nationality groups. Our detailed experiments shed light on this concept and demonstrate that more sophisticated encoder architectures better align with the definitions of fairness. Additionally, we find that the choice of loss functions can significantly impact the bias of SR models.
abstract_zh: 随着使用说话人识别 (SR) 系统作为个人身份验证和个性化服务手段的智能设备的普及，SR 系统的公平性已成为一个重要的关注点。在本文中，我们基于 3 个流行且相关的定义，即统计均等、均等赔率和均等机会，研究了近期 SR 系统中的公平概念。我们研究了 5 种流行的神经架构和 5 种训练 SR 系统时常用的损失函数，同时评估它们对性别和国籍群体的公平性。我们详细的实验阐明了这个概念，并证明更复杂的编码器架构更好地符合公平性的定义。此外，我们发现损失函数的选择会显着影响 SR 模型的偏差。

AI.tldr: 研究深度说话人识别系统中的偏见与公平性问题
AI.motivation: 随着智能设备普及，SR系统在认证中的应用需确保公平性，避免性别和国籍相关的偏见
AI.method: 基于统计公平性、均等机会等定义，对比五种神经网络架构和五种损失函数在性别和国籍群体上的公平性表现
AI.result: 复杂编码器架构更符合公平性定义，损失函数选择显著影响模型偏见
AI.conclusion: 需优化模型架构和损失函数选择以减少SR系统中的偏见，提升公平性

search_text: A Study on Bias and Fairness In Deep Speaker Recognition 深度说话人识别中的偏差和公平性研究 With the ubiquity of smart devices that use speaker recognition (SR) systems as a means of authenticating individuals and personalizing their services, fairness of SR systems has becomes an important point of focus. In this paper we study the notion of fairness in recent SR systems based on 3 popular and relevant definitions, namely Statistical Parity, Equalized Odds, and Equal Opportunity. We examine 5 popular neural architectures and 5 commonly used loss functions in training SR systems, while evaluating their fairness against gender and nationality groups. Our detailed experiments shed light on this concept and demonstrate that more sophisticated encoder architectures better align with the definitions of fairness. Additionally, we find that the choice of loss functions can significantly impact the bias of SR models. 随着使用说话人识别 (SR) 系统作为个人身份验证和个性化服务手段的智能设备的普及，SR 系统的公平性已成为一个重要的关注点。在本文中，我们基于 3 个流行且相关的定义，即统计均等、均等赔率和均等机会，研究了近期 SR 系统中的公平概念。我们研究了 5 种流行的神经架构和 5 种训练 SR 系统时常用的损失函数，同时评估它们对性别和国籍群体的公平性。我们详细的实验阐明了这个概念，并证明更复杂的编码器架构更好地符合公平性的定义。此外，我们发现损失函数的选择会显着影响 SR 模型的偏差。 研究深度说话人识别系统中的偏见与公平性问题 Amirhossein Hajavi,Ali Etemad cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Mai A. Shaaban,Mariam Kashkash,Maryam Alghfeli,Adham Ibrahim
title: OptBA: Optimizing Hyperparameters with the Bees Algorithm for Improved Medical Text Classification
title_zh: OptBA：使用蜜蜂算法优化超参数以改进医学文本分类
abstract: One of the main challenges in the field of deep learning is obtaining the optimal model hyperparameters. The search for optimal hyperparameters usually hinders the progress of solutions to real-world problems such as healthcare. Previous solutions have been proposed, but they can still get stuck in local optima. To overcome this hurdle, we propose OptBA to automatically fine-tune the hyperparameters of deep learning models by leveraging the Bees Algorithm, which is a recent promising swarm intelligence algorithm. In this paper, the optimization problem of OptBA is to maximize the accuracy in classifying ailments using medical text, where initial hyperparameters are iteratively adjusted by specific criteria. Experimental results demonstrate a noteworthy enhancement in accuracy with approximately 1.4%. This outcome highlights the effectiveness of the proposed mechanism in addressing the critical issue of hyperparameter optimization and its potential impact on advancing solutions for healthcare. The code is available publicly at \url{https://github.com/Mai-CS/OptBA}.
summary: One of the main challenges in the field of deep learning is obtaining the optimal model hyperparameters. The search for optimal hyperparameters usually hinders the progress of solutions to real-world problems such as healthcare. Previous solutions have been proposed, but they can still get stuck in local optima. To overcome this hurdle, we propose OptBA to automatically fine-tune the hyperparameters of deep learning models by leveraging the Bees Algorithm, which is a recent promising swarm intelligence algorithm. In this paper, the optimization problem of OptBA is to maximize the accuracy in classifying ailments using medical text, where initial hyperparameters are iteratively adjusted by specific criteria. Experimental results demonstrate a noteworthy enhancement in accuracy with approximately 1.4%. This outcome highlights the effectiveness of the proposed mechanism in addressing the critical issue of hyperparameter optimization and its potential impact on advancing solutions for healthcare. The code is available publicly at \url{https://github.com/Mai-CS/OptBA}.
abstract_zh: 深度学习领域的主要挑战之一是获得最优模型超参数。对最佳超参数的搜索通常会阻碍医疗保健等现实问题的解决方案的进展。以前的解决方案已经被提出，但它们仍然可能陷入局部最优。为了克服这一障碍，我们提出 OptBA 通过利用蜜蜂算法（最近有前途的群体智能算法）来自动微调深度学习模型的超参数。在本文中，OptBA 的优化问题是最大化使用医学文本对疾病进行分类的准确性，其中初始超参数根据特定标准迭代调整。实验结果表明，准确度显着提高，大约提高了 1.4%。这一结果凸显了所提出的机制在解决超参数优化关键问题方面的有效性及其对推进医疗保健解决方案的潜在影响。该代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Mai-CS/OptBA} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OptBA方法，利用蜜蜂算法优化深度学习模型超参数，以提升医疗文本分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有超参数优化方法易陷入局部最优，影响医疗等实际问题的解决方案效果。
AI.method: 采用蜜蜂算法（Bees Algorithm）自动调整深度学习模型初始超参数，通过迭代优化提升分类准确率。
AI.result: 实验显示医疗文本分类准确率提升约1.4%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OptBA有效解决了超参数优化问题，为医疗健康领域的深度学习应用提供了改进方案。

authors_text: Jinchao Li,Kaitao Song,Junan Li,Bo Zheng,Dongsheng Li,Xixin Wu,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Leveraging Pretrained Representations with Task-related Keywords for Alzheimer's Disease Detection
title_zh: 利用预训练表示和任务相关关键字进行阿尔茨海默病检测
abstract: With the global population aging rapidly, Alzheimer's disease (AD) is particularly prominent in older adults, which has an insidious onset and leads to a gradual, irreversible deterioration in cognitive domains (memory, communication, etc.). Speech-based AD detection opens up the possibility of widespread screening and timely disease intervention. Recent advances in pre-trained models motivate AD detection modeling to shift from low-level features to high-level representations. This paper presents several efficient methods to extract better AD-related cues from high-level acoustic and linguistic features. Based on these features, the paper also proposes a novel task-oriented approach by modeling the relationship between the participants' description and the cognitive task. Experiments are carried out on the ADReSS dataset in a binary classification setup, and models are evaluated on the unseen test set. Results and comparison with recent literature demonstrate the efficiency and superior performance of proposed acoustic, linguistic and task-oriented methods. The findings also show the importance of semantic and syntactic information, and feasibility of automation and generalization with the promising audio-only and task-oriented methods for the AD detection task.
summary: With the global population aging rapidly, Alzheimer's disease (AD) is particularly prominent in older adults, which has an insidious onset and leads to a gradual, irreversible deterioration in cognitive domains (memory, communication, etc.). Speech-based AD detection opens up the possibility of widespread screening and timely disease intervention. Recent advances in pre-trained models motivate AD detection modeling to shift from low-level features to high-level representations. This paper presents several efficient methods to extract better AD-related cues from high-level acoustic and linguistic features. Based on these features, the paper also proposes a novel task-oriented approach by modeling the relationship between the participants' description and the cognitive task. Experiments are carried out on the ADReSS dataset in a binary classification setup, and models are evaluated on the unseen test set. Results and comparison with recent literature demonstrate the efficiency and superior performance of proposed acoustic, linguistic and task-oriented methods. The findings also show the importance of semantic and syntactic information, and feasibility of automation and generalization with the promising audio-only and task-oriented methods for the AD detection task.
abstract_zh: 随着全球人口迅速老龄化，阿尔茨海默病（AD）在老年人中尤为突出，该病起病隐匿，会导致认知领域（记忆、沟通等）逐渐、不可逆转的恶化。基于语音的 AD 检测开辟了广泛筛查和及时疾病干预的可能性。预训练模型的最新进展促使 AD 检测建模从低级特征转向高级表示。本文提出了几种有效的方法，可以从高级声学和语言特征中提取更好的 AD 相关线索。基于这些特征，本文还通过对参与者的描述和认知任务之间的关系进行建模，提出了一种新颖的面向任务的方法。在二元分类设置中的 ADReSS 数据集上进行实验，并在未见过的测试集上评估模型。结果以及与最新文献的比较证明了所提出的声学、语言和面向任务的方法的效率和优越性能。研究结果还表明了语义和句法信息的重要性，以及用于 AD 检测任务的有前途的纯音频和面向任务的方法的自动化和泛化的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练模型和任务相关关键词，通过语音数据中的高级声学与语言特征检测阿尔茨海默病。
AI.motivation: 人口老龄化加剧导致阿尔茨海默病筛查需求增加，传统方法依赖低级特征效果有限，需探索更高效的自动化检测手段。
AI.method: 提取语音的高级声学和语言特征，结合任务导向建模（分析描述与认知任务的关系），在ADReSS数据集上进行二分类实验。
AI.result: 所提方法在测试集上表现优于现有技术，验证了语义/句法信息的重要性，且音频仅方法具备泛化潜力。
AI.conclusion: 基于预训练表示的任务导向方法能有效提升AD检测性能，为自动化筛查提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Guoxuan Xia,Christos-Savvas Bouganis
title: Window-Based Early-Exit Cascades for Uncertainty Estimation: When Deep Ensembles are More Efficient than Single Models
title_zh: 基于窗口的早期退出级联用于不确定性估计：当深度集成比单个模型更有效时
abstract: Deep Ensembles are a simple, reliable, and effective method of improving both the predictive performance and uncertainty estimates of deep learning approaches. However, they are widely criticised as being computationally expensive, due to the need to deploy multiple independent models. Recent work has challenged this view, showing that for predictive accuracy, ensembles can be more computationally efficient (at inference) than scaling single models within an architecture family. This is achieved by cascading ensemble members via an early-exit approach. In this work, we investigate extending these efficiency gains to tasks related to uncertainty estimation. As many such tasks, e.g. selective classification, are binary classification, our key novel insight is to only pass samples within a window close to the binary decision boundary to later cascade stages. Experiments on ImageNet-scale data across a number of network architectures and uncertainty tasks show that the proposed window-based early-exit approach is able to achieve a superior uncertainty-computation trade-off compared to scaling single models. For example, a cascaded EfficientNet-B2 ensemble is able to achieve similar coverage at 5% risk as a single EfficientNet-B4 with <30% the number of MACs. We also find that cascades/ensembles give more reliable improvements on OOD data vs scaling models up. Code for this work is available at: https://github.com/Guoxoug/window-early-exit.

This is achieved by cascading ensemble members via an early-exit approach. In this work, we investigate extending these efficiency gains to tasks related to uncertainty estimation. As many such tasks, e.g. selective classification, are binary classification, our key novel insight is to only pass samples within a window close to the binary decision boundary to later cascade stages. Experiments on ImageNet-scale data across a number of network architectures and uncertainty tasks show that the proposed window-based early-exit approach is able to achieve a superior uncertainty-computation trade-off compared to scaling single models. For example, a cascaded EfficientNet-B2 ensemble is able to achieve similar coverage at 5% risk as a single EfficientNet-B4 with <30% the number of MACs. We also find that cascades/ensembles give more reliable improvements on OOD data vs scaling models up. Code for this work is available at: https://github.com/Guoxoug/window-early-exit.
abstract_zh: 深度集成是一种简单、可靠且有效的方法，可提高深度学习方法的预测性能和不确定性估计。然而，由于需要部署多个独立模型，它们被广泛批评为计算成本高昂。最近的工作对这一观点提出了挑战，表明就预测准确性而言，集成（在推理时）比在架构系列中扩展单个模型的计算效率更高。这是通过提前退出方法级联集成成员来实现的。在这项工作中，我们研究将这些效率增益扩展到与不确定性估计相关的任务。此类任务有很多，例如选择性分类是二元分类，我们的关键新颖见解是仅将靠近二元决策边界的窗口内的样本传递到后面的级联阶段。对跨多种网络架构和不确定性任务的 ImageNet 规模数据进行的实验表明，与扩展单一模型相比，所提出的基于窗口的提前退出方法能够实现卓越的不确定性计算权衡。例如，级联的 EfficientNet-B2 集成能够以 5% 的风险实现与 MAC 数量 <30% 的单个 EfficientNet-B4 相似的覆盖范围。我们还发现，与扩展模型相比，级联/集成可以对 OOD 数据提供更可靠的改进。这项工作的代码位于：https://github.com/Guoxoug/window-early-exit。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于窗口的早期退出级联方法，以提高深度集成在不确定性估计任务中的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 深度集成虽然在预测性能和不确定性估计方面表现良好，但常因需要部署多个独立模型而被认为计算成本高。本文旨在探索如何在不确定性估计任务中提升深度集成的计算效率。
AI.method: 通过级联集成成员并采用早期退出方法，仅将接近二分类决策边界窗口内的样本传递到后续阶段，从而减少计算量。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于窗口的早期退出方法在不确定性估计任务中实现了优于单模型扩展的不确定性-计算权衡，例如，一个级联的EfficientNet-B2集成在5%风险下与单个EfficientNet-B4模型具有相似的覆盖率，但计算量不到其30%。
AI.conclusion: 级联/集成方法在不确定性估计任务中比单模型扩展更可靠，特别是在处理分布外数据时表现更好。

search_text: Window-Based Early-Exit Cascades for Uncertainty Estimation: When Deep Ensembles are More Efficient than Single Models 基于窗口的早期退出级联用于不确定性估计：当深度集成比单个模型更有效时 Deep Ensembles are a simple, reliable, and effective method of improving both the predictive performance and uncertainty estimates of deep learning approaches. However, they are widely criticised as being computationally expensive, due to the need to deploy multiple independent models. Recent work has challenged this view, showing that for predictive accuracy, ensembles can be more computationally efficient (at inference) than scaling single models within an architecture family. This is achieved by cascading ensemble members via an early-exit approach. In this work, we investigate extending these efficiency gains to tasks related to uncertainty estimation. As many such tasks, e.g. selective classification, are binary classification, our key novel insight is to only pass samples within a window close to the binary decision boundary to later cascade stages. Experiments on ImageNet-scale data across a number of network architectures and uncertainty tasks show that the proposed window-based early-exit approach is able to achieve a superior uncertainty-computation trade-off compared to scaling single models. For example, a cascaded EfficientNet-B2 ensemble is able to achieve similar coverage at 5% risk as a single EfficientNet-B4 with <30% the number of MACs. We also find that cascades/ensembles give more reliable improvements on OOD data vs scaling models up. Code for this work is available at: https://github.com/Guoxoug/window-early-exit. 深度集成是一种简单、可靠且有效的方法，可提高深度学习方法的预测性能和不确定性估计。然而，由于需要部署多个独立模型，它们被广泛批评为计算成本高昂。最近的工作对这一观点提出了挑战，表明就预测准确性而言，集成（在推理时）比在架构系列中扩展单个模型的计算效率更高。这是通过提前退出方法级联集成成员来实现的。在这项工作中，我们研究将这些效率增益扩展到与不确定性估计相关的任务。此类任务有很多，例如选择性分类是二元分类，我们的关键新颖见解是仅将靠近二元决策边界的窗口内的样本传递到后面的级联阶段。对跨多种网络架构和不确定性任务的 ImageNet 规模数据进行的实验表明，与扩展单一模型相比，所提出的基于窗口的提前退出方法能够实现卓越的不确定性计算权衡。例如，级联的 EfficientNet-B2 集成能够以 5% 的风险实现与 MAC 数量 <30% 的单个 EfficientNet-B4 相似的覆盖范围。我们还发现，与扩展模型相比，级联/集成可以对 OOD 数据提供更可靠的改进。这项工作的代码位于：https://github.com/Guoxoug/window-early-exit。 本文提出了一种基于窗口的早期退出级联方法，以提高深度集成在不确定性估计任务中的计算效率。 Guoxuan Xia,Christos-Savvas Bouganis cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Julian Eggert,Tim Puphal
title: Continuous Risk Measures for Driving Support
title_zh: 持续的风险措施以提供支持
abstract: In this paper, we compare three different model-based risk measures by evaluating their stengths and weaknesses qualitatively and testing them quantitatively on a set of real longitudinal and intersection scenarios. We start with the traditional heuristic Time-To-Collision (TTC), which we extend towards 2D operation and non-crash cases to retrieve the Time-To-Closest-Encounter (TTCE). The second risk measure models position uncertainty with a Gaussian distribution and uses spatial occupancy probabilities for collision risks. We then derive a novel risk measure based on the statistics of sparse critical events and so-called survival conditions. The resulting survival analysis shows to have an earlier detection time of crashes and less false positive detections in near-crash and non-crash cases supported by its solid theoretical grounding. It can be seen as a generalization of TTCE and the Gaussian method which is suitable for the validation of ADAS and AD.
summary: In this paper, we compare three different model-based risk measures by evaluating their stengths and weaknesses qualitatively and testing them quantitatively on a set of real longitudinal and intersection scenarios. We start with the traditional heuristic Time-To-Collision (TTC), which we extend towards 2D operation and non-crash cases to retrieve the Time-To-Closest-Encounter (TTCE). The second risk measure models position uncertainty with a Gaussian distribution and uses spatial occupancy probabilities for collision risks. We then derive a novel risk measure based on the statistics of sparse critical events and so-called survival conditions. The resulting survival analysis shows to have an earlier detection time of crashes and less false positive detections in near-crash and non-crash cases supported by its solid theoretical grounding. It can be seen as a generalization of TTCE and the Gaussian method which is suitable for the validation of ADAS and AD.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过定性评估三种不同的基于模型的风险衡量标准的优缺点，并在一组真实的纵向和交叉场景中定量测试它们，来比较它们。我们从传统的启发式碰撞时间 (TTC) 开始，将其扩展到 2D 操作和非碰撞情况，以检索最近相遇时间 (TTCE)。第二个风险度量使用高斯分布对位置不确定性进行建模，并使用空间占用概率来计算碰撞风险。然后，我们根据稀疏关键事件和所谓的生存条件的统计数据得出一种新的风险衡量标准。由此产生的生存分析表明，在其坚实的理论基础的支持下，碰撞检测时间更早，并且在接近碰撞和非碰撞的情况下误报检测更少。它可以看作是TTCE和高斯方法的推广，适用于ADAS和AD的验证。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种基于模型的驾驶支持系统风险度量方法，评估其优缺点并进行实际场景测试。
AI.motivation: 现有风险评估方法在处理复杂驾驶场景时存在检测延迟或误报率高的问题，需更精确的理论支持方法。
AI.method: 通过定性分析与定量测试相结合，对比传统TTC扩展的TTCE方法、高斯分布位置不确定性模型以及基于稀疏关键事件统计的生存分析方法。
AI.result: 生存分析方法在碰撞检测时间更早且误报率更低，理论基础扎实，可视为TTCE和高斯方法的推广。
AI.conclusion: 提出的生存分析风险度量方法适用于ADAS和自动驾驶系统的验证，具有更优的实用性和理论普适性。

authors_text: Jiayi Pan,Glen Chou,Dmitry Berenson
title: Data-Efficient Learning of Natural Language to Linear Temporal Logic Translators for Robot Task Specification
title_zh: 用于机器人任务规范的自然语言到线性时序逻辑转换器的数据高效学习
abstract: To make robots accessible to a broad audience, it is critical to endow them with the ability to take universal modes of communication, like commands given in natural language, and extract a concrete desired task specification, defined using a formal language like linear temporal logic (LTL). In this paper, we present a learning-based approach for translating from natural language commands to LTL specifications with very limited human-labeled training data. This is in stark contrast to existing natural-language to LTL translators, which require large human-labeled datasets, often in the form of labeled pairs of LTL formulas and natural language commands, to train the translator. To reduce reliance on human data, our approach generates a large synthetic training dataset through algorithmic generation of LTL formulas, conversion to structured English, and then exploiting the paraphrasing capabilities of modern large language models (LLMs) to synthesize a diverse corpus of natural language commands corresponding to the LTL formulas. We use this generated data to finetune an LLM and apply a constrained decoding procedure at inference time to ensure the returned LTL formula is syntactically correct. We evaluate our approach on three existing LTL/natural language datasets and show that we can translate natural language commands at 75\% accuracy with far less human data ($\le$12 annotations). Moreover, when training on large human-annotated datasets, our method achieves higher test accuracy (95\% on average) than prior work. Finally, we show the translated formulas can be used to plan long-horizon, multi-stage tasks on a 12D quadrotor.
summary: To make robots accessible to a broad audience, it is critical to endow them with the ability to take universal modes of communication, like commands given in natural language, and extract a concrete desired task specification, defined using a formal language like linear temporal logic (LTL). In this paper, we present a learning-based approach for translating from natural language commands to LTL specifications with very limited human-labeled training data. This is in stark contrast to existing natural-language to LTL translators, which require large human-labeled datasets, often in the form of labeled pairs of LTL formulas and natural language commands, to train the translator. To reduce reliance on human data, our approach generates a large synthetic training dataset through algorithmic generation of LTL formulas, conversion to structured English, and then exploiting the paraphrasing capabilities of modern large language models (LLMs) to synthesize a diverse corpus of natural language commands corresponding to the LTL formulas. We use this generated data to finetune an LLM and apply a constrained decoding procedure at inference time to ensure the returned LTL formula is syntactically correct. We evaluate our approach on three existing LTL/natural language datasets and show that we can translate natural language commands at 75\% accuracy with far less human data ($\le$12 annotations). Moreover, when training on large human-annotated datasets, our method achieves higher test accuracy (95\% on average) than prior work. Finally, we show the translated formulas can be used to plan long-horizon, multi-stage tasks on a 12D quadrotor.
abstract_zh: 为了让机器人能够为广大受众所使用，至关重要的是赋予它们采用通用通信模式（例如以自然语言给出的命令）的能力，并提取使用线性时序逻辑（LTL）等形式语言定义的具体所需任务规范。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，利用非常有限的人工标记训练数据将自然语言命令转换为 LTL 规范。这与现有的自然语言到 LTL 翻译器形成鲜明对比，后者需要大量人工标记的数据集（通常以 LTL 公式和自然语言命令的标记对的形式）来训练翻译器。为了减少对人类数据的依赖，我们的方法通过 LTL 公式的算法生成、转换为结构化英语，然后利用现代大语言模型 (LLM) 的释义功能来合成与 LTL 公式相对应的多样化自然语言命令语料库，从而生成大型合成训练数据集。我们使用生成的数据来微调 LLM，并在推理时应用约束解码过程，以确保返回的 LTL 公式在语法上正确。我们在三个现有的 LTL/自然语言数据集上评估了我们的方法，并表明我们可以以 75% 的准确度翻译自然语言命令，而人类数据要少得多（$\le$12 注释）。此外，当在大型人工注释数据集上进行训练时，我们的方法比之前的工作实现了更高的测试精度（平均 95%）。最后，我们展示了翻译后的公式可用于在 12D 四旋翼飞行器上规划长视野、多阶段任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据高效的方法，将自然语言指令转换为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范，以实现机器人任务规划。
AI.motivation: 现有自然语言到LTL翻译器依赖大量人工标注数据，成本高且难以扩展，需减少对人工数据的依赖以提升实用性。
AI.method: 通过算法生成LTL公式并转换为结构化英语，利用大语言模型（LLM）生成多样化自然语言指令，合成训练数据并微调LLM，结合约束解码确保输出LTL语法正确。
AI.result: 在少量人工标注数据（≤12条）下达到75%准确率，使用大规模数据时平均准确率达95%，且生成的LTL公式可成功用于12D四旋翼飞行器的复杂任务规划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低人工数据需求，在小样本和大规模数据集上均表现优异，验证了其在机器人任务规范中的有效性。

search_text: Data-Efficient Learning of Natural Language to Linear Temporal Logic Translators for Robot Task Specification 用于机器人任务规范的自然语言到线性时序逻辑转换器的数据高效学习 To make robots accessible to a broad audience, it is critical to endow them with the ability to take universal modes of communication, like commands given in natural language, and extract a concrete desired task specification, defined using a formal language like linear temporal logic (LTL). In this paper, we present a learning-based approach for translating from natural language commands to LTL specifications with very limited human-labeled training data. This is in stark contrast to existing natural-language to LTL translators, which require large human-labeled datasets, often in the form of labeled pairs of LTL formulas and natural language commands, to train the translator. To reduce reliance on human data, our approach generates a large synthetic training dataset through algorithmic generation of LTL formulas, conversion to structured English, and then exploiting the paraphrasing capabilities of modern large language models (LLMs) to synthesize a diverse corpus of natural language commands corresponding to the LTL formulas. We use this generated data to finetune an LLM and apply a constrained decoding procedure at inference time to ensure the returned LTL formula is syntactically correct. We evaluate our approach on three existing LTL/natural language datasets and show that we can translate natural language commands at 75\% accuracy with far less human data ($\le$12 annotations). Moreover, when training on large human-annotated datasets, our method achieves higher test accuracy (95\% on average) than prior work. Finally, we show the translated formulas can be used to plan long-horizon, multi-stage tasks on a 12D quadrotor. 为了让机器人能够为广大受众所使用，至关重要的是赋予它们采用通用通信模式（例如以自然语言给出的命令）的能力，并提取使用线性时序逻辑（LTL）等形式语言定义的具体所需任务规范。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，利用非常有限的人工标记训练数据将自然语言命令转换为 LTL 规范。这与现有的自然语言到 LTL 翻译器形成鲜明对比，后者需要大量人工标记的数据集（通常以 LTL 公式和自然语言命令的标记对的形式）来训练翻译器。为了减少对人类数据的依赖，我们的方法通过 LTL 公式的算法生成、转换为结构化英语，然后利用现代大语言模型 (LLM) 的释义功能来合成与 LTL 公式相对应的多样化自然语言命令语料库，从而生成大型合成训练数据集。我们使用生成的数据来微调 LLM，并在推理时应用约束解码过程，以确保返回的 LTL 公式在语法上正确。我们在三个现有的 LTL/自然语言数据集上评估了我们的方法，并表明我们可以以 75% 的准确度翻译自然语言命令，而人类数据要少得多（$\le$12 注释）。此外，当在大型人工注释数据集上进行训练时，我们的方法比之前的工作实现了更高的测试精度（平均 95%）。最后，我们展示了翻译后的公式可用于在 12D 四旋翼飞行器上规划长视野、多阶段任务。 本文提出一种数据高效的方法，将自然语言指令转换为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范，以实现机器人任务规划。 Jiayi Pan,Glen Chou,Dmitry Berenson cs.CL,cs.RO

authors_text: Darius Petermann,Inseon Jang,Minje Kim
title: Native Multi-Band Audio Coding within Hyper-Autoencoded Reconstruction Propagation Networks
title_zh: 超自动编码重建传播网络中的本机多频带音频编码
comment: Accepted to ICASSP 2023. For resources and examples, see https://saige.sice.indiana.edu/research-projects/HARP-Net/
comments: Accepted to ICASSP 2023. For resources and examples, see https://saige.sice.indiana.edu/research-projects/HARP-Net/
abstract: Spectral sub-bands do not portray the same perceptual relevance. In audio coding, it is therefore desirable to have independent control over each of the constituent bands so that bitrate assignment and signal reconstruction can be achieved efficiently. In this work, we present a novel neural audio coding network that natively supports a multi-band coding paradigm. Our model extends the idea of compressed skip connections in the U-Net-based codec, allowing for independent control over both core and high band-specific reconstructions and bit allocation. Our system reconstructs the full-band signal mainly from the condensed core-band code, therefore exploiting and showcasing its bandwidth extension capabilities to its fullest. Meanwhile, the low-bitrate high-band code helps the high-band reconstruction similarly to MPEG audio codecs' spectral bandwidth replication. MUSHRA tests show that the proposed model not only improves the quality of the core band by explicitly assigning more bits to it but retains a good quality in the high-band as well.
summary: Spectral sub-bands do not portray the same perceptual relevance. In audio coding, it is therefore desirable to have independent control over each of the constituent bands so that bitrate assignment and signal reconstruction can be achieved efficiently. In this work, we present a novel neural audio coding network that natively supports a multi-band coding paradigm. Our model extends the idea of compressed skip connections in the U-Net-based codec, allowing for independent control over both core and high band-specific reconstructions and bit allocation. Our system reconstructs the full-band signal mainly from the condensed core-band code, therefore exploiting and showcasing its bandwidth extension capabilities to its fullest. Meanwhile, the low-bitrate high-band code helps the high-band reconstruction similarly to MPEG audio codecs' spectral bandwidth replication. MUSHRA tests show that the proposed model not only improves the quality of the core band by explicitly assigning more bits to it but retains a good quality in the high-band as well.
abstract_zh: 频谱子带不描绘相同的感知相关性。因此，在音频编码中，需要对每个组成频带进行独立控制，以便可以有效地实现比特率分配和信号重建。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经音频编码网络，它本身支持多频段编码范例。我们的模型扩展了基于 U-Net 的编解码器中压缩跳跃连接的思想，允许独立控制核心和高频段特定的重建和比特分配。我们的系统主要从压缩的核心带代码重建全带信号，因此充分利用和展示了其带宽扩展能力。同时，低比特率高频带编码有助于高频带重建，类似于MPEG音频编解码器的频谱带宽复制。 MUSHRA 测试表明，所提出的模型不仅通过显式分配更多比特来提高核心频段的质量，而且还保留了高频段的良好质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种支持多波段音频编码的神经网络模型，通过独立控制核心频段与高频频段的比特分配与重建，提升音频编码效率与音质。
AI.motivation: 不同频段的感知重要性存在差异，传统编码方法难以高效分配比特率，导致核心频段与高频频段的质量难以平衡。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构扩展压缩跳连接，实现核心频段与高频频段的独立重建与比特分配，利用低比特率高带代码辅助高带重建，类似MPEG频谱扩展技术。
AI.result: MUSHRA测试表明，模型通过增加核心频段比特分配提升其质量，同时保持高频频段良好质量，验证了多波段控制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过独立控制多波段编码，有效平衡核心与高带质量，为高效音频编码提供新思路。

authors_text: Jikun Kang,Di Wu,Ju Wang,Ekram Hossain,Xue Liu,Gregory Dudek
title: Multi-agent Attention Actor-Critic Algorithm for Load Balancing in Cellular Networks
title_zh: 蜂窝网络中负载均衡的多智能体注意 Actor-Critic 算法
abstract: In cellular networks, User Equipment (UE) handoff from one Base Station (BS) to another, giving rise to the load balancing problem among the BSs. To address this problem, BSs can work collaboratively to deliver a smooth migration (or handoff) and satisfy the UEs' service requirements. This paper formulates the load balancing problem as a Markov game and proposes a Robust Multi-agent Attention Actor-Critic (Robust-MA3C) algorithm that can facilitate collaboration among the BSs (i.e., agents). In particular, to solve the Markov game and find a Nash equilibrium policy, we embrace the idea of adopting a nature agent to model the system uncertainty. Moreover, we utilize the self-attention mechanism, which encourages high-performance BSs to assist low-performance BSs. In addition, we consider two types of schemes, which can facilitate load balancing for both active UEs and idle UEs. We carry out extensive evaluations by simulations, and simulation results illustrate that, compared to the state-of-the-art MARL methods, Robust-\ours~scheme can improve the overall performance by up to 45%.
summary: In cellular networks, User Equipment (UE) handoff from one Base Station (BS) to another, giving rise to the load balancing problem among the BSs. To address this problem, BSs can work collaboratively to deliver a smooth migration (or handoff) and satisfy the UEs' service requirements. This paper formulates the load balancing problem as a Markov game and proposes a Robust Multi-agent Attention Actor-Critic (Robust-MA3C) algorithm that can facilitate collaboration among the BSs (i.e., agents). In particular, to solve the Markov game and find a Nash equilibrium policy, we embrace the idea of adopting a nature agent to model the system uncertainty. Moreover, we utilize the self-attention mechanism, which encourages high-performance BSs to assist low-performance BSs. In addition, we consider two types of schemes, which can facilitate load balancing for both active UEs and idle UEs. We carry out extensive evaluations by simulations, and simulation results illustrate that, compared to the state-of-the-art MARL methods, Robust-\ours~scheme can improve the overall performance by up to 45%.
abstract_zh: 在蜂窝网络中，用户设备（UE）从一个基站（BS）切换到另一个基站（BS），引起BS之间的负载平衡问题。为了解决这个问题，BS可以协同工作以实现平滑迁移（或切换）并满足UE的服务需求。本文将负载平衡问题表述为马尔可夫博弈，并提出了一种鲁棒多智能体注意行动者评论家 (Robust-MA3C) 算法，该算法可以促进 BS（即智能体）之间的协作。特别是，为了解决马尔可夫博弈并找到纳什均衡策略，我们采用了采用自然代理来对系统不确定性进行建模的想法。此外，我们利用自注意力机制，鼓励高性能 BS 协助低性能 BS。此外，我们考虑两种类型的方案，它们可以促进活动UE和空闲UE的负载平衡。我们通过仿真进行了广泛的评估，仿真结果表明，与最先进的 MARL 方法相比，Robust-\ours~方案可以将整体性能提高高达 45%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Robust-MA3C的多智能体注意力Actor-Critic算法，用于解决蜂窝网络中的基站负载均衡问题。
AI.motivation: 蜂窝网络中用户设备切换导致基站负载不均衡，现有方法难以有效处理系统不确定性及基站间协作问题。
AI.method: 将负载均衡建模为马尔可夫博弈，引入自然智能体模拟系统不确定性，并采用自注意力机制促进高性能基站辅助低性能基站，设计两种方案分别处理活跃用户和空闲用户。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，与最先进的多智能体强化学习方法相比，所提方案整体性能提升高达45%。
AI.conclusion: Robust-MA3C算法通过引入不确定性建模和注意力机制，有效提升了蜂窝网络负载均衡的性能。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为Robust-MA3C的多智能体注意力Actor-Critic算法，用于解决蜂窝网络中的基站负载均衡问题。
motivation: 蜂窝网络中用户设备切换导致基站负载不均衡，现有方法难以有效处理系统不确定性及基站间协作问题。
method: 将负载均衡建模为马尔可夫博弈，引入自然智能体模拟系统不确定性，并采用自注意力机制促进高性能基站辅助低性能基站，设计两种方案分别处理活跃用户和空闲用户。
result: 仿真结果表明，与最先进的多智能体强化学习方法相比，所提方案整体性能提升高达45%。
conclusion: Robust-MA3C算法通过引入不确定性建模和注意力机制，有效提升了蜂窝网络负载均衡的性能。
search_text: Multi-agent Attention Actor-Critic Algorithm for Load Balancing in Cellular Networks 蜂窝网络中负载均衡的多智能体注意 Actor-Critic 算法 In cellular networks, User Equipment (UE) handoff from one Base Station (BS) to another, giving rise to the load balancing problem among the BSs. To address this problem, BSs can work collaboratively to deliver a smooth migration (or handoff) and satisfy the UEs' service requirements. This paper formulates the load balancing problem as a Markov game and proposes a Robust Multi-agent Attention Actor-Critic (Robust-MA3C) algorithm that can facilitate collaboration among the BSs (i.e., agents). In particular, to solve the Markov game and find a Nash equilibrium policy, we embrace the idea of adopting a nature agent to model the system uncertainty. Moreover, we utilize the self-attention mechanism, which encourages high-performance BSs to assist low-performance BSs. In addition, we consider two types of schemes, which can facilitate load balancing for both active UEs and idle UEs. We carry out extensive evaluations by simulations, and simulation results illustrate that, compared to the state-of-the-art MARL methods, Robust-\ours~scheme can improve the overall performance by up to 45%. 在蜂窝网络中，用户设备（UE）从一个基站（BS）切换到另一个基站（BS），引起BS之间的负载平衡问题。为了解决这个问题，BS可以协同工作以实现平滑迁移（或切换）并满足UE的服务需求。本文将负载平衡问题表述为马尔可夫博弈，并提出了一种鲁棒多智能体注意行动者评论家 (Robust-MA3C) 算法，该算法可以促进 BS（即智能体）之间的协作。特别是，为了解决马尔可夫博弈并找到纳什均衡策略，我们采用了采用自然代理来对系统不确定性进行建模的想法。此外，我们利用自注意力机制，鼓励高性能 BS 协助低性能 BS。此外，我们考虑两种类型的方案，它们可以促进活动UE和空闲UE的负载平衡。我们通过仿真进行了广泛的评估，仿真结果表明，与最先进的 MARL 方法相比，Robust-\ours~方案可以将整体性能提高高达 45%。 本文提出一种名为Robust-MA3C的多智能体注意力Actor-Critic算法，用于解决蜂窝网络中的基站负载均衡问题。 Jikun Kang,Di Wu,Ju Wang,Ekram Hossain,Xue Liu,Gregory Dudek cs.AI,cs.NI

authors_text: Jialiang Zhao,Maria Bauza,Edward H. Adelson
title: FingerSLAM: Closed-loop Unknown Object Localization and Reconstruction from Visuo-tactile Feedback
title_zh: FingerSLAM：闭环未知物体定位和视觉触觉反馈重建
comment: Submitted and accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: Submitted and accepted to 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of using visuo-tactile feedback for 6-DoF localization and 3D reconstruction of unknown in-hand objects. We propose FingerSLAM, a closed-loop factor graph-based pose estimator that combines local tactile sensing at finger-tip and global vision sensing from a wrist-mount camera. FingerSLAM is constructed with two constituent pose estimators: a multi-pass refined tactile-based pose estimator that captures movements from detailed local textures, and a single-pass vision-based pose estimator that predicts from a global view of the object. We also design a loop closure mechanism that actively matches current vision and tactile images to previously stored key-frames to reduce accumulated error. FingerSLAM incorporates the two sensing modalities of tactile and vision, as well as the loop closure mechanism with a factor graph-based optimization framework. Such a framework produces an optimized pose estimation solution that is more accurate than the standalone estimators. The estimated poses are then used to reconstruct the shape of the unknown object incrementally by stitching the local point clouds recovered from tactile images. We train our system on real-world data collected with 20 objects. We demonstrate reliable visuo-tactile pose estimation and shape reconstruction through quantitative and qualitative real-world evaluations on 6 objects that are unseen during training.
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of using visuo-tactile feedback for 6-DoF localization and 3D reconstruction of unknown in-hand objects. We propose FingerSLAM, a closed-loop factor graph-based pose estimator that combines local tactile sensing at finger-tip and global vision sensing from a wrist-mount camera. FingerSLAM is constructed with two constituent pose estimators: a multi-pass refined tactile-based pose estimator that captures movements from detailed local textures, and a single-pass vision-based pose estimator that predicts from a global view of the object. We also design a loop closure mechanism that actively matches current vision and tactile images to previously stored key-frames to reduce accumulated error. FingerSLAM incorporates the two sensing modalities of tactile and vision, as well as the loop closure mechanism with a factor graph-based optimization framework. Such a framework produces an optimized pose estimation solution that is more accurate than the standalone estimators. The estimated poses are then used to reconstruct the shape of the unknown object incrementally by stitching the local point clouds recovered from tactile images. We train our system on real-world data collected with 20 objects. We demonstrate reliable visuo-tactile pose estimation and shape reconstruction through quantitative and qualitative real-world evaluations on 6 objects that are unseen during training.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了使用视觉触觉反馈进行 6-DoF 定位和未知手中物体的 3D 重建的问题。我们提出了 FingerSLAM，这是一种基于闭环因子图的姿态估计器，它将指尖的局部触觉传感和腕戴式摄像头的全局视觉传感相结合。 FingerSLAM 由两个组成的姿势估计器构建：一个多通道精细的基于触觉的姿势估计器，用于从详细的局部纹理捕获运动；以及一个单通道的基于视觉的姿势估计器，用于从对象的全局视图进行预测。我们还设计了一种闭环机制，可以主动将当前视觉和触觉图像与之前存储的关键帧进行匹配，以减少累积误差。 FingerSLAM 结合了触觉和视觉两种传感模式，以及基于因子图的优化框架的闭环机制。这样的框架产生了比独立估计器更准确的优化姿态估计解决方案。然后，通过缝合从触觉图像恢复的局部点云，使用估计的姿势来增量重建未知物体的形状。我们使用 20 个物体收集的真实数据来训练我们的系统。我们通过对训练期间看不见的 6 个物体进行定量和定性的现实世界评估，展示了可靠的视觉触觉姿势估计和形状重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FingerSLAM方法，通过融合触觉与视觉反馈实现对未知手持物体的6自由度定位与三维重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确估计未知物体在手部的位姿，且单独依赖触觉或视觉存在局限性，需结合多模态感知并消除累积误差。
AI.method: 构建基于因子图的闭环系统，包含多通道触觉位姿估计器与单通道视觉估计器，并通过关键帧匹配实现回环闭合优化。
AI.result: 在20个物体数据集上训练后，系统在6个未见过的物体上实现了可靠的位姿估计与形状重建，优于单一模态方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合触觉-视觉多模态感知与回环优化机制，显著提升了未知物体定位与重建精度，为增量式三维重建提供了新思路。

search_text: FingerSLAM: Closed-loop Unknown Object Localization and Reconstruction from Visuo-tactile Feedback FingerSLAM：闭环未知物体定位和视觉触觉反馈重建 In this paper, we address the problem of using visuo-tactile feedback for 6-DoF localization and 3D reconstruction of unknown in-hand objects. We propose FingerSLAM, a closed-loop factor graph-based pose estimator that combines local tactile sensing at finger-tip and global vision sensing from a wrist-mount camera. FingerSLAM is constructed with two constituent pose estimators: a multi-pass refined tactile-based pose estimator that captures movements from detailed local textures, and a single-pass vision-based pose estimator that predicts from a global view of the object. We also design a loop closure mechanism that actively matches current vision and tactile images to previously stored key-frames to reduce accumulated error. FingerSLAM incorporates the two sensing modalities of tactile and vision, as well as the loop closure mechanism with a factor graph-based optimization framework. Such a framework produces an optimized pose estimation solution that is more accurate than the standalone estimators. The estimated poses are then used to reconstruct the shape of the unknown object incrementally by stitching the local point clouds recovered from tactile images. We train our system on real-world data collected with 20 objects. We demonstrate reliable visuo-tactile pose estimation and shape reconstruction through quantitative and qualitative real-world evaluations on 6 objects that are unseen during training. 在本文中，我们解决了使用视觉触觉反馈进行 6-DoF 定位和未知手中物体的 3D 重建的问题。我们提出了 FingerSLAM，这是一种基于闭环因子图的姿态估计器，它将指尖的局部触觉传感和腕戴式摄像头的全局视觉传感相结合。 FingerSLAM 由两个组成的姿势估计器构建：一个多通道精细的基于触觉的姿势估计器，用于从详细的局部纹理捕获运动；以及一个单通道的基于视觉的姿势估计器，用于从对象的全局视图进行预测。我们还设计了一种闭环机制，可以主动将当前视觉和触觉图像与之前存储的关键帧进行匹配，以减少累积误差。 FingerSLAM 结合了触觉和视觉两种传感模式，以及基于因子图的优化框架的闭环机制。这样的框架产生了比独立估计器更准确的优化姿态估计解决方案。然后，通过缝合从触觉图像恢复的局部点云，使用估计的姿势来增量重建未知物体的形状。我们使用 20 个物体收集的真实数据来训练我们的系统。我们通过对训练期间看不见的 6 个物体进行定量和定性的现实世界评估，展示了可靠的视觉触觉姿势估计和形状重建。 本文提出FingerSLAM方法，通过融合触觉与视觉反馈实现对未知手持物体的6自由度定位与三维重建。 Jialiang Zhao,Maria Bauza,Edward H. authors_text: Nico Reski,Aris Alissandrakis,Andreas Kerren
title: Designing a 3D Gestural Interface to Support User Interaction with Time-Oriented Data as Immersive 3D Radar Chart
title_zh: 设计 3D 手势界面以支持用户与沉浸式 3D 雷达图等面向时间的数据进行交互
comment: 30 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables; this version corrects Figure 6 (boxplot of PU in the UES-SF scores) and related discussion in Section 6
comments: 30 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables; this version corrects Figure 6 (boxplot of PU in the UES-SF scores) and related discussion in Section 6
abstract: The design of intuitive three-dimensional user interfaces is vital for interaction in virtual reality, allowing to effectively close the loop between a human user and the virtual environment. The utilization of 3D gestural input allows for useful hand interaction with virtual content by directly grasping visible objects, or through invisible gestural commands that are associated with corresponding features in the immersive 3D space. The design of such interfaces remains complex and challenging. In this article, we present a design approach for a three-dimensional user interface using 3D gestural input with the aim to facilitate user interaction within the context of Immersive Analytics. Based on a scenario of exploring time-oriented data in immersive virtual reality using 3D Radar Charts, we implemented a rich set of features that is closely aligned with relevant 3D interaction techniques, data analysis tasks, and aspects of hand posture comfort. We conducted an empirical evaluation (n=12), featuring a series of representative tasks to evaluate the developed user interface design prototype. The results, based on questionnaires, observations, and interviews, indicate good usability and an engaging user experience. We are able to reflect on the implemented hand-based grasping and gestural command techniques, identifying aspects for improvement in regard to hand detection and precision as well as emphasizing a prototype's ability to infer user intent for better prevention of unintentional gestures.
summary: The design of intuitive three-dimensional user interfaces is vital for interaction in virtual reality, allowing to effectively close the loop between a human user and the virtual environment. The utilization of 3D gestural input allows for useful hand interaction with virtual content by directly grasping visible objects, or through invisible gestural commands that are associated with corresponding features in the immersive 3D space. The design of such interfaces remains complex and challenging. In this article, we present a design approach for a three-dimensional user interface using 3D gestural input with the aim to facilitate user interaction within the context of Immersive Analytics. Based on a scenario of exploring time-oriented data in immersive virtual reality using 3D Radar Charts, we implemented a rich set of features that is closely aligned with relevant 3D interaction techniques, data analysis tasks, and aspects of hand posture comfort. We conducted an empirical evaluation (n=12), featuring a series of representative tasks to evaluate the developed user interface design prototype. The results, based on questionnaires, observations, and interviews, indicate good usability and an engaging user experience. We are able to reflect on the implemented hand-based grasping and gestural command techniques, identifying aspects for improvement in regard to hand detection and precision as well as emphasizing a prototype's ability to infer user intent for better prevention of unintentional gestures.
abstract_zh: 直观的三维用​​户界面的设计对于虚拟现实中的交互至关重要，可以有效地闭合人类用户和虚拟环境之间的循环。 3D 手势输入的利用允许通过直接抓握可见对象或通过与沉浸式 3D 空间中的相应特征相关联的不可见手势命令来与虚拟内容进行有用的手部交互。此类接口的设计仍然复杂且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 3D 手势输入的三维用户界面的设计方法，旨在促进沉浸式分析环境中的用户交互。基于使用 3D 雷达图探索沉浸式虚拟现实中的时间导向数据的场景，我们实现了一组与相关 3D 交互技术、数据分析任务和手部姿势舒适度方面紧密结合的丰富功能。我们进行了实证评估（n=12），通过一系列代表性任务来评估开发的用户界面设计原型。基于调查问卷、观察和访谈的结果显示出良好的可用性和引人入胜的用户体验。我们能够反思所实施的基于手部的抓取和手势命令技术，确定手部检测和精度方面需要改进的方面，并强调原型推断用户意图以更好地防止无意手势的能力。

AI.tldr: 设计一个三维手势界面，以支持用户在沉浸式虚拟环境中通过三维雷达图交互时间导向数据。
AI.motivation: 直观的三维用户界面对于虚拟现实中的有效交互至关重要，但现有设计复杂且存在挑战，需提升手部交互的自然性与数据分析的效率。
AI.method: 基于沉浸式分析场景，结合三维雷达图与手势交互技术，开发支持时间数据探索的界面原型，并通过12人的实证评估（问卷、观察、访谈）验证设计效果。
AI.result: 用户反馈表明界面具有良好的可用性与沉浸感，同时发现手部检测精度和无意手势预防机制仍有优化空间。
AI.conclusion: 该设计验证了三维手势交互在时间数据分析中的潜力，未来需改进手部追踪技术并优化用户意图推断算法。

We conducted an empirical evaluation (n=12), featuring a series of representative tasks to evaluate the developed user interface design prototype. The results, based on questionnaires, observations, and interviews, indicate good usability and an engaging user experience. We are able to reflect on the implemented hand-based grasping and gestural command techniques, identifying aspects for improvement in regard to hand detection and precision as well as emphasizing a prototype's ability to infer user intent for better prevention of unintentional gestures. 直观的三维用​​户界面的设计对于虚拟现实中的交互至关重要，可以有效地闭合人类用户和虚拟环境之间的循环。 3D 手势输入的利用允许通过直接抓握可见对象或通过与沉浸式 3D 空间中的相应特征相关联的不可见手势命令来与虚拟内容进行有用的手部交互。此类接口的设计仍然复杂且具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 3D 手势输入的三维用户界面的设计方法，旨在促进沉浸式分析环境中的用户交互。基于使用 3D 雷达图探索沉浸式虚拟现实中的时间导向数据的场景，我们实现了一组与相关 3D 交互技术、数据分析任务和手部姿势舒适度方面紧密结合的丰富功能。我们进行了实证评估（n=12），通过一系列代表性任务来评估开发的用户界面设计原型。基于调查问卷、观察和访谈的结果显示出良好的可用性和引人入胜的用户体验。我们能够反思所实施的基于手部的抓取和手势命令技术，确定手部检测和精度方面需要改进的方面，并强调原型推断用户意图以更好地防止无意手势的能力。 设计一个三维手势界面，以支持用户在沉浸式虚拟环境中通过三维雷达图交互时间导向数据。 Nico Reski,Aris Alissandrakis,Andreas Kerren cs.HC

authors_text: Prasun Roy,Subhankar Ghosh,Umapada Pal
title: A CNN Based Framework for Unistroke Numeral Recognition in Air-Writing
title_zh: 基于 CNN 的空中书写单笔划数字识别框架
comment: Accepted in The International Conference on Frontiers of Handwriting Recognition (ICFHR) 2018
comments: Accepted in The International Conference on Frontiers of Handwriting Recognition (ICFHR) 2018
abstract: Air-writing refers to virtually writing linguistic characters through hand gestures in three-dimensional space with six degrees of freedom. This paper proposes a generic video camera-aided convolutional neural network (CNN) based air-writing framework. Gestures are performed using a marker of fixed color in front of a generic video camera, followed by color-based segmentation to identify the marker and track the trajectory of the marker tip. A pre-trained CNN is then used to classify the gesture. The recognition accuracy is further improved using transfer learning with the newly acquired data. The performance of the system varies significantly on the illumination condition due to color-based segmentation. In a less fluctuating illumination condition, the system is able to recognize isolated unistroke numerals of multiple languages. The proposed framework has achieved 97.7%, 95.4% and 93.7% recognition rates in person independent evaluations on English, Bengali and Devanagari numerals, respectively.
summary: Air-writing refers to virtually writing linguistic characters through hand gestures in three-dimensional space with six degrees of freedom. This paper proposes a generic video camera-aided convolutional neural network (CNN) based air-writing framework. Gestures are performed using a marker of fixed color in front of a generic video camera, followed by color-based segmentation to identify the marker and track the trajectory of the marker tip. A pre-trained CNN is then used to classify the gesture. The recognition accuracy is further improved using transfer learning with the newly acquired data. The performance of the system varies significantly on the illumination condition due to color-based segmentation. In a less fluctuating illumination condition, the system is able to recognize isolated unistroke numerals of multiple languages. The proposed framework has achieved 97.7%, 95.4% and 93.7% recognition rates in person independent evaluations on English, Bengali and Devanagari numerals, respectively.
abstract_zh: 空中书写是指在六自由度的三维空间中通过手势虚拟书写语言文字。本文提出了一种基于通用视频摄像头辅助的卷积神经网络（CNN）的空中书写框架。使用通用摄像机前的固定颜色标记执行手势，然后进行基于颜色的分割以识别标记并跟踪标记尖端的轨迹。然后使用预先训练的 CNN 对手势进行分类。使用新获取的数据进行迁移学习，进一步提高了识别精度。由于基于颜色的分割，系统的性能在照明条件下变化很大。在光照波动较小的情况下，系统能够识别多种语言的孤立的单笔画数字。所提出的框架在英语、孟加拉语和梵文数字的独立评估中分别实现了 97.7%、95.4% 和 93.7% 的识别率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的空中书写单笔画数字识别框架
AI.motivation: 解决光照变化对颜色分割的影响，提升多语言数字识别准确性
AI.method: 采用颜色标记与摄像头捕捉轨迹，结合预训练CNN模型及迁移学习进行分类
AI.result: 在独立测试中实现英文97.7%、孟加拉语95.4%、梵文字母93.7%的识别率
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过迁移学习有效提升多语言数字识别性能，但需优化光照适应性

authors_text: Michael Levet,Puck Rombach,Nicholas Sieger
title: Logarithmic Weisfeiler--Leman and Treewidth
title_zh: 对数 Weisfeiler--Leman 和 Treewidth
comment: There were minor bugs in this version. We corrected those bugs and folded this result into a different paper: arXiv:2306.17777
comments: There were minor bugs in this version. We corrected those bugs and folded this result into a different paper: arXiv:2306.17777
abstract: In this paper, we show that the $(3k+4)$-dimensional Weisfeiler--Leman algorithm can identify graphs of treewidth $k$ in $O(\log n)$ rounds. This improves the result of Grohe & Verbitsky (ICALP 2006), who previously established the analogous result for $(4k+3)$-dimensional Weisfeiler--Leman. In light of the equivalence between Weisfeiler--Leman and the logic $\textsf{FO} + \textsf{C}$ (Cai, Fürer, & Immerman, Combinatorica 1992), we obtain an improvement in the descriptive complexity for graphs of treewidth $k$. Precisely, if $G$ is a graph of treewidth $k$, then there exists a $(3k+5)$-variable formula $\varphi$ in $\textsf{FO} + \textsf{C}$ with quantifier depth $O(\log n)$ that identifies $G$ up to isomorphism.
summary: In this paper, we show that the $(3k+4)$-dimensional Weisfeiler--Leman algorithm can identify graphs of treewidth $k$ in $O(\log n)$ rounds. This improves the result of Grohe & Verbitsky (ICALP 2006), who previously established the analogous result for $(4k+3)$-dimensional Weisfeiler--Leman. In light of the equivalence between Weisfeiler--Leman and the logic $\textsf{FO} + \textsf{C}$ (Cai, Fürer, & Immerman, Combinatorica 1992), we obtain an improvement in the descriptive complexity for graphs of treewidth $k$. Precisely, if $G$ is a graph of treewidth $k$, then there exists a $(3k+5)$-variable formula $\varphi$ in $\textsf{FO} + \textsf{C}$ with quantifier depth $O(\log n)$ that identifies $G$ up to isomorphism.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们证明 $(3k+4)$ 维 Weisfeiler-Leman 算法可以在 $O(\log n)$ 轮中识别树宽 $k$ 的图。这改进了 Grohe & Verbitsky (ICALP 2006) 的结果，该公司之前为 $(4k+3)$ 维 Weisfeiler-Leman 建立了类似结果。鉴于 Weisfeiler--Leman 和逻辑 $\textsf{FO} + \textsf{C}$ (Cai, Fürer, & Immerman, Combinatorica 1992) 之间的等价性，我们获得了树宽 $k$ 图的描述复杂性的改进。准确地说，如果 $G$ 是树宽 $k$ 的图，则 $\textsf{FO} + \textsf{C}$ 中存在 $(3k+5)$ 变量公式 $\varphi$，其量词深度 $O(\log n)$ 标识 $G$ 直至同构。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了对数维Weisfeiler-Leman算法在识别树宽为k的图方面的效率提升。
AI.motivation: 改进Grohe与Verbitsky在ICALP 2006年提出的关于Weisfeiler-Leman算法与树宽关系的结果，并结合FO+C逻辑的描述复杂性进行优化。
AI.method: 通过分析Weisfeiler-Leman算法的维度与树宽的关系，结合FO+C逻辑的表达能力，设计更高效的识别方法。
AI.result: 证明(3k+4)维Weisfeiler-Leman算法可在O(log n)轮内识别树宽k的图，并得到一个(3k+5)变量的FO+C公式以实现同构识别。
AI.conclusion: 在算法复杂性与描述复杂性两个层面，均对树宽图的识别效率实现了改进。

authors_text: Jian-Feng Cai,Zhiqiang Xu,Zili Xu
title: Interlacing Polynomial Method for the Column Subset Selection Problem
title_zh: 列子集选择问题的交错多项式法
abstract: This paper investigates the spectral norm version of the column subset selection problem. Given a matrix $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ and a positive integer $k\leq\text{rank}(\mathbf{A})$, the objective is to select exactly $k$ columns of $\mathbf{A}$ that minimize the spectral norm of the residual matrix after projecting $\mathbf{A}$ onto the space spanned by the selected columns. We use the method of interlacing polynomials introduced by Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava to derive a new upper bound on the minimal approximation error. This new bound is asymptotically sharp when the matrix $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ obeys a spectral power-law decay. The relevant expected characteristic polynomials can be written as an extension of the expected polynomial for the restricted invertibility problem, incorporating two extra variable substitution operators. Finally, we propose a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm that achieves this error bound up to a computational error.
summary: This paper investigates the spectral norm version of the column subset selection problem. Given a matrix $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ and a positive integer $k\leq\text{rank}(\mathbf{A})$, the objective is to select exactly $k$ columns of $\mathbf{A}$ that minimize the spectral norm of the residual matrix after projecting $\mathbf{A}$ onto the space spanned by the selected columns. We use the method of interlacing polynomials introduced by Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava to derive a new upper bound on the minimal approximation error. This new bound is asymptotically sharp when the matrix $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ obeys a spectral power-law decay. The relevant expected characteristic polynomials can be written as an extension of the expected polynomial for the restricted invertibility problem, incorporating two extra variable substitution operators. Finally, we propose a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm that achieves this error bound up to a computational error.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了列子集选择问题的谱范数版本。给定一个矩阵 $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 和一个正整数 $k\leq\text{rank}(\mathbf{A})$，目标是精确选择 $\mathbf{A}$ 的 $k$ 列，在将 $\mathbf{A}$ 投影到所选列所跨越的空间后，最小化残差矩阵的谱范数。我们使用 Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava 引入的交错多项式方法来导出最小逼近误差的新上限。当矩阵 $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 服从谱幂律衰减时，这个新界限是渐近尖锐的。相关的期望特征多项式可以写为受限可逆性问题的期望多项式的扩展，并结合两个额外的变量替换算子。最后，我们提出了一种确定性多项式时间算法，可以实现将误差限制在计算误差范围内。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了列子集选择问题的谱范数版本，旨在通过选择k列使投影残差矩阵的谱范数最小。
AI.motivation: 列子集选择问题在数据压缩和降维中具有重要意义，而谱范数误差的精确界对算法设计和理论分析至关重要。
AI.method: 采用Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava的交错多项式方法，结合扩展的特征多项式和变量替换算子推导误差上界。
AI.result: 提出了一个渐近最优的误差上界，并设计了多项式时间确定性算法实现该界（误差范围内）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为谱幂律衰减矩阵提供了理论保证，推动了列子集选择问题的高效算法发展。

motivation: 列子集选择问题在数据压缩和降维中具有重要意义，而谱范数误差的精确界对算法设计和理论分析至关重要。
method: 采用Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava的交错多项式方法，结合扩展的特征多项式和变量替换算子推导误差上界。
result: 提出了一个渐近最优的误差上界，并设计了多项式时间确定性算法实现该界（误差范围内）。
conclusion: 该方法为谱幂律衰减矩阵提供了理论保证，推动了列子集选择问题的高效算法发展。
search_text: Interlacing Polynomial Method for the Column Subset Selection Problem 列子集选择问题的交错多项式法 This paper investigates the spectral norm version of the column subset selection problem. Given a matrix $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ and a positive integer $k\leq\text{rank}(\mathbf{A})$, the objective is to select exactly $k$ columns of $\mathbf{A}$ that minimize the spectral norm of the residual matrix after projecting $\mathbf{A}$ onto the space spanned by the selected columns. We use the method of interlacing polynomials introduced by Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava to derive a new upper bound on the minimal approximation error. This new bound is asymptotically sharp when the matrix $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ obeys a spectral power-law decay. The relevant expected characteristic polynomials can be written as an extension of the expected polynomial for the restricted invertibility problem, incorporating two extra variable substitution operators. Finally, we propose a deterministic polynomial-time algorithm that achieves this error bound up to a computational error. 本文研究了列子集选择问题的谱范数版本。给定一个矩阵 $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 和一个正整数 $k\leq\text{rank}(\mathbf{A})$，目标是精确选择 $\mathbf{A}$ 的 $k$ 列，在将 $\mathbf{A}$ 投影到所选列所跨越的空间后，最小化残差矩阵的谱范数。我们使用 Marcus-Spielman-Srivastava 引入的交错多项式方法来导出最小逼近误差的新上限。当矩阵 $\mathbf{A}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 服从谱幂律衰减时，这个新界限是渐近尖锐的。相关的期望特征多项式可以写为受限可逆性问题的期望多项式的扩展，并结合两个额外的变量替换算子。最后，我们提出了一种确定性多项式时间算法，可以实现将误差限制在计算误差范围内。 本文研究了列子集选择问题的谱范数版本，旨在通过选择k列使投影残差矩阵的谱范数最小。 Jian-Feng Cai,Zhiqiang Xu,Zili Xu cs.DS,math.FA

authors_text: Zehang Weng,Haofei Lu,Jens Lundell,Danica Kragic
title: GoNet: An Approach-Constrained Generative Grasp Sampling Network
title_zh: GoNet：方法约束的生成抓取采样网络
comment: IEEE-RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots (Humanoids 2023)
comments: IEEE-RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots (Humanoids 2023)
abstract: This work addresses the problem of learning approach-constrained data-driven grasp samplers. To this end, we propose GoNet: a generative grasp sampler that can constrain the grasp approach direction to a subset of SO(3). The key insight is to discretize SO(3) into a predefined number of bins and train GoNet to generate grasps whose approach directions are within those bins. At run-time, the bin aligning with the second largest principal component of the observed point cloud is selected. GoNet is benchmarked against GraspNet, a state-of-the-art unconstrained grasp sampler, in an unconfined grasping experiment in simulation and on an unconfined and confined grasping experiment in the real world. The results demonstrate that GoNet achieves higher success-over-coverage in simulation and a 12%-18% higher success rate in real-world table-picking and shelf-picking tasks than the baseline.
summary: This work addresses the problem of learning approach-constrained data-driven grasp samplers. To this end, we propose GoNet: a generative grasp sampler that can constrain the grasp approach direction to a subset of SO(3). The key insight is to discretize SO(3) into a predefined number of bins and train GoNet to generate grasps whose approach directions are within those bins. At run-time, the bin aligning with the second largest principal component of the observed point cloud is selected. GoNet is benchmarked against GraspNet, a state-of-the-art unconstrained grasp sampler, in an unconfined grasping experiment in simulation and on an unconfined and confined grasping experiment in the real world. The results demonstrate that GoNet achieves higher success-over-coverage in simulation and a 12%-18% higher success rate in real-world table-picking and shelf-picking tasks than the baseline.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了学习方法受限的数据驱动的抓取采样器的问题。为此，我们提出了 GoNet：一种生成抓取采样器，可以将抓取方法方向限制为 SO(3) 的子集。关键的见解是将 SO(3) 离散化为预定义数量的 bin，并训练 GoNet 以生成其接近方向位于这些 bin 内的抓取。在运行时，选择与观察到的点云的第二大主成分对齐的箱。 GoNet 在模拟中的无约束抓取实验以及现实世界中的无约束和约束抓取实验中以 GraspNet（一种最先进的无约束抓取采样器）为基准。结果表明，与基线相比，GoNet 在模拟中实现了更高的成功覆盖率，在现实世界的桌子拣选和货架拣选任务中的成功率高出 12%-18%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GoNet，一种通过约束抓取接近方向来生成抓取样本的网络，以提高抓取成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有抓取生成方法缺乏对抓取接近方向的约束，导致在复杂场景中成功率不足，需通过方向约束提升抓取效果。
AI.method: 将SO(3)空间离散化为预定义的 bins，训练GoNet生成符合特定方向的抓取样本，并在运行时根据点云主成分选择对应 bin。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中，GoNet 的成功率分别比基线 GraspNet 提高 12%-18%，且覆盖范围更优。
AI.conclusion: GoNet 通过方向约束有效提升了抓取性能，验证了方向控制在抓取生成中的重要性。

authors_text: Karim Slimani,Brahim Tamadazte,Catherine Achard
title: RoCNet: 3D Robust Registration of Point-Clouds using Deep Learning
title_zh: RoCNet：使用深度学习对点云进行 3D 稳健配准
abstract: This paper introduces a new method for 3D point cloud registration based on deep learning. The architecture is composed of three distinct blocs: (i) an encoder composed of a convolutional graph-based descriptor that encodes the immediate neighbourhood of each point and an attention mechanism that encodes the variations of the surface normals. Such descriptors are refined by highlighting attention between the points of the same set and then between the points of the two sets. (ii) a matching process that estimates a matrix of correspondences using the Sinkhorn algorithm. (iii) Finally, the rigid transformation between the two point clouds is calculated by RANSAC using the Kc best scores from the correspondence matrix. We conduct experiments on the ModelNet40 dataset, and our proposed architecture shows very promising results, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in most of the simulated configurations, including partial overlap and data augmentation with Gaussian noise.
summary: This paper introduces a new method for 3D point cloud registration based on deep learning. The architecture is composed of three distinct blocs: (i) an encoder composed of a convolutional graph-based descriptor that encodes the immediate neighbourhood of each point and an attention mechanism that encodes the variations of the surface normals. Such descriptors are refined by highlighting attention between the points of the same set and then between the points of the two sets. (ii) a matching process that estimates a matrix of correspondences using the Sinkhorn algorithm. (iii) Finally, the rigid transformation between the two point clouds is calculated by RANSAC using the Kc best scores from the correspondence matrix. We conduct experiments on the ModelNet40 dataset, and our proposed architecture shows very promising results, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in most of the simulated configurations, including partial overlap and data augmentation with Gaussian noise.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于深度学习的3D点云配准新方法。该架构由三个不同的块组成：（i）一个由基于卷积图的描述符组成的编码器，该描述符对每个点的直接邻域进行编码，以及一个对表面法线的变化进行编码的注意机制。通过突出同一组的点之间以及两个组的点之间的注意力来细化此类描述符。 (ii) 使用 Sinkhorn 算法估计对应矩阵的匹配过程。 (iii) 最后，使用对应矩阵中的 Kc 最佳分数通过 RANSAC 计算两个点云之间的刚性变换。我们在 ModelNet40 数据集上进行了实验，我们提出的架构显示了非常有希望的结果，在大多数模拟配置中都优于最先进的方法，包括部分重叠和高斯噪声数据增强。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习的3D点云鲁棒配准方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在部分重叠和噪声环境下表现不足，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 分三阶段：图卷积编码器提取点邻域特征，注意力机制强化法向量变化；Sinkhorn算法生成对应矩阵；RANSAC结合Kc最佳匹配计算刚性变换。
AI.result: ModelNet40数据集实验显示，在部分重叠和高斯噪声场景下优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过多模块协同提升配准鲁棒性，验证了深度学习在点云配准中的有效性。

authors_text: Kazem Taghandiki,Mohammad Hassan Ahmadi,Elnaz Rezaei Ehsan
title: Automatic summarisation of Instagram social network posts Combining semantic and statistical approaches
title_zh: Instagram 社交网络帖子的自动摘要 结合语义和统计方法
abstract: The proliferation of data and text documents such as articles, web pages, books, social network posts, etc. on the Internet has created a fundamental challenge in various fields of text processing under the title of "automatic text summarisation". Manual processing and summarisation of large volumes of textual data is a very difficult, expensive, time-consuming and impossible process for human users. Text summarisation systems are divided into extractive and abstract categories. In the extractive summarisation method, the final summary of a text document is extracted from the important sentences of the same document without any modification. In this method, it is possible to repeat a series of sentences and to interfere with pronouns. However, in the abstract summarisation method, the final summary of a textual document is extracted from the meaning and significance of the sentences and words of the same document or other documents. Many of the works carried out have used extraction methods or abstracts to summarise the collection of web documents, each of which has advantages and disadvantages in the results obtained in terms of similarity or size. In this work, a crawler has been developed to extract popular text posts from the Instagram social network with appropriate preprocessing, and a set of extraction and abstraction algorithms have been combined to show how each of the abstraction algorithms can be used. Observations made on 820 popular text posts on the social network Instagram show the accuracy (80%) of the proposed system.
summary: The proliferation of data and text documents such as articles, web pages, books, social network posts, etc. on the Internet has created a fundamental challenge in various fields of text processing under the title of "automatic text summarisation". Manual processing and summarisation of large volumes of textual data is a very difficult, expensive, time-consuming and impossible process for human users. Text summarisation systems are divided into extractive and abstract categories. In the extractive summarisation method, the final summary of a text document is extracted from the important sentences of the same document without any modification. In this method, it is possible to repeat a series of sentences and to interfere with pronouns. However, in the abstract summarisation method, the final summary of a textual document is extracted from the meaning and significance of the sentences and words of the same document or other documents. Many of the works carried out have used extraction methods or abstracts to summarise the collection of web documents, each of which has advantages and disadvantages in the results obtained in terms of similarity or size. In this work, a crawler has been developed to extract popular text posts from the Instagram social network with appropriate preprocessing, and a set of extraction and abstraction algorithms have been combined to show how each of the abstraction algorithms can be used. Observations made on 820 popular text posts on the social network Instagram show the accuracy (80%) of the proposed system.
abstract_zh: 互联网上文​​章、网页、书籍、社交网络帖子等数据和文本文档的激增，给文本处理的各个领域带来了根本性的挑战，即“自动文本摘要”。对于人类用户来说，手动处理和总结大量文本数据是一个非常困难、昂贵、耗时且不可能的过程。文本摘要系统分为抽取式和抽象式两类。在提取摘要方法中，文本文档的最终摘要是从同一文档的重要句子中提取出来的，不做任何修改。在这种方法中，可以重复一系列句子并干扰代词。然而，在摘要摘要方法中，文本文档的最终摘要是从同一文档或其他文档的句子和单词的含义和意义中提取的。许多开展的工作都使用提取方法或摘要来总结网络文档的集合，每种方法在获得的结果中在相似性或大小方面都有优点和缺点。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个爬虫，通过适当的预处理从 Instagram 社交网络中提取流行的文本帖子，并结合了一组提取和抽象算法来展示如何使用每种抽象算法。对社交网络 Instagram 上 820 条热门文本帖子的观察显示了所提议系统的准确性 (80%)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合语义和统计方法的自动摘要系统，用于Instagram社交网络帖子的自动摘要。
AI.motivation: 随着互联网文本数据的激增，手动处理和摘要大体量文本数据变得困难且低效，亟需开发自动文本摘要系统以提高效率。
AI.method: 开发了Instagram爬虫获取热门文本帖子，通过预处理后结合抽取式和抽象式摘要算法进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在820条Instagram热门帖子上的实验表明，所提系统的摘要准确率为80%。
AI.conclusion: 混合抽取式与抽象式方法能有效提升社交媒体文本摘要效果，为相关研究提供了可行方案。

ai_content.result: 在820条Instagram热门帖子上的实验表明，所提系统的摘要准确率为80%。
ai_content.conclusion: 混合抽取式与抽象式方法能有效提升社交媒体文本摘要效果，为相关研究提供了可行方案。
