search_text: Automatic summarisation of Instagram social network posts Combining semantic and statistical approaches Instagram 社交网络帖子的自动摘要 结合语义和统计方法 The proliferation of data and text documents such as articles, web pages, books, social network posts, etc. on the Internet has created a fundamental challenge in various fields of text processing under the title of "automatic text summarisation". Manual processing and summarisation of large volumes of textual data is a very difficult, expensive, time-consuming and impossible process for human users. Text summarisation systems are divided into extractive and abstract categories. In the extractive summarisation method, the final summary of a text document is extracted from the important sentences of the same document without any modification. In this method, it is possible to repeat a series of sentences and to interfere with pronouns. However, in the abstract summarisation method, the final summary of a textual document is extracted from the meaning and significance of the sentences and words of the same document or other documents. Many of the works carried out have used extraction methods or abstracts to summarise the collection of web documents, each of which has advantages and disadvantages in the results obtained in terms of similarity or size. In this work, a crawler has been developed to extract popular text posts from the Instagram social network with appropriate preprocessing, and a set of extraction and abstraction algorithms have been combined to show how each of the abstraction algorithms can be used. Observations made on 820 popular text posts on the social network Instagram show the accuracy (80%) of the proposed system. 互联网上文​​章、网页、书籍、社交网络帖子等数据和文本文档的激增，给文本处理的各个领域带来了根本性的挑战，即“自动文本摘要”。对于人类用户来说，手动处理和总结大量文本数据是一个非常困难、昂贵、耗时且不可能的过程。文本摘要系统分为抽取式和抽象式两类。在提取摘要方法中，文本文档的最终摘要是从同一文档的重要句子中提取出来的，不做任何修改。在这种方法中，可以重复一系列句子并干扰代词。然而，在摘要摘要方法中，文本文档的最终摘要是从同一文档或其他文档的句子和单词的含义和意义中提取的。许多开展的工作都使用提取方法或摘要来总结网络文档的集合，每种方法在获得的结果中在相似性或大小方面都有优点和缺点。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个爬虫，通过适当的预处理从 Instagram 社交网络中提取流行的文本帖子，并结合了一组提取和抽象算法来展示如何使用每种抽象算法。对社交网络 Instagram 上 820 条热门文本帖子的观察显示了所提议系统的准确性 (80%)。 本文提出了一种结合语义和统计方法的自动摘要系统，用于Instagram社交网络帖子的自动摘要。 Kazem Taghandiki,Mohammad Hassan Ahmadi,Elnaz Rezaei Ehsan cs.AI

authors_text: Maorong Wang,Ling Xiao,Toshihiko Yamasaki
title: MetaMixer: A Regularization Strategy for Online Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: MetaMixer：在线知识蒸馏的正则化策略
abstract: Online knowledge distillation (KD) has received increasing attention in recent years. However, while most existing online KD methods focus on developing complicated model structures and training strategies to improve the distillation of high-level knowledge like probability distribution, the effects of the multi-level knowledge in the online KD are greatly overlooked, especially the low-level knowledge. Thus, to provide a novel viewpoint to online KD, we propose MetaMixer, a regularization strategy that can strengthen the distillation by combining the low-level knowledge that impacts the localization capability of the networks, and high-level knowledge that focuses on the whole image. Experiments under different conditions show that MetaMixer can achieve significant performance gains over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Online knowledge distillation (KD) has received increasing attention in recent years. However, while most existing online KD methods focus on developing complicated model structures and training strategies to improve the distillation of high-level knowledge like probability distribution, the effects of the multi-level knowledge in the online KD are greatly overlooked, especially the low-level knowledge. Thus, to provide a novel viewpoint to online KD, we propose MetaMixer, a regularization strategy that can strengthen the distillation by combining the low-level knowledge that impacts the localization capability of the networks, and high-level knowledge that focuses on the whole image. Experiments under different conditions show that MetaMixer can achieve significant performance gains over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在线知识蒸馏（KD）近年来受到越来越多的关注。然而，虽然大多数现有的在线KD方法专注于开发复杂的模型结构和训练策略来提高概率分布等高级知识的提炼，但在线KD中多级知识的影响却被大大忽视了，尤其是低级知识。因此，为了为在线 KD 提供一种新颖的观点，我们提出了 MetaMixer，这是一种正则化策略，可以通过结合影响网络定位能力的低级知识和关注整个图像的高级知识来加强蒸馏。不同条件下的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，MetaMixer 可以实现显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaMixer，一种结合高低层知识的正则化策略，用于提升在线知识蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 现有在线知识蒸馏方法过度关注高层知识，忽视了低层知识对网络定位能力的关键作用，缺乏对多级知识的综合利用。
AI.method: 设计MetaMixer正则化策略，通过联合优化低层知识（定位相关）与高层知识（全局特征），增强模型对多尺度信息的蒸馏能力。
AI.result: 在多种实验条件下，MetaMixer相较现有最优方法实现显著性能提升，验证了多级知识融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MetaMixer通过有效整合多级知识为在线知识蒸馏提供新视角，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Cathy Mengying Fang,Ryo Suzuki,Daniel Leithinger
title: VR Haptics at Home: Repurposing Everyday Objects and Environment for Casual and On-Demand VR Haptic Experiences
title_zh: 家庭 VR 触觉：重新利用日常物体和环境，打造休闲和按需 VR 触觉体验
abstract: This paper introduces VR Haptics at Home, a method of repurposing everyday objects in the home to provide casual and on-demand haptic experiences. Current VR haptic devices are often expensive, complex, and unreliable, which limits the opportunities for rich haptic experiences outside research labs. In contrast, we envision that, by repurposing everyday objects as passive haptics props, we can create engaging VR experiences for casual uses with minimal cost and setup. To explore and evaluate this idea, we conducted an in-the-wild study with eight participants, in which they used our proof-of-concept system to turn their surrounding objects such as chairs, tables, and pillows at their own homes into haptic props. The study results show that our method can be adapted to different homes and environments, enabling more engaging VR experiences without the need for complex setup process. Based on our findings, we propose a possible design space to showcase the potential for future investigation.
summary: This paper introduces VR Haptics at Home, a method of repurposing everyday objects in the home to provide casual and on-demand haptic experiences. Current VR haptic devices are often expensive, complex, and unreliable, which limits the opportunities for rich haptic experiences outside research labs. In contrast, we envision that, by repurposing everyday objects as passive haptics props, we can create engaging VR experiences for casual uses with minimal cost and setup. To explore and evaluate this idea, we conducted an in-the-wild study with eight participants, in which they used our proof-of-concept system to turn their surrounding objects such as chairs, tables, and pillows at their own homes into haptic props. The study results show that our method can be adapted to different homes and environments, enabling more engaging VR experiences without the need for complex setup process. Based on our findings, we propose a possible design space to showcase the potential for future investigation.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 VR 家庭触觉技术，这是一种重新利用家中日常物品以提供休闲和按需触觉体验的方法。当前的 VR 触觉设备通常昂贵、复杂且不可靠，这限制了在研究实验室之外获得丰富触觉体验的机会。相比之下，我们设想，通过将日常物品重新用作被动触觉道具，我们可以以最低的成本和设置为休闲用途创造引人入胜的 VR 体验。为了探索和评估这个想法，我们对八名参与者进行了一项野外研究，他们使用我们的概念验证系统将自己家里的椅子、桌子和枕头等周围的物体变成触觉道具。研究结果表明，我们的方法可以适应不同的家庭和环境，无需复杂的设置过程即可实现更具吸引力的 VR 体验。根据我们的发现，我们提出了一个可能的设计空间来展示未来调查的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用家庭日常物品实现低成本、易设置的VR触觉体验的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VR触觉设备价格昂贵、复杂且不可靠，限制了非实验室环境下的触觉体验机会。
AI.method: 通过在真实家庭环境中进行用户研究，指导参与者将椅子、桌子等日常物品转化为触觉道具。
AI.result: 方法适用于不同家庭环境，能有效提升VR体验的沉浸感且无需复杂设置。
AI.conclusion: 提出了触觉设计空间框架，为未来研究提供了方向和可能性。

authors_text: Chaehun Shin,Heeseung Kim,Che Hyun Lee,Sang-gil Lee,Sungroh Yoon
title: Edit-A-Video: Single Video Editing with Object-Aware Consistency
title_zh: 编辑视频：具有对象感知一致性的单个视频编辑
abstract: Despite the fact that text-to-video (TTV) model has recently achieved remarkable success, there have been few approaches on TTV for its extension to video editing. Motivated by approaches on TTV models adapting from diffusion-based text-to-image (TTI) models, we suggest the video editing framework given only a pretrained TTI model and a single <text, video> pair, which we term Edit-A-Video. The framework consists of two stages: (1) inflating the 2D model into the 3D model by appending temporal modules and tuning on the source video (2) inverting the source video into the noise and editing with target text prompt and attention map injection. Each stage enables the temporal modeling and preservation of semantic attributes of the source video. One of the key challenges for video editing include a background inconsistency problem, where the regions not included for the edit suffer from undesirable and inconsistent temporal alterations. To mitigate this issue, we also introduce a novel mask blending method, termed as sparse-causal blending (SC Blending). We improve previous mask blending methods to reflect the temporal consistency so that the area where the editing is applied exhibits smooth transition while also achieving spatio-temporal consistency of the unedited regions. We present extensive experimental results over various types of text and videos, and demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method compared to baselines in terms of background consistency, text alignment, and video editing quality.
summary: Despite the fact that text-to-video (TTV) model has recently achieved remarkable success, there have been few approaches on TTV for its extension to video editing. Motivated by approaches on TTV models adapting from diffusion-based text-to-image (TTI) models, we suggest the video editing framework given only a pretrained TTI model and a single <text, video> pair, which we term Edit-A-Video. The framework consists of two stages: (1) inflating the 2D model into the 3D model by appending temporal modules and tuning on the source video (2) inverting the source video into the noise and editing with target text prompt and attention map injection. Each stage enables the temporal modeling and preservation of semantic attributes of the source video. One of the key challenges for video editing include a background inconsistency problem, where the regions not included for the edit suffer from undesirable and inconsistent temporal alterations. To mitigate this issue, we also introduce a novel mask blending method, termed as sparse-causal blending (SC Blending). We improve previous mask blending methods to reflect the temporal consistency so that the area where the editing is applied exhibits smooth transition while also achieving spatio-temporal consistency of the unedited regions. We present extensive experimental results over various types of text and videos, and demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method compared to baselines in terms of background consistency, text alignment, and video editing quality.
abstract_zh: 尽管文本转视频（TTV）模型最近取得了显着的成功，但将 TTV 扩展到视频编辑的方法还很少。受基于扩散的文本到图像 (TTI) 模型的 TTV 模型方法的启发，我们建议视频编辑框架仅给出预训练的 TTI 模型和单个 <text, video> 对，我们将其称为“编辑视频”。该框架由两个阶段组成：(1) 通过附加时间模块并调整源视频，将 2D 模型膨胀为 3D 模型 (2) 将源视频反转为噪声，并使用目标文本提示和注意图注入进行编辑。每个阶段都可以对源视频的语义属性进行时间建模和保存。视频编辑的关键挑战之一包括背景不一致问题，其中未包含在编辑中的区域会遭受不良且不一致的时间变化。为了缓解这个问题，我们还引入了一种新颖的掩模混合方法，称为稀疏因果混合（SC Blending）。我们改进了以前的掩模混合方法以反映时间一致性，以便应用编辑的区域呈现平滑过渡，同时还实现未编辑区域的时空一致性。我们对各种类型的文本和视频进行了广泛的实验结果，并证明了所提出的方法在背景一致性、文本对齐和视频编辑质量方面与基线相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预训练文本到图像模型的单视频编辑框架Edit-A-Video，通过时序建模和语义属性保持实现高质量视频编辑。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到视频生成模型取得进展，但针对视频编辑的扩展方法仍较少。受文本到图像模型适配方法启发，旨在利用单个<文本，视频>对实现视频编辑。
AI.method: 框架包含两阶段：1）通过添加时序模块将2D模型扩展为3D并微调源视频；2）将源视频逆向为噪声后，结合目标文本提示和注意力图进行编辑。引入稀疏因果混合（SC Blending）解决背景不一致问题。
AI.result: 在多种文本和视频上实验表明，该方法在背景一致性、文本对齐和视频编辑质量上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过时序建模与稀疏因果混合方法，Edit-A-Video有效解决了视频编辑中的时空一致性问题，实现了高质量单视频编辑。

search_text: Edit-A-Video: Single Video Editing with Object-Aware Consistency 编辑视频：具有对象感知一致性的单个视频编辑 Despite the fact that text-to-video (TTV) model has recently achieved remarkable success, there have been few approaches on TTV for its extension to video editing. Motivated by approaches on TTV models adapting from diffusion-based text-to-image (TTI) models, we suggest the video editing framework given only a pretrained TTI model and a single <text, video> pair, which we term Edit-A-Video. The framework consists of two stages: (1) inflating the 2D model into the 3D model by appending temporal modules and tuning on the source video (2) inverting the source video into the noise and editing with target text prompt and attention map injection. Each stage enables the temporal modeling and preservation of semantic attributes of the source video. One of the key challenges for video editing include a background inconsistency problem, where the regions not included for the edit suffer from undesirable and inconsistent temporal alterations. To mitigate this issue, we also introduce a novel mask blending method, termed as sparse-causal blending (SC Blending). We improve previous mask blending methods to reflect the temporal consistency so that the area where the editing is applied exhibits smooth transition while also achieving spatio-temporal consistency of the unedited regions. We present extensive experimental results over various types of text and videos, and demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method compared to baselines in terms of background consistency, text alignment, and video editing quality. 尽管文本转视频（TTV）模型最近取得了显着的成功，但将 TTV 扩展到视频编辑的方法还很少。受基于扩散的文本到图像 (TTI) 模型的 TTV 模型方法的启发，我们建议视频编辑框架仅给出预训练的 TTI 模型和单个 <text, video> 对，我们将其称为“编辑视频”。该框架由两个阶段组成：(1) 通过附加时间模块并调整源视频，将 2D 模型膨胀为 3D 模型 (2) 将源视频反转为噪声，并使用目标文本提示和注意图注入进行编辑。每个阶段都可以对源视频的语义属性进行时间建模和保存。视频编辑的关键挑战之一包括背景不一致问题，其中未包含在编辑中的区域会遭受不良且不一致的时间变化。为了缓解这个问题，我们还引入了一种新颖的掩模混合方法，称为稀疏因果混合（SC Blending）。我们改进了以前的掩模混合方法以反映时间一致性，以便应用编辑的区域呈现平滑过渡，同时还实现未编辑区域的时空一致性。我们对各种类型的文本和视频进行了广泛的实验结果，并证明了所提出的方法在背景一致性、文本对齐和视频编辑质量方面与基线相比的优越性。 本文提出了一种基于预训练文本到图像模型的单视频编辑框架Edit-A-Video，通过时序建模和语义属性保持实现高质量视频编辑。 Chaehun Shin,Heeseung Kim,Che Hyun Lee,Sang-gil Lee,Sungroh Yoon cs.CV

authors_text: Jeremy Speth,Nathan Vance,Patrick Flynn,Adam Czajka
title: Non-Contrastive Unsupervised Learning of Physiological Signals from Video
title_zh: 视频生理信号的非对比无监督学习
abstract: Subtle periodic signals such as blood volume pulse and respiration can be extracted from RGB video, enabling remote health monitoring at low cost. Advancements in remote pulse estimation -- or remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) -- are currently driven by deep learning solutions. However, modern approaches are trained and evaluated on benchmark datasets with associated ground truth from contact-PPG sensors. We present the first non-contrastive unsupervised learning framework for signal regression to break free from the constraints of labelled video data. With minimal assumptions of periodicity and finite bandwidth, our approach is capable of discovering the blood volume pulse directly from unlabelled videos. We find that encouraging sparse power spectra within normal physiological bandlimits and variance over batches of power spectra is sufficient for learning visual features of periodic signals. We perform the first experiments utilizing unlabelled video data not specifically created for rPPG to train robust pulse rate estimators. Given the limited inductive biases and impressive empirical results, the approach is theoretically capable of discovering other periodic signals from video, enabling multiple physiological measurements without the need for ground truth signals. Codes to fully reproduce the experiments are made available along with the paper.
summary: Subtle periodic signals such as blood volume pulse and respiration can be extracted from RGB video, enabling remote health monitoring at low cost. Advancements in remote pulse estimation -- or remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) -- are currently driven by deep learning solutions. However, modern approaches are trained and evaluated on benchmark datasets with associated ground truth from contact-PPG sensors. We present the first non-contrastive unsupervised learning framework for signal regression to break free from the constraints of labelled video data. With minimal assumptions of periodicity and finite bandwidth, our approach is capable of discovering the blood volume pulse directly from unlabelled videos. We find that encouraging sparse power spectra within normal physiological bandlimits and variance over batches of power spectra is sufficient for learning visual features of periodic signals. We perform the first experiments utilizing unlabelled video data not specifically created for rPPG to train robust pulse rate estimators. Given the limited inductive biases and impressive empirical results, the approach is theoretically capable of discovering other periodic signals from video, enabling multiple physiological measurements without the need for ground truth signals. Codes to fully reproduce the experiments are made available along with the paper.
abstract_zh: 可以从RGB视频中提取血量脉搏和呼吸等细微的周期性信号，从而以低成本实现远程健康监测。目前，深度学习解决方案推动了远程脉冲估计或远程光电体积描记术 (rPPG) 的进步。然而，现代方法是在基准数据集以及来自接触式 PPG 传感器的相关地面实况上进行训练和评估的。我们提出了第一个用于信号回归的非对比无监督学习框架，以摆脱标记视频数据的限制。通过对周期性和有限带宽的最小假设，我们的方法能够直接从未标记的视频中发现血量脉冲。我们发现，鼓励正常生理带限内的稀疏功率谱和批次功率谱的方差足以学习周期性信号的视觉特征。我们利用并非专门为 rPPG 创建的未标记视频数据进行第一个实验，以训练强大的脉搏率估计器。鉴于有限的归纳偏差和令人印象深刻的经验结果，该方法理论上能够从视频中发现其他周期性信号，从而无需地面真实信号即可实现多种生理测量。完全重现实验的代码随论文一起提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标签数据的非对比无监督学习框架，用于直接从视频中提取生理信号（如血容量脉冲）。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度学习的远程脉搏估计方法依赖于带有接触式PPG传感器标签的基准数据集，限制了其应用范围。本文旨在摆脱标签数据约束，实现更普适的生理信号提取。
AI.method: 通过假设信号周期性和有限带宽，设计非对比无监督学习框架，利用功率谱稀疏性和批次间方差约束学习视频特征，无需标注数据即可提取生理信号。
AI.result: 首次在非rPPG专用的未标注视频数据上训练出鲁棒的脉率估计器，实验表明方法在有限先验假设下仍能有效提取信号，具备发现其他周期性信号的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法理论可扩展至多种生理信号提取，无需地面真值信号即可实现多模态生理测量，为远程健康监测提供了新范式。

authors_text: Jesus L. Lobo,Ibai Laña,Eneko Osaba,Javier Del Ser
title: On the Connection between Concept Drift and Uncertainty in Industrial Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 论工业人工智能中概念漂移与不确定性的联系
comment: 2 pages, 1 figure, 2023 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IEEE CAI)
comments: 2 pages, 1 figure, 2023 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IEEE CAI)
abstract: AI-based digital twins are at the leading edge of the Industry 4.0 revolution, which are technologically empowered by the Internet of Things and real-time data analysis. Information collected from industrial assets is produced in a continuous fashion, yielding data streams that must be processed under stringent timing constraints. Such data streams are usually subject to non-stationary phenomena, causing that the data distribution of the streams may change, and thus the knowledge captured by models used for data analysis may become obsolete (leading to the so-called concept drift effect). The early detection of the change (drift) is crucial for updating the model's knowledge, which is challenging especially in scenarios where the ground truth associated to the stream data is not readily available. Among many other techniques, the estimation of the model's confidence has been timidly suggested in a few studies as a criterion for detecting drifts in unsupervised settings. The goal of this manuscript is to confirm and expose solidly the connection between the model's confidence in its output and the presence of a concept drift, showcasing it experimentally and advocating for a major consideration of uncertainty estimation in comparative studies to be reported in the future.
summary: AI-based digital twins are at the leading edge of the Industry 4.0 revolution, which are technologically empowered by the Internet of Things and real-time data analysis. Information collected from industrial assets is produced in a continuous fashion, yielding data streams that must be processed under stringent timing constraints. Such data streams are usually subject to non-stationary phenomena, causing that the data distribution of the streams may change, and thus the knowledge captured by models used for data analysis may become obsolete (leading to the so-called concept drift effect). The early detection of the change (drift) is crucial for updating the model's knowledge, which is challenging especially in scenarios where the ground truth associated to the stream data is not readily available. Among many other techniques, the estimation of the model's confidence has been timidly suggested in a few studies as a criterion for detecting drifts in unsupervised settings. The goal of this manuscript is to confirm and expose solidly the connection between the model's confidence in its output and the presence of a concept drift, showcasing it experimentally and advocating for a major consideration of uncertainty estimation in comparative studies to be reported in the future.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的数字孪生处于工业 4.0 革命的前沿，并得到物联网和实时数据分析的技术支持。从工业资产收集的信息以连续的方式产生，产生的数据流必须在严格的时间限制下进行处理。此类数据流通常会受到非平稳现象的影响，导致流的数据分布可能发生变化，从而用于数据分析的模型捕获的知识可能会过时（导致所谓的概念漂移效应）。早期检测变化（漂移）对于更新模型的知识至关重要，这具有挑战性，尤其是在与流数据相关的基本事实不易获得的情况下。在许多其他技术中，一些研究胆怯地建议将模型置信度的估计作为检测无监督环境中漂移的标准。本手稿的目的是确认并切实揭示模型对其输出的置信度与概念漂移的存在之间的联系，通过实验展示它，并提倡在未来报告的比较研究中主要考虑不确定性估计。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨工业人工智能中概念漂移与模型不确定性之间的关联，通过实验验证模型置信度可作为漂移检测的依据。
AI.motivation: 工业数据流的非平稳性导致模型知识快速过时，而传统漂移检测方法在无标签场景下效果有限，需探索新检测机制。
AI.method: 通过实验分析模型输出置信度与概念漂移的关联性，验证不确定性估计在无监督漂移检测中的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明模型置信度下降与概念漂移存在显著关联，证明不确定性估计可作为漂移检测的有效指标。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性估计应成为工业AI漂移检测的核心研究方向，未来需在比较研究中系统纳入该因素以提升模型适应性。

search_text: On the Connection between Concept Drift and Uncertainty in Industrial Artificial Intelligence 论工业人工智能中概念漂移与不确定性的联系 AI-based digital twins are at the leading edge of the Industry 4.0 revolution, which are technologically empowered by the Internet of Things and real-time data analysis. Information collected from industrial assets is produced in a continuous fashion, yielding data streams that must be processed under stringent timing constraints. Such data streams are usually subject to non-stationary phenomena, causing that the data distribution of the streams may change, and thus the knowledge captured by models used for data analysis may become obsolete (leading to the so-called concept drift effect). The early detection of the change (drift) is crucial for updating the model's knowledge, which is challenging especially in scenarios where the ground truth associated to the stream data is not readily available. Among many other techniques, the estimation of the model's confidence has been timidly suggested in a few studies as a criterion for detecting drifts in unsupervised settings. The goal of this manuscript is to confirm and expose solidly the connection between the model's confidence in its output and the presence of a concept drift, showcasing it experimentally and advocating for a major consideration of uncertainty estimation in comparative studies to be reported in the future. 基于人工智能的数字孪生处于工业 4.0 革命的前沿，并得到物联网和实时数据分析的技术支持。从工业资产收集的信息以连续的方式产生，产生的数据流必须在严格的时间限制下进行处理。此类数据流通常会受到非平稳现象的影响，导致流的数据分布可能发生变化，从而用于数据分析的模型捕获的知识可能会过时（导致所谓的概念漂移效应）。早期检测变化（漂移）对于更新模型的知识至关重要，这具有挑战性，尤其是在与流数据相关的基本事实不易获得的情况下。在许多其他技术中，一些研究胆怯地建议将模型置信度的估计作为检测无监督环境中漂移的标准。本手稿的目的是确认并切实揭示模型对其输出的置信度与概念漂移的存在之间的联系，通过实验展示它，并提倡在未来报告的比较研究中主要考虑不确定性估计。 本文探讨工业人工智能中概念漂移与模型不确定性之间的关联，通过实验验证模型置信度可作为漂移检测的依据。 Jesus L. authors_text: Zhaoyang Lyu,Jinyi Wang,Yuwei An,Ya Zhang,Dahua Lin,Bo Dai
title: Controllable Mesh Generation Through Sparse Latent Point Diffusion Models
title_zh: 通过稀疏潜点扩散模型可控网格生成
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project page is at https://slide-3d.github.io
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project page is at https://slide-3d.github.io
abstract: Mesh generation is of great value in various applications involving computer graphics and virtual content, yet designing generative models for meshes is challenging due to their irregular data structure and inconsistent topology of meshes in the same category. In this work, we design a novel sparse latent point diffusion model for mesh generation. Our key insight is to regard point clouds as an intermediate representation of meshes, and model the distribution of point clouds instead. While meshes can be generated from point clouds via techniques like Shape as Points (SAP), the challenges of directly generating meshes can be effectively avoided. To boost the efficiency and controllability of our mesh generation method, we propose to further encode point clouds to a set of sparse latent points with point-wise semantic meaningful features, where two DDPMs are trained in the space of sparse latent points to respectively model the distribution of the latent point positions and features at these latent points. We find that sampling in this latent space is faster than directly sampling dense point clouds. Moreover, the sparse latent points also enable us to explicitly control both the overall structures and local details of the generated meshes. Extensive experiments are conducted on the ShapeNet dataset, where our proposed sparse latent point diffusion model achieves superior performance in terms of generation quality and controllability when compared to existing methods.
summary: Mesh generation is of great value in various applications involving computer graphics and virtual content, yet designing generative models for meshes is challenging due to their irregular data structure and inconsistent topology of meshes in the same category. In this work, we design a novel sparse latent point diffusion model for mesh generation. Our key insight is to regard point clouds as an intermediate representation of meshes, and model the distribution of point clouds instead. While meshes can be generated from point clouds via techniques like Shape as Points (SAP), the challenges of directly generating meshes can be effectively avoided. To boost the efficiency and controllability of our mesh generation method, we propose to further encode point clouds to a set of sparse latent points with point-wise semantic meaningful features, where two DDPMs are trained in the space of sparse latent points to respectively model the distribution of the latent point positions and features at these latent points. We find that sampling in this latent space is faster than directly sampling dense point clouds. Moreover, the sparse latent points also enable us to explicitly control both the overall structures and local details of the generated meshes. Extensive experiments are conducted on the ShapeNet dataset, where our proposed sparse latent point diffusion model achieves superior performance in terms of generation quality and controllability when compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 网格生成在涉及计算机图形和虚拟内容的各种应用中具有重要价值，但由于其不规则的数据结构和同一类别中网格的拓扑不一致，设计网格的生成模型具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种用于网格生成的新颖的稀疏潜点扩散模型。我们的主要见解是将点云视为网格的中间表示，并对点云的分布进行建模。虽然可以通过点云 (SAP) 等技术从点云生成网格，但可以有效避免直接生成网格的挑战。为了提高网格生成方法的效率和可控性，我们建议将点云进一步编码为一组具有逐点语义有意义特征的稀疏潜在点，其中在稀疏潜在点的空间中训练两个DDPM以分别对这些潜在点的潜在点位置和特征的分布进行建模。我们发现在这个潜在空间中采样比直接采样密集点云要快。此外，稀疏的潜在点还使我们能够显式控制生成的网格的整体结构和局部细节。在 ShapeNet 数据集上进行了大量实验，与现有方法相比，我们提出的稀疏潜点扩散模型在生成质量和可控性方面取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过稀疏潜在点扩散模型实现可控网格生成的方法。
AI.motivation: 网格生成因数据结构不规则和拓扑不一致而面临挑战，现有方法难以兼顾生成质量与可控性。
AI.method: 以点云作为网格中间表示，通过两个DDPM分别建模稀疏潜在点的位置和特征分布，实现高效可控的网格生成。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet数据集上，生成质量与可控性优于现有方法，且采样速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏潜在点扩散模型有效解决了网格生成的挑战，为可控三维内容生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Junyoung Seo,Wooseok Jang,Min-Seop Kwak,Hyeonsu Kim,Jaehoon Ko,Junho Kim,Jin-Hwa Kim,Jiyoung Lee,Seungryong Kim
title: Let 2D Diffusion Model Know 3D-Consistency for Robust Text-to-3D Generation
title_zh: 让 2D 扩散模型了解 3D 一致性，以实现稳健的文本到 3D 生成
abstract: Text-to-3D generation has shown rapid progress in recent days with the advent of score distillation, a methodology of using pretrained text-to-2D diffusion models to optimize neural radiance field (NeRF) in the zero-shot setting. However, the lack of 3D awareness in the 2D diffusion models destabilizes score distillation-based methods from reconstructing a plausible 3D scene. To address this issue, we propose 3DFuse, a novel framework that incorporates 3D awareness into pretrained 2D diffusion models, enhancing the robustness and 3D consistency of score distillation-based methods. We realize this by first constructing a coarse 3D structure of a given text prompt and then utilizing projected, view-specific depth map as a condition for the diffusion model. Additionally, we introduce a training strategy that enables the 2D diffusion model learns to handle the errors and sparsity within the coarse 3D structure for robust generation, as well as a method for ensuring semantic consistency throughout all viewpoints of the scene. Our framework surpasses the limitations of prior arts, and has significant implications for 3D consistent generation of 2D diffusion models.
summary: Text-to-3D generation has shown rapid progress in recent days with the advent of score distillation, a methodology of using pretrained text-to-2D diffusion models to optimize neural radiance field (NeRF) in the zero-shot setting. However, the lack of 3D awareness in the 2D diffusion models destabilizes score distillation-based methods from reconstructing a plausible 3D scene. To address this issue, we propose 3DFuse, a novel framework that incorporates 3D awareness into pretrained 2D diffusion models, enhancing the robustness and 3D consistency of score distillation-based methods. We realize this by first constructing a coarse 3D structure of a given text prompt and then utilizing projected, view-specific depth map as a condition for the diffusion model. Additionally, we introduce a training strategy that enables the 2D diffusion model learns to handle the errors and sparsity within the coarse 3D structure for robust generation, as well as a method for ensuring semantic consistency throughout all viewpoints of the scene. Our framework surpasses the limitations of prior arts, and has significant implications for 3D consistent generation of 2D diffusion models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着分数蒸馏的出现，文本到 3D 生成取得了快速进展，分数蒸馏是一种使用预训练的文本到 2D 扩散模型在零样本设置中优化神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的方法。然而，2D 扩散模型缺乏 3D 意识，使得基于分数蒸馏的方法无法重建可信的 3D 场景。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 3DFuse，这是一种新颖的框架，它将 3D 感知融入到预训练的 2D 扩散模型中，从而增强了基于分数蒸馏的方法的鲁棒性和 3D 一致性。我们通过首先构建给定文本提示的粗略 3D 结构，然后利用投影的特定于视图的深度图作为扩散模型的条件来实现这一点。此外，我们引入了一种训练策略，使 2D 扩散模型能够学习处理粗略 3D 结构中的错误和稀疏性，以实现稳健的生成，以及一种确保场景所有视点语义一致性的方法。我们的框架超越了现有技术的限制，并且对于 2D 扩散模型的 3D 一致生成具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为3DFuse的框架，通过引入3D感知能力提升基于分数蒸馏的文本到3D生成方法的鲁棒性和一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于2D扩散模型的文本到3D生成方法因缺乏3D感知能力，导致生成结果在3D场景重建中存在不稳定性和不一致性。
AI.method: 首先构建文本提示的粗略3D结构，利用投影的视角特定深度图作为扩散模型的条件输入，并设计训练策略使模型学习处理粗略3D结构中的误差和稀疏性，同时确保场景各视角的语义一致性。
AI.result: 该框架显著优于现有方法，在3D一致性生成任务中表现出更高的鲁棒性和生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 3DFuse通过融合3D感知能力，有效解决了2D扩散模型在文本到3D生成中的3D一致性问题，为相关研究提供了重要参考。

search_text: Let 2D Diffusion Model Know 3D-Consistency for Robust Text-to-3D Generation 让 2D 扩散模型了解 3D 一致性，以实现稳健的文本到 3D 生成 Text-to-3D generation has shown rapid progress in recent days with the advent of score distillation, a methodology of using pretrained text-to-2D diffusion models to optimize neural radiance field (NeRF) in the zero-shot setting. However, the lack of 3D awareness in the 2D diffusion models destabilizes score distillation-based methods from reconstructing a plausible 3D scene. To address this issue, we propose 3DFuse, a novel framework that incorporates 3D awareness into pretrained 2D diffusion models, enhancing the robustness and 3D consistency of score distillation-based methods. We realize this by first constructing a coarse 3D structure of a given text prompt and then utilizing projected, view-specific depth map as a condition for the diffusion model. Additionally, we introduce a training strategy that enables the 2D diffusion model learns to handle the errors and sparsity within the coarse 3D structure for robust generation, as well as a method for ensuring semantic consistency throughout all viewpoints of the scene. Our framework surpasses the limitations of prior arts, and has significant implications for 3D consistent generation of 2D diffusion models. 近年来，随着分数蒸馏的出现，文本到 3D 生成取得了快速进展，分数蒸馏是一种使用预训练的文本到 2D 扩散模型在零样本设置中优化神经辐射场 (NeRF) 的方法。然而，2D 扩散模型缺乏 3D 意识，使得基于分数蒸馏的方法无法重建可信的 3D 场景。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 3DFuse，这是一种新颖的框架，它将 3D 感知融入到预训练的 2D 扩散模型中，从而增强了基于分数蒸馏的方法的鲁棒性和 3D 一致性。我们通过首先构建给定文本提示的粗略 3D 结构，然后利用投影的特定于视图的深度图作为扩散模型的条件来实现这一点。此外，我们引入了一种训练策略，使 2D 扩散模型能够学习处理粗略 3D 结构中的错误和稀疏性，以实现稳健的生成，以及一种确保场景所有视点语义一致性的方法。我们的框架超越了现有技术的限制，并且对于 2D 扩散模型的 3D 一致生成具有重要意义。 本文提出一种名为3DFuse的框架，通过引入3D感知能力提升基于分数蒸馏的文本到3D生成方法的鲁棒性和一致性。 Junyoung Seo,Wooseok Jang,Min-Seop Kwak,Hyeonsu Kim,Jaehoon Ko,Junho Kim,Jin-Hwa Kim,Jiyoung Lee,Seungryong Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Tim Puphal,Malte Probst,Misa Komuro,Yiyang Li,Julian Eggert
title: Comfortable Priority Handling with Predictive Velocity Optimization for Intersection Crossings
title_zh: 舒适的优先处理与交叉路口的预测速度优化
abstract: We address the problem of motion planning for four-way intersection crossings with right-of-ways. Road safety typically assigns liability to the follower in rear-end collisions and to the approaching vehicle required to yield in side crashes. As an alternative to previous models based on heuristic state machines, we propose a planning framework which changes the prediction model of other cars (e.g. their prototypical accelerations and decelerations) depending on the given longitudinal or lateral priority rules. Combined with a state-of-the-art trajectory optimization approach ROPT (Risk Optimization Method) this allows to find ego velocity profiles minimizing risks from curves and all involved vehicles while maximizing utility (needed time to arrive at a goal) and comfort (change and duration of acceleration) under the presence of regulatory conditions. Analytical and statistical evaluations show that our method is able to follow right-of-ways for a wide range of other vehicle behaviors and path geometries. Even when the other cars drive in a non-priority-compliant way, ROPT achieves good risk-comfort tradeoffs.
summary: We address the problem of motion planning for four-way intersection crossings with right-of-ways. Road safety typically assigns liability to the follower in rear-end collisions and to the approaching vehicle required to yield in side crashes. As an alternative to previous models based on heuristic state machines, we propose a planning framework which changes the prediction model of other cars (e.g. their prototypical accelerations and decelerations) depending on the given longitudinal or lateral priority rules. Combined with a state-of-the-art trajectory optimization approach ROPT (Risk Optimization Method) this allows to find ego velocity profiles minimizing risks from curves and all involved vehicles while maximizing utility (needed time to arrive at a goal) and comfort (change and duration of acceleration) under the presence of regulatory conditions. Analytical and statistical evaluations show that our method is able to follow right-of-ways for a wide range of other vehicle behaviors and path geometries. Even when the other cars drive in a non-priority-compliant way, ROPT achieves good risk-comfort tradeoffs.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了具有通行权的四向交叉路口的运动规划问题。道路安全通常将追尾碰撞中的追随者的责任以及侧面碰撞中需要让行的接近车辆分配给责任。作为基于启发式状态机的先前模型的替代方案，我们提出了一个规划框架，该框架根据给定的纵向或横向优先级规则改变其他汽车的预测模型（例如其原型加速和减速）。结合最先进的轨迹优化方法 ROPT（风险优化方法），这可以找到自我速度曲线，最大限度地减少弯道和所有涉及车辆的风险，同时在监管条件下最大化效用（达到目标所需的时间）和舒适度（加速的变化和持续时间）。分析和统计评估表明，我们的方法能够遵循各种其他车辆行为和路径几何形状的通行权。即使其他汽车以不符合优先级的方式行驶，ROPT 也能实现良好的风险与舒适度权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合优先规则与预测速度优化的运动规划框架，用于解决四向交叉路口的车辆路径规划问题，兼顾安全、效率与舒适性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于启发式状态机的模型难以灵活处理复杂交通场景中的车辆行为差异及优先规则，导致安全性和舒适性不足。
AI.method: 根据纵向/横向优先规则动态调整其他车辆的加减速预测模型，结合ROPT轨迹优化方法，在满足法规条件下最小化风险并最大化到达效率与乘坐舒适性。
AI.result: 实验验证方法能有效遵循优先规则应对多种车辆行为及路径几何，即使在其他车辆违规情况下仍可实现良好的风险-舒适平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过动态预测模型与优化算法的结合，在复杂交叉路口场景中实现了更安全、高效的路径规划，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Ping Chen,Xingpeng Zhang,Ye Li,Ju Tao,Bin Xiao,Bing Wang,Zongjie Jiang
title: DAA: A Delta Age AdaIN operation for age estimation via binary code transformer
title_zh: DAA：通过二进制代码转换器进行年龄估计的 Delta Age AdaIN 操作
abstract: Naked eye recognition of age is usually based on comparison with the age of others. However, this idea is ignored by computer tasks because it is difficult to obtain representative contrast images of each age. Inspired by the transfer learning, we designed the Delta Age AdaIN (DAA) operation to obtain the feature difference with each age, which obtains the style map of each age through the learned values representing the mean and standard deviation. We let the input of transfer learning as the binary code of age natural number to obtain continuous age feature information. The learned two groups of values in Binary code mapping are corresponding to the mean and standard deviation of the comparison ages. In summary, our method consists of four parts: FaceEncoder, DAA operation, Binary code mapping, and AgeDecoder modules. After getting the delta age via AgeDecoder, we take the average value of all comparison ages and delta ages as the predicted age. Compared with state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves better performance with fewer parameters on multiple facial age datasets.
summary: Naked eye recognition of age is usually based on comparison with the age of others. However, this idea is ignored by computer tasks because it is difficult to obtain representative contrast images of each age. Inspired by the transfer learning, we designed the Delta Age AdaIN (DAA) operation to obtain the feature difference with each age, which obtains the style map of each age through the learned values representing the mean and standard deviation. We let the input of transfer learning as the binary code of age natural number to obtain continuous age feature information. The learned two groups of values in Binary code mapping are corresponding to the mean and standard deviation of the comparison ages. In summary, our method consists of four parts: FaceEncoder, DAA operation, Binary code mapping, and AgeDecoder modules. After getting the delta age via AgeDecoder, we take the average value of all comparison ages and delta ages as the predicted age. Compared with state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves better performance with fewer parameters on multiple facial age datasets.
abstract_zh: 肉眼对年龄的识别通常是基于与他人年龄的比较。然而，这个想法被计算机任务忽略，因为很难获得每个年龄段的代表性对比图像。受迁移学习的启发，我们设计了Delta Age AdaIN（DAA）操作来获取每个年龄段的特征差异，通过表示平均值和标准差的学习值获得每个年龄段的风格图。我们让迁移学习的输入为年龄自然数的二进制代码，以获得连续的年龄特征信息。二进制编码映射中学习到的两组值对应于比较年龄的平均值和标准差。总之，我们的方法由四个部分组成：FaceEncoder、DAA 操作、二进制代码映射和 AgeDecoder 模块。通过AgeDecoder得到delta年龄后，我们将所有对比年龄和delta年龄的平均值作为预测年龄。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在多个面部年龄数据集上以更少的参数实现了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于二进制代码转换器的Delta Age AdaIN（DAA）操作，用于解决面部年龄估计中对比图像获取困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统年龄估计方法依赖对比图像难以获取，而迁移学习可利用二进制编码提取年龄特征差异，从而提升模型性能。
AI.method: 方法包含四部分：FaceEncoder提取面部特征，DAA操作通过AdaIN计算年龄差异风格图，二进制代码映射将年龄转为二进制输入，AgeDecoder解码得到年龄差并计算预测值。
AI.result: 在多个面部年龄数据集上，该方法以更少参数优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: DAA操作通过二进制编码与AdaIN结合，有效捕捉年龄差异特征，证明了其在年龄估计任务中的优越性。

In summary, our method consists of four parts: FaceEncoder, DAA operation, Binary code mapping, and AgeDecoder modules. After getting the delta age via AgeDecoder, we take the average value of all comparison ages and delta ages as the predicted age. Compared with state-of-the-art methods, our method achieves better performance with fewer parameters on multiple facial age datasets. 肉眼对年龄的识别通常是基于与他人年龄的比较。然而，这个想法被计算机任务忽略，因为很难获得每个年龄段的代表性对比图像。受迁移学习的启发，我们设计了Delta Age AdaIN（DAA）操作来获取每个年龄段的特征差异，通过表示平均值和标准差的学习值获得每个年龄段的风格图。我们让迁移学习的输入为年龄自然数的二进制代码，以获得连续的年龄特征信息。二进制编码映射中学习到的两组值对应于比较年龄的平均值和标准差。总之，我们的方法由四个部分组成：FaceEncoder、DAA 操作、二进制代码映射和 AgeDecoder 模块。通过AgeDecoder得到delta年龄后，我们将所有对比年龄和delta年龄的平均值作为预测年龄。与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在多个面部年龄数据集上以更少的参数实现了更好的性能。 本文提出一种基于二进制代码转换器的Delta Age AdaIN（DAA）操作，用于解决面部年龄估计中对比图像获取困难的问题。 Ping Chen,Xingpeng Zhang,Ye Li,Ju Tao,Bin Xiao,Bing Wang,Zongjie Jiang cs.CV

authors_text: Andreas Mueller
title: Review of the Exponential and Cayley Map on SE(3) as relevant for Lie Group Integration of the Generalized Poisson Equation and Flexible Multibody Systems
title_zh: 回顾 SE(3) 上与广义泊松方程和灵活多体系统的李群积分相关的指数和凯莱图
abstract: The exponential and Cayley map on SE(3) are the prevailing coordinate maps used in Lie group integration schemes for rigid body and flexible body systems. Such geometric integrators are the Munthe-Kaas and generalized-alpha schemes, which involve the differential and its directional derivative of the respective coordinate map. Relevant closed form expressions, which were reported over the last two decades, are scattered in the literature, and some are reported without proof. This paper provides a reference summarizing all relevant closed form relations along with the relevant proofs. including the right-trivialized differential of the exponential and Cayley map and their directional derivatives (resembling the Hessian). The latter gives rise to an implicit generalized-alpha scheme for rigid/flexible multibody systems in terms of the Cayley map with improved computational efficiency.
summary: The exponential and Cayley map on SE(3) are the prevailing coordinate maps used in Lie group integration schemes for rigid body and flexible body systems. Such geometric integrators are the Munthe-Kaas and generalized-alpha schemes, which involve the differential and its directional derivative of the respective coordinate map. Relevant closed form expressions, which were reported over the last two decades, are scattered in the literature, and some are reported without proof. This paper provides a reference summarizing all relevant closed form relations along with the relevant proofs. including the right-trivialized differential of the exponential and Cayley map and their directional derivatives (resembling the Hessian). The latter gives rise to an implicit generalized-alpha scheme for rigid/flexible multibody systems in terms of the Cayley map with improved computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: SE(3) 上的指数图和凯莱图是刚体和柔体系统李群积分方案中使用的主流坐标图。这种几何积分器是 Munthe-Kaas 和广义 alpha 方案，它们涉及相应坐标图的微分及其方向导数。近二十年来报道的相关封闭式表达散见于文献中，有些报道未经证实。本文提供了总结所有相关封闭式关系以及相关证明的参考。包括指数映射和凯莱映射的右微分及其方向导数（类似于 Hessian）。后者根据凯莱图提出了刚性/柔性多体系统的隐式广义阿尔法方案，并提高了计算效率。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了SE(3)上的指数映射和Cayley映射在李群积分中的应用，总结了相关闭合表达式并提供了证明。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中关于指数映射和Cayley映射的闭合表达式分散且部分缺乏证明，阻碍了其在多体系统积分中的有效应用。
AI.method: 系统整理并证明指数映射和Cayley映射的右平凡化微分及其方向导数，推导基于Cayley映射的隐式广义α积分方案。
AI.result: 提供了完整的闭合表达式及证明，提出了计算效率更高的Cayley映射隐式广义α方案。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为李群积分方法的应用提供了理论支持，Cayley映射方案在计算效率上具有优势。

authors_text: Kijung Lee,Prudence Attablayo
title: Examining the impacts of privacy awareness on user's self-disclosure on social media
title_zh: 检查隐私意识对用户在社交媒体上自我披露的影响
abstract: This research aims to investigate the impact of users' privacy awareness on their self-disclosing behavior. Our primary research question is to investigate how young social media users feel about the benefits and risks of disclosing them-selves on social media and how risk-benefit awareness influences the assess-ment of their self-disclosure. Based on the data we recorded, the factor analysis, and three-way ANOVA, we conclude that users who know more about privacy benefits share more on social media (F= 36.291; df 1; sig < .001) while those who know less about the benefits disclose less on social media. According to the analysis, users who know more about self-disclosure risks share less on so-cial media (F= 7.001; df 1; sig < .001). Users disclose less information on so-cial media platforms based on the different levels of their risk perceptions (df 3, F=.715, sig < 0.5). This indicates that risks on social media platforms vary to some degree. We saw that people's sharing habits based on their levels of risk, benefits, and social media platforms can vary. One thing that remained certain was users' main benefit for engaging and disclosing on social media is their need to stay in touch with friends and their need for community. On the flip side, the main risk was the need not to be impersonated and misunderstood by people. Based on a simple frequency analysis of the open-ended questions we asked In our data collection, the most highlighted words in our responses were "people" and "friends". These were the two main words that stood out in all the data we collected concerning the benefits, risks, and intention to self-disclose.
summary: This research aims to investigate the impact of users' privacy awareness on their self-disclosing behavior. Our primary research question is to investigate how young social media users feel about the benefits and risks of disclosing them-selves on social media and how risk-benefit awareness influences the assess-ment of their self-disclosure. Based on the data we recorded, the factor analysis, and three-way ANOVA, we conclude that users who know more about privacy benefits share more on social media (F= 36.291; df 1; sig < .001) while those who know less about the benefits disclose less on social media. According to the analysis, users who know more about self-disclosure risks share less on so-cial media (F= 7.001; df 1; sig < .001). Users disclose less information on so-cial media platforms based on the different levels of their risk perceptions (df 3, F=.715, sig < 0.5). This indicates that risks on social media platforms vary to some degree. We saw that people's sharing habits based on their levels of risk, benefits, and social media platforms can vary. One thing that remained certain was users' main benefit for engaging and disclosing on social media is their need to stay in touch with friends and their need for community. On the flip side, the main risk was the need not to be impersonated and misunderstood by people. Based on a simple frequency analysis of the open-ended questions we asked In our data collection, the most highlighted words in our responses were "people" and "friends". These were the two main words that stood out in all the data we collected concerning the benefits, risks, and intention to self-disclose.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在调查用户隐私意识对其自我披露行为的影响。我们的主要研究问题是调查年轻的社交媒体用户对在社交媒体上披露自己的好处和风险有何感受，以及风险收益意识如何影响他们自我披露的评估。根据我们记录的数据、因子分析和三向方差分析，我们得出的结论是，对隐私福利了解更多的用户在社交媒体上分享更多 (F= 36.291; df 1; sig < .001)，而对隐私福利了解较少的用户在社交媒体上披露较少。根据分析，对自我披露风险了解越多的用户在社交媒体上的分享越少（F= 7.001；df 1；sig < .001）。根据风险认知程度的不同，用户在社交媒体平台上披露的信息较少（df 3，F=.715，sig < 0.5）。这表明社交媒体平台的风险存在一定程度的差异。我们发现，人们的分享习惯因风险、收益和社交媒体平台的不同而有所不同。可以肯定的一件事是，用户在社交媒体上参与和披露的主要好处是他们需要与朋友保持联系以及他们对社区的需要。另一方面，主要的风险是不需要被人们冒充和误解。基于对我们在数据收集中提出的开放式问题的简单频率分析，我们的回答中最突出的词是“人”和“朋友”。这是我们收集的有关利益、风险和自我披露意愿的所有数据中突出的两个关键词。

AI.tldr: 研究探讨隐私意识对社交媒体用户自我披露行为的影响，分析其对披露行为的驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 理解年轻用户如何权衡社交媒体自我披露的利弊，以及隐私意识如何影响其披露决策。
AI.method: 通过因子分析和三向方差分析（ANOVA），结合开放性问题的频率分析，统计用户对隐私收益与风险的认知差异。
AI.result: 隐私收益认知越高，用户披露越多（F=36.291, p<0.001）；风险认知越高，披露越少（F=7.001, p<0.001）。用户主要因社交需求（如保持联系）而披露，主要风险担忧是被冒名或误解。
AI.conclusion: 隐私意识显著影响用户自我披露行为，但社交需求仍是核心驱动力，不同平台和风险认知水平会导致披露行为差异。

authors_text: Lucas Maison,Yannick Estève
title: Improving Accented Speech Recognition with Multi-Domain Training
title_zh: 通过多领域训练提高口音语音识别
abstract: Thanks to the rise of self-supervised learning, automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems now achieve near-human performance on a wide variety of datasets. However, they still lack generalization capability and are not robust to domain shifts like accent variations. In this work, we use speech audio representing four different French accents to create fine-tuning datasets that improve the robustness of pre-trained ASR models. By incorporating various accents in the training set, we obtain both in-domain and out-of-domain improvements. Our numerical experiments show that we can reduce error rates by up to 25% (relative) on African and Belgian accents compared to single-domain training while keeping a good performance on standard French.
summary: Thanks to the rise of self-supervised learning, automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems now achieve near-human performance on a wide variety of datasets. However, they still lack generalization capability and are not robust to domain shifts like accent variations. In this work, we use speech audio representing four different French accents to create fine-tuning datasets that improve the robustness of pre-trained ASR models. By incorporating various accents in the training set, we obtain both in-domain and out-of-domain improvements. Our numerical experiments show that we can reduce error rates by up to 25% (relative) on African and Belgian accents compared to single-domain training while keeping a good performance on standard French.
abstract_zh: 由于自监督学习的兴起，自动语音识别（ASR）系统现在在各种数据集上实现了接近人类的性能。然而，它们仍然缺乏泛化能力，并且对于诸如口音变化之类的领域变化并不鲁棒。在这项工作中，我们使用代表四种不同法国口音的语音音频来创建微调数据集，以提高预训练 ASR 模型的稳健性。通过在训练集中纳入各种口音，我们获得了域内和域外的改进。我们的数值实验表明，与单域训练相比，我们可以将非洲和比利时口音的错误率降低高达 25%（相对），同时保持标准法语的良好性能。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过多领域训练提升带口音语音识别的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动语音识别系统在面对口音等域转移时泛化能力不足，需提高模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用四种法语口音语音构建微调数据集，通过多领域训练增强预训练模型。
AI.result: 非洲和比利时口音测试中相对错误率降低25%，标准法语性能保持良好。
AI.conclusion: 多领域训练有效提升模型跨口音识别能力，同时维持基准表现。

search_text: Improving Accented Speech Recognition with Multi-Domain Training 通过多领域训练提高口音语音识别 Thanks to the rise of self-supervised learning, automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems now achieve near-human performance on a wide variety of datasets. However, they still lack generalization capability and are not robust to domain shifts like accent variations. In this work, we use speech audio representing four different French accents to create fine-tuning datasets that improve the robustness of pre-trained ASR models. By incorporating various accents in the training set, we obtain both in-domain and out-of-domain improvements. Our numerical experiments show that we can reduce error rates by up to 25% (relative) on African and Belgian accents compared to single-domain training while keeping a good performance on standard French. 由于自监督学习的兴起，自动语音识别（ASR）系统现在在各种数据集上实现了接近人类的性能。然而，它们仍然缺乏泛化能力，并且对于诸如口音变化之类的领域变化并不鲁棒。在这项工作中，我们使用代表四种不同法国口音的语音音频来创建微调数据集，以提高预训练 ASR 模型的稳健性。通过在训练集中纳入各种口音，我们获得了域内和域外的改进。我们的数值实验表明，与单域训练相比，我们可以将非洲和比利时口音的错误率降低高达 25%（相对），同时保持标准法语的良好性能。 本论文通过多领域训练提升带口音语音识别的鲁棒性。 Lucas Maison,Yannick Estève cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sayan Bandyapadhyay,William Lochet,Saket Saurabh
title: FPT Constant-Approximations for Capacitated Clustering to Minimize the Sum of Cluster Radii
title_zh: 用于最小化簇半径总和的赋能聚类的 FPT 常数近似
comment: Updated version: fix an error in the proof of Lemma 2.5
comments: Updated version: fix an error in the proof of Lemma 2.5
abstract: Clustering with capacity constraints is a fundamental problem that attracted significant attention throughout the years. In this paper, we give the first FPT constant-factor approximation algorithm for the problem of clustering points in a general metric into $k$ clusters to minimize the sum of cluster radii, subject to non-uniform hard capacity constraints. In particular, we give a $(15+ε)$-approximation algorithm that runs in $2^{0(k^2\log k)}\cdot n^3$ time. When capacities are uniform, we obtain the following improved approximation bounds: A (4 + $ε$)-approximation with running time $2^{O(k\log(k/ε))}n^3$, which significantly improves over the FPT 28-approximation of Inamdar and Varadarajan [ESA 2020]; a (2 + $ε$)-approximation with running time $2^{O(k/ε^2 \cdot\log(k/ε))}dn^3$ and a $(1+ε)$-approximation with running time $2^{O(kd\log ((k/ε)))}n^{3}$ in the Euclidean space; and a (1 + $ε$)-approximation in the Euclidean space with running time $2^{O(k/ε^2 \cdot\log(k/ε))}dn^3$ if we are allowed to violate the capacities by (1 + $ε$)-factor. We complement this result by showing that there is no (1 + $ε$)-approximation algorithm running in time $f(k)\cdot n^{O(1)}$, if any capacity violation is not allowed.
summary: Clustering with capacity constraints is a fundamental problem that attracted significant attention throughout the years. In this paper, we give the first FPT constant-factor approximation algorithm for the problem of clustering points in a general metric into $k$ clusters to minimize the sum of cluster radii, subject to non-uniform hard capacity constraints. In particular, we give a $(15+ε)$-approximation algorithm that runs in $2^{0(k^2\log k)}\cdot n^3$ time. When capacities are uniform, we obtain the following improved approximation bounds: A (4 + $ε$)-approximation with running time $2^{O(k\log(k/ε))}n^3$, which significantly improves over the FPT 28-approximation of Inamdar and Varadarajan [ESA 2020]; a (2 + $ε$)-approximation with running time $2^{O(k/ε^2 \cdot\log(k/ε))}dn^3$ and a $(1+ε)$-approximation with running time $2^{O(kd\log ((k/ε)))}n^{3}$ in the Euclidean space; and a (1 + $ε$)-approximation in the Euclidean space with running time $2^{O(k/ε^2 \cdot\log(k/ε))}dn^3$ if we are allowed to violate the capacities by (1 + $ε$)-factor. We complement this result by showing that there is no (1 + $ε$)-approximation algorithm running in time $f(k)\cdot n^{O(1)}$, if any capacity violation is not allowed.
abstract_zh: 容量限制的集群是多年来引起人们广泛关注的一个基本问题。在本文中，我们给出了第一个 FPT 常因子近似算法，用于解决将通用度量中的点聚类为 $k$ 簇的问题，以最小化簇半径之和，但受到非均匀硬容量约束。特别是，我们给出了一个 $(15+ε)$ 近似算法，运行时间为 $2^{0(k^2\log k)}\cdot n^3$ 时间。当容量均匀时，我们获得以下改进的近似界限：运行时间为 $2^{O(k\log(k/ε))}n^3$ 的 (4 + $ε$) 近似，这比 Inamdar 和 Varadarajan [ESA 2020] 的 FPT 28 近似有显着改进；欧几里得空间中运行时间为 $2^{O(k/ε^2 \cdot\log(k/ε))}dn^3$ 的 (2 + $ε$) 近似和运行时间 $2^{O(kd\log ((k/ε)))}n^{3}$ 的 $(1+ε)$ 近似；以及欧几里得空间中的 (1 + $ε$) 近似，运行时间 $2^{O(k/ε^2 \cdot\log(k/ε))}dn^3$ 如果允许我们违反 (1 + $ε$) 因子的容量。我们通过证明如果不允许任何容量违规，则不存在在时间 $f(k)\cdot n^{O(1)}$ 中运行的 (1 + $ε$) 近似算法来补充此结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于解决带容量约束的聚类问题的固定参数可约（FPT）常数近似算法，旨在最小化聚类半径之和。
AI.motivation: 带容量约束的聚类问题在实际应用中具有重要意义，但此前缺乏针对非均匀硬容量约束的高效近似算法。
AI.method: 设计了基于FPT框架的近似算法，结合不同场景（如均匀容量、欧几里得空间）优化时间复杂度与近似比。
AI.result: 首次提出(15+ε)-近似算法，针对均匀容量改进为(4+ε)、(2+ε)和(1+ε)近似，并在欧几里得空间中给出更优时间复杂度；证明了在不允许容量违规时无法达到(1+ε)-近似。
AI.conclusion: 本文为带容量约束的聚类问题提供了首个FPT常数近似方案，并通过复杂度下界分析明确了算法的理论极限。

authors_text: Aby Philip,Soorya Rethinasamy,Vincent Russo,Mark M. Wilde
title: Schrödinger as a Quantum Programmer: Estimating Entanglement via Steering
title_zh: 薛定谔作为量子程序员：通过引导估计纠缠
comment: v4: 33 pages, 12 figures, all source code available as arXiv ancillary files, update to complexity theoretic results for QIP$_{\operatorname{EB}}(2)$, accepted to Quantum
comments: v4: 33 pages, 12 figures, all source code available as arXiv ancillary files, update to complexity theoretic results for QIP$_{\operatorname{EB}}(2)$, accepted to Quantum
abstract: Quantifying entanglement is an important task by which the resourcefulness of a quantum state can be measured. Here, we develop a quantum algorithm that tests for and quantifies the separability of a general bipartite state by using the quantum steering effect, the latter initially discovered by Schrödinger. Our separability test consists of a distributed quantum computation involving two parties: a computationally limited client, who prepares a purification of the state of interest, and a computationally unbounded server, who tries to steer the reduced systems to a probabilistic ensemble of pure product states. To design a practical algorithm, we replace the role of the server with a combination of parameterized unitary circuits and classical optimization techniques to perform the necessary computation. The result is a variational quantum steering algorithm (VQSA), a modified separability test that is implementable on quantum computers that are available today. We then simulate our VQSA on noisy quantum simulators and find favorable convergence properties on the examples tested. We also develop semidefinite programs, executable on classical computers, that benchmark the results obtained from our VQSA. Thus, our findings provide a meaningful connection between steering, entanglement, quantum algorithms, and quantum computational complexity theory. They also demonstrate the value of a parameterized mid-circuit measurement in a VQSA.
summary: Quantifying entanglement is an important task by which the resourcefulness of a quantum state can be measured. Here, we develop a quantum algorithm that tests for and quantifies the separability of a general bipartite state by using the quantum steering effect, the latter initially discovered by Schrödinger. Our separability test consists of a distributed quantum computation involving two parties: a computationally limited client, who prepares a purification of the state of interest, and a computationally unbounded server, who tries to steer the reduced systems to a probabilistic ensemble of pure product states. To design a practical algorithm, we replace the role of the server with a combination of parameterized unitary circuits and classical optimization techniques to perform the necessary computation. The result is a variational quantum steering algorithm (VQSA), a modified separability test that is implementable on quantum computers that are available today. We then simulate our VQSA on noisy quantum simulators and find favorable convergence properties on the examples tested. We also develop semidefinite programs, executable on classical computers, that benchmark the results obtained from our VQSA. Thus, our findings provide a meaningful connection between steering, entanglement, quantum algorithms, and quantum computational complexity theory. They also demonstrate the value of a parameterized mid-circuit measurement in a VQSA.
abstract_zh: 量化纠缠是一项重要的任务，可以通过它来衡量量子态的智慧。在这里，我们开发了一种量子算法，通过使用量子转向效应来测试和量化一般二分态的可分离性，后者最初由薛定谔发现。我们的可分离性测试由涉及两方的分布式量子计算组成：计算有限的客户端，准备对感兴趣的状态进行纯化；以及计算无限的服务器，试图将简化的系统引导到纯乘积状态的概率集合。为了设计实用的算法，我们用参数化酉电路和经典优化技术的组合取代服务器的角色来执行必要的计算。其结果是变分量子转向算法（VQSA），这是一种改进的可分离性测试，可以在当今可用的量子计算机上实现。然后，我们在嘈杂的量子模拟器上模拟 VQSA，并在测试的示例中发现有利的收敛特性。我们还开发了可在经典计算机上执行的半定程序，对从我们的 VQSA 获得的结果进行基准测试。因此，我们的发现在转向、纠缠、量子算法和量子计算复杂性理论之间提供了有意义的联系。他们还展示了 VQSA 中参数化中电路测量的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于量子steering效应的算法，用于量化量子态的纠缠程度。
AI.motivation: 量化纠缠是评估量子态资源的关键任务，传统方法存在计算复杂度高或可操作性差的问题。
AI.method: 设计分布式量子计算框架，结合参数化量子电路与经典优化技术，开发变分量子steering算法（VQSA）。
AI.result: 在噪声量子模拟器中验证VQSA的收敛性，并通过半定规划实现经典基准测试。
AI.conclusion: 建立了steering、纠缠与量子计算复杂度理论的关联，展示了参数化中途测量在量子算法中的应用价值。

result: 在噪声量子模拟器中验证VQSA的收敛性，并通过半定规划实现经典基准测试。
conclusion: 建立了steering、纠缠与量子计算复杂度理论的关联，展示了参数化中途测量在量子算法中的应用价值。
search_text: Schrödinger as a Quantum Programmer: Estimating Entanglement via Steering 薛定谔作为量子程序员：通过引导估计纠缠 Quantifying entanglement is an important task by which the resourcefulness of a quantum state can be measured. Here, we develop a quantum algorithm that tests for and quantifies the separability of a general bipartite state by using the quantum steering effect, the latter initially discovered by Schrödinger. Our separability test consists of a distributed quantum computation involving two parties: a computationally limited client, who prepares a purification of the state of interest, and a computationally unbounded server, who tries to steer the reduced systems to a probabilistic ensemble of pure product states. To design a practical algorithm, we replace the role of the server with a combination of parameterized unitary circuits and classical optimization techniques to perform the necessary computation. The result is a variational quantum steering algorithm (VQSA), a modified separability test that is implementable on quantum computers that are available today. We then simulate our VQSA on noisy quantum simulators and find favorable convergence properties on the examples tested. We also develop semidefinite programs, executable on classical computers, that benchmark the results obtained from our VQSA. Thus, our findings provide a meaningful connection between steering, entanglement, quantum algorithms, and quantum computational complexity theory. They also demonstrate the value of a parameterized mid-circuit measurement in a VQSA. 量化纠缠是一项重要的任务，可以通过它来衡量量子态的智慧。在这里，我们开发了一种量子算法，通过使用量子转向效应来测试和量化一般二分态的可分离性，后者最初由薛定谔发现。我们的可分离性测试由涉及两方的分布式量子计算组成：计算有限的客户端，准备对感兴趣的状态进行纯化；以及计算无限的服务器，试图将简化的系统引导到纯乘积状态的概率集合。为了设计实用的算法，我们用参数化酉电路和经典优化技术的组合取代服务器的角色来执行必要的计算。其结果是变分量子转向算法（VQSA），这是一种改进的可分离性测试，可以在当今可用的量子计算机上实现。然后，我们在嘈杂的量子模拟器上模拟 VQSA，并在测试的示例中发现有利的收敛特性。我们还开发了可在经典计算机上执行的半定程序，对从我们的 VQSA 获得的结果进行基准测试。因此，我们的发现在转向、纠缠、量子算法和量子计算复杂性理论之间提供了有意义的联系。他们还展示了 VQSA 中参数化中电路测量的价值。 本文提出一种基于量子steering效应的算法，用于量化量子态的纠缠程度。 Aby Philip,Soorya Rethinasamy,Vincent Russo,Mark M. Wilde quant-ph,cond-mat.stat-mech,cs.CC,cs.DS,hep-th

authors_text: Hengyuan Zhao,Hao Luo,Yuyang Zhao,Pichao Wang,Fan Wang,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Revisit Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning: A Two-Stage Paradigm
title_zh: 重新审视参数高效的迁移学习：两阶段范式
abstract: Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning (PETL) aims at efficiently adapting large models pre-trained on massive data to downstream tasks with limited task-specific data. In view of the practicality of PETL, previous works focus on tuning a small set of parameters for each downstream task in an end-to-end manner while rarely considering the task distribution shift issue between the pre-training task and the downstream task. This paper proposes a novel two-stage paradigm, where the pre-trained model is first aligned to the target distribution. Then the task-relevant information is leveraged for effective adaptation. Specifically, the first stage narrows the task distribution shift by tuning the scale and shift in the LayerNorm layers. In the second stage, to efficiently learn the task-relevant information, we propose a Taylor expansion-based importance score to identify task-relevant channels for the downstream task and then only tune such a small portion of channels, making the adaptation to be parameter-efficient. Overall, we present a promising new direction for PETL, and the proposed paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance on the average accuracy of 19 downstream tasks.
summary: Parameter-Efficient Transfer Learning (PETL) aims at efficiently adapting large models pre-trained on massive data to downstream tasks with limited task-specific data. In view of the practicality of PETL, previous works focus on tuning a small set of parameters for each downstream task in an end-to-end manner while rarely considering the task distribution shift issue between the pre-training task and the downstream task. This paper proposes a novel two-stage paradigm, where the pre-trained model is first aligned to the target distribution. Then the task-relevant information is leveraged for effective adaptation. Specifically, the first stage narrows the task distribution shift by tuning the scale and shift in the LayerNorm layers. In the second stage, to efficiently learn the task-relevant information, we propose a Taylor expansion-based importance score to identify task-relevant channels for the downstream task and then only tune such a small portion of channels, making the adaptation to be parameter-efficient. Overall, we present a promising new direction for PETL, and the proposed paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance on the average accuracy of 19 downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 参数高效迁移学习（PETL）旨在有效地将基于海量数据预训练的大型模型应用于具有有限任务特定数据的下游任务。鉴于PETL的实用性，之前的工作主要集中在以端到端的方式为每个下游任务调整一小组参数，而很少考虑预训练任务和下游任务之间的任务分配转移问题。本文提出了一种新颖的两阶段范例，其中预训练模型首先与目标分布对齐。然后利用与任务相关的信息进行有效的适应。具体来说，第一阶段通过调整 LayerNorm 层的规模和偏移来缩小任务分配偏移。在第二阶段，为了有效地学习任务相关信息，我们提出了基于泰勒展开的重要性得分来识别下游任务的任务相关通道，然后仅调整一小部分通道，从而使适应具有参数效率。总的来说，我们为 PETL 提出了一个有前途的新方向，并且所提出的范例在 19 个下游任务的平均准确度上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段参数高效迁移学习框架，通过解决预训练任务与下游任务间的分布偏移问题，提升模型在少量任务数据下的适应效果。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效迁移学习方法忽视了预训练与下游任务间的分布偏移问题，导致模型适应效果受限，需探索更有效的分布对齐与参数优化策略。
AI.method: 两阶段范式：第一阶段通过调整LayerNorm层的缩放和偏移参数实现分布对齐；第二阶段基于泰勒展开的重要性评分筛选任务相关通道，仅微调少量关键参数以提升效率。
AI.result: 在19个下游任务中达到最先进的平均准确率，验证了所提方法在参数效率与适应性能上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段范式为参数高效迁移学习提供了新方向，通过分布对齐与通道选择有效缓解了分布偏移问题，实现了参数高效且性能优越的模型适应。

authors_text: Chenshuang Zhang,Chaoning Zhang,Mengchun Zhang,In So Kweon,Junmo Kim
title: Text-to-image Diffusion Models in Generative AI: A Survey
title_zh: 生成人工智能中的文本到图像扩散模型：一项调查
comment: First survey on the recent progress of text-to-image generation based on the diffusion model
comments: First survey on the recent progress of text-to-image generation based on the diffusion model
abstract: This survey reviews the progress of diffusion models in generating images from text, ~\textit{i.e.} text-to-image diffusion models. As a self-contained work, this survey starts with a brief introduction of how diffusion models work for image synthesis, followed by the background for text-conditioned image synthesis. Based on that, we present an organized review of pioneering methods and their improvements on text-to-image generation. We further summarize applications beyond image generation, such as text-guided generation for various modalities like videos, and text-guided image editing. Beyond the progress made so far, we discuss existing challenges and promising future directions.
summary: This survey reviews the progress of diffusion models in generating images from text, ~\textit{i.e.} text-to-image diffusion models. As a self-contained work, this survey starts with a brief introduction of how diffusion models work for image synthesis, followed by the background for text-conditioned image synthesis. Based on that, we present an organized review of pioneering methods and their improvements on text-to-image generation. We further summarize applications beyond image generation, such as text-guided generation for various modalities like videos, and text-guided image editing. Beyond the progress made so far, we discuss existing challenges and promising future directions.
abstract_zh: 本次调查回顾了扩散模型在从文本生成图像方面的进展，~\textit{i.e.} 文本到图像扩散模型。作为一项独立的工作，本综述首先简要介绍扩散模型如何用于图像合成，然后介绍文本条件图像合成的背景。在此基础上，我们对开创性方法及其在文本到图像生成方面的改进进行了有组织的回顾。我们进一步总结了图像生成之外的应用，例如视频等各种模式的文本引导生成以及文本引导图像编辑。除了迄今为止取得的进展之外，我们还讨论了现有的挑战和有希望的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了文本到图像扩散模型在生成式AI领域的研究进展，涵盖方法、应用及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 系统梳理文本到图像生成技术的发展脉络，帮助研究者把握核心方法、应用场景及待解决问题。
AI.method: 通过分类整理开创性方法及改进方案，总结多模态应用案例，并分析当前技术瓶颈与未来方向。
AI.result: 全面覆盖扩散模型原理、文本条件生成技术、跨模态应用（如视频生成）及图像编辑等方向的最新成果。
AI.conclusion: 尽管文本到图像生成取得显著进展，但模型效率、可控性及多模态融合仍是亟待突破的关键问题。

authors_text: Xuenan Xu,Zhiling Zhang,Zelin Zhou,Pingyue Zhang,Zeyu Xie,Mengyue Wu,Kenny Q. Zhu
title: BLAT: Bootstrapping Language-Audio Pre-training based on AudioSet Tag-guided Synthetic Data
title_zh: BLAT：基于 AudioSet 标签引导合成数据的引导语言音频预训练
abstract: Compared with ample visual-text pre-training research, few works explore audio-text pre-training, mostly due to the lack of sufficient parallel audio-text data. Most existing methods incorporate the visual modality as a pivot for audio-text pre-training, which inevitably induces data noise. In this paper, we propose to utilize audio captioning to generate text directly from audio, without the aid of the visual modality so that potential noise from modality mismatch is eliminated. Furthermore, we propose caption generation under the guidance of AudioSet tags, leading to more accurate captions. With the above two improvements, we curate high-quality, large-scale parallel audio-text data, based on which we perform audio-text pre-training. We comprehensively demonstrate the performance of the pre-trained model on a series of downstream audio-related tasks, including single-modality tasks like audio classification and tagging, as well as cross-modal tasks consisting of audio-text retrieval and audio-based text generation. Experimental results indicate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot classification performance on most datasets, suggesting the effectiveness of our synthetic data. The audio encoder also serves as an efficient pattern recognition model by fine-tuning it on audio-related tasks. Synthetic data and pre-trained models are available online.
summary: Compared with ample visual-text pre-training research, few works explore audio-text pre-training, mostly due to the lack of sufficient parallel audio-text data. Most existing methods incorporate the visual modality as a pivot for audio-text pre-training, which inevitably induces data noise. In this paper, we propose to utilize audio captioning to generate text directly from audio, without the aid of the visual modality so that potential noise from modality mismatch is eliminated. Furthermore, we propose caption generation under the guidance of AudioSet tags, leading to more accurate captions. With the above two improvements, we curate high-quality, large-scale parallel audio-text data, based on which we perform audio-text pre-training. We comprehensively demonstrate the performance of the pre-trained model on a series of downstream audio-related tasks, including single-modality tasks like audio classification and tagging, as well as cross-modal tasks consisting of audio-text retrieval and audio-based text generation. Experimental results indicate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot classification performance on most datasets, suggesting the effectiveness of our synthetic data. The audio encoder also serves as an efficient pattern recognition model by fine-tuning it on audio-related tasks. Synthetic data and pre-trained models are available online.
abstract_zh: 与大量的视觉文本预训练研究相比，很少有研究探索音频文本预训练，这主要是由于缺乏足够的并行音频文本数据。大多数现有方法将视觉模态作为音频文本预训练的枢纽，这不可避免地会引起数据噪声。在本文中，我们建议利用音频字幕直接从音频生成文本，而不借助视觉模态，从而消除模态不匹配带来的潜在噪声。此外，我们建议在 AudioSet 标签的指导下生成字幕，从而产生更准确的字幕。通过上述两项改进，我们获得了高质量、大规模的并行音频文本数据，并在此基础上进行音频文本预训练。我们全面展示了预训练模型在一系列下游音频相关任务上的性能，包括音频分类和标记等单模态任务，以及音频文本检索和基于音频的文本生成等跨模态任务。实验结果表明，我们的方法在大多数数据集上实现了最先进的零样本分类性能，这表明我们的合成数据的有效性。音频编码器还可以通过在音频相关任务上进行微调来充当有效的模式识别模型。综合数据和预训练模型可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BLAT方法，通过AudioSet标签引导的音频字幕生成技术，构建高质量音频-文本平行数据并进行预训练，提升音频相关任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-文本预训练方法依赖视觉模态作为桥梁，导致模态不匹配噪声。直接从音频生成文本可避免此问题，但需解决字幕准确性不足的挑战。
AI.method: 1) 直接基于音频生成文本，消除视觉模态噪声；2) 利用AudioSet标签指导字幕生成提升准确性；3) 构建大规模平行数据进行音频-文本预训练。
AI.result: 在音频分类、跨模态检索等任务中取得SOTA零样本分类性能，音频编码器在微调后展现高效模式识别能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于标签引导的合成数据有效提升预训练模型性能，为音频-文本理解提供新思路，相关资源已开源。

search_text: BLAT: Bootstrapping Language-Audio Pre-training based on AudioSet Tag-guided Synthetic Data BLAT：基于 AudioSet 标签引导合成数据的引导语言音频预训练 Compared with ample visual-text pre-training research, few works explore audio-text pre-training, mostly due to the lack of sufficient parallel audio-text data. Most existing methods incorporate the visual modality as a pivot for audio-text pre-training, which inevitably induces data noise. In this paper, we propose to utilize audio captioning to generate text directly from audio, without the aid of the visual modality so that potential noise from modality mismatch is eliminated. Furthermore, we propose caption generation under the guidance of AudioSet tags, leading to more accurate captions. With the above two improvements, we curate high-quality, large-scale parallel audio-text data, based on which we perform audio-text pre-training. We comprehensively demonstrate the performance of the pre-trained model on a series of downstream audio-related tasks, including single-modality tasks like audio classification and tagging, as well as cross-modal tasks consisting of audio-text retrieval and audio-based text generation. Experimental results indicate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot classification performance on most datasets, suggesting the effectiveness of our synthetic data. The audio encoder also serves as an efficient pattern recognition model by fine-tuning it on audio-related tasks. Synthetic data and pre-trained models are available online. 与大量的视觉文本预训练研究相比，很少有研究探索音频文本预训练，这主要是由于缺乏足够的并行音频文本数据。大多数现有方法将视觉模态作为音频文本预训练的枢纽，这不可避免地会引起数据噪声。在本文中，我们建议利用音频字幕直接从音频生成文本，而不借助视觉模态，从而消除模态不匹配带来的潜在噪声。此外，我们建议在 AudioSet 标签的指导下生成字幕，从而产生更准确的字幕。通过上述两项改进，我们获得了高质量、大规模的并行音频文本数据，并在此基础上进行音频文本预训练。我们全面展示了预训练模型在一系列下游音频相关任务上的性能，包括音频分类和标记等单模态任务，以及音频文本检索和基于音频的文本生成等跨模态任务。实验结果表明，我们的方法在大多数数据集上实现了最先进的零样本分类性能，这表明我们的合成数据的有效性。音频编码器还可以通过在音频相关任务上进行微调来充当有效的模式识别模型。综合数据和预训练模型可在线获取。 本文提出BLAT方法，通过AudioSet标签引导的音频字幕生成技术，构建高质量音频-文本平行数据并进行预训练，提升音频相关任务的性能。 Xuenan Xu,Zhiling Zhang,Zelin Zhou,Pingyue Zhang,Zeyu Xie,Mengyue Wu,Kenny Q. authors_text: Pascal Peter
title: Generalised Scale-Space Properties for Probabilistic Diffusion Models
title_zh: 概率扩散模型的广义尺度空间属性
comment: ef:In L. Calatroni, M. Donatelli, S. Morigi, M. Prato, M. Santavesaria (Eds.): Scale Space and Variational Methods in Computer Vision. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Vol. 14009, Springer, Cham, 601-613, 2023
comments: ef:In L. Calatroni, M. Donatelli, S. Morigi, M. Prato, M. Santavesaria (Eds.): Scale Space and Variational Methods in Computer Vision. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, Vol. 14009, Springer, Cham, 601-613, 2023
abstract: Probabilistic diffusion models enjoy increasing popularity in the deep learning community. They generate convincing samples from a learned distribution of input images with a wide field of practical applications. Originally, these approaches were motivated from drift-diffusion processes, but these origins find less attention in recent, practice-oriented publications. We investigate probabilistic diffusion models from the viewpoint of scale-space research and show that they fulfil generalised scale-space properties on evolving probability distributions. Moreover, we discuss similarities and differences between interpretations of the physical core concept of drift-diffusion in the deep learning and model-based world. To this end, we examine relations of probabilistic diffusion to osmosis filters.
summary: Probabilistic diffusion models enjoy increasing popularity in the deep learning community. They generate convincing samples from a learned distribution of input images with a wide field of practical applications. Originally, these approaches were motivated from drift-diffusion processes, but these origins find less attention in recent, practice-oriented publications. We investigate probabilistic diffusion models from the viewpoint of scale-space research and show that they fulfil generalised scale-space properties on evolving probability distributions. Moreover, we discuss similarities and differences between interpretations of the physical core concept of drift-diffusion in the deep learning and model-based world. To this end, we examine relations of probabilistic diffusion to osmosis filters.
abstract_zh: 概率扩散模型在深度学习社区中越来越受欢迎。他们从学习的输入图像分布中生成令人信服的样本，具有广泛的实际应用领域。最初，这些方法是由漂移扩散过程激发的，但在最近以实践为导向的出版物中，这些起源很少受到关注。我们从尺度空间研究的角度研究概率扩散模型，并表明它们满足演化概率分布的广义尺度空间特性。此外，我们还讨论了深度学习和基于模型的世界中漂移扩散的物理核心概念的解释之间的异同。为此，我们研究了概率扩散与渗透过滤器的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文从尺度空间理论角度分析概率扩散模型，证明其满足广义尺度空间属性，并探讨其与物理漂移-扩散过程的关联。
AI.motivation: 概率扩散模型虽应用广泛，但其理论根源（漂移-扩散过程）在近期研究中被忽视，需重新建立理论联系以深化理解。
AI.method: 通过尺度空间理论框架分析概率扩散模型的演化过程，比较其与渗透过滤器的数学关系，并对比深度学习与物理模型中漂移-扩散概念的异同。
AI.result: 证明概率扩散模型在概率分布演化中满足广义尺度空间属性，揭示了深度学习与物理模型对漂移-扩散解释的相似性与差异性。
AI.conclusion: 概率扩散模型具有可解释的尺度空间特性，这为模型分析提供了新视角，并强调了跨学科理论融合的重要性。

authors_text: Nico Reski,Aris Alissandrakis,Andreas Kerren
title: User Preferences of Spatio-Temporal Referencing Approaches For Immersive 3D Radar Charts
title_zh: 沉浸式 3D 雷达图时空参考方法的用户偏好
abstract: The use of head-mounted display technologies for virtual reality experiences is inherently single-user-centred, allowing for the visual immersion of its user in the computer-generated environment. This isolates them from their physical surroundings, effectively preventing external visual information cues, such as the pointing and referral to an artifact by another user. However, such input is important and desired in collaborative scenarios when exploring and analyzing data in virtual environments together with a peer. In this article, we investigate different designs for making spatio-temporal references, i.e., visually highlighting virtual data artifacts, within the context of Collaborative Immersive Analytics. The ability to make references to data is foundational for collaboration, affecting aspects such as awareness, attention, and common ground. Based on three design options, we implemented a variety of approaches to make spatial and temporal references in an immersive virtual reality environment that featured abstract visualization of spatio-temporal data as 3D Radar Charts. We conducted a user study (n=12) to empirically evaluate aspects such as aesthetic appeal, legibility, and general user preference. The results indicate a unified favour for the presented location approach as a spatial reference while revealing trends towards a preference of mixed temporal reference approaches dependent on the task configuration: pointer for elementary, and outline for synoptic references. Based on immersive data visualization complexity as well as task reference configuration, we argue that it can be beneficial to explore multiple reference approaches as collaborative information cues, as opposed to following a rather uniform user interface design.
summary: The use of head-mounted display technologies for virtual reality experiences is inherently single-user-centred, allowing for the visual immersion of its user in the computer-generated environment. This isolates them from their physical surroundings, effectively preventing external visual information cues, such as the pointing and referral to an artifact by another user. However, such input is important and desired in collaborative scenarios when exploring and analyzing data in virtual environments together with a peer. In this article, we investigate different designs for making spatio-temporal references, i.e., visually highlighting virtual data artifacts, within the context of Collaborative Immersive Analytics. The ability to make references to data is foundational for collaboration, affecting aspects such as awareness, attention, and common ground. Based on three design options, we implemented a variety of approaches to make spatial and temporal references in an immersive virtual reality environment that featured abstract visualization of spatio-temporal data as 3D Radar Charts. We conducted a user study (n=12) to empirically evaluate aspects such as aesthetic appeal, legibility, and general user preference. The results indicate a unified favour for the presented location approach as a spatial reference while revealing trends towards a preference of mixed temporal reference approaches dependent on the task configuration: pointer for elementary, and outline for synoptic references. Based on immersive data visualization complexity as well as task reference configuration, we argue that it can be beneficial to explore multiple reference approaches as collaborative information cues, as opposed to following a rather uniform user interface design.
abstract_zh: 使用头戴式显示技术进行虚拟现实体验本质上是以单用户为中心的，允许用户在计算机生成的环境中视觉沉浸。这将它们与物理环境隔离开来，有效地防止外部视觉信息提示，例如其他用户指向和引用工件。然而，当与同伴一起探索和分析虚拟环境中的数据时，这种输入在协作场景中非常重要并且是必需的。在本文中，我们研究了用于制作时空参考的不同设计，即在协作沉浸式分析的背景下直观地突出显示虚拟数据工件。引用数据的能力是协作的基础，影响意识、注意力和共同点等方面。基于三种设计选项，我们实施了多种方法，在沉浸式虚拟现实环境中进行空间和时间参考，该环境以 3D 雷达图的形式对时空数据进行抽象可视化。我们进行了一项用户研究 (n=12)，以实证评估美学吸引力、易读性和一般用户偏好等方面。结果表明，人们普遍倾向于将所提出的位置方法作为空间参考，同时揭示了依赖于任务配置的混合时间参考方法的偏好趋势：基本指针和概要参考。基于沉浸式数据可视化的复杂性以及任务参考配置，我们认为探索多种参考方法作为协作信息线索可能是有益的，而不是遵循相当统一的用户界面设计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究用户在协作沉浸式分析场景中对不同时空引用方法（如3D雷达图的可视化设计）的偏好。
AI.motivation: 传统VR技术单用户特性限制了协作场景中用户间通过视觉线索（如指针、参照物）进行数据交互与沟通的效率，需探索更有效的时空引用设计以支持协作分析。
AI.method: 提出三种设计选项，实现空间与时间引用的多种方法，在沉浸式VR环境中通过抽象的3D雷达图可视化时空数据，并基于12名用户的实验评估美学、可读性与偏好。
AI.result: 用户统一偏好空间引用的定位方法，时间引用则因任务类型呈现差异：基础任务倾向指针式，综合任务倾向轮廓式。
AI.conclusion: 应根据沉浸式可视化复杂度与任务需求，灵活采用混合引用方法而非统一UI设计，以提升协作信息传递效率。
