search_text: User Preferences of Spatio-Temporal Referencing Approaches For Immersive 3D Radar Charts 沉浸式 3D 雷达图时空参考方法的用户偏好 The use of head-mounted display technologies for virtual reality experiences is inherently single-user-centred, allowing for the visual immersion of its user in the computer-generated environment. This isolates them from their physical surroundings, effectively preventing external visual information cues, such as the pointing and referral to an artifact by another user. However, such input is important and desired in collaborative scenarios when exploring and analyzing data in virtual environments together with a peer. In this article, we investigate different designs for making spatio-temporal references, i.e., visually highlighting virtual data artifacts, within the context of Collaborative Immersive Analytics. The ability to make references to data is foundational for collaboration, affecting aspects such as awareness, attention, and common ground. Based on three design options, we implemented a variety of approaches to make spatial and temporal references in an immersive virtual reality environment that featured abstract visualization of spatio-temporal data as 3D Radar Charts. We conducted a user study (n=12) to empirically evaluate aspects such as aesthetic appeal, legibility, and general user preference. The results indicate a unified favour for the presented location approach as a spatial reference while revealing trends towards a preference of mixed temporal reference approaches dependent on the task configuration: pointer for elementary, and outline for synoptic references. Based on immersive data visualization complexity as well as task reference configuration, we argue that it can be beneficial to explore multiple reference approaches as collaborative information cues, as opposed to following a rather uniform user interface design. 使用头戴式显示技术进行虚拟现实体验本质上是以单用户为中心的，允许用户在计算机生成的环境中视觉沉浸。这将它们与物理环境隔离开来，有效地防止外部视觉信息提示，例如其他用户指向和引用工件。然而，当与同伴一起探索和分析虚拟环境中的数据时，这种输入在协作场景中非常重要并且是必需的。在本文中，我们研究了用于制作时空参考的不同设计，即在协作沉浸式分析的背景下直观地突出显示虚拟数据工件。引用数据的能力是协作的基础，影响意识、注意力和共同点等方面。基于三种设计选项，我们实施了多种方法，在沉浸式虚拟现实环境中进行空间和时间参考，该环境以 3D 雷达图的形式对时空数据进行抽象可视化。我们进行了一项用户研究 (n=12)，以实证评估美学吸引力、易读性和一般用户偏好等方面。结果表明，人们普遍倾向于将所提出的位置方法作为空间参考，同时揭示了依赖于任务配置的混合时间参考方法的偏好趋势：基本指针和概要参考。基于沉浸式数据可视化的复杂性以及任务参考配置，我们认为探索多种参考方法作为协作信息线索可能是有益的，而不是遵循相当统一的用户界面设计。 本文研究用户在协作沉浸式分析场景中对不同时空引用方法（如3D雷达图的可视化设计）的偏好。 Nico Reski,Aris Alissandrakis,Andreas Kerren cs.HC

authors_text: Erik Ostrowski,Muhammad Shafique
title: ISLE: A Framework for Image Level Semantic Segmentation Ensemble
title_zh: ISLE：图像级语义分割集成框架
comment: Accepted for Publication at the International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC), October 2023, Lake Tahoe, NV, USA
comments: Accepted for Publication at the International Symposium on Visual Computing (ISVC), October 2023, Lake Tahoe, NV, USA
abstract: One key bottleneck of employing state-of-the-art semantic segmentation networks in the real world is the availability of training labels. Conventional semantic segmentation networks require massive pixel-wise annotated labels to reach state-of-the-art prediction quality. Hence, several works focus on semantic segmentation networks trained with only image-level annotations. However, when scrutinizing the results of state-of-the-art in more detail, we notice that they are remarkably close to each other on average prediction quality, different approaches perform better in different classes while providing low quality in others. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework, ISLE, which employs an ensemble of the "pseudo-labels" for a given set of different semantic segmentation techniques on a class-wise level. Pseudo-labels are the pixel-wise predictions of the image-level semantic segmentation frameworks used to train the final segmentation model. Our pseudo-labels seamlessly combine the strong points of multiple segmentation techniques approaches to reach superior prediction quality. We reach up to 2.4% improvement over ISLE's individual components. An exhaustive analysis was performed to demonstrate ISLE's effectiveness over state-of-the-art frameworks for image-level semantic segmentation.
summary: One key bottleneck of employing state-of-the-art semantic segmentation networks in the real world is the availability of training labels. Conventional semantic segmentation networks require massive pixel-wise annotated labels to reach state-of-the-art prediction quality. Hence, several works focus on semantic segmentation networks trained with only image-level annotations. However, when scrutinizing the results of state-of-the-art in more detail, we notice that they are remarkably close to each other on average prediction quality, different approaches perform better in different classes while providing low quality in others. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework, ISLE, which employs an ensemble of the "pseudo-labels" for a given set of different semantic segmentation techniques on a class-wise level. Pseudo-labels are the pixel-wise predictions of the image-level semantic segmentation frameworks used to train the final segmentation model. Our pseudo-labels seamlessly combine the strong points of multiple segmentation techniques approaches to reach superior prediction quality. We reach up to 2.4% improvement over ISLE's individual components. An exhaustive analysis was performed to demonstrate ISLE's effectiveness over state-of-the-art frameworks for image-level semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界中使用最先进的语义分割网络的一个关键瓶颈是训练标签的可用性。传统的语义分割网络需要大量的像素级注释标签才能达到最先进的预测质量。因此，一些工作专注于仅使用图像级注释训练的语义分割网络。然而，当更详细地审查最先进的结果时，我们注意到它们在平均预测质量上非常接近，不同的方法在不同的类别中表现更好，而在其他类别中提供较低的质量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个新颖的框架，ISLE，它在类级别上针对给定的一组不同语义分割技术采用“伪标签”集合。伪标签是用于训练最终分割模型的图像级语义分割框架的像素级预测。我们的伪标签无缝地结合了多种分割技术方法的优点，以达到卓越的预测质量。与 ISLE 的各个组件相比，我们的性能提高了 2.4%。我们进行了详尽的分析，以证明 ISLE 相对于最先进的图像级语义分割框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ISLE框架，通过集成多种图像级语义分割方法的伪标签，解决像素级标注不足导致的分割效果不均衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割模型依赖大量像素级标注，而基于图像级标注的方法在不同类别上表现差异大，限制了整体性能。
AI.method: ISLE框架在类级别上集成多个分割模型生成的伪标签，通过组合不同模型的优势提升预测质量。
AI.result: ISLE在多个基准数据集上较单一模型提升2.4%，并通过实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ISLE通过多模型伪标签集成有效提升了图像级语义分割性能，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Roman Korkin,Ivan Oseledets,Aleksandr Katrutsa
title: Multiparticle Kalman filter for object localization in symmetric environments
title_zh: 用于对称环境中对象定位的多粒子卡尔曼滤波器
abstract: This study considers the object localization problem and proposes a novel multiparticle Kalman filter to solve it in complex and symmetric environments. Two well-known classes of filtering algorithms to solve the localization problem are Kalman filter-based methods and particle filter-based methods. We consider these classes, demonstrate their complementary properties, and propose a novel filtering algorithm that takes the best from two classes. We evaluate the multiparticle Kalman filter in symmetric and noisy environments. Such environments are especially challenging for both classes of classical methods. We compare the proposed approach with the particle filter since only this method is feasible if the initial state is unknown. In the considered challenging environments, our method outperforms the particle filter in terms of both localization error and runtime.
summary: This study considers the object localization problem and proposes a novel multiparticle Kalman filter to solve it in complex and symmetric environments. Two well-known classes of filtering algorithms to solve the localization problem are Kalman filter-based methods and particle filter-based methods. We consider these classes, demonstrate their complementary properties, and propose a novel filtering algorithm that takes the best from two classes. We evaluate the multiparticle Kalman filter in symmetric and noisy environments. Such environments are especially challenging for both classes of classical methods. We compare the proposed approach with the particle filter since only this method is feasible if the initial state is unknown. In the considered challenging environments, our method outperforms the particle filter in terms of both localization error and runtime.
abstract_zh: 本研究考虑了对象定位问题，并提出了一种新颖的多粒子卡尔曼滤波器来解决复杂和对称环境中的问题。解决定位问题的两类著名的滤波算法是基于卡尔曼滤波器的方法和基于粒子滤波器的方法。我们考虑这些类别，展示它们的互补特性，并提出一种新颖的过滤算法，该算法充分利用了两个类别的优点。我们在对称和噪声环境中评估多粒子卡尔曼滤波器。对于这两类经典方法来说，这样的环境尤其具有挑战性。我们将所提出的方法与粒子滤波器进行比较，因为如果初始状态未知，则只有此方法可行。在考虑到的具有挑战性的环境中，我们的方法在定位误差和运行时间方面都优于粒子滤波器。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多粒子卡尔曼滤波器，用于在复杂对称环境中提高目标定位的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统卡尔曼滤波和粒子滤波在复杂对称环境中存在局限性，需结合两者优势以提高定位精度和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 融合卡尔曼滤波与粒子滤波的优势，设计多粒子卡尔曼滤波器，以提升对称及噪声环境下的定位性能。
AI.result: 在对称噪声环境中，该方法在定位误差和运行时间上均优于传统粒子滤波器，尤其在初始状态未知时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 多粒子卡尔曼滤波器有效结合两种方法优势，解决了对称复杂环境下的目标定位难题，优于现有方法。

We evaluate the multiparticle Kalman filter in symmetric and noisy environments. Such environments are especially challenging for both classes of classical methods. In the considered challenging environments, our method outperforms the particle filter in terms of both localization error and runtime. 本研究考虑了对象定位问题，并提出了一种新颖的多粒子卡尔曼滤波器来解决复杂和对称环境中的问题。解决定位问题的两类著名的滤波算法是基于卡尔曼滤波器的方法和基于粒子滤波器的方法。我们考虑这些类别，展示它们的互补特性，并提出一种新颖的过滤算法，该算法充分利用了两个类别的优点。我们在对称和噪声环境中评估多粒子卡尔曼滤波器。对于这两类经典方法来说，这样的环境尤其具有挑战性。我们将所提出的方法与粒子滤波器进行比较，因为如果初始状态未知，则只有此方法可行。在考虑到的具有挑战性的环境中，我们的方法在定位误差和运行时间方面都优于粒子滤波器。 提出一种多粒子卡尔曼滤波器，用于在复杂对称环境中提高目标定位的准确性与效率。 Roman Korkin,Ivan Oseledets,Aleksandr Katrutsa cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Erik Ostrowski,Bharath Srinivas Prabakaran,Muhammad Shafique
title: Exploring Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation Ensembles for Medical Imaging Systems
title_zh: 探索医疗成像系统的弱监督语义分割集成
abstract: Reliable classification and detection of certain medical conditions, in images, with state-of-the-art semantic segmentation networks, require vast amounts of pixel-wise annotation. However, the public availability of such datasets is minimal. Therefore, semantic segmentation with image-level labels presents a promising alternative to this problem. Nevertheless, very few works have focused on evaluating this technique and its applicability to the medical sector. Due to their complexity and the small number of training examples in medical datasets, classifier-based weakly supervised networks like class activation maps (CAMs) struggle to extract useful information from them. However, most state-of-the-art approaches rely on them to achieve their improvements. Therefore, we propose a framework that can still utilize the low-quality CAM predictions of complicated datasets to improve the accuracy of our results. Our framework achieves that by first utilizing lower threshold CAMs to cover the target object with high certainty; second, by combining multiple low-threshold CAMs that even out their errors while highlighting the target object. We performed exhaustive experiments on the popular multi-modal BRATS and prostate DECATHLON segmentation challenge datasets. Using the proposed framework, we have demonstrated an improved dice score of up to 8% on BRATS and 6% on DECATHLON datasets compared to the previous state-of-the-art.

However, the public availability of such datasets is minimal. Therefore, semantic segmentation with image-level labels presents a promising alternative to this problem. Nevertheless, very few works have focused on evaluating this technique and its applicability to the medical sector. Due to their complexity and the small number of training examples in medical datasets, classifier-based weakly supervised networks like class activation maps (CAMs) struggle to extract useful information from them. However, most state-of-the-art approaches rely on them to achieve their improvements. Therefore, we propose a framework that can still utilize the low-quality CAM predictions of complicated datasets to improve the accuracy of our results. Our framework achieves that by first utilizing lower threshold CAMs to cover the target object with high certainty; second, by combining multiple low-threshold CAMs that even out their errors while highlighting the target object. We performed exhaustive experiments on the popular multi-modal BRATS and prostate DECATHLON segmentation challenge datasets. Using the proposed framework, we have demonstrated an improved dice score of up to 8% on BRATS and 6% on DECATHLON datasets compared to the previous state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 使用最先进的语义分割网络对图像中的某些医疗状况进行可靠的分类和检测需要大量的像素级注释。然而，此类数据集的公开可用性很少。因此，具有图像级标签的语义分割为该问题提供了一个有前途的替代方案。然而，很少有工作关注评估这项技术及其在医疗领域的适用性。由于医学数据集中的复杂性和训练示例数量较少，基于分类器的弱监督网络（例如类激活图（CAM））很难从中提取有用的信息。然而，大多数最先进的方法都依赖它们来实现改进。因此，我们提出了一个框架，仍然可以利用复杂数据集的低质量 CAM 预测来提高结果的准确性。我们的框架通过首先利用较低阈值的 CAM 高度确定地覆盖目标对象来实现这一目标；其次，通过组合多个低阈值 CAM，在突出显示目标对象的同时消除它们的错误。我们对流行的多模态 BRATS 和前列腺 DECATHLON 分割挑战数据集进行了详尽的实验。使用所提出的框架，我们证明了与之前最先进的技术相比，在 BRATS 上的骰子得分提高了 8%，在 DECATHLON 数据集上的骰子得分提高了 6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督语义分割集成框架，用于解决医学影像中像素级标注数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学影像分割需要大量像素级标注数据，但公开数据集稀缺，且现有基于分类器的弱监督方法（如CAM）在医学数据上效果有限。
AI.method: 框架分两步：首先利用低阈值CAM覆盖目标区域，其次通过融合多个低阈值CAM减少误差并突出目标。
AI.result: 在BRATS和DECATHLON数据集上，Dice分数分别提升8%和6%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效利用低质量CAM预测，提升了医学影像分割的准确性，为弱监督医学分割提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Erik Ostrowski,Bharath Srinivas Prabakaran,Muhammad Shafique
title: SILOP: An Automated Framework for Semantic Segmentation Using Image Labels Based on Object Perimeters
title_zh: SILOP：使用基于对象周长的图像标签进行语义分割的自动化框架
comment: Accepted for Publication at the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN), July 2023, Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia
comments: Accepted for Publication at the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN), July 2023, Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia
abstract: Achieving high-quality semantic segmentation predictions using only image-level labels enables a new level of real-world applicability. Although state-of-the-art networks deliver reliable predictions, the amount of handcrafted pixel-wise annotations to enable these results are not feasible in many real-world applications. Hence, several works have already targeted this bottleneck, using classifier-based networks like Class Activation Maps~\cite{CAM} (CAMs) as a base. Addressing CAM's weaknesses of fuzzy borders and incomplete predictions, state-of-the-art approaches rely only on adding regulations to the classifier loss or using pixel-similarity-based refinement after the fact. We propose a framework that introduces an additional module using object perimeters for improved saliency. We define object perimeter information as the line separating the object and background. Our new PerimeterFit module will be applied to pre-refine the CAM predictions before using the pixel-similarity-based network. In this way, our PerimeterFit increases the quality of the CAM prediction while simultaneously improving the false negative rate. We investigated a wide range of state-of-the-art unsupervised semantic segmentation networks and edge detection techniques to create useful perimeter maps, which enable our framework to predict object locations with sharper perimeters. We achieved up to 1.5% improvement over frameworks without our PerimeterFit module. We conduct an exhaustive analysis to illustrate that SILOP enhances existing state-of-the-art frameworks for image-level-based semantic segmentation. The framework is open-source and accessible online at https://github.com/ErikOstrowski/SILOP.
summary: Achieving high-quality semantic segmentation predictions using only image-level labels enables a new level of real-world applicability. Although state-of-the-art networks deliver reliable predictions, the amount of handcrafted pixel-wise annotations to enable these results are not feasible in many real-world applications. Hence, several works have already targeted this bottleneck, using classifier-based networks like Class Activation Maps~\cite{CAM} (CAMs) as a base. Addressing CAM's weaknesses of fuzzy borders and incomplete predictions, state-of-the-art approaches rely only on adding regulations to the classifier loss or using pixel-similarity-based refinement after the fact. We propose a framework that introduces an additional module using object perimeters for improved saliency. We define object perimeter information as the line separating the object and background. Our new PerimeterFit module will be applied to pre-refine the CAM predictions before using the pixel-similarity-based network. In this way, our PerimeterFit increases the quality of the CAM prediction while simultaneously improving the false negative rate. We investigated a wide range of state-of-the-art unsupervised semantic segmentation networks and edge detection techniques to create useful perimeter maps, which enable our framework to predict object locations with sharper perimeters. We achieved up to 1.5% improvement over frameworks without our PerimeterFit module. We conduct an exhaustive analysis to illustrate that SILOP enhances existing state-of-the-art frameworks for image-level-based semantic segmentation. The framework is open-source and accessible online at https://github.com/ErikOstrowski/SILOP.
abstract_zh: 仅使用图像级标签实现高质量的语义分割预测可以将现实世界的适用性提升到一个新的水平。尽管最先进的网络可以提供可靠的预测，但在许多实际应用中，用于实现这些结果的手工像素级注释的数量是不可行的。因此，一些工作已经针对这个瓶颈，使用基于分类器的网络，如类激活映射〜\cite{CAM}（CAM）作为基础。为了解决 CAM 模糊边界和不完整预测的弱点，最先进的方法仅依赖于对分类器损失添加规则或事后使用基于像素相似性的细化。我们提出了一个框架，引入了一个使用对象周界的附加模块来提高显着性。我们将对象周长信息定义为分隔对象和背景的线。我们的新 PerimeterFit 模块将用于在使用基于像素相似性的网络之前预先细化 CAM 预测。通过这种方式，我们的 PerimeterFit 提高了 CAM 预测的质量，同时提高了漏报率。我们研究了各种最先进的无监督语义分割网络和边缘检测技术来创建有用的周界图，这使我们的框架能够预测具有更清晰周界的对象位置。与没有 PerimeterFit 模块的框架相比，我们实现了高达 1.5% 的改进。我们进行了详尽的分析，以说明 SILOP 增强了现有的基于图像级语义分割的最先进框架。该框架是开源的，可以通过 https://github.com/ErikOstrowski/SILOP 在线访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SILOP框架，通过利用对象轮廓信息提升基于图像级标签的语义分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分类激活图（CAM）的方法存在边界模糊和预测不完整的问题，传统改进方法仅依赖损失函数调节或后处理优化，难以有效提升分割质量。
AI.method: 引入PerimeterFit模块，利用对象轮廓线（区分物体与背景的边界）预处理CAM预测结果，并结合像素相似性网络进行优化，通过多种边缘检测技术生成轮廓图。
AI.result: 在多个先进框架上实现最高1.5%的性能提升，实验验证了SILOP对现有方法的有效增强。
AI.conclusion: SILOP通过对象轮廓信息优化语义分割，显著提升图像级标签下的分割精度，框架已开源。

authors_text: Yukai Ju,Jun Chen,Shimin Zhang,Shulin He,Wei Rao,Weixin Zhu,Yannan Wang,Tao Yu,Shidong Shang
title: TEA-PSE 3.0: Tencent-Ethereal-Audio-Lab Personalized Speech Enhancement System For ICASSP 2023 DNS Challenge
title_zh: TEA-PSE 3.0：腾讯-Ethereal-Audio-Lab个性化语音增强系统应对ICASSP 2023 DNS挑战赛
abstract: This paper introduces the Unbeatable Team's submission to the ICASSP 2023 Deep Noise Suppression (DNS) Challenge. We expand our previous work, TEA-PSE, to its upgraded version -- TEA-PSE 3.0. Specifically, TEA-PSE 3.0 incorporates a residual LSTM after squeezed temporal convolution network (S-TCN) to enhance sequence modeling capabilities. Additionally, the local-global representation (LGR) structure is introduced to boost speaker information extraction, and multi-STFT resolution loss is used to effectively capture the time-frequency characteristics of the speech signals. Moreover, retraining methods are employed based on the freeze training strategy to fine-tune the system. According to the official results, TEA-PSE 3.0 ranks 1st in both ICASSP 2023 DNS-Challenge track 1 and track 2.

Moreover, retraining methods are employed based on the freeze training strategy to fine-tune the system. abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Unbeatable 团队提交的 ICASSP 2023 深度噪声抑制 (DNS) 挑战赛。我们将之前的工作 TEA-PSE 扩展到其升级版本——TEA-PSE 3.0。具体来说，TEA-PSE 3.0在压缩时间卷积网络（S-TCN）后结合了残差LSTM，以增强序列建模能力。此外，引入局部全局表示（LGR）结构来促进说话人信息提取，并利用多重STFT分辨率损失来有效捕获语音信号的时频特征。此外，基于冻结训练策略采用再训练方法来微调系统。根据官方结果，TEA-PSE 3.0 在 ICASSP 2023 DNS-Challenge track 1 和 track 2 中均排名第一。

AI.motivation: 在原有TEA-PSE基础上优化模型结构，提升语音增强效果以应对复杂噪声环境下的个性化语音恢复需求。

AI.result: 在ICASSP 2023 DNS挑战赛Track 1和Track 2中均获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模块协同优化和训练策略改进，TEA-PSE 3.0显著提升了个性化语音增强性能。

authors_text: Junjie Ni,Yijin Li,Zhaoyang Huang,Hongsheng Li,Hujun Bao,Zhaopeng Cui,Guofeng Zhang
title: PATS: Patch Area Transportation with Subdivision for Local Feature Matching
title_zh: PATS：通过细分进行局部特征匹配的补丁区域交通
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/pats
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/pats
abstract: Local feature matching aims at establishing sparse correspondences between a pair of images. Recently, detector-free methods present generally better performance but are not satisfactory in image pairs with large scale differences. In this paper, we propose Patch Area Transportation with Subdivision (PATS) to tackle this issue. Instead of building an expensive image pyramid, we start by splitting the original image pair into equal-sized patches and gradually resizing and subdividing them into smaller patches with the same scale. However, estimating scale differences between these patches is non-trivial since the scale differences are determined by both relative camera poses and scene structures, and thus spatially varying over image pairs. Moreover, it is hard to obtain the ground truth for real scenes. To this end, we propose patch area transportation, which enables learning scale differences in a self-supervised manner. In contrast to bipartite graph matching, which only handles one-to-one matching, our patch area transportation can deal with many-to-many relationships. PATS improves both matching accuracy and coverage, and shows superior performance in downstream tasks, such as relative pose estimation, visual localization, and optical flow estimation. The source code is available at \url{https://zju3dv.github.io/pats/}.

Moreover, it is hard to obtain the ground truth for real scenes. To this end, we propose patch area transportation, which enables learning scale differences in a self-supervised manner. In contrast to bipartite graph matching, which only handles one-to-one matching, our patch area transportation can deal with many-to-many relationships. PATS improves both matching accuracy and coverage, and shows superior performance in downstream tasks, such as relative pose estimation, visual localization, and optical flow estimation. The source code is available at \url{https://zju3dv.github.io/pats/}.
abstract_zh: 局部特征匹配旨在建立一对图像之间的稀疏对应关系。最近，无检测器方法通常表现出更好的性能，但在具有大尺度差异的图像对中并不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了细分补丁区域交通（PATS）来解决这个问题。我们不是构建昂贵的图像金字塔，而是首先将原始图像对分割成大小相等的块，然后逐渐调整它们的大小并将它们细分为具有相同比例的更小的块。然而，估计这些补丁之间的尺度差异并非易事，因为尺度差异是由相对相机姿势和场景结构决定的，因此在图像对上空间变化。此外，很难获得真实场景的真实情况。为此，我们提出了斑块区域传输，它能够以自我监督的方式学习尺度差异。与仅处理一对一匹配的二分图匹配相比，我们的补丁区域传输可以处理多对多关系。 PATS 提高了匹配精度和覆盖范围，并在相对位姿估计、视觉定位和光流估计等下游任务中表现出卓越的性能。源代码可在 \url{https://zju3dv.github.io/pats/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PATS方法，通过分割和细分图像块并结合自监督学习解决局部特征匹配中大尺度差异的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无检测器方法在图像对存在大尺度差异时表现不佳，而传统方法难以处理尺度差异的时空变化性及真实场景的地面真相获取困难。
AI.method: 将图像分割为等大小块并逐步调整尺度，通过自监督的patch area transportation学习尺度差异，处理多对多匹配关系。
AI.result: 提升匹配精度和覆盖率，在相对姿态估计、视觉定位和光流估计等下游任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: PATS有效解决了尺度差异问题，通过自监督学习优化匹配性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Geumbyeol Hwang,Sunwon Hong,Seunghyun Lee,Sungwoo Park,Gyeongsu Chae
title: DisCoHead: Audio-and-Video-Driven Talking Head Generation by Disentangled Control of Head Pose and Facial Expressions
title_zh: DisCoHead：通过头部姿势和面部表情的解开控制来生成音频和视频驱动的头部说话
abstract: For realistic talking head generation, creating natural head motion while maintaining accurate lip synchronization is essential. To fulfill this challenging task, we propose DisCoHead, a novel method to disentangle and control head pose and facial expressions without supervision. DisCoHead uses a single geometric transformation as a bottleneck to isolate and extract head motion from a head-driving video. Either an affine or a thin-plate spline transformation can be used and both work well as geometric bottlenecks. We enhance the efficiency of DisCoHead by integrating a dense motion estimator and the encoder of a generator which are originally separate modules. Taking a step further, we also propose a neural mix approach where dense motion is estimated and applied implicitly by the encoder. After applying the disentangled head motion to a source identity, DisCoHead controls the mouth region according to speech audio, and it blinks eyes and moves eyebrows following a separate driving video of the eye region, via the weight modulation of convolutional neural networks. The experiments using multiple datasets show that DisCoHead successfully generates realistic audio-and-video-driven talking heads and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://deepbrainai-research.github.io/discohead/
summary: For realistic talking head generation, creating natural head motion while maintaining accurate lip synchronization is essential. To fulfill this challenging task, we propose DisCoHead, a novel method to disentangle and control head pose and facial expressions without supervision. DisCoHead uses a single geometric transformation as a bottleneck to isolate and extract head motion from a head-driving video. Either an affine or a thin-plate spline transformation can be used and both work well as geometric bottlenecks. We enhance the efficiency of DisCoHead by integrating a dense motion estimator and the encoder of a generator which are originally separate modules. Taking a step further, we also propose a neural mix approach where dense motion is estimated and applied implicitly by the encoder. After applying the disentangled head motion to a source identity, DisCoHead controls the mouth region according to speech audio, and it blinks eyes and moves eyebrows following a separate driving video of the eye region, via the weight modulation of convolutional neural networks. The experiments using multiple datasets show that DisCoHead successfully generates realistic audio-and-video-driven talking heads and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://deepbrainai-research.github.io/discohead/
abstract_zh: 为了生成逼真的头部说话，在保持准确的嘴唇同步的同时创建自然的头部运动至关重要。为了完成这项具有挑战性的任务，我们提出了 DisCoHead，这是一种无需监督即可解开和控制头部姿势和面部表情的新颖方法。 DisCoHead 使用单个几何变换作为瓶颈，从头部驱动视频中分离和提取头部运动。可以使用仿射变换或薄板样条变换，并且两者都可以很好地作为几何瓶颈。我们通过集成密集运动估计器和生成器的编码器（它们原本是独立的模块）来提高 DisCoHead 的效率。更进一步，我们还提出了一种神经混合方法，其中编码器隐式地估计和应用密集运动。将解开的头部运动应用于源身份后，DisCoHead 根据语音音频控制嘴部区域，并通过卷积神经网络的权重调制，根据眼睛区域的单独驾驶视频眨眼并移动眉毛。使用多个数据集的实验表明，DisCoHead 成功生成了逼真的音频和视频驱动的说话头像，并且性能优于最先进的方法。项目页面：https://deepbrainai-research.github.io/discohead/

AI.tldr: 本文提出DisCoHead方法，通过解耦控制头部姿态和面部表情，实现音频和视频驱动的逼真说话人生成。
AI.motivation: 真实说话人生成需要自然头部运动和精确唇形同步，但现有方法难以同时满足这两个要求且缺乏无监督控制手段。
AI.method: 采用几何变换作为瓶颈分离头部运动，整合密集运动估计器和生成器编码器，通过神经混合方法隐式估计运动，并利用权重调制控制口部与眼部动作。
AI.result: 多数据集实验表明DisCoHead在生成效果上优于现有最先进的方法，能成功生成音频-视频驱动的逼真说话人。
AI.conclusion: DisCoHead通过解耦控制机制和模块整合，有效实现了无监督的音频视频驱动说话人生成，推动了该领域的发展。

search_text: DisCoHead: Audio-and-Video-Driven Talking Head Generation by Disentangled Control of Head Pose and Facial Expressions DisCoHead：通过头部姿势和面部表情的解开控制来生成音频和视频驱动的头部说话 For realistic talking head generation, creating natural head motion while maintaining accurate lip synchronization is essential. To fulfill this challenging task, we propose DisCoHead, a novel method to disentangle and control head pose and facial expressions without supervision. DisCoHead uses a single geometric transformation as a bottleneck to isolate and extract head motion from a head-driving video. Either an affine or a thin-plate spline transformation can be used and both work well as geometric bottlenecks. We enhance the efficiency of DisCoHead by integrating a dense motion estimator and the encoder of a generator which are originally separate modules. Taking a step further, we also propose a neural mix approach where dense motion is estimated and applied implicitly by the encoder. After applying the disentangled head motion to a source identity, DisCoHead controls the mouth region according to speech audio, and it blinks eyes and moves eyebrows following a separate driving video of the eye region, via the weight modulation of convolutional neural networks. The experiments using multiple datasets show that DisCoHead successfully generates realistic audio-and-video-driven talking heads and outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://deepbrainai-research.github.io/discohead/ 为了生成逼真的头部说话，在保持准确的嘴唇同步的同时创建自然的头部运动至关重要。为了完成这项具有挑战性的任务，我们提出了 DisCoHead，这是一种无需监督即可解开和控制头部姿势和面部表情的新颖方法。 DisCoHead 使用单个几何变换作为瓶颈，从头部驱动视频中分离和提取头部运动。可以使用仿射变换或薄板样条变换，并且两者都可以很好地作为几何瓶颈。我们通过集成密集运动估计器和生成器的编码器（它们原本是独立的模块）来提高 DisCoHead 的效率。更进一步，我们还提出了一种神经混合方法，其中编码器隐式地估计和应用密集运动。将解开的头部运动应用于源身份后，DisCoHead 根据语音音频控制嘴部区域，并通过卷积神经网络的权重调制，根据眼睛区域的单独驾驶视频眨眼并移动眉毛。使用多个数据集的实验表明，DisCoHead 成功生成了逼真的音频和视频驱动的说话头像，并且性能优于最先进的方法。项目页面：https://deepbrainai-research.github.io/discohead/ 本文提出DisCoHead方法，通过解耦控制头部姿态和面部表情，实现音频和视频驱动的逼真说话人生成。 Geumbyeol Hwang,Sunwon Hong,Seunghyun Lee,Sungwoo Park,Gyeongsu Chae cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Han Zheng,Xufang Luo,Pengfei Wei,Xuan Song,Dongsheng Li,Jing Jiang
title: Adaptive Policy Learning for Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 离线到在线强化学习的自适应策略学习
abstract: Conventional reinforcement learning (RL) needs an environment to collect fresh data, which is impractical when online interactions are costly. Offline RL provides an alternative solution by directly learning from the previously collected dataset. However, it will yield unsatisfactory performance if the quality of the offline datasets is poor. In this paper, we consider an offline-to-online setting where the agent is first learned from the offline dataset and then trained online, and propose a framework called Adaptive Policy Learning for effectively taking advantage of offline and online data. Specifically, we explicitly consider the difference between the online and offline data and apply an adaptive update scheme accordingly, that is, a pessimistic update strategy for the offline dataset and an optimistic/greedy update scheme for the online dataset. Such a simple and effective method provides a way to mix the offline and online RL and achieve the best of both worlds. We further provide two detailed algorithms for implementing the framework through embedding value or policy-based RL algorithms into it. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on popular continuous control tasks, and results show that our algorithm can learn the expert policy with high sample efficiency even when the quality of offline dataset is poor, e.g., random dataset.
summary: Conventional reinforcement learning (RL) needs an environment to collect fresh data, which is impractical when online interactions are costly. Offline RL provides an alternative solution by directly learning from the previously collected dataset. However, it will yield unsatisfactory performance if the quality of the offline datasets is poor. In this paper, we consider an offline-to-online setting where the agent is first learned from the offline dataset and then trained online, and propose a framework called Adaptive Policy Learning for effectively taking advantage of offline and online data. Specifically, we explicitly consider the difference between the online and offline data and apply an adaptive update scheme accordingly, that is, a pessimistic update strategy for the offline dataset and an optimistic/greedy update scheme for the online dataset. Such a simple and effective method provides a way to mix the offline and online RL and achieve the best of both worlds. We further provide two detailed algorithms for implementing the framework through embedding value or policy-based RL algorithms into it. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on popular continuous control tasks, and results show that our algorithm can learn the expert policy with high sample efficiency even when the quality of offline dataset is poor, e.g., random dataset.
abstract_zh: 传统的强化学习（RL）需要一个环境来收集新数据，当在线交互成本高昂时，这是不切实际的。离线强化学习通过直接从之前收集的数据集进行学习，提供了另一种解决方案。然而，如果离线数据集的质量较差，则其性能将无法令人满意。在本文中，我们考虑了一种离线到在线的设置，其中代理首先从离线数据集中学习，然后在线训练，并提出了一种称为自适应策略学习的框架，以有效利用离线和在线数据。具体来说，我们明确考虑在线和离线数据之间的差异，并相应地应用自适应更新方案，即离线数据集的悲观更新策略和在线数据集的乐观/贪婪更新策略。这种简单而有效的方法提供了一种混合离线和在线强化学习并实现两全其美的方法。我们进一步提供了两种详细的算法，通过将价值或基于策略的 RL 算法嵌入其中来实现该框架。最后，我们对流行的连续控制任务进行了广泛的实验，结果表明，即使离线数据集的质量较差（例如随机数据集），我们的算法也可以以高样本效率学习专家策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为自适应策略学习的框架，用于在离线到在线的强化学习设置中有效结合离线数据和在线数据。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖在线交互数据，成本高昂；离线强化学习在数据质量差时表现不佳。本文旨在解决离线数据质量差和在线数据利用不足的矛盾。
AI.method: 通过显式区分在线与离线数据，采用悲观更新策略处理离线数据，乐观/贪婪策略处理在线数据，并嵌入值函数或策略梯度算法实现框架。
AI.result: 在连续控制任务中，即使离线数据质量差（如随机数据），算法仍能高效学习专家策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应策略有效融合离线与在线数据，在数据质量受限时仍能保持高样本效率。

Specifically, we explicitly consider the difference between the online and offline data and apply an adaptive update scheme accordingly, that is, a pessimistic update strategy for the offline dataset and an optimistic/greedy update scheme for the online dataset. Such a simple and effective method provides a way to mix the offline and online RL and achieve the best of both worlds. authors_text: Mengfei Ye
title: Dual-Attention Model for Aspect-Level Sentiment Classification
title_zh: 方面级情感分类的双注意力模型
abstract: I propose a novel dual-attention model(DAM) for aspect-level sentiment classification. Many methods have been proposed, such as support vector machines for artificial design features, long short-term memory networks based on attention mechanisms, and graph neural networks based on dependency parsing. While these methods all have decent performance, I think they all miss one important piece of syntactic information: dependency labels. Based on this idea, this paper proposes a model using dependency labels for the attention mechanism to do this task. We evaluate the proposed approach on three datasets: laptop and restaurant are from SemEval 2014, and the last one is a twitter dataset. Experimental results show that the dual attention model has good performance on all three datasets.
summary: I propose a novel dual-attention model(DAM) for aspect-level sentiment classification. Many methods have been proposed, such as support vector machines for artificial design features, long short-term memory networks based on attention mechanisms, and graph neural networks based on dependency parsing. While these methods all have decent performance, I think they all miss one important piece of syntactic information: dependency labels. Based on this idea, this paper proposes a model using dependency labels for the attention mechanism to do this task. We evaluate the proposed approach on three datasets: laptop and restaurant are from SemEval 2014, and the last one is a twitter dataset. Experimental results show that the dual attention model has good performance on all three datasets.
abstract_zh: 我提出了一种新颖的双注意力模型（DAM），用于方面级别的情感分类。人们提出了许多方法，例如用于人工设计特征的支持向量机、基于注意力机制的长短期记忆网络、基于依赖解析的图神经网络。虽然这些方法都有不错的性能，但我认为它们都错过了一项重要的语法信息：依赖标签。基于这个想法，本文提出了一种使用依赖标签的注意力机制模型来完成这项任务。我们在三个数据集上评估所提出的方法：笔记本电脑和餐厅来自 SemEval 2014，最后一个是 Twitter 数据集。实验结果表明，双重注意力模型在所有三个数据集上都有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于依存标签的双注意力模型（DAM），用于改进方面级情感分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如SVM、LSTM和图神经网络在方面级情感分类中表现良好，但忽略了依存标签这一关键句法信息。
AI.method: 设计结合依存标签的双注意力机制，通过捕捉句法结构与语义关系提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在SemEval 2014的laptop、restaurant数据集和twitter数据集上均取得良好效果。
AI.conclusion: 双注意力模型通过引入依存标签有效提升了方面级情感分类的准确性，验证了句法信息的重要性。

authors_text: Xulong Zhang,Haobin Tang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jian Luo,Jing Xiao
title: Dynamic Alignment Mask CTC: Improved Mask-CTC with Aligned Cross Entropy
title_zh: 动态对齐掩模 CTC：具有对齐交叉熵的改进掩模-CTC
abstract: Because of predicting all the target tokens in parallel, the non-autoregressive models greatly improve the decoding efficiency of speech recognition compared with traditional autoregressive models. In this work, we present dynamic alignment Mask CTC, introducing two methods: (1) Aligned Cross Entropy (AXE), finding the monotonic alignment that minimizes the cross-entropy loss through dynamic programming, (2) Dynamic Rectification, creating new training samples by replacing some masks with model predicted tokens. The AXE ignores the absolute position alignment between prediction and ground truth sentence and focuses on tokens matching in relative order. The dynamic rectification method makes the model capable of simulating the non-mask but possible wrong tokens, even if they have high confidence. Our experiments on WSJ dataset demonstrated that not only AXE loss but also the rectification method could improve the WER performance of Mask CTC.
summary: Because of predicting all the target tokens in parallel, the non-autoregressive models greatly improve the decoding efficiency of speech recognition compared with traditional autoregressive models. In this work, we present dynamic alignment Mask CTC, introducing two methods: (1) Aligned Cross Entropy (AXE), finding the monotonic alignment that minimizes the cross-entropy loss through dynamic programming, (2) Dynamic Rectification, creating new training samples by replacing some masks with model predicted tokens. The AXE ignores the absolute position alignment between prediction and ground truth sentence and focuses on tokens matching in relative order. The dynamic rectification method makes the model capable of simulating the non-mask but possible wrong tokens, even if they have high confidence. Our experiments on WSJ dataset demonstrated that not only AXE loss but also the rectification method could improve the WER performance of Mask CTC.
abstract_zh: 由于并行预测所有目标标记，非自回归模型与传统自回归模型相比大大提高了语音识别的解码效率。在这项工作中，我们提出了动态对齐Mask CTC，介绍了两种方法：（1）对齐交叉熵（AXE），通过动态编程找到最小化交叉熵损失的单调对齐，（2）动态整流，通过用模型预测标记替换一些掩模来创建新的训练样本。 AX 忽略预测和真实句子之间的绝对位置对齐，并专注于相对顺序的标记匹配。动态校正方法使模型能够模拟非掩码但可能错误的标记，即使它们具有很高的置信度。我们在 WSJ 数据集上的实验表明，不仅 AX 损失而且校正方法都可以提高 Mask CTC 的 WER 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态对齐Mask CTC方法，通过改进Mask-CTC模型提升语音识别的词错误率（WER）性能。
AI.motivation: 非自回归模型相比传统自回归模型能显著提升语音识别解码效率，但现有Mask-CTC方法在对齐精度和错误修正能力上仍有不足。
AI.method: 引入两种方法：(1) 通过动态规划寻找最小交叉熵损失的单调对齐方式的对齐交叉熵（AXE）；(2) 动态校正方法，通过替换部分掩码为模型预测的高置信度错误词生成新训练样本。
AI.result: 在WSJ数据集实验中，AXE损失函数与动态校正方法均有效提升了Mask-CTC的WER表现。
AI.conclusion: AXE和动态校正方法共同作用可增强Mask-CTC模型对相对顺序匹配的建模能力及错误预测的修正能力。

search_text: Dynamic Alignment Mask CTC: Improved Mask-CTC with Aligned Cross Entropy 动态对齐掩模 CTC：具有对齐交叉熵的改进掩模-CTC Because of predicting all the target tokens in parallel, the non-autoregressive models greatly improve the decoding efficiency of speech recognition compared with traditional autoregressive models. In this work, we present dynamic alignment Mask CTC, introducing two methods: (1) Aligned Cross Entropy (AXE), finding the monotonic alignment that minimizes the cross-entropy loss through dynamic programming, (2) Dynamic Rectification, creating new training samples by replacing some masks with model predicted tokens. The AXE ignores the absolute position alignment between prediction and ground truth sentence and focuses on tokens matching in relative order. The dynamic rectification method makes the model capable of simulating the non-mask but possible wrong tokens, even if they have high confidence. Our experiments on WSJ dataset demonstrated that not only AXE loss but also the rectification method could improve the WER performance of Mask CTC. 由于并行预测所有目标标记，非自回归模型与传统自回归模型相比大大提高了语音识别的解码效率。在这项工作中，我们提出了动态对齐Mask CTC，介绍了两种方法：（1）对齐交叉熵（AXE），通过动态编程找到最小化交叉熵损失的单调对齐，（2）动态整流，通过用模型预测标记替换一些掩模来创建新的训练样本。 AX 忽略预测和真实句子之间的绝对位置对齐，并专注于相对顺序的标记匹配。动态校正方法使模型能够模拟非掩码但可能错误的标记，即使它们具有很高的置信度。我们在 WSJ 数据集上的实验表明，不仅 AX 损失而且校正方法都可以提高 Mask CTC 的 WER 性能。 本文提出动态对齐Mask CTC方法，通过改进Mask-CTC模型提升语音识别的词错误率（WER）性能。 Xulong Zhang,Haobin Tang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jian Luo,Jing Xiao cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Junhao Zhang,Junjie Tang,Juncheng Jin,Zehui Qu
title: FPTN: Fast Pure Transformer Network for Traffic Flow Forecasting
title_zh: FPTN：用于交通流预测的快速纯变压器网络
abstract: Traffic flow forecasting is challenging due to the intricate spatio-temporal correlations in traffic flow data. Existing Transformer-based methods usually treat traffic flow forecasting as multivariate time series (MTS) forecasting. However, too many sensors can cause a vector with a dimension greater than 800, which is difficult to process without information loss. In addition, these methods design complex mechanisms to capture spatial dependencies in MTS, resulting in slow forecasting speed. To solve the abovementioned problems, we propose a Fast Pure Transformer Network (FPTN) in this paper. First, the traffic flow data are divided into sequences along the sensor dimension instead of the time dimension. Then, to adequately represent complex spatio-temporal correlations, Three types of embeddings are proposed for projecting these vectors into a suitable vector space. After that, to capture the complex spatio-temporal correlations simultaneously in these vectors, we utilize Transformer encoder and stack it with several layers. Extensive experiments are conducted with 4 real-world datasets and 13 baselines, which demonstrate that FPTN outperforms the state-of-the-art on two metrics. Meanwhile, the computational time of FPTN spent is less than a quarter of other state-of-the-art Transformer-based models spent, and the requirements for computing resources are significantly reduced.
summary: Traffic flow forecasting is challenging due to the intricate spatio-temporal correlations in traffic flow data. Existing Transformer-based methods usually treat traffic flow forecasting as multivariate time series (MTS) forecasting. However, too many sensors can cause a vector with a dimension greater than 800, which is difficult to process without information loss. In addition, these methods design complex mechanisms to capture spatial dependencies in MTS, resulting in slow forecasting speed. To solve the abovementioned problems, we propose a Fast Pure Transformer Network (FPTN) in this paper. First, the traffic flow data are divided into sequences along the sensor dimension instead of the time dimension. Then, to adequately represent complex spatio-temporal correlations, Three types of embeddings are proposed for projecting these vectors into a suitable vector space. After that, to capture the complex spatio-temporal correlations simultaneously in these vectors, we utilize Transformer encoder and stack it with several layers. Extensive experiments are conducted with 4 real-world datasets and 13 baselines, which demonstrate that FPTN outperforms the state-of-the-art on two metrics. Meanwhile, the computational time of FPTN spent is less than a quarter of other state-of-the-art Transformer-based models spent, and the requirements for computing resources are significantly reduced.
abstract_zh: 由于交通流数据中复杂的时空相关性，交通流预测具有挑战性。现有的基于 Transformer 的方法通常将交通流预测视为多元时间序列 (MTS) 预测。然而，太多的传感器会导致维度大于800的向量，很难在不丢失信息的情况下进行处理。此外，这些方法设计了复杂的机制来捕获MTS中的空间依赖性，导致预测速度缓慢。为了解决上述问题，我们在本文中提出了一种快速纯变压器网络（FPTN）。首先，将交通流数据沿着传感器维度而不是时间维度划分为序列。然后，为了充分表示复杂的时空相关性，提出了三种类型的嵌入来将这些向量投影到合适的向量空间中。之后，为了同时捕获这些向量中复杂的时空相关性，我们利用 Transformer 编码器并将其堆叠多个层。使用 4 个真实世界数据集和 13 个基线进行了广泛的实验，这表明 FPTN 在两个指标上优于最先进的技术。同时，FPTN 所花费的计算时间不到其他最先进的基于 Transformer 的模型所花费的四分之一，并且对计算资源的要求显着降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FPTN的快速纯Transformer网络，用于解决交通流量预测中的高维数据处理和计算效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在处理高维传感器数据时存在信息丢失和计算速度慢的问题，需设计更高效模型以捕捉复杂的时空关联。
AI.method: 将交通数据按传感器维度分序列，提出三种嵌入方法投影向量，并通过堆叠Transformer编码器同时捕捉时空相关性。
AI.result: 在四个真实数据集上，FPTN在两个指标上优于现有方法，计算时间仅为其他模型的四分之一，资源需求显著降低。
AI.conclusion: FPTN通过优化数据处理和模型结构，在保持预测精度的同时大幅提升计算效率，适用于实际交通流量预测场景。

authors_text: Haobin Tang,Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao
title: QI-TTS: Questioning Intonation Control for Emotional Speech Synthesis
title_zh: QI-TTS：质疑情感语音合成的语调控制
abstract: Recent expressive text to speech (TTS) models focus on synthesizing emotional speech, but some fine-grained styles such as intonation are neglected. In this paper, we propose QI-TTS which aims to better transfer and control intonation to further deliver the speaker's questioning intention while transferring emotion from reference speech. We propose a multi-style extractor to extract style embedding from two different levels. While the sentence level represents emotion, the final syllable level represents intonation. For fine-grained intonation control, we use relative attributes to represent intonation intensity at the syllable level.Experiments have validated the effectiveness of QI-TTS for improving intonation expressiveness in emotional speech synthesis.
summary: Recent expressive text to speech (TTS) models focus on synthesizing emotional speech, but some fine-grained styles such as intonation are neglected. In this paper, we propose QI-TTS which aims to better transfer and control intonation to further deliver the speaker's questioning intention while transferring emotion from reference speech. We propose a multi-style extractor to extract style embedding from two different levels. While the sentence level represents emotion, the final syllable level represents intonation. For fine-grained intonation control, we use relative attributes to represent intonation intensity at the syllable level.Experiments have validated the effectiveness of QI-TTS for improving intonation expressiveness in emotional speech synthesis.
abstract_zh: 最近的表达性文本转语音（TTS）模型专注于合成情感语音，但忽略了一些细粒度的风格，例如语调。在本文中，我们提出了QI-TTS，旨在更好地传递和控制语调，以进一步传达说话者的提问意图，同时传递参考语音的情感。我们提出了一种多样式提取器来从两个不同级别提取样式嵌入。句子级别代表情感，而最终音节级别代表语调。为了进行细粒度的语调控制，我们使用相关属性来表示音节级别的语调强度。实验验证了QI-TTS对于提高情感语音合成中的语调表现力的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QI-TTS模型，旨在通过更精细的语调控制提升情感语音合成中疑问意图的表达效果。
AI.motivation: 现有情感语音合成模型忽视了语调等细粒度风格控制，导致难以准确传递如疑问等具体意图。
AI.method: 设计多层级风格提取器，从句子层面提取情感嵌入，从音节层面提取语调嵌入，并采用相对属性表示语调强度。
AI.result: 实验验证QI-TTS有效提升了情感语音合成中语调的表现力，尤其在疑问语调的控制上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过多层级风格建模和细粒度语调控制，QI-TTS为情感语音合成提供了更自然的表达方式。

search_text: QI-TTS: Questioning Intonation Control for Emotional Speech Synthesis QI-TTS：质疑情感语音合成的语调控制 Recent expressive text to speech (TTS) models focus on synthesizing emotional speech, but some fine-grained styles such as intonation are neglected. In this paper, we propose QI-TTS which aims to better transfer and control intonation to further deliver the speaker's questioning intention while transferring emotion from reference speech. We propose a multi-style extractor to extract style embedding from two different levels. While the sentence level represents emotion, the final syllable level represents intonation. For fine-grained intonation control, we use relative attributes to represent intonation intensity at the syllable level.Experiments have validated the effectiveness of QI-TTS for improving intonation expressiveness in emotional speech synthesis. 最近的表达性文本转语音（TTS）模型专注于合成情感语音，但忽略了一些细粒度的风格，例如语调。在本文中，我们提出了QI-TTS，旨在更好地传递和控制语调，以进一步传达说话者的提问意图，同时传递参考语音的情感。我们提出了一种多样式提取器来从两个不同级别提取样式嵌入。句子级别代表情感，而最终音节级别代表语调。为了进行细粒度的语调控制，我们使用相关属性来表示音节级别的语调强度。实验验证了QI-TTS对于提高情感语音合成中的语调表现力的有效性。 本文提出QI-TTS模型，旨在通过更精细的语调控制提升情感语音合成中疑问意图的表达效果。 Haobin Tang,Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Takumi Harada,Hiroyuki Sakai
title: Feature representations useful for predicting image memorability
title_zh: 可用于预测图像记忆性的特征表示
abstract: Prediction of image memorability has attracted interest in various fields. Consequently, the prediction accuracy of convolutional neural network (CNN) models has been approaching the empirical upper bound estimated based on human consistency. However, identifying which feature representations embedded in CNN models are responsible for the high memorability prediction accuracy remains an open question. To tackle this problem, we sought to identify memorability-related feature representations in CNN models using brain similarity. Specifically, memorability prediction accuracy and brain similarity were examined across 16,860 layers in 64 CNN models pretrained for object recognition. A clear tendency was observed in this comprehensive analysis that layers with high memorability prediction accuracy had higher brain similarity with the inferior temporal (IT) cortex, which is the highest stage in the ventral visual pathway. Furthermore, fine-tuning of the 64 CNN models for memorability prediction revealed that brain similarity with the IT cortex at the penultimate layer positively correlated with the memorability prediction accuracy of the models. This analysis also showed that the best fine-tuned model provided accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art CNN models developed for memorability prediction. Overall, the results of this study indicated that the CNN models' great success in predicting memorability relies on feature representation acquisition, similar to the IT cortex. This study advances our understanding of feature representations and their use in predicting image memorability.

abstract_zh: 图像记忆力的预测引起了各个领域的兴趣。因此，卷积神经网络（CNN）模型的预测精度已经接近基于人类一致性估计的经验上限。然而，确定 CNN 模型中嵌入的哪些特征表示对高记忆性预测精度负责仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们试图利用大脑相似性来识别 CNN 模型中与记忆相关的特征表示。具体来说，我们在 64 个针对对象识别进行预训练的 CNN 模型中的 16,860 个层中检查了记忆预测准确性和大脑相似性。在这项综合分析中观察到一个明显的趋势，即记忆预测准确度高的层与下颞叶（IT）皮层（腹侧视觉通路的最高阶段）的大脑相似性较高。此外，对 64 个用于记忆预测的 CNN 模型进行微调表明，大脑与倒数第二层 IT 皮层的相似性与模型记忆预测的准确性呈正相关。该分析还表明，最佳微调模型的准确性可与用于记忆预测的最先进 CNN 模型相媲美。总的来说，这项研究的结果表明，CNN 模型在预测记忆力方面的巨大成功依赖于特征表示的获取，类似于 IT 皮层。这项研究增进了我们对特征表示及其在预测图像记忆性中的应用的理解。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在识别卷积神经网络（CNN）模型中与图像记忆预测相关的特征表示。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在图像记忆预测中表现优异，但其成功依赖的具体特征表示尚不明确，需探索与人类大脑相似性相关的特征。
AI.method: 通过分析64个预训练CNN模型的16,860层，结合大脑相似性（特别是颞下皮层IT区）评估记忆预测准确性，并进行模型微调验证。
AI.result: 高记忆预测准确率的CNN层与IT皮层大脑相似性显著相关，微调后模型的IT皮层相似性与准确率正相关，最佳模型性能达现有最优水平。
AI.conclusion: CNN在记忆预测中的成功源于类似IT皮层的特征表示，揭示了深度学习模型与人类视觉系统在特征提取上的共性。

authors_text: Hui Tang,Yao Lu,Qi Xuan
title: SR-init: An interpretable layer pruning method
title_zh: SR-init：一种可解释的层剪枝方法
abstract: Despite the popularization of deep neural networks (DNNs) in many fields, it is still challenging to deploy state-of-the-art models to resource-constrained devices due to high computational overhead. Model pruning provides a feasible solution to the aforementioned challenges. However, the interpretation of existing pruning criteria is always overlooked. To counter this issue, we propose a novel layer pruning method by exploring the Stochastic Re-initialization. Our SR-init method is inspired by the discovery that the accuracy drop due to stochastic re-initialization of layer parameters differs in various layers. On the basis of this observation, we come up with a layer pruning criterion, i.e., those layers that are not sensitive to stochastic re-initialization (low accuracy drop) produce less contribution to the model and could be pruned with acceptable loss. Afterward, we experimentally verify the interpretability of SR-init via feature visualization. The visual explanation demonstrates that SR-init is theoretically feasible, thus we compare it with state-of-the-art methods to further evaluate its practicability. As for ResNet56 on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, SR-init achieves a great reduction in parameters (63.98% and 37.71%) with an ignorable drop in top-1 accuracy (-0.56% and 0.8%). With ResNet50 on ImageNet, we achieve a 15.59% FLOPs reduction by removing 39.29% of the parameters, with only a drop of 0.6% in top-1 accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/huitang-zjut/SR-init.
summary: Despite the popularization of deep neural networks (DNNs) in many fields, it is still challenging to deploy state-of-the-art models to resource-constrained devices due to high computational overhead. Model pruning provides a feasible solution to the aforementioned challenges. However, the interpretation of existing pruning criteria is always overlooked. To counter this issue, we propose a novel layer pruning method by exploring the Stochastic Re-initialization. Our SR-init method is inspired by the discovery that the accuracy drop due to stochastic re-initialization of layer parameters differs in various layers. On the basis of this observation, we come up with a layer pruning criterion, i.e., those layers that are not sensitive to stochastic re-initialization (low accuracy drop) produce less contribution to the model and could be pruned with acceptable loss. Afterward, we experimentally verify the interpretability of SR-init via feature visualization. The visual explanation demonstrates that SR-init is theoretically feasible, thus we compare it with state-of-the-art methods to further evaluate its practicability. As for ResNet56 on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, SR-init achieves a great reduction in parameters (63.98% and 37.71%) with an ignorable drop in top-1 accuracy (-0.56% and 0.8%). With ResNet50 on ImageNet, we achieve a 15.59% FLOPs reduction by removing 39.29% of the parameters, with only a drop of 0.6% in top-1 accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/huitang-zjut/SR-init.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在许多领域得到普及，但由于计算开销较高，将最先进的模型部署到资源受限的设备上仍然具有挑战性。模型剪枝为上述挑战提供了可行的解决方案。然而，对现有修剪标准的解释总是被忽视。为了解决这个问题，我们通过探索随机重新初始化提出了一种新颖的层剪枝方法。我们的 SR-init 方法的灵感来自于这样一个发现：由于层参数的随机重新初始化而导致的精度下降在各个层中是不同的。基于这一观察，我们提出了一个层剪枝标准，即那些对随机重新初始化（低精度下降）不敏感的层对模型的贡献较小，并且可以以可接受的损失进行剪枝。随后，我们通过特征可视化实验验证了 SR-init 的可解释性。可视化解释表明 SR-init 在理论上是可行的，因此我们将其与最先进的方法进行比较，以进一步评估其实用性。对于 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的 ResNet56，SR-init 实现了参数的大幅减少（63.98% 和 37.71%），同时 top-1 精度的下降可忽略不计（-0.56% 和 0.8%）。使用 ImageNet 上的 ResNet50，我们通过删除 39.29% 的参数实现了 15.59% FLOP 的减少，而 top-1 准确率仅下降了 0.6%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/huitang-zjut/SR-init 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机重初始化的可解释层剪枝方法SR-init，通过分析不同层对随机重初始化的敏感性来确定剪枝目标。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在资源受限设备上的部署面临计算开销大的挑战，现有剪枝方法缺乏可解释性，难以理解剪枝准则的理论依据。
AI.method: 通过观察随机重初始化导致不同层精度下降的差异性，提出以层对重初始化的敏感度作为剪枝标准：敏感度低的层贡献较小，可安全剪枝。结合特征可视化验证方法的可解释性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100上ResNet56参数量减少63.98%/37.71%精度仅下降0.56%/0.8%；在ImageNet上ResNet50减少39.29%参数量（15.59%FLOPs）精度下降0.6%。
AI.conclusion: SR-init通过理论可行的可解释性准则实现高效剪枝，在保持模型精度的前提下显著降低计算复杂度，验证了该方法在模型压缩中的有效性。

As for ResNet56 on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, SR-init achieves a great reduction in parameters (63.98% and 37.71%) with an ignorable drop in top-1 accuracy (-0.56% and 0.8%). With ResNet50 on ImageNet, we achieve a 15.59% FLOPs reduction by removing 39.29% of the parameters, with only a drop of 0.6% in top-1 accuracy. Our code is available at https://github.com/huitang-zjut/SR-init. 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在许多领域得到普及，但由于计算开销较高，将最先进的模型部署到资源受限的设备上仍然具有挑战性。模型剪枝为上述挑战提供了可行的解决方案。然而，对现有修剪标准的解释总是被忽视。为了解决这个问题，我们通过探索随机重新初始化提出了一种新颖的层剪枝方法。我们的 SR-init 方法的灵感来自于这样一个发现：由于层参数的随机重新初始化而导致的精度下降在各个层中是不同的。基于这一观察，我们提出了一个层剪枝标准，即那些对随机重新初始化（低精度下降）不敏感的层对模型的贡献较小，并且可以以可接受的损失进行剪枝。随后，我们通过特征可视化实验验证了 SR-init 的可解释性。可视化解释表明 SR-init 在理论上是可行的，因此我们将其与最先进的方法进行比较，以进一步评估其实用性。对于 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的 ResNet56，SR-init 实现了参数的大幅减少（63.98% 和 37.71%），同时 top-1 精度的下降可忽略不计（-0.56% 和 0.8%）。使用 ImageNet 上的 ResNet50，我们通过删除 39.29% 的参数实现了 15.59% FLOP 的减少，而 top-1 准确率仅下降了 0.6%。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/huitang-zjut/SR-init 获取。 本文提出了一种基于随机重初始化的可解释层剪枝方法SR-init，通过分析不同层对随机重初始化的敏感性来确定剪枝目标。 Hui Tang,Yao Lu,Qi Xuan cs.CV

authors_text: Tao Yang,Lisheng Wang
title: Koos Classification of Vestibular Schwannoma via Image Translation-Based Unsupervised Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 通过基于图像翻译的无监督跨模态域适应对前庭神经鞘瘤进行 Koos 分类
abstract: The Koos grading scale is a classification system for vestibular schwannoma (VS) used to characterize the tumor and its effects on adjacent brain structures. The Koos classification captures many of the characteristics of treatment deci-sions and is often used to determine treatment plans. Although both contrast-enhanced T1 (ceT1) scanning and high-resolution T2 (hrT2) scanning can be used for Koos Classification, hrT2 scanning is gaining interest because of its higher safety and cost-effectiveness. However, in the absence of annotations for hrT2 scans, deep learning methods often inevitably suffer from performance deg-radation due to unsupervised learning. If ceT1 scans and their annotations can be used for unsupervised learning of hrT2 scans, the performance of Koos classifi-cation using unlabeled hrT2 scans will be greatly improved. In this regard, we propose an unsupervised cross-modality domain adaptation method based on im-age translation by transforming annotated ceT1 scans into hrT2 modality and us-ing their annotations to achieve supervised learning of hrT2 modality. Then, the VS and 7 adjacent brain structures related to Koos classification in hrT2 scans were segmented. Finally, handcrafted features are extracted from the segmenta-tion results, and Koos grade is classified using a random forest classifier. The proposed method received rank 1 on the Koos classification task of the Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA 2022) challenge, with Macro-Averaged Mean Absolute Error (MA-MAE) of 0.2148 for the validation set and 0.26 for the test set.
summary: The Koos grading scale is a classification system for vestibular schwannoma (VS) used to characterize the tumor and its effects on adjacent brain structures. The Koos classification captures many of the characteristics of treatment deci-sions and is often used to determine treatment plans. Although both contrast-enhanced T1 (ceT1) scanning and high-resolution T2 (hrT2) scanning can be used for Koos Classification, hrT2 scanning is gaining interest because of its higher safety and cost-effectiveness. However, in the absence of annotations for hrT2 scans, deep learning methods often inevitably suffer from performance deg-radation due to unsupervised learning. If ceT1 scans and their annotations can be used for unsupervised learning of hrT2 scans, the performance of Koos classifi-cation using unlabeled hrT2 scans will be greatly improved. In this regard, we propose an unsupervised cross-modality domain adaptation method based on im-age translation by transforming annotated ceT1 scans into hrT2 modality and us-ing their annotations to achieve supervised learning of hrT2 modality. Then, the VS and 7 adjacent brain structures related to Koos classification in hrT2 scans were segmented. Finally, handcrafted features are extracted from the segmenta-tion results, and Koos grade is classified using a random forest classifier. The proposed method received rank 1 on the Koos classification task of the Cross-Modality Domain Adaptation (crossMoDA 2022) challenge, with Macro-Averaged Mean Absolute Error (MA-MAE) of 0.2148 for the validation set and 0.26 for the test set.
abstract_zh: Koos 分级量表是前庭神经鞘瘤 (VS) 的分类系统，用于表征肿瘤及其对邻近大脑结构的影响。 Koos 分类捕捉了治疗决策的许多特征，通常用于确定治疗计划。虽然对比增强 T1 (ceT1) 扫描和高分辨率 T2 (hrT2) 扫描都可用于 Koos 分类，但 hrT2 扫描因其更高的安全性和成本效益而受到关注。然而，在缺乏 hrT2 扫描注释的情况下，深度学习方法往往不可避免地会因无监督学习而遭受性能下降。如果ceT1扫描及其注释可以用于hrT2扫描的无监督学习，那么使用未标记的hrT2扫描的Koos分类性能将大大提高。在这方面，我们提出了一种基于图像翻译的无监督跨模态域适应方法，通过将带注释的 ceT1 扫描转换为 hrT2 模态，并使用它们的注释来实现 hrT2 模态的监督学习。然后，对 hrT2 扫描中与 Koos 分类相关的 VS 和 7 个相邻大脑结构进行分割。最后，从分割结果中提取手工特征，并使用随机森林分类器对 Koos 等级进行分类。所提出的方法在跨模态域适应 (crossMoDA 2022) 挑战的 Koos 分类任务中获得排名 1，验证集的宏观平均平均绝对误差 (MA-MAE) 为 0.2148，测试集为 0.26。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像翻译的无监督跨模态域适应方法，用于在无标注的高分辨率T2（hrT2）扫描下对前庭神经鞘瘤进行Koos分级。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率T2（hrT2）扫描因安全性高且成本效益好而备受关注，但缺乏标注数据导致深度学习性能下降，需利用对比增强T1（ceT1）扫描的标注信息进行无监督学习。
AI.method: 通过图像翻译将带标注的ceT1扫描转换为hrT2模态，利用其标注信息实现对hrT2模态的监督学习；分割hrT2扫描中的肿瘤及7个相关脑结构，提取手工特征并使用随机森林分类器进行Koos分级。
AI.result: 该方法在crossMoDA 2022挑战赛的Koos分类任务中排名第一，验证集和测试集的宏平均绝对误差（MA-MAE）分别为0.2148和0.26。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过跨模态域适应有效解决了hrT2扫描标注不足的问题，显著提升了无监督条件下的Koos分级性能。

authors_text: Ziyue Zhu,Zhao Zhang,Zheng Lin,Xing Sun,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Co-Salient Object Detection with Co-Representation Purification
title_zh: 具有共同表示纯化的共同显着目标检测
abstract: Co-salient object detection (Co-SOD) aims at discovering the common objects in a group of relevant images. Mining a co-representation is essential for locating co-salient objects. Unfortunately, the current Co-SOD method does not pay enough attention that the information not related to the co-salient object is included in the co-representation. Such irrelevant information in the co-representation interferes with its locating of co-salient objects. In this paper, we propose a Co-Representation Purification (CoRP) method aiming at searching noise-free co-representation. We search a few pixel-wise embeddings probably belonging to co-salient regions. These embeddings constitute our co-representation and guide our prediction. For obtaining purer co-representation, we use the prediction to iteratively reduce irrelevant embeddings in our co-representation. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our CoRP achieves state-of-the-art performances on the benchmark datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ZZY816/CoRP.
summary: Co-salient object detection (Co-SOD) aims at discovering the common objects in a group of relevant images. Mining a co-representation is essential for locating co-salient objects. Unfortunately, the current Co-SOD method does not pay enough attention that the information not related to the co-salient object is included in the co-representation. Such irrelevant information in the co-representation interferes with its locating of co-salient objects. In this paper, we propose a Co-Representation Purification (CoRP) method aiming at searching noise-free co-representation. We search a few pixel-wise embeddings probably belonging to co-salient regions. These embeddings constitute our co-representation and guide our prediction. For obtaining purer co-representation, we use the prediction to iteratively reduce irrelevant embeddings in our co-representation. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our CoRP achieves state-of-the-art performances on the benchmark datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/ZZY816/CoRP.
abstract_zh: 共同显着目标检测（Co-SOD）旨在发现一组相关图像中的共同目标。挖掘共同表示对于定位共同显着对象至关重要。不幸的是，当前的Co-SOD方法没有足够重视将与协同显着对象无关的信息包含在协同表示中。共同表示中的此类不相关信息会干扰其对共同显着对象的定位。在本文中，我们提出了一种旨在搜索无噪声协同表示的协同表示纯化（CoRP）方法。我们搜索一些可能属于共显着区域的像素级嵌入。这些嵌入构成了我们的共同表示并指导我们的预测。为了获得更纯粹的共同表示，我们使用预测来迭代地减少共同表示中不相关的嵌入。对三个数据集的实验表明，我们的 CoRP 在基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/ZZY816/CoRP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CoRP的共表示净化方法，用于提升多图像组中共同显著物体检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有共显著物体检测方法未能有效剔除共表示中的无关信息，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 通过迭代筛选像素级嵌入，构建纯净共表示并指导预测，逐步去除无关嵌入以优化表示质量。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，源代码已开源至GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 共表示净化能有效提升多图像共同显著物体检测效果，为相关研究提供新思路。

ai_content.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到最先进性能，源代码已开源至GitHub。
ai_content.conclusion: 共表示净化能有效提升多图像共同显著物体检测效果，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Tong Hua,Tao Li,Ling Pei
title: PIEKF-VIWO: Visual-Inertial-Wheel Odometry using Partial Invariant Extended Kalman Filter
title_zh: PIEKF-VIWO：使用部分不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器的视觉惯性轮里程计
abstract: Invariant Extended Kalman Filter (IEKF) has been successfully applied in Visual-inertial Odometry (VIO) as an advanced achievement of Kalman filter, showing great potential in sensor fusion. In this paper, we propose partial IEKF (PIEKF), which only incorporates rotation-velocity state into the Lie group structure and apply it for Visual-Inertial-Wheel Odometry (VIWO) to improve positioning accuracy and consistency. Specifically, we derive the rotation-velocity measurement model, which combines wheel measurements with kinematic constraints. The model circumvents the wheel odometer's 3D integration and covariance propagation, which is essential for filter consistency. And a plane constraint is also introduced to enhance the position accuracy. A dynamic outlier detection method is adopted, leveraging the velocity state output. Through the simulation and real-world test, we validate the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms the standard Multi-State Constraint Kalman Filter (MSCKF) based VIWO in consistency and accuracy.
summary: Invariant Extended Kalman Filter (IEKF) has been successfully applied in Visual-inertial Odometry (VIO) as an advanced achievement of Kalman filter, showing great potential in sensor fusion. In this paper, we propose partial IEKF (PIEKF), which only incorporates rotation-velocity state into the Lie group structure and apply it for Visual-Inertial-Wheel Odometry (VIWO) to improve positioning accuracy and consistency. Specifically, we derive the rotation-velocity measurement model, which combines wheel measurements with kinematic constraints. The model circumvents the wheel odometer's 3D integration and covariance propagation, which is essential for filter consistency. And a plane constraint is also introduced to enhance the position accuracy. A dynamic outlier detection method is adopted, leveraging the velocity state output. Through the simulation and real-world test, we validate the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms the standard Multi-State Constraint Kalman Filter (MSCKF) based VIWO in consistency and accuracy.
abstract_zh: 不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（IEKF）作为卡尔曼滤波器的先进成果，已成功应用于视觉惯性里程计（VIO），在传感器融合方面展现出巨大的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了部分IEKF（PIEKF），它仅将旋转速度状态合并到李群结构中，并将其应用于视觉惯性轮里程计（VIWO）以提高定位精度和一致性。具体来说，我们推导了旋转速度测量模型，它将车轮测量与运动学约束相结合。该模型规避了车轮里程计的 3D 积分和协方差传播，这对于滤波器的一致性至关重要。并且还引入平面约束来提高位置精度。采用动态异常值检测方法，利用速度状态输出。通过仿真和实际测试，我们验证了该方法的有效性，该方法在一致性和准确性方面优于基于标准多状态约束卡尔曼滤波器（MSCKF）的 VIWO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（PIEKF）的视觉惯性轮式里程计（VIWO）方法，旨在提高定位精度和一致性。
AI.motivation: 传统轮式里程计存在3D积分和协方差传播问题，而现有IEKF方法在VIWO中的应用仍有改进空间，需通过优化状态表示和约束条件提升性能。
AI.method: 设计部分不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（PIEKF），仅将旋转-速度状态纳入李群结构；推导融合轮式测量与运动学约束的旋转-速度观测模型；引入平面约束增强定位精度，并采用动态异常值检测方法。
AI.result: 仿真与实际测试表明，该方法在一致性与定位精度上优于基于多状态约束卡尔曼滤波器（MSCKF）的VIWO方法。
AI.conclusion: PIEKF-VIWO通过优化状态建模与约束机制，有效提升了视觉-惯性-轮式里程计的定位性能，为多传感器融合提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ganghui Ru,Xulong Zhang,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao
title: Improving Music Genre Classification from Multi-Modal Properties of Music and Genre Correlations Perspective
title_zh: 从音乐的多模态属性和流派相关性的角度改进音乐流派分类
abstract: Music genre classification has been widely studied in past few years for its various applications in music information retrieval. Previous works tend to perform unsatisfactorily, since those methods only use audio content or jointly use audio content and lyrics content inefficiently. In addition, as genres normally co-occur in a music track, it is desirable to capture and model the genre correlations to improve the performance of multi-label music genre classification. To solve these issues, we present a novel multi-modal method leveraging audio-lyrics contrastive loss and two symmetric cross-modal attention, to align and fuse features from audio and lyrics. Furthermore, based on the nature of the multi-label classification, a genre correlations extraction module is presented to capture and model potential genre correlations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method significantly surpasses other multi-label music genre classification methods and achieves state-of-the-art result on Music4All dataset.
summary: Music genre classification has been widely studied in past few years for its various applications in music information retrieval. Previous works tend to perform unsatisfactorily, since those methods only use audio content or jointly use audio content and lyrics content inefficiently. In addition, as genres normally co-occur in a music track, it is desirable to capture and model the genre correlations to improve the performance of multi-label music genre classification. To solve these issues, we present a novel multi-modal method leveraging audio-lyrics contrastive loss and two symmetric cross-modal attention, to align and fuse features from audio and lyrics. Furthermore, based on the nature of the multi-label classification, a genre correlations extraction module is presented to capture and model potential genre correlations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method significantly surpasses other multi-label music genre classification methods and achieves state-of-the-art result on Music4All dataset.
abstract_zh: 音乐流派分类因其在音乐信息检索中的各种应用而在过去几年中得到了广泛的研究。以前的作品往往表现不令人满意，因为那些方法仅使用音频内容或联合使用音频内容和歌词内容，效率低下。此外，由于流派通常同时出现在音乐曲目中，因此需要捕获流派相关性并对其进行建模，以提高多标签音乐流派分类的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态方法，利用音频歌词对比损失和两个对称的跨模态注意力来对齐和融合音频和歌词的特征。此外，基于多标签分类的性质，提出了流派相关性提取模块来捕获和建模潜在的流派相关性。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法显着优于其他多标签音乐流派分类方法，并在 Music4All 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态方法，通过结合音频和歌词信息并建模音乐流派间的相关性，改进多标签音乐流派分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理音乐流派分类时，要么仅使用音频信息，要么未能有效融合音频与歌词信息，且忽视了流派间的共现关系，导致分类效果不理想。
AI.method: 设计了音频-歌词对比损失和对称跨模态注意力机制以对齐融合多模态特征，并引入流派相关性提取模块建模潜在流派关联。
AI.result: 在Music4All数据集上，该方法显著优于其他多标签音乐流派分类方法，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效融合多模态信息并建模流派相关性，所提方法显著提升了多标签音乐流派分类的准确率。

authors_text: Alexandra Dana,Nadav Carmel,Amit Shomer,Ofer Manela,Tomer Peleg
title: Do More With What You Have: Transferring Depth-Scale from Labeled to Unlabeled Domains
title_zh: 利用现有资源做更多事情：将深度尺度从标记域转移到未标记域
abstract: Transferring the absolute depth prediction capabilities of an estimator to a new domain is a task with significant real-world applications. This task is specifically challenging when images from the new domain are collected without ground-truth depth measurements, and possibly with sensors of different intrinsics. To overcome such limitations, a recent zero-shot solution was trained on an extensive training dataset and encoded the various camera intrinsics. Other solutions generated synthetic data with depth labels that matched the intrinsics of the new target data to enable depth-scale transfer between the domains. In this work we present an alternative solution that can utilize any existing synthetic or real dataset, that has a small number of images annotated with ground truth depth labels. Specifically, we show that self-supervised depth estimators result in up-to-scale predictions that are linearly correlated to their absolute depth values across the domain, a property that we model in this work using a single scalar. In addition, aligning the field-of-view of two datasets prior to training, results in a common linear relationship for both domains. We use this observed property to transfer the depth-scale from source datasets that have absolute depth labels to new target datasets that lack these measurements, enabling absolute depth predictions in the target domain. The suggested method was successfully demonstrated on the KITTI, DDAD and nuScenes datasets, while using other existing real or synthetic source datasets, that have a different field-of-view, other image style or structural content, achieving comparable or better accuracy than other existing methods that do not use target ground-truth depths.
summary: Transferring the absolute depth prediction capabilities of an estimator to a new domain is a task with significant real-world applications. This task is specifically challenging when images from the new domain are collected without ground-truth depth measurements, and possibly with sensors of different intrinsics. To overcome such limitations, a recent zero-shot solution was trained on an extensive training dataset and encoded the various camera intrinsics. Other solutions generated synthetic data with depth labels that matched the intrinsics of the new target data to enable depth-scale transfer between the domains. In this work we present an alternative solution that can utilize any existing synthetic or real dataset, that has a small number of images annotated with ground truth depth labels. Specifically, we show that self-supervised depth estimators result in up-to-scale predictions that are linearly correlated to their absolute depth values across the domain, a property that we model in this work using a single scalar. In addition, aligning the field-of-view of two datasets prior to training, results in a common linear relationship for both domains. We use this observed property to transfer the depth-scale from source datasets that have absolute depth labels to new target datasets that lack these measurements, enabling absolute depth predictions in the target domain. The suggested method was successfully demonstrated on the KITTI, DDAD and nuScenes datasets, while using other existing real or synthetic source datasets, that have a different field-of-view, other image style or structural content, achieving comparable or better accuracy than other existing methods that do not use target ground-truth depths.
abstract_zh: 将估计器的绝对深度预测能力转移到新领域是一项具有重要现实应用的任务。当收集来自新领域的图像时没有地面实况深度测量，并且可能使用不同本征的传感器时，这项任务尤其具有挑战性。为了克服这些限制，最近的零样本解决方案在广泛的训练数据集上进行了训练，并对各种相机内在特性进行了编码。其他解决方案生成带有深度标签的合成数据，这些标签与新目标数据的内在特征相匹配，以实现域之间的深度尺度传输。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种替代解决方案，可以利用任何现有的合成或真实数据集，其中有少量带有地面真实深度标签注释的图像。具体来说，我们表明，自监督深度估计器会产生与整个域的绝对深度值线性相关的大规模预测，这是我们在这项工作中使用单个标量建模的属性。此外，在训练之前对齐两个数据集的视野，会导致两个域具有共同的线性关系。我们使用这个观察到的属性将深度尺度从具有绝对深度标签的源数据集转移到缺乏这些测量的新目标数据集，从而实现目标域中的绝对深度预测。所提出的方法在 KITTI、DDAD 和 nuScenes 数据集上成功进行了演示，同时使用其他现有的真实或合成源数据集，这些数据集具有不同的视场、其他图像样式或结构内容，与不使用目标地面实况深度的其他现有方法相比，实现了可比或更好的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标领域标注深度数据即可转移深度尺度的方法，通过利用已有标注数据集和自监督深度估计器实现跨领域绝对深度预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无目标领域真实深度标注时面临挑战，需依赖大量标注数据或特定传感器参数，限制了实际应用的灵活性和泛化性。
AI.method: 基于自监督深度估计器的尺度可线性映射特性，通过单标量建模预测深度与真实深度的线性关系，并通过对齐数据集视野范围建立跨领域的统一尺度转换关系。
AI.result: 在KITTI、DDAD和nuScenes数据集上验证，使用不同视野、风格或结构的源数据集进行训练，取得优于或媲美现有无目标标注方法的深度预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视野对齐和线性尺度映射实现高效跨领域深度迁移，为实际场景中缺乏标注数据的深度估计提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: Do More With What You Have: Transferring Depth-Scale from Labeled to Unlabeled Domains 利用现有资源做更多事情：将深度尺度从标记域转移到未标记域 Transferring the absolute depth prediction capabilities of an estimator to a new domain is a task with significant real-world applications. This task is specifically challenging when images from the new domain are collected without ground-truth depth measurements, and possibly with sensors of different intrinsics. To overcome such limitations, a recent zero-shot solution was trained on an extensive training dataset and encoded the various camera intrinsics. Other solutions generated synthetic data with depth labels that matched the intrinsics of the new target data to enable depth-scale transfer between the domains. In this work we present an alternative solution that can utilize any existing synthetic or real dataset, that has a small number of images annotated with ground truth depth labels. Specifically, we show that self-supervised depth estimators result in up-to-scale predictions that are linearly correlated to their absolute depth values across the domain, a property that we model in this work using a single scalar. In addition, aligning the field-of-view of two datasets prior to training, results in a common linear relationship for both domains. We use this observed property to transfer the depth-scale from source datasets that have absolute depth labels to new target datasets that lack these measurements, enabling absolute depth predictions in the target domain. The suggested method was successfully demonstrated on the KITTI, DDAD and nuScenes datasets, while using other existing real or synthetic source datasets, that have a different field-of-view, other image style or structural content, achieving comparable or better accuracy than other existing methods that do not use target ground-truth depths. 将估计器的绝对深度预测能力转移到新领域是一项具有重要现实应用的任务。当收集来自新领域的图像时没有地面实况深度测量，并且可能使用不同本征的传感器时，这项任务尤其具有挑战性。为了克服这些限制，最近的零样本解决方案在广泛的训练数据集上进行了训练，并对各种相机内在特性进行了编码。其他解决方案生成带有深度标签的合成数据，这些标签与新目标数据的内在特征相匹配，以实现域之间的深度尺度传输。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种替代解决方案，可以利用任何现有的合成或真实数据集，其中有少量带有地面真实深度标签注释的图像。具体来说，我们表明，自监督深度估计器会产生与整个域的绝对深度值线性相关的大规模预测，这是我们在这项工作中使用单个标量建模的属性。此外，在训练之前对齐两个数据集的视野，会导致两个域具有共同的线性关系。我们使用这个观察到的属性将深度尺度从具有绝对深度标签的源数据集转移到缺乏这些测量的新目标数据集，从而实现目标域中的绝对深度预测。所提出的方法在 KITTI、DDAD 和 nuScenes 数据集上成功进行了演示，同时使用其他现有的真实或合成源数据集，这些数据集具有不同的视场、其他图像样式或结构内容，与不使用目标地面实况深度的其他现有方法相比，实现了可比或更好的精度。 本文提出一种无需目标领域标注深度数据即可转移深度尺度的方法，通过利用已有标注数据集和自监督深度估计器实现跨领域绝对深度预测。 Alexandra Dana,Nadav Carmel,Amit Shomer,Ofer Manela,Tomer Peleg cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Xiaolin Wen,Kim Siang Yeo,Yong Wang,Ling Cheng,Feida Zhu,Min Zhu
title: Code Will Tell: Visual Identification of Ponzi Schemes on Ethereum
title_zh: 代码会告诉你：以太坊上庞氏骗局的视觉识别
abstract: Ethereum has become a popular blockchain with smart contracts for investors nowadays. Due to the decentralization and anonymity of Ethereum, Ponzi schemes have been easily deployed and caused significant losses to investors. However, there are still no explainable and effective methods to help investors easily identify Ponzi schemes and validate whether a smart contract is actually a Ponzi scheme. To fill the research gap, we propose PonziLens, a novel visualization approach to help investors achieve early identification of Ponzi schemes by investigating the operation codes of smart contracts. Specifically, we conduct symbolic execution of opcode and extract the control flow for investing and rewarding with critical opcode instructions. Then, an intuitive directed-graph based visualization is proposed to display the investing and rewarding flows and the crucial execution paths, enabling easy identification of Ponzi schemes on Ethereum. Two usage scenarios involving both Ponzi and non-Ponzi schemes demonstrate the effectiveness of PonziLens.
summary: Ethereum has become a popular blockchain with smart contracts for investors nowadays. Due to the decentralization and anonymity of Ethereum, Ponzi schemes have been easily deployed and caused significant losses to investors. However, there are still no explainable and effective methods to help investors easily identify Ponzi schemes and validate whether a smart contract is actually a Ponzi scheme. To fill the research gap, we propose PonziLens, a novel visualization approach to help investors achieve early identification of Ponzi schemes by investigating the operation codes of smart contracts. Specifically, we conduct symbolic execution of opcode and extract the control flow for investing and rewarding with critical opcode instructions. Then, an intuitive directed-graph based visualization is proposed to display the investing and rewarding flows and the crucial execution paths, enabling easy identification of Ponzi schemes on Ethereum. Two usage scenarios involving both Ponzi and non-Ponzi schemes demonstrate the effectiveness of PonziLens.
abstract_zh: 以太坊已成为当今投资者流行的带有智能合约的区块链。由于以太坊的去中心化和匿名性，庞氏骗局很容易被利用，给投资者造成了重大损失。然而，目前仍然没有可解释且有效的方法来帮助投资者轻松识别庞氏骗局并验证智能合约是否实际上是庞氏骗局。为了填补研究空白​​，我们提出了 PonziLens，这是一种新颖的可视化方法，可帮助投资者通过调查智能合约的操作代码来早期识别庞氏骗局。具体来说，我们对操作码进行符号执行，并使用关键操作码指令提取用于投资和奖励的控制流程。然后，提出了基于直观有向图的可视化来显示投资和奖励流程以及关键执行路径，从而可以轻松识别以太坊上的庞氏骗局。涉及庞氏骗局和非庞氏骗局的两个使用场景证明了 PonziLens 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PonziLens，一种通过分析以太坊智能合约操作码的可视化方法，帮助投资者早期识别庞氏骗局。
AI.motivation: 以太坊的去中心化和匿名性使庞氏骗局易于部署，但现有方法缺乏可解释性和有效性，导致投资者难以识别此类骗局。
AI.method: 通过符号执行操作码提取投资与奖励的控制流，构建直观的有向图可视化展示关键执行路径。
AI.result: 两种场景验证了PonziLens在识别庞氏骗局与非骗局中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PonziLens为投资者提供了早期识别以太坊庞氏骗局的可视化工具，弥补了现有研究的不足。

authors_text: Kourosh Darvish,Serena Ivaldi,Daniele Pucci
title: Simultaneous Action Recognition and Human Whole-Body Motion and Dynamics Prediction from Wearable Sensors
title_zh: 可穿戴传感器的同步动作识别以及人体全身运动和动力学预测
abstract: This paper presents a novel approach to solve simultaneously the problems of human activity recognition and whole-body motion and dynamics prediction for real-time applications. Starting from the dynamics of human motion and motor system theory, the notion of mixture of experts from deep learning has been extended to address this problem. In the proposed approach, experts are modelled as a sequence-to-sequence recurrent neural networks (RNN) architecture. Experiments show the results of 66-DoF real-world human motion prediction and action recognition during different tasks like walking and rotating. The code associated with this paper is available at: \url{github.com/ami-iit/paper_darvish_2022_humanoids_action-kindyn-predicition}
summary: This paper presents a novel approach to solve simultaneously the problems of human activity recognition and whole-body motion and dynamics prediction for real-time applications. Starting from the dynamics of human motion and motor system theory, the notion of mixture of experts from deep learning has been extended to address this problem. In the proposed approach, experts are modelled as a sequence-to-sequence recurrent neural networks (RNN) architecture. Experiments show the results of 66-DoF real-world human motion prediction and action recognition during different tasks like walking and rotating. The code associated with this paper is available at: \url{github.com/ami-iit/paper_darvish_2022_humanoids_action-kindyn-predicition}
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新方法，可以同时解决实时应用中的人体活动识别、全身运动和动态预测问题。从人体运动动力学和运动系统理论出发，深度学习专家混合的概念已被扩展来解决这个问题。在所提出的方法中，专家被建模为序列到序列递归神经网络（RNN）架构。实验展示了在步行和旋转等不同任务中 66 自由度真实人体运动预测和动作识别的结果。与本文相关的代码位于：\url{github.com/ami-iit/paper_darvish_2022_ humanoids_action-kindyn-prediction}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可穿戴传感器的新型方法，同时解决人体动作识别与全身运动动力学预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理实时动作识别与高精度运动动力学预测，需结合深度学习与运动学理论实现联合建模。
AI.method: 扩展深度学习中的专家混合框架，采用序列到序列RNN架构，结合人体运动动力学理论建模专家网络。
AI.result: 在66自由度真实场景下实现行走、旋转等任务的运动预测与动作识别，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合建模提升了实时应用中的动作识别与动力学预测精度，代码已开源共享。
